Connect it to AI assistants, no-code automation tools, or build full custom integrations. Ships with an MCP server, pre-built automation templates, a CLI, and an interactive API explorer. Available on every Buffer plan, including Free.
description_zh: Buffer的API允许您通过单一端点在11个社交平台上发布和管理内容。您可以将其连接到AI助手、无代码自动化工具，或构建完整的自定义集成。该产品附带一个MCP服务器、预构建的自动化模板、一个命令行界面（CLI）和一个交互式API资源管理器。所有Buffer计划（包括免费计划）均提供此功能。

name: Paste MCP & AI Tools
tagline: Infinite clipboard for Claude, Codex and other AI tools
tagline_zh: 适用于Claude、Codex和其他AI工具的无限剪贴板
description: Privacy-first, lightning fast, searchable, and avaialbe across all devices. Save snippets, sync securely, and boost productivity with smart shortcuts and instant paste history.
description_zh: 隐私优先，速度如闪电，可搜索，且跨所有设备可用。保存片段，安全同步，并通过智能快捷方式和即时粘贴历史记录提高生产力。

name: Exstats
tagline: Track your browser extensions and competitors in one place
tagline_zh: 一站式追踪您的浏览器扩展程序和竞争对手
description: Exstats unifies browser extension analytics and market research across Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. Track your products, competitors, reviews, rankings, keywords, and store trends in one place, with daily updates, history, exports, and alerts.
description_zh: Exstats整合了Chrome、Edge和Firefox浏览器的扩展程序分析和市场调研功能。您可以在一个地方追踪您的产品、竞争对手、评论、排名、关键词和商店趋势，并获得每日更新、历史记录、数据导出和提醒。

name: MCP Bridge by Appfactor
tagline: Connect any API to any AI agent
tagline_zh: 将任何API连接到任何AI代理
description: Point MCP Bridge at any REST, GraphQL, SOAP, or gRPC API. It auto-generates MCP tool definitions with typed schemas, auth, rate limiting, and response processing. Your LLM agents call enterprise APIs through one standard interface.
description_zh: 在任何REST、GraphQL、SOAP或gRPC API上接入MCP桥接。它能够自动生成带有类型化模式、身份验证、速率限制和响应处理的MCP工具定义。您的LLM代理通过一个标准接口调用企业API。

name: Hermes Desktop
tagline: The agent that grows with you
tagline_zh: 与你共同成长的代理
description: Hermes Desktop — the open-source agent that grows with you, now a native app for macOS, Windows, and Linux. By Nous Research.
description_zh: Hermes Desktop——这款开源代理软件，可随您一同成长，现已推出适用于macOS、Windows和Linux的原生应用。由Nous Research开发。

name: Firecrawl Research Index
tagline: An index for agents pushing the frontier of AI/ML research
tagline_zh: 推动人工智能/机器学习研究前沿的代理指标
description: AI/ML research moves fast, and the work that matters is split between new papers and the code that implements them. Most search providers omit or misrank key papers, leaving you to review sources by hand without ever being sure you've caught everything. So we built an index for it. Firecrawl's index includes all 3M+ arXiv papers, as well as GitHub artifacts from top research repos, refreshed daily so agents always stay current.
description_zh: 人工智能/机器学习（AI/ML）研究进展迅速，而真正重要的工作既包括发表新论文，也包括实现这些论文的代码。大多数搜索提供商会遗漏或错误排序关键论文，导致您不得不手动审查资源，却无法确保自己已经掌握了所有信息。因此，我们为此构建了一个索引。Firecrawl的索引涵盖了所有300多万篇arXiv论文，以及来自顶级研究存储库的GitHub工件，并且每天都会更新，以确保代理始终保持最新状态。

name: Openstatus MCP Health Checker
tagline: Test MCP servers like a real AI client, not just a ping
tagline_zh: 像真正的AI客户端一样测试MCP服务器，而不仅仅是进行ping测试
description: Most monitors just send an HTTP ping. But a 200 OK is useless if the JSON-RPC handshake fails. Our tool is different because it performs a true protocol-level check, acting exactly like a real AI client. Key features: Full Handshake: Executes the spec-defined initialize, ping, and tools/list sequence. Deep Visibility: Inspect exact JSON-RPC payloads and negotiated versions. Smart Auth: Parses RFC 9728 headers on 401s to surface exact token requirements.
description_zh: 大多数监控工具只是发送HTTP ping请求。但如果JSON-RPC握手失败，200 OK响应就毫无用处。我们的工具与众不同，因为它会执行真正的协议级检查，表现得就像一个真正的AI客户端。主要功能包括：完整握手：执行规范定义的初始化、ping和tools/list序列。深度可见性：检查确切的JSON-RPC有效负载和协商版本。智能认证：解析401状态码上的RFC 9728头，以明确显示确切的令牌要求。

name: Slideshot
tagline: Product demo videos, recorded by your AI agent
tagline_zh: 由您的AI代理录制的产品演示视频
description: Give your AI agent a product flow to record. Slideshot drives your web app through MCP, captures the walkthrough, and returns a polished demo video and GIF with zooms, cursor motion, and custom intro animation. No manual recording or editing.
description_zh: 为你的AI代理提供一个产品流程进行录制。Slideshot通过MCP驱动你的网页应用，捕捉操作流程，并返回一个经过润色的演示视频和GIF，其中包含缩放、光标移动和自定义的介绍动画。无需手动录制或编辑。

name: Bluerails Discovery
tagline: The rails AI agents use to find and pay you
tagline_zh: 铁路AI代理用于寻找并支付您的费用
description: Most "AI visibility" tools stop at telling you if AI mentions your brand. Bluerails goes further. We make you discoverable to AI agents and ready to get paid by them, on the rails we already run for marketplaces. What stands out: • Discovery: a peer-reviewed AI-visibility score from 400 samples, not a one-off guess. Free, no signup. • Agent-ready checkout + global settlement • Compliance built in Try your free Discovery report today; agent payments roll out next.
description_zh: 大多数“AI可见性”工具仅限于告知你AI是否提及了你的品牌。而Bluerails更进一步。我们使你在AI代理中可被发现，并准备好通过他们获得收益，这一切都在我们已为市场运行的轨道上实现。其独特之处在于：• 发现：基于400个样本的同行评审AI可见性评分，而非一次性猜测。免费，无需注册。• 代理就绪结账+全球结算 • 内置合规性 今天就尝试你的免费发现报告；代理支付功能即将推出。

name: Alai 2.0
tagline: AI design partner for presentations, social posts, and more
tagline_zh: 演示文稿、社交帖子等内容的AI设计合作伙伴
description: Alai captures every little detail about your brand in a design system. Use it to create presentations, social assets, ads, or any canvas size, all perfectly on-brand. Make precise edits manually or with AI. And choose your own AI models to balance cost, quality, and latency.
description_zh: Alai在设计系统中捕捉到关于您品牌的每一个细节。利用它来创建演示文稿、社交媒体素材、广告，或任何尺寸的画布，所有内容都完美地符合品牌风格。您可以手动或使用AI进行精确编辑。同时，您可以选择自己的AI模型来平衡成本、质量和延迟。

name: Agent 37
tagline: Give every customer their own Hermes or OpenClaw agent
tagline_zh: 为每位客户分配专属的Hermes或OpenClaw客服代表
description: Agent 37 is managed hosting for persistent agents like Hermes, OpenClaw and ClaudeCode. So you don't need to run them on Mac minis or VPS yourself. One API call gives each of your customers their own always-on agent, from $3.44/mo. Founders use it to ship vertical agents to their own clients without babysitting servers.
description_zh: Agent 37 是为 Hermes、OpenClaw 和 ClaudeCode 等持久代理提供托管服务的平台。因此，您无需自己在 Mac mini 或 VPS 上运行它们。只需一次 API 调用，即可为您的每位客户提供各自专属的永久在线代理，起价每月 3.44 美元。创始人使用它向自己的客户交付垂直代理，而无需照看服务器。

name: Build Club Campus
tagline: Virtual AI School: Upskill in AI and Become Great at it Fast
tagline_zh: 虚拟人工智能学校：提升人工智能技能，快速成为高手
description: Build Club Campus is a fun, gamified and community-driven virtual AI school for learning AI by building with it. Static courses get old fast in AI, so Campus helps you stay current through bite-sized courses, real projects, role-based use cases and community templates that evolve with the tools. Earn certifications in OpenAI, Claude, Copilot and more, and become great at AI fast - for work, startups or side hustles. It’s 100% free, as part of our mission to enable anyone to build with AI.
description_zh: Build Club Campus是一所充满乐趣、游戏化且由社区驱动的虚拟人工智能学校，旨在通过动手构建来学习人工智能。在人工智能领域，静态课程很快就会过时，因此Campus通过随工具发展而更新的小课程、真实项目、基于角色的用例和社区模板，帮助您保持最新状态。您可以在OpenAI、Claude、Copilot等平台获得认证，并快速掌握人工智能技能——无论是为了工作、创业还是副业。它是100%免费的，这是我们使命的一部分，即让任何人都能用人工智能进行构建。

name: AppWizzy
tagline: Rent a private VM with Codex to build production apps
tagline_zh: 使用Codex租用私有虚拟机来构建生产级应用
description: AppWizzy gives you a private VM with Codex installed where you build, run, and host production web apps by chatting with AI. Your code is yours, the workspace persists, and the app lives in the same environment where it was created. Pay only for AI usage, hosting days, and optional templates
description_zh: AppWizzy为您提供了一个安装了Codex的私有虚拟机（VM），您可以在其中通过与人工智能（AI）交互来构建、运行和托管生产Web应用程序。您的代码归您所有，工作区会持续存在，应用程序会一直运行在创建它的相同环境中。您只需为AI使用、托管天数和可选模板付费

name: Android 17
tagline: Android becomes an intelligence system
tagline_zh: 安卓成为一种智能系统
description: Android 17 brings AppFunctions, Android MCP, adaptive-first app requirements, App Bubbles, Continue On, stronger privacy controls, memory limits, performance improvements, and new media/camera APIs as Android starts shifting from an operating system into an intelligence system.
description_zh: 随着Android开始从操作系统向智能系统转变，Android 17带来了AppFunctions、Android MCP、自适应优先的应用要求、应用气泡、继续操作、更强的隐私控制、内存限制、性能改进以及新的媒体/相机API。

name: Tiny CV
tagline: Resume builder that fits on one page
tagline_zh: 一页纸大小的简历模板
description: Tiny CV turns markdown into one-page resumes that look right as PDFs and clean public links. Build from focused templates, preview on real paper, tailor versions by role, and let agents draft safely. And share it all on a clean tiny.cv url. Your agents can also use Tiny CV entirely by themselves, no human actions needed. Supports X402 and MPP out of the box.
description_zh: Tiny CV将Markdown转换为单页简历，其PDF格式和简洁的公共链接均显得十分得体。基于专注的模板构建，可在真实纸张上进行预览，根据不同职位定制版本，并让代理人安全地起草。所有内容均可通过简洁的tiny.cv网址进行分享。您的代理人也可以完全自主使用Tiny CV，无需人工干预。即开即用，支持X402和MPP。

name: Slackbot’s MCP Client
tagline: Work across 20+ apps in Slack with multiplayer collaboration
tagline_zh: 在Slack中，通过多人协作功能，可在20多个应用间进行工作
description: Slackbot’s new MCP Client ends fragmented AI work by connecting 20+ apps (Atlassian, Linear, Canva, Zoom) to one conversational interface. Ask Slackbot in plain language to act across tools—sign docs, update tickets, view dashboards—then share results in team channels for true multiplayer collaboration.
description_zh: Slackbot的新MCP客户端通过将20多个应用程序（如Atlassian、Linear、Canva、Zoom）连接到一个会话界面，结束了零散的人工智能工作。用通俗易懂的语言让Slackbot在各种工具间执行操作——签署文档、更新工单、查看仪表板——然后在团队频道中分享结果，实现真正的多人协作。

name: CakewordAI
tagline: Point at anything to learn its name in any language
tagline_zh: 指向任何东西，就能学习到它在任何语言中的名称
description: Kids point the camera at anything — a cup, a teddy bear, a guitar — and Cakeword cuts it out into a sticker, says its name in the language they're learning, and adds it to their Word Dex. 100% on-device AI. No accounts, no ads, no data collection.
description_zh: 孩子们只需将相机对准任何物品——杯子、泰迪熊、吉他——Cakeword就能将其剪切下来做成贴纸，并用他们正在学习的语言标注出物品名称，并将其添加到他们的Word Dex中。100%设备内AI处理。无账号、无广告、无数据收集。

name: Parrot Speech-to-text API
tagline: Fast, accurate STT for production-grade voice agents
tagline_zh: 为生产级语音代理提供快速、准确的STT（语音到文本）转换
description: Introducing Parrot: Ringg’s speech-to-text model for production-grade voice agents. Capture Hindi-heavy and noisy real-world conversations with low-latency inference, stronger transcript quality, and Hindi validation built for downstream workflows.
description_zh: 介绍Parrot：Ringg面向生产级语音代理的语音转文本模型。通过低延迟推理、更强的转录质量和专为下游工作流程构建的印地语验证，捕捉以印地语为主且嘈杂的真实世界对话。

name: Tabstack Structured Extraction
tagline: Extract web data into structured JSON, no scraper required.
tagline_zh: 将网页数据提取为结构化的JSON格式，无需使用爬虫。
description: Define a schema, pass a URL, get back JSON that matches. Tabstack's extract endpoint turns any web page into structured output, no parsing code and no LLM call to maintain. generate endpoint adds AI instructions for reasoned answers, not raw fields. Both enforce your schema on every call, even when the page changes. Tune speed with effort levels, target any country with geo_target. Mozilla-backed: your data is never sold or used to train models. 10,000 free credits to start.
description_zh: 定义一个模式，传入一个URL，即可获取匹配的JSON数据。Tabstack的提取端点可将任何网页转换为结构化输出，无需解析代码，也无需维护大型语言模型（LLM）调用。生成端点会添加AI指令以生成合理答案，而非原始字段。两者都会在每次调用时强制执行您的模式，即使页面发生变化。您可根据工作量调整速度，并使用geo_target定位任何国家。Mozilla支持：您的数据永远不会出售或用于训练模型。初始提供10,000个免费信用点。

name: Smmall Cloud for iOS
tagline: Simple file sharing on your iPad or iPhone
tagline_zh: 在iPad或iPhone上进行简单文件共享
description: Smmall Cloud is the focused, customizable file-sharing app you've been missing. Upload photos, videos, docs, and more from your iPhone or iPad, then share them with a clean link, a QR code, or a custom short URL. Organize files into ordered folders, collect uploads from anyone through your File Inbox, and put your own brand front and center on every share. No clutter, no enterprise tier, no sales team — just sharing done right.
description_zh: Smmall Cloud是一款专注且可定制的文件共享应用，正是你一直在寻找的。你可以从iPhone或iPad上传照片、视频、文档等，然后通过简洁的链接、二维码或自定义的短网址进行分享。你可以将文件整理到有序的文件夹中，通过文件收件箱收集来自任何人的上传文件，并在每次分享中突出展示你自己的品牌。没有杂乱无章，没有企业层级，也没有销售团队——只有正确的分享方式。

name: Edgee Fallback Models
tagline: Claude Code that never stops
tagline_zh: 克劳德，永不停止的代码
description: Your Claude Code session shouldn't die when Anthropic goes down or your plan runs out. Edgee Fallback Models keeps coding assistants running by routing to alternative models like Kimi K2.6, Gemma, GLM, or Qwen when Claude is unavailable, rate-limited, or just too expensive. Or one-click fallback to your own Bedrock, Vertex, or Azure account. Same Claude Code, different backend, zero code changes. Built for teams that can't afford to stop shipping.
description_zh: 当Anthropic宕机或您的计划耗尽时，您的Claude Code会话不应中断。Edgee Fallback Models可在Claude不可用、受到速率限制或成本过高时，通过路由至Kimi K2.6、Gemma、GLM或Qwen等替代模型，使编码助手保持运行。或者一键回退到您自己的Bedrock、Vertex或Azure账户。相同的Claude Code，不同的后端，无需更改任何代码。专为无法停止交付的团队打造。

name: Napkin Math
tagline: personalized AI food journal + nutrition coach
tagline_zh: 个性化AI饮食日记+营养指导
description: Napkin Math is the personalized AI food journal that helps people achieve their health goals. as simple as taking a photo of your food so cute you'll share it with a friend
description_zh: Napkin Math是一款个性化的AI饮食日记应用，旨在帮助人们实现健康目标。使用起来非常简单，只需拍下你吃的食物照片即可，照片效果如此可爱，你甚至会想和朋友分享

name: Agent Mode on Arena
tagline: Get real-world tasks done with autonomous AI agents
tagline_zh: 利用自主AI代理完成现实世界的任务
description: Most AI benchmarks test models in controlled environments. Agent Mode tests them on complex tasks to get more work done. Run autonomous agents that browse, research, code, use files, and complete multi-step workflows from a single prompt. Then watch each workflow unfold step by step. Every run contributes to the Agent Arena Leaderboard, ranking frontier models by real-world agentic performance.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能基准测试都是在受控环境中对模型进行测试。而Agent Mode则通过复杂任务来测试模型，以完成更多工作。运行自主代理，使其能够从单个提示中浏览、研究、编码、使用文件并完成多步骤工作流程。然后，您可以逐步观察每个工作流程的展开。每次运行都会为Agent Arena排行榜做出贡献，该排行榜根据真实世界的代理性能对前沿模型进行排名。

name: Notra Image Generation
tagline: Turn merged PRs into on-brand marketing visuals
tagline_zh: 将合并的PR（公关材料）转化为符合品牌调性的营销视觉素材
description: Notra turns shipped work into changelogs, launch posts, and social updates in your voice.
description_zh: Notra将已发货的商品以您的口吻转化为更新日志、发布帖子和社交动态。

name: API to MCP
tagline: Turn any API into an MCP server for AI agents
tagline_zh: 将任何API转换为AI代理的MCP服务器
description: API To MCP turns REST, GraphQL, SaaS, and internal business APIs into hosted MCP servers that AI agents can use in minutes. Build visually from the dashboard, or let an AI agent create, test, and deploy tools from API docs. End users can connect live MCP servers to ChatGPT, Claude, Codex, Cursor, VS Code, Antigravity, or custom agents with OAuth, secure auth, workflows, and forkable snapshots.
description_zh: API To MCP将REST、GraphQL、SaaS和内部业务API转换为托管MCP服务器，AI代理可在几分钟内使用。您可以从仪表板直观构建，或让AI代理根据API文档创建、测试和部署工具。最终用户可通过OAuth、安全认证、工作流和可分叉快照，将实时MCP服务器连接到ChatGPT、Claude、Codex、Cursor、VS Code、Antigravity或自定义代理。

name: Tamadoggo
tagline: A living journal for your pet's life, with AI insights
tagline_zh: 一本记录宠物生活的动态日志，融入人工智能的洞见
description: Most pet apps are clinical trackers. Tamadoggo is a living journal, a warm place to hold every walk, meal, vet visit and milestone. What stands out: gentle AI that never nags or diagnoses. It surfaces patterns across the timeline, gives breed and age-aware suggestions, scans a vet doc (photo or PDF) into auto-filled records, and writes a warm monthly letter. Each pet gets a "Crib", an illustrated home for their whole life. The free tier is also genuinely complete. PRO adds the AI magic.
description_zh: 大多数宠物应用程序都是临床跟踪工具。而Tamadoggo则是一本生活日志，一个温馨的地方，记录着每一次散步、每一餐、每一次兽医访问和每一个里程碑。它的独特之处在于：温和的人工智能，从不唠叨或诊断。它会在时间线上呈现模式，提供针对品种和年龄的建议，将兽医文件（照片或PDF）扫描成自动填充的记录，并撰写一封温馨的月度信件。每只宠物都会得到一个“小床”，一个用插图描绘的它们一生的家。免费版功能也相当齐全。专业版则增加了人工智能的魔力。

name: Deliveryman.ai
tagline: Cold email infrastructure on autopilot without Gsuite
tagline_zh: 无需Gsuite即可自动运行的冷邮件基础设施
description: Deliveryman.ai automates the hardest parts of cold email infrastructure mailbox setup, DNS records, warmup, email verification, sending systems, blacklist monitoring, reply management, and routing. Instead of spending weeks setting up your own cold email infrastructure and fixing deliverability issues, you can launch faster, scale confidently, and focus on what actually drives revenue. No G-suite required. Warmup, email list verification, Blacklist monitoring, etc. all included in one tool.
description_zh: Deliveryman.ai能够自动化处理冷邮件基础设施设置中的最复杂环节，包括邮箱设置、DNS记录、预热、邮件验证、发送系统、黑名单监控、回复管理以及路由选择。您无需花费数周时间自行搭建冷邮件基础设施并解决投递问题，而是可以更快地启动、自信地扩展规模，并专注于真正能带来收入的业务。无需G-suite。预热、邮件列表验证、黑名单监控等功能，均包含在一个工具中。

name: Edgee Turbo Models
tagline: Use Claude Code with Kimi K2.7 Code, MiniMax M2.7, and more
tagline_zh: 将Claude Code与Kimi K2.7 Code、MiniMax M2.7等一起使用
description: Run state-of-the-art open-source models (GLM 5.1, Kimi K2.7 Code, MiniMax M2.7, and more) in Claude Code at up to 4× the speed (up to 200 tok/s) for a flat $29/month. Set up in minutes, no code changes.
description_zh: 在Claude Code中，您能够以高达4倍的速度（最高可达200个标记/秒）运行最先进的开源模型（如GLM 5.1、Kimi K2.7 Code、MiniMax M2.7等），而每月仅需固定费用29美元。只需几分钟即可完成设置，无需更改任何代码。

name: Athenic 2.0
tagline: A faster, smarter Athenic. Analyze on autopilot.
tagline_zh: 更快、更智能的雅典娜。自动分析。
description: Athenic is an AI agent for analyzing data and automating work. Connect your data, chat in plain English, and ship dashboards, reports, and automations. Built for startups to Fortune 500.
description_zh: Athenic是一款用于分析数据和自动化工作的AI代理。连接您的数据，用简单英语聊天，并发送仪表板、报告和自动化内容。专为初创公司到财富500强企业打造。

name: Firecoach AI
tagline: AI roleplays that turn reps into top performers
tagline_zh: 人工智能角色扮演，让销售代表成为顶尖销售员
description: FireCoach.ai is the fastest way to clone your sales methodology and coach every rep on your team — at scale, without adding headcount. Build custom AI sales bots trained on your playbook, run rep roleplays, get scored feedback, and identify coaching gaps before they show up on a lost deal.
description_zh: FireCoach.ai是复制您的销售方法论并大规模指导团队中每位销售代表的最快方式，无需增加人员。您可以根据您的销售策略构建定制的AI销售机器人，进行销售代表角色扮演，获得评分反馈，并在交易失败之前发现指导中的不足。

name: Uiverse Design
tagline: De-slop your AI generated websites
tagline_zh: 去除你的人工智能生成网站的斜杠
description: You can tell when an app was vibecoded. So can your users. That generic purple gradient, the pills and badges, emojis everywhere, it all screams: "an AI made this in 20 minutes." Uiverse Design is a library of AI-first design systems you can drop into any project. Each one defines real typography, spacing, color, images and component treatment. All of them ship with a DESIGN.md instructions file, so that your agent knows exactly how to use it. You just sit back, and watch your app transform.
description_zh: 你可以分辨出某个应用是否经过了vibecoding。你的用户也能。那种通用的紫色渐变、药丸和徽章、随处可见的表情符号，都在尖叫着：“这是AI在20分钟内完成的。”Uiverse Design是一个以AI为先的设计系统库，你可以将其应用于任何项目。每个系统都定义了真实的排版、间距、颜色、图像和组件处理方式。所有系统都附带一个DESIGN.md说明文件，这样你的代理就能确切地知道如何使用它。你只需袖手旁观，看着你的应用蜕变。

name: QWERTYS by Smart Keys
tagline: My keyboard fell apart. Now it's your problem.
tagline_zh: 我的键盘坏了。现在得由你来解决了。
description: Tetris meets QWERTY. It's Tetris, except the blocks are keys and every single one has exactly one home. Drop the A on the A. The Z on the Z. You get it. Miss the spot, and that key turns into a useless gray brick that just sits there, bothering you until you explode it. This is game is sponsored by Smart Keys App. Stack them right and the keyboard lights up blue, row by row, until the whole thing is whole again. Stack them wrong long enough and the junk piles to the top and it's over.
description_zh: 俄罗斯方块遇上QWERTY键盘。这还是俄罗斯方块，只不过方块变成了按键，而且每个按键都只有一个归宿。把A放在A上，把Z放在Z上。懂了吧。如果放错位置，那个按键就会变成一块无用的灰色砖块，一直烦着你，直到你把它炸掉。这个游戏由Smart Keys App赞助。正确摆放它们，键盘就会一排排地亮起蓝色，直到整个键盘恢复原状。如果摆放错误的时间足够长，垃圾就会堆到最上面，游戏也就结束了。

name: Step 3.7 Flash
tagline: Flash-speed agents model that can see and act
tagline_zh: 能够观察并采取行动的闪电般迅速的智能体模型
description: An Apache 2.0 open-weight Flash model for real-world agents. Step 3.7 Flash combines vision, coding, search, tool use, 256K context, ~11B active params, and up to 400 TPS.
description_zh: 一个用于真实世界智能体的Apache 2.0开源轻量级Flash模型。第3.7步，Flash结合了视觉、编码、搜索、工具使用、256K上下文、约110亿个活动参数，以及高达400 TPS（每秒事务数）。

name: Kimi Work
tagline: The AI desktop for knowledge work
tagline_zh: 用于知识工作的AI桌面
description: Kimi Work is a desktop agent for knowledge work. It connects to local files, uses WebBridge for browser automation, runs scheduled tasks, coordinates agent swarms, creates PPT/Excel/Word/PDF outputs, and includes native finance data tools.
description_zh: Kimi Work是一款用于知识工作的桌面代理软件。它能够连接本地文件，利用WebBridge实现浏览器自动化，执行计划任务，协调代理群，生成PPT/Excel/Word/PDF等格式的输出文件，并内置了原生财务数据工具。

name: Agentic videos by D-ID
tagline: Interactive videos that talk back
tagline_zh: 能与人互动的视频
description: Turn any video into an interactive AI experience. With Agentic Videos, viewers don't just watch - they pause, ask questions, get real-time answers, and interact with the presenter inside the video itself. Viewers experience content in a fully personalized way. Creators gain a new world of insight into knowledge gaps and intent: a viewer who asks three questions tells you more than a thousand passive completions ever could. Now on the D-ID platform, built with industry-leading expressive avatars.
description_zh: 将任何视频转变为互动式人工智能体验。有了Agentic Videos，观众不再只是观看——他们可以暂停、提问、获得实时答案，并与视频中的演讲者进行互动。观众以完全个性化的方式体验内容。创作者对知识空白和意图有了全新的洞察：一个提出三个问题的观众所告诉你的，远超过一千个被动完成的问题所能告诉你的。现在，在D-ID平台上，我们打造了行业领先的富有表现力的虚拟形象。

name: Zoona AI
tagline: Automated support that learns from docs + past conversations
tagline_zh: 从文档和以往对话中学习的自动化支持
description: Sluggish, bloated, legacy support tools are dead. Zoona is support for modern teams — it learns from your docs and past conversations, then resolves 60%+ of tickets the second they land. No backlog. No burnout. No endless hiring to keep up. When it does need a human, it hands off with full context so the customer never repeats themselves. This is support that scales with you, not against you. Train it, go live, done.
description_zh: 迟缓、臃肿的传统支持工具已经过时。Zoona为现代团队提供支持——它从您的文档和过去的对话中学习，然后在工单刚出现时就能解决60%以上的问题。没有积压。没有倦怠。无需无休止地招聘来跟上。当它确实需要人工支持时，它会提供完整的上下文，这样客户就无需重复自己的问题。这种支持与你共同成长，而不是与你作对。训练它，上线，搞定。

name: AVTR-1 Real-Time Open Weights Model
tagline: Generating uncanny AI avatars is now open source
tagline_zh: 生成逼真AI头像，现已开源
description: The best real-time avatar model in the world is now open source with open weights. Take the model, tweak it, and use it at $0 cost. What's unique: our model listens while you speak — full-duplex; the avatar reacts in real-time, with minimal latency. • Every frame is generated, avoiding annoying animation loops from pre-rendered playback. • Full streaming infrastructure included so you can get started right away.
description_zh: 全球最佳的实时头像模型现已开源，且权重可开放。获取该模型，稍作调整，即可零成本使用。其独特之处在于：我们的模型在你说话时能够倾听——全双工；头像能够实时反应，延迟极小。• 每一帧都是生成的，避免了预渲染播放中令人不悦的动画循环。• 包含完整的流媒体基础设施，让你即刻上手。

name: VoiceOS
tagline: Say it and it's done. JARVIS for your computer
tagline_zh: 说一声，就完成了。为你的电脑安装JARVIS
description: VoiceOS is the universal voice → action for your computer. Eliminates app-hopping, maximizes focus and productivity. Speak naturally, and VoiceOS instantly executes workflows while keeping you in control with a quick confirmation step. Works system-wide on Mac and Windows.
description_zh: VoiceOS是您电脑上的通用语音→操作工具。它消除了在应用程序间跳转的麻烦，最大限度地提高了专注度和生产力。您只需自然地说话，VoiceOS就会立即执行工作流程，同时通过一个快速的确认步骤让您保持对全局的控制。该系统可在Mac和Windows上全系统运行。

name: Spectron
tagline: Agent memory you can trust
tagline_zh: 值得信赖的智能体记忆
description: Spectron is agent memory built on one ACID substrate. Graph, vectors, documents, and structured rows commit in one transaction. Every fact carries provenance. Corrections supersede, never overwrite. Hybrid retrieval fuses vectors, graph, BM25, and keywords. Traces feed back into ranking. Tri-temporal facts, multi-tenant scopes, and MCP support. No stitched stores. No sync pipelines.
description_zh: Spectron是基于ACID底层构建的代理内存。图、向量、文档和结构化行在一个事务中提交。每个事实都带有来源信息。更正操作会替换原有内容，而不会覆盖。混合检索融合了向量、图、BM25和关键字。跟踪信息会反馈到排名中。支持三时态事实、多租户范围和MCP。无拼接存储。无同步管道。

name: Viktor for Microsoft Teams
tagline: The most powerful AI employee, now in Microsoft Teams
tagline_zh: 最强大的AI员工，现已入驻Microsoft Teams
description: An autonomous AI employee that lives in Microsoft Teams and does real work across 3,000+ tools: reports, reconciliations, approvals, recurring ops. Not a copilot that drafts and waits. It ships. Live today, $100 in credits, no card.
description_zh: 一个自主的人工智能员工，它生活在微软团队中，使用3000多种工具执行实际工作：报告、对账、审批、日常运营。它不是只会起草和等待的副驾驶。它能够立即投入使用，即刻生效，赠送100美元信用额度，无需信用卡。

name: Marqly 5.0
tagline: Your AI-powered bookmark manager
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能书签管理器
description: Marqly is an AI-powered bookmark manager that automatically organizes your saved links using intelligent tagging, categorization, and semantic search. Save articles, videos, docs, and websites from any device, then find them instantly using natural language instead of folders and manual sorting. With AI summaries, reader mode, cross-platform sync, offline access, and smart organization, Marqly helps you build a searchable knowledge library without the maintenance.
description_zh: Marqly是一款基于人工智能的书签管理器，通过智能标签、分类和语义搜索，自动整理您保存的链接。您可以从任何设备保存文章、视频、文档和网站，然后使用自然语言而非文件夹和手动排序，即可立即找到它们。Marqly提供人工智能摘要、阅读模式、跨平台同步、离线访问和智能整理功能，助您轻松构建一个可搜索的知识库，无需繁琐的维护。

name: Nemotron 3 Ultra by NVIDIA
tagline: Powers faster, efficient reasoning for long-running agents
tagline_zh: 为长时间运行的代理提供更快、更高效的推理能力
description: A 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents. It delivers 5x faster inference and lowers the cost of complex agentic tasks by up to 30% versus other open frontier models.Ultra excels at complex tasks like coding and deep research. Long-running agents spend their time planning, using tools, recovering from failures, and deciding what to do next.
description_zh: 这是一个专为长时间运行的智能体构建的550B MoE前沿智能开放模型。与其他开放前沿模型相比，它提供了5倍的推理速度，并将复杂智能体任务的成本降低了多达30%。Ultra在编码和深度研究等复杂任务方面表现出色。长时间运行的智能体会将时间花在规划、使用工具、从故障中恢复以及决定下一步行动上。

name: Re_gent
tagline: Version Control for AI agent Activity
tagline_zh: AI代理活动的版本控制
description: Git for your AI agent’s actions. Undo, trace, and control every step. re_gent shows what your coding agent changed, which prompt caused it, and lets you roll back agent work across files and sessions.
description_zh: Git 用于跟踪 AI 代理的行动。撤销、追踪和控制每一步操作。re_gent 显示您的编码代理所做的更改，以及触发这些更改的提示，并允许您跨文件和会话回滚代理工作。

name: Auto Posts
tagline: Schedule social post, Telegram messages + more
tagline_zh: 安排社交帖子、Telegram消息等
description: Stop wasting your time manually posting on every social platform. Plan your content and schedule posts across all platforms from one simple dashboard. Focus on building your business, not your content calendar. AutoPost helps you schedule smarter, post automatically, and reclaim your time. Because your business needs you, your socials don’t.
description_zh: 别再浪费时间在每个社交平台上手动发帖了。只需一个简单的控制面板，你就能规划好内容并在所有平台上安排好发帖时间。专注于发展你的业务，而不是制作内容日历。AutoPost助你更智能地安排发帖，实现自动发布，从而节省你的时间。因为你的业务需要你，而你的社交媒体账号并不需要。

name: Pi Coding Agent
tagline: The coding-agent harness you can make your own
tagline_zh: 你可以自己制作编码代理线束
description: Pi is a minimal terminal coding harness. Adapt Pi to your workflows, not the other way around. Customize Pi with extensions, skills, prompt templates, and themes. Bundle them as Pi packages and share via npm or git. Pi ships with powerful defaults but skips features like sub-agents and plan mode. Ask Pi to build what you want, or install a package that does it your way.
description_zh: Pi是一个最小的终端编码工具。让Pi适应你的工作流程，而不是让你的工作流程适应Pi。通过扩展、技能、提示模板和主题来定制Pi。将它们打包成Pi包，并通过npm或git进行共享。Pi附带强大的默认设置，但跳过了子代理和计划模式等功能。让Pi构建你想要的东西，或者安装一个按照你的方式构建的包。

name: Octolane
tagline: Self-driving AI CRM that you can talk to
tagline_zh: 可以对话的自动驾驶式人工智能客户关系管理（CRM）系统
description: Octolane is chat-first Self-driving AI CRM: say "follow up with David" or "show me stuck deals" and it does the thing. self-driving underneath. reads your gmail and calendar, auto-detects deals, drafts follow-ups, updates fields. What's new: slash-command chat, meeting recorder, visitor signal, kanban pipeline, MCP server with ~60 tools.
description_zh: Octolane是一款以聊天为主的自动驾驶人工智能客户关系管理（CRM）系统：只需说“跟进一下David”或“给我看看未完成的交易”，它就会自动执行相应操作。其底层为自动驾驶技术。它会读取你的Gmail邮件和日历，自动检测交易，起草跟进邮件，并更新相关字段。新功能包括：斜杠指令聊天、会议记录器、访客信号、看板流程以及配备约60种工具的MCP服务器。

name: Cloudback for Linear
tagline: Automated backup and restore for Linear workspaces
tagline_zh: 线性工作区的自动备份与恢复
description: Cloudback runs automated, snapshot-based backups for Linear workspaces, GitHub, GitLab, and Azure DevOps. Linear capture covers 23 data categories: issues, projects, cycles, documents, comments, attachments, embedded files, and the workspace structure itself. Restore in dependency order from any backup, into a new target workspace. AES-256 with optional customer-managed keys (RSA Lockbox). SOC 2 Type II compliant. 1.7k+ customers, 14k+ repositories, 4M+ backups.
description_zh: Cloudback为Linear工作区、GitHub、GitLab和Azure DevOps提供基于快照的自动化备份。Linear捕获涵盖23个数据类别：问题、项目、周期、文档、评论、附件、嵌入式文件以及工作区结构本身。可按依赖关系顺序从任何备份中恢复到新的目标工作区。使用AES-256加密，并提供可选的客户管理密钥（RSA Lockbox）。符合SOC 2 Type II标准。拥有1.7万+客户、1.4万+存储库和400万+备份。

name: Angel Match 4.0
tagline: A database of 125K+ angels and VCs to raise your seed round
tagline_zh: 一个包含12.5万+天使投资人和风险投资人的数据库，助你筹集种子轮资金
description: Angel Match connects you with 125,000+ angel investors and venture capitalists in one platform so you save time on the grueling process of searching for investors.
description_zh: 天使匹配（Angel Match）将125,000多名天使投资者和风险投资家汇聚于一个平台，让您无需在寻找投资者的繁琐过程中浪费时间。

name: Integuru
tagline: Generate fast, reliable APIs for any platform. No browsers
tagline_zh: 为任何平台生成快速、可靠的API。无需浏览器
description: Integuru generates fast, reliable APIs for any platform, without browsers or RPA. API calls complete in ~3 seconds with 99.9%+ success. Most agents today use browser automation to control web apps that lack official APIs, but this is slow and brittle. Integuru replaces browsers entirely and connects directly with the backend. Integuru covers authentication and edge cases. Integrations get auto-healing, API docs, and a 24/7 on-call maintenance team. Each API is generated end-to-end in minutes.
description_zh: Integuru为任何平台生成快速、可靠的API，无需浏览器或RPA。API调用约3秒内完成，成功率高达99.9%以上。如今，大多数代理使用浏览器自动化来控制缺乏官方API的Web应用程序，但这种方法既缓慢又脆弱。Integuru完全取代了浏览器，直接与后端连接。Integuru涵盖身份验证和边缘情况。集成具有自动修复功能、API文档和24/7随叫随到的维护团队。每个API都在几分钟内端到端生成。

name: Dopami
tagline: Household chores without the mental load for ADHD
tagline_zh: 无需脑力负担的家务活，适合多动症患者
description: Dopami helps ADHD families, adults, and roommates handle household chores without mental load by suggesting small missions based on room, time, energy, and shared home context.
description_zh: Dopami通过根据房间、时间、精力和共享的家庭背景提出小任务，帮助多动症家庭、成年人和室友在无心理负担的情况下处理家务。

name: moop
tagline: A social network without media
tagline_zh: 一个无媒体社交网络
description: Social media without media. Moop is a social network designed to spark inspiration and combat brainrotting. List the things you're into — places, books, ideas, the small moments worth saving.
description_zh: 无媒体社交。Moop是一个社交网络平台，旨在激发灵感，对抗脑力衰退。列出你感兴趣的事物——地点、书籍、想法，以及值得珍藏的细微时刻。

name: Mellum by JetBrains
tagline: Fast LLMs for low-latency and high-performance workflows
tagline_zh: 适用于低延迟和高性能工作流的快速大型语言模型（LLMs）
description: Meet Mellum, a family of fast language models, including a next-generation model for ultra-low-latency and high-performance inference.
description_zh: 来认识一下Mellum，这是一个快速语言模型系列，其中包括一款用于超低延迟和高性能推理的新一代模型。

name: Linear Diffs
tagline: A new way to review PRs, directly inside Linear
tagline_zh: 一种直接在Linear内部审阅PR的新方法
description: Introducing Linear Diffs to make reviewing code a fast and fluid experience native to Linear. You can now review diffs from any issue with a PR, iterate on further changes with agents, and ship code from Linear. All reviews in Linear sync back to GitHub, so the current state of review work is always clear. Linear Diffs is available now on all plans.
description_zh: 引入线性差异，让代码审查成为Linear原生的一种快速流畅的体验。现在，您可以通过拉取请求（PR）审查任何问题中的差异，与代理一起迭代进一步的更改，并从Linear发布代码。Linear中的所有审查都会同步回GitHub，因此审查工作的当前状态始终清晰明了。线性差异现已在所有计划中可用。

name: readywhen
tagline: Your 24/7 AI Chief of Staff for commitments and follow-ups
tagline_zh: 您的全天候AI助手，负责承诺事项和后续跟进
description: Your team’s work lives in project management tools and CRMs. Your exec work is scattered. readywhen catches every decision and commitment across Slack, email, meetings, and docs. Without being asked, it drafts what’s needed next: the brief, the email response, the update. You just approve. It's like having your own Chief of Staff, 24/7.
description_zh: 你的团队工作依赖于项目管理工具和客户关系管理系统。你的高管工作则分散在各个地方。readywhen会捕捉Slack、电子邮件、会议和文档中的每一个决策和承诺。无需询问，它就会自动起草下一步所需的内容：简报、电子邮件回复、更新。你只需批准即可。这就像拥有一个全天候的私人幕僚长。

name: HAQQ Legal AI on Mobile
tagline: Bringing legal understanding to anyone with a phone
tagline_zh: 让每个拥有手机的人都能了解法律知识
description: We built HAQQ because understanding legal situations shouldn’t depend on who you know or whether you can afford to “just ask a lawyer.” Today, HAQQ Legal AI is available on mobile. Upload a contract. Ask a legal question. Get structured, jurisdiction-aware legal work with risk flags and exportable outputs. Not generic chat. Legal reasoning powered by Justinian®. Know exactly where you stand, wherever you are.
description_zh: 我们打造了HAQQ，因为了解法律情况不应取决于你认识谁，或者你是否负担得起“直接咨询律师”的费用。如今，HAQQ法律人工智能已可在移动设备上使用。上传合同，提出法律问题，即可获得结构化、具有管辖权意识的法律服务，包括风险提示和可导出的输出结果。这并非普通的聊天功能。法律推理由Justinian®提供支持。无论身处何地，你都能准确了解自己的处境。

name: Runway Agent
tagline: Generate edited, sound-designed videos via chat
tagline_zh: 通过聊天生成经过编辑和音效设计的视频
description: Runway Agent is a conversational AI that takes a brief and outputs finished, sound-designed, edited videos for ads, shorts, and social content. Available in the Runway web app.
description_zh: Runway Agent是一款会话式人工智能工具，可接收简短指令并输出经过声音设计和编辑的完整视频，适用于广告、短视频和社交内容。该工具可在Runway网络应用程序中使用。

name: Tabstack Web Research
tagline: Run a research agent with cited answers in a single API call
tagline_zh: 通过单个API调用，运行一个带有引用答案的研究代理
description: /research gives your app or agent cited answers from the live web in one API call. Not a pre-indexed corpus: the actual live web. Every request comes back with source URL's users can verify. Source selection, synthesis, and citation formatting are all inside the call. You write or maintain none of that code. Built for legal, financial, and competitive intel, where a wrong answer is a liability. Free to try.
description_zh: /research 只需一次 API 调用，即可为您的应用程序或代理提供来自实时网络的引用答案。不是预先索引的语料库：而是真正的实时网络。每个请求都会返回用户可以验证的源网址。源选择、合成和引用格式化都在调用中完成。您无需编写或维护任何代码。专为法律、金融和竞争情报而设计，在这些领域，错误的答案会带来法律责任。免费试用。

name: Robinhood Agentic Trading
tagline: Let your agent trade
tagline_zh: 让你的代理人进行交易
description: Customers can connect their own AI agents to Robinhood to help manage and automate trading and credit card purchases, with built-in safety controls and a real-time activity feed. Trade in a dedicated agentic account to stay in control of every trade your agent makes.
description_zh: 客户可以将自己的AI代理连接到Robinhood，以帮助管理和自动化交易和信用卡购买，同时享受内置的安全控制和实时活动推送。在专门的代理账户中进行交易，以便随时掌控代理进行的每一笔交易。

name: Cotypist
tagline: Local AI Autocomplete in your voice, anywhere on your Mac
tagline_zh: 在Mac上的任何位置，通过语音实现本地AI自动补全
description: Cotypist is smart autocomplete for the Mac apps you already write in: Mail, Slack, Notes, docs, even AI prompts. Press Tab when a suggestion fits, or keep typing and watch it update in real time. Runs locally on your Mac. No cloud, no API calls.
description_zh: Cotypist是一款智能自动补全工具，适用于您已在使用的Mac应用：Mail、Slack、Notes、docs，甚至AI提示。当建议符合时，按下Tab键，或继续输入并实时查看更新。它可在您的Mac上本地运行，无需云服务，也无需API调用。

name: Mojito
tagline: Type to search for any emoji, symbol, or gif in seconds
tagline_zh: 输入即可在几秒钟内搜索到任何表情符号、符号或GIF图片
description: Autocomplete :emoji: everywhere on macOS. Type a colon and search any emoji, symbol, or shortcode in seconds — in TextEdit, iMessage, Terminal, anywhere. Slack and a few other apps have this — type :heart: and you get ❤️. It makes finding emoji easy. I wanted it everywhere on my Mac, so I built Mojito. It works just like you'd expect, and it's smart enough to ignore apps and sites that already support it. And it's free, open-source donationware.
description_zh: macOS 上随处可见自动补全 :emoji: 功能。只需输入一个冒号，即可在几秒钟内搜索到任何表情符号、符号或简码——无论是在 TextEdit、iMessage、Terminal 还是其他任何地方。Slack 和其他一些应用程序也有此功能——输入 :heart:，即可得到 ❤️。这让查找表情符号变得轻而易举。我希望我的 Mac 上到处都有这个功能，于是便开发了 Mojito。它的工作方式正如你所期望的那样，而且它足够智能，能够忽略已经支持该功能的应用程序和网站。此外，它还是一款免费、开源的捐赠软件。

name: Memori
tagline: Persistent memory from agent trace, not just conversation
tagline_zh: 来自代理追踪的持久记忆，而不仅仅是对话
description: Memori launched its new agent-native memory infrastructure, enabling agents to create structured, long-term memory directly from agent trace — including execution paths, tool results, workflow steps, outcomes, and decision-making logic. This allows memory to also be generated from what an agent actually does. Benchmark results: 81.95% accuracy on LoCoMo using only 1,294 tokens per query, roughly 5% of full-context cost, saving users 95%+ on inference spend. 15K GitHub stars, 200000+ downloads
description_zh: Memori推出了全新的代理原生内存基础设施，使代理能够直接从代理追踪中创建结构化的长期内存，包括执行路径、工具结果、工作流步骤、结果和决策逻辑。这使得内存也能根据代理的实际行为生成。基准测试结果：在LoCoMo上，每个查询仅使用1294个标记，准确率达到81.95%，大约是全上下文成本的5%，为用户节省了95%以上的推理支出。GitHub上获得15K颗星，下载量超过20万次

name: Monako Glass
tagline: Run AI coding agents hands-free from a heads-up display
tagline_zh: 通过抬头显示，无需手动操作即可运行AI编码代理
description: Monako Glass is a 48g wearable running Buildroot Linux with a waveguide display, bone conduction mic, and gesture input. Lets developers run Claude Code, Codex, or any coding agent hands-free from glasses. Reservation-only, ships July-August 2026.
description_zh: Monako Glass是一款48克的可穿戴跑步设备，搭载Buildroot Linux操作系统，配备波导显示屏、骨传导麦克风和手势输入功能。开发者可以通过眼镜免提运行Claude Code、Codex或任何编码代理。该产品仅接受预订，预计于2026年7月至8月发货。

name: Bulkmark
tagline: Transform your Twitter/X Bookmarks into real knowledge
tagline_zh: 将你的Twitter/X书签转化为真正的知识
description: Stop losing saved tweets. Bulkmark organizes your X bookmarks with AI, builds shareable lists, and delivers a weekly email digest.
description_zh: 别再丢失已保存的推文了。Bulkmark通过人工智能整理您的X书签，构建可分享的列表，并每周发送电子邮件摘要。

name: Trippple Club
tagline: Advertise together on Meta Ads and pay 3x less
tagline_zh: 在Meta Ads上一起投放广告，费用减少3倍
description: Trippple Club is the first Meta ads collective for small businesses. You pool your budget with non-competing peers who share your audience. The algorithm treats the group like one large advertiser. Everyone gets better delivery, faster learning, and lower costs - and it compounds as the collective grows, besides, we create your ads too!
description_zh: Trippple Club是首个面向小企业的Meta广告集合平台。您可以将预算与共享相同受众的非竞争同行共享。算法将该群体视为一个大型广告主。每个人都能获得更好的投放效果、更快的学习速度和更低的成本——而且，随着集合规模的扩大，这些优势会进一步增强。此外，我们还会为您创建广告！

name: Juno
tagline: Free, local AI powered Voice to Text w/ live transcriptions
tagline_zh: 免费、本地化、基于人工智能的语音转文字服务，提供实时转录
description: Juno is a local, open-source voice writing app for Mac. It is the only voice dictation tool with live transcriptions. Speak naturally in Mail, Slack, Notes, Cursor, or the app you’re already using; Juno writes clean text, rewrites selected passages, uses snippets, and creates Notes, Reminders, and Alarms. No login, runs offline and free forever.
description_zh: Juno是一款适用于Mac的本地开源语音写作应用。它是唯一一款具备实时转录功能的语音听写工具。您可以在Mail、Slack、Notes、Cursor或您正在使用的任何应用中自然地说话；Juno会写出整洁的文本，重写选定的段落，使用片段，并创建笔记、提醒和闹钟。无需登录，可离线运行，且永久免费。

name: Manus Scheduled Tasks 2.0
tagline: Run recurring Manus work inside the same task context
tagline_zh: 在同一任务上下文中运行重复的Manus工作
description: Manus now runs scheduled tasks inside the same task context, reuses Project setups, and adds recurring actions to Manus-built web apps. For knowledge workers and teams automating repeatable workflows in Manus.
description_zh: Manus现在可以在同一任务上下文中运行计划任务，重用Project设置，并向Manus构建的Web应用程序中添加重复操作。面向知识工作者和团队，在Manus中实现可重复工作流程的自动化。

name: Willow Scribe
tagline: Tell Scribe what to say. It writes the rest.
tagline_zh: 告诉抄写员该说什么。其余的部分由它来写。
description: Willow Scribe lets you speak the gist of what you want to say and writes the full message for you in your own voice. You talk the way you actually think and a finished message comes out the other side, ready to send. It works inside the apps where you already write the most like email, Slack, iMessage, and Google Docs. You can also highlight any text on your screen, tell Willow how to change it, and the selection gets rewritten in place. The more you use it, the more it sounds like you.
description_zh: Willow Scribe让你只需说出你想说的要点，它就会用你自己的声音为你写下完整的信息。你按照自己的想法说话，一条完整的消息就会自动生成，随时可以发送。它可以在你经常使用的应用程序中工作，如电子邮件、Slack、iMessage和谷歌文档。你还可以在屏幕上高亮显示任何文本，告诉Willow如何修改，所选内容就会自动重写。你使用得越多，它听起来就越像你。

name: GitHits beta 0.9
tagline: Give your AI coding agent access to open-source code
tagline_zh: 授予你的AI编码代理访问开源代码的权限
description: GitHits gives coding agents access to the open-source code your app depends on. Get real implementation examples, dependency source navigation, package inspection and documentation. Agents can grep and read your codebase. They can't grep and read the open-source code your app depends on. That's where they start guessing, retrying, and looping. GitHits builds a version-aware index on demand. Agents can search, navigate, and inspect the code behind their dependencies. CLI: npx githits@latest init
description_zh: GitHits 让编码代理能够访问您的应用程序所依赖的开源代码。获取真实的实现示例、依赖源导航、包检查和文档。代理可以搜索和读取您的代码库。但他们无法搜索和读取您的应用程序所依赖的开源代码。这就是他们开始猜测、重试和循环的地方。GitHits 根据需要构建一个版本感知索引。代理可以搜索、导航和检查其依赖项背后的代码。命令行界面：npx githits@latest init

name: Sigma File Manager
tagline: Free, open-source, cross-platform, modern file manager app
tagline_zh: 免费、开源、跨平台、现代化的文件管理器应用
description: "Sigma File Manager" is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux (Mac is supported but the build is not provided yet, can be built from source). - aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
description_zh: “Sigma File Manager”是一款适用于Windows和Linux的免费、开源、快速发展的现代文件管理器（资源管理器/浏览器）应用程序（支持Mac，但尚未提供构建版本，可以从源代码构建）。- aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager

name: Uselink
tagline: host your html, share the link, and get comments
tagline_zh: 托管你的HTML，分享链接，并获取评论
description: uselink turns any HTML or Markdown into a clean link you control. paste a doc, get a url under your handle, decide who can read and who can comment. readers reply in threads with no account, which Google Docs and Notion can't do. interactive HTML actually runs. add a password, an expiry, or a view limit, and keep every version. new this launch: a visual editor to edit live pages with no code, and an MCP server so Claude, Cursor, or n8n can publish for you.
description_zh: uselink可将任何HTML或Markdown转换为可由您控制的干净链接。粘贴文档，即可获得一个以您为句柄的URL，并可决定谁可以阅读以及谁可以评论。读者可以在没有账户的情况下在帖子中回复，这是Google Docs和Notion无法做到的。交互式HTML实际上可以运行。您可以添加密码、有效期或查看限制，并保留每个版本。此次发布的新功能包括：一个可视化编辑器，用于编辑无需代码的实时页面，以及一个MCP服务器，以便Claude、Cursor或n8n为您发布内容。

name: frontpage.sh
tagline: A perpetual auction for eight ad squares
tagline_zh: 八个广告位的持续拍卖
description: A perpetual auction for eight ad squares. Pay a multiple of the last price to take one; when someone outbids you, you leave with up to 1.5× what you paid. 80% of every flip funds a pool that buys the page more attention. Agents do the buying — two HTTP calls, USDC on Tempo, no accounts.
description_zh: 八个广告位进行持续拍卖。支付上一价格的倍数即可购买一个；若有人出价高于你，你将获得最多1.5倍于你所支付金额的退款。每次竞拍所得的80%将进入一个资金池，用于为该页面吸引更多关注。代理商负责购买——只需两个HTTP调用，在Tempo上使用USDC支付，无需账户。

name: Mistral Vibe
tagline: I agent for long-running, multi-step work and coding
tagline_zh: 我是一名代理，负责长期运行、多步骤工作和编码
description: The unified agent for long-horizon productivity and coding, launching with Work and Code modes. Plus, a new Vibe VS Code extension.
description_zh: 这款集生产力和编码功能于一体的统一代理，推出了“工作”和“编码”两种模式。此外，还推出了全新的Vibe VS Code扩展插件。

name: BooBar
tagline: AI Dynamic Island for your Mac
tagline_zh: 适用于Mac的AI动态岛
description: BooBar is a local-first AI Dynamic Island for Mac that brings file organization, download progress, email codes, browser context, GitHub panels, and Codex/Claude tasks into one calm menu bar workspace.
description_zh: BooBar是一款专为Mac打造的本地优先型AI动态岛，它将文件整理、下载进度、电子邮件代码、浏览器上下文、GitHub面板以及Codex/Claude任务整合到一个简洁的菜单栏工作区中。

name: Prosed
tagline: Go from newsletters & podcasts to published manuscript
tagline_zh: 从新闻通讯和播客到出版手稿
description: You've spent years creating—newsletters, podcasts, LinkedIn posts, courses. The book is in there. You just haven't had time to assemble it. Prosed's Inkwell pipeline analyzes your voice, structures your scattered content into chapters, and produces a manuscript that actually sounds like you. Not generic AI writing or slop. Your words, your ideas, assembled into something real. Built-in editorial review. Print-ready PDF/DOCX export. Beta: $47 for the first 100 founders.
description_zh: 你花费多年时间创作——撰写新闻稿、播客、LinkedIn帖子、课程。书稿就在那里。你只是没有时间整理。Prosed的Inkwell平台会分析你的声音，将你零散的内容组织成章节，并生成听起来真正像你风格的手稿。不是千篇一律的AI写作或劣质作品。你的文字，你的想法，被整理成真实的内容。内置编辑审核功能。可打印的PDF/DOCX导出格式。测试版：前100名创始人只需47美元。

name: Viberia
tagline: Command AI agents like you're playing Civilization
tagline_zh: 像玩《文明》游戏一样指挥人工智能代理
description: Do you like your Claude/Codex pet but wish you had a zoo? Viberia is a spatial command center for your AI agents. Your whole AI org lives on an isometric map, status icons show who’s blocked, who’s asking, who’s done. Zoom in to chat with anyone, pick any model, bring your own keys. Agents collaborate, build their own little teams, and pick up new skills as they go. Docs, terminals, browsers built in.
description_zh: 你喜欢你的克劳德/科迪克斯宠物，但希望自己能拥有一个动物园吗？Viberia是你的AI代理人的空间指挥中心。你的整个AI组织都生活在一个等距地图上，状态图标显示谁被阻止、谁在询问、谁已完成。放大地图即可与任何人聊天，选择任何模型，带上你自己的钥匙。代理人可以协作，建立自己的小团队，并在过程中学习新技能。内置文档、终端和浏览器。

name: Supercut for Agents
tagline: Permission-aware AI access to recordings and metadata
tagline_zh: 具备权限感知的人工智能对录音和元数据的访问
description: The Supercut MCP gives your AI/coding assistants permission-aware access to recordings, including semantic search, transcripts, frames, comments, reactions, and more.
description_zh: Supercut MCP赋予您的AI/编码助手对录音的权限感知访问权限，包括语义搜索、转录文本、帧、评论、反应等更多功能。

name: Unreal Engine 5.8
tagline: Build unreal games with AI agents
tagline_zh: 使用AI智能体构建虚幻游戏
description: Unreal Engine 5.8 is the final major milestone of the UE5 lifecycle. It introduces experimental 3D Mesh Terrain to replace traditional heightfields, production-ready MegaLights for current-gen consoles, and a native MCP plugin for AI agent automation.
description_zh: 虚幻引擎5.8是UE5生命周期中的最后一个重要里程碑。它引入了实验性的3D网格地形以取代传统的高度场，为当前世代的游戏机提供了可用于生产的MegaLights，并为AI代理自动化提供了一个原生MCP插件。

name: Latitude
tagline: Fix what's breaking in your AI agent
tagline_zh: 修复你的人工智能代理中的故障
description: Open-source AI agent monitoring platform. Latitude automatically detects all the ways your agents fail at scale, and gives your coding agent the tools to fix it.
description_zh: 开源人工智能代理监控平台。Latitude能自动检测出你的代理在规模上可能出现的所有故障，并为你的编码代理提供修复工具。

name: DynamicNotch
tagline: Dynamic island for macOS
tagline_zh: macOS的动态岛
description: The difference between this project and others is that it is built on its own engine, and not taken from other ready-made repositories. It completely copies the logic, animations, and behavior of a real Dynamic Island on an iPhone, unlike other projects. The main goal is to make the project as native as possible, both in terms of design and interaction.
description_zh: 这个项目与其他项目的不同之处在于，它是基于自己的引擎构建的，而不是从其他现成的资源库中获取的。与其他项目不同，它完全复制了iPhone上真实动态岛的逻辑、动画和行为。主要目标是在设计和交互方面，使该项目尽可能地接近原生应用。

name: Nodey
tagline: Your n8n command center, now on your phone
tagline_zh: 您的n8n指挥中心，现已入驻您的手机
description: Nodey is a mobile companion for n8n. Monitor your workflows in real time, diagnose failed executions with AI, build workflows from a prompt, and trigger automations with NFC tags or geofenced locations — all from your phone.
description_zh: Nodey是n8n的移动伴侣。您可以通过手机实时监控工作流程，利用人工智能诊断执行失败的情况，根据提示构建工作流程，以及使用NFC标签或地理围栏位置触发自动化操作。

name: just f***ing send it
tagline: Send any file, any size, straight from browser to browser
tagline_zh: 直接从浏览器向浏览器发送任何大小的文件
description: Drop a file, get a short code, share it. The file streams straight from your browser to theirs over an encrypted WebRTC connection — no upload, no server, no account, nothing stored. Multi-GB files and whole folders work, and if the connection drops it can resume.
description_zh: 上传文件，获取简短代码，分享出去。文件会通过加密的WebRTC连接直接从你的浏览器传输到他们的浏览器——无需上传，无需服务器，无需账户，无任何存储。数GB的文件和整个文件夹都能传输，如果连接中断，还可以恢复。

name: Retina
tagline: Screen recorder w/ auto-zoom, smooth cursors, + AI graphics
tagline_zh: 带自动缩放功能的屏幕录制器，光标平滑，+ AI图形
description: Retina is a Mac screen recorder built for polished demos. Auto-zoom into the action. Cursor paths cleaned into smooth arcs. 4K export, optimized file sizes. Recordings look cinematic out of the box — no post-production needed. Built for product demos, tutorials, and feature walkthroughs that need to look professional without hours in editing. Currently in beta. Free. No watermark. Made by BlendPixel.
description_zh: Retina是一款专为制作精美演示而打造的Mac屏幕录制软件。它能自动放大动作场景，将光标路径整理成流畅的弧线。支持4K导出，且文件大小经过优化。录制内容开箱即用，无需后期制作，即可呈现电影级效果。专为产品演示、教程和功能演示而设计，无需花费数小时编辑，即可呈现专业效果。目前处于测试阶段。免费。无水印。由BlendPixel制作。

name: SlimSnap
tagline: Your AI doesn't know which button you mean
tagline_zh: 你的人工智能不知道你指的是哪个按钮
description: The AI reads your screenshot as a pixel blob and guesses which button you meant. SlimSnap converts the screenshot plus your annotation into structured JSON: every element has coordinates, an ID, and your arrow points at a specific one. Around 700 tokens vs 1,568 raw on Sonnet. Free Mac app. Schema and Claude Code skill are open MIT. Runs entirely on-device.
description_zh: 人工智能将你的截图视为像素块，并猜测你指的是哪个按钮。SlimSnap将截图和你的标注转换为结构化的JSON格式：每个元素都有坐标、一个ID，并且你的箭头指向特定的一个元素。大约700个标记，而Sonnet上的原始标记为1568个。免费Mac应用程序。模式和Claude Code技能均采用开源MIT许可。完全在设备上运行。

name: pumaDB
tagline: a small hosted memory layer for AI agents
tagline_zh: 一个用于人工智能代理的小型托管内存层
description: Most AI agent workflows lose useful context between sessions, tools, and chats. The usual fixes are either too manual, like copying notes into docs, or too heavy, like setting up a database, vector store, or custom RAG stack. pumaDB gives agents a simple shared place to save and reuse notes, facts, preferences, project context, transcripts, task state, and other useful memory. No database setup, vector DB, or infrastructure to manage
description_zh: 大多数人工智能代理的工作流程会在会话、工具和聊天之间丢失有用的上下文。通常的修复方法要么过于手动，比如将笔记复制到文档中，要么过于繁琐，比如设置数据库、向量存储或自定义RAG堆栈。pumaDB为代理提供了一个简单的共享空间，用于保存和重用笔记、事实、偏好、项目上下文、脚本、任务状态和其他有用的记忆。无需设置数据库、向量数据库或管理基础设施

name: Vivaldi 8.0
tagline: New unified look for full customization
tagline_zh: 全新统一外观，可全面定制
description: Thirteen years in, and we've just shipped our most ambitious update yet. Vivaldi 8.0 has a bold new look we call Unified. Every toolbar now sits on one continuous surface, giving you new ways to customize your browser across the whole window, edge to edge. With six layouts to start from - then make it all yours. Every color, every toolbar, every pixel. Your browser. Your rules.
description_zh: 十三年来，我们刚刚发布了迄今为止最具雄心的更新版本。Vivaldi 8.0采用了我们称之为“统一”的全新设计风格。现在，每个工具栏都位于一个连续的界面上，让您能够以全新的方式在整个窗口内，从边缘到边缘自定义您的浏览器。您可以从六种布局开始，然后将其全部个性化。每一个颜色、每一个工具栏、每一个像素，都是您的选择。您的浏览器，由您做主。

name: Nugget AI
tagline: Turn customer interviews into your product roadmap
tagline_zh: 将客户访谈转化为产品路线图
description: Nugget AI turns customer interviews into product evidence. Record or upload calls → AI extracts pain points and feature requests → synthesis surfaces themes → auto-generated PRDs with real customer quotes → dev-ready handoff to Linear & GitHub. NEW: MCP server. Connect Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or Codex — your AI agent can search every interview and draft specs grounded in real evidence. No more copy-pasting. Half the price of Dovetail.
description_zh: Nugget AI将客户访谈转化为产品实证。录制或上传通话内容→AI提取痛点与功能需求→综合呈现主题→自动生成包含真实客户引述的产品需求文档（PRD）→开发人员可直接接手至Linear与GitHub。新增功能：MCP服务器。连接Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor或Codex——您的AI助手能够搜索每一次访谈，并基于真实证据起草规格说明。无需再手动复制粘贴。价格仅为Dovetail的一半。

name: Axol
tagline: Automate physical work with a powerful robot
tagline_zh: 用强大的机器人自动化体力工作
description: Axol is a dual-arm robot designed for teams automating real work with physical AI. Easy data collection, long reach, and a high range of motion means you can automate work that matters.
description_zh: Axol是一款双臂机器人，专为团队设计，通过物理AI实现实际工作的自动化。其易于数据收集、覆盖范围广、运动范围大等特点，意味着您可以自动化处理重要工作。

name: Enshittifier
tagline: Chrome extension that replaces "AI" with 💩
tagline_zh: 一个Chrome扩展程序，可以将“AI”替换为💩
description: The Mac app started as a dumb question: can you use font ligatures to turn AI into 💩? Turns out yes. Ironically, I used AI to figure out how. The Chrome extension came after — web fonts don't always cooperate. So mostly this is me poking fun. It's also a small nudge to be a little more mindful of the din around AI. Starting, apparently, with your font files.
description_zh: 这个Mac应用始于一个愚蠢的问题：你能用字体连字把AI变成💩吗？事实证明，答案是肯定的。具有讽刺意味的是，我是用AI来弄明白如何做到的。Chrome扩展程序是后来才有的——网页字体并不总是那么配合。所以，这主要是我在开玩笑。这也是一个小小的提醒，让我们对围绕AI的喧嚣多加留意。显然，这要从你的字体文件开始。

name: Bob's CLI
tagline: A local-first AI coding CLI that adapts to you
tagline_zh: 一个本地优先、能根据您需求调整的AI编码命令行界面
description: Bob's CLI runs on your own hardware with zero API costs, zero data leaving your machine. Bob lives in your terminal, sees your actual files, and writes code only with your explicit approval. What makes it different: auto-detect local AI models, behavioral DNA profiling that adapts to how YOU work, autonomous code review + auto-fix, conversation forking, deep dives, and SovereignLink — remote execution from any device while your code stays home. Free to start. Sovereign by design.
description_zh: Bob的命令行界面（CLI）运行于您自己的硬件上，无需支付任何API费用，数据也不会离开您的机器。Bob驻留在您的终端中，能够查看您的实际文件，并且仅在您明确授权的情况下编写代码。其独特之处在于：自动检测本地人工智能模型、根据您的工作方式调整的行为DNA分析、自主代码审查+自动修复、对话分叉、深度挖掘以及SovereignLink——在您的代码保持原位的同时，从任何设备进行远程执行。免费开始使用。设计上即追求主权。

name: Web Clipper for NotebookLM
tagline: Your ultimate NotebookLM's Chrome Extension
tagline_zh: 您终极的NotebookLM Chrome扩展程序
description: NotebookLM, supercharged from both ends. • Clip in: one click saves any web page, PDF, AI chat, Reddit thread, tweet or a YouTube video, channel, or playlist (cherry-pick which videos to include). • Export out: NotebookLM's flashcards to Anki, mind maps to Obsidian, reports to Word/PDF, full chats to Markdown. • Stay in sync: Google Drive sources auto-refresh in the background. • UI blends in like Google built it.
description_zh: NotebookLM，从两端增强功能。• 导入：一键保存任何网页、PDF、AI聊天、Reddit帖子、推文或YouTube视频、频道或播放列表（可自主选择要包含的视频）。• 导出：NotebookLM的闪卡导出到Anki，思维导图导出到Obsidian，报告导出到Word/PDF，完整聊天导出到Markdown。• 保持同步：Google Drive源文件在后台自动刷新。• 用户界面（UI）与Google原生界面融为一体。

name: Juno
tagline: AI health companion for chronic illness
tagline_zh: 慢性病AI健康伴侣
description: Juno helps people living with chronic illness reduce symptoms, spot patterns, and shorten the path to diagnosis. Built on our Oxford research and 1,000+ patient interviews.
description_zh: Juno帮助慢性病患者减轻症状、发现规律，并缩短诊断时间。该产品基于我们的牛津研究以及1000多名患者的访谈结果而开发。

name: Gaming services by IFTTT
tagline: Level up the way you play with Steam, Dota 2, and more
tagline_zh: 通过Steam、Dota 2等游戏提升你的游戏水平
description: A whole new stack of gaming services just hit IFTTT. Connect Destiny 2, Diablo III, Hearthstone, World of Warcraft, StarCraft II, Dota 2, Team Fortress 2, Steam, and Stoat to automate the parts of gaming that eat up your time. Whether you're tracking Steam achievements, staying on top of Hearthstone releases, or making sure you never miss Xur, it all runs once connected. Even your Diablo III hardcore hero's death won't go undocumented. Hook it all up to Discord, Slack, Google Sheets, and more.
description_zh: IFTTT刚刚推出了一系列全新的游戏服务。连接《命运2》、《暗黑破坏神III》、《炉石传说》、《魔兽世界》、《星际争霸II》、《刀塔2》、《军团要塞2》、Steam和Stoat，即可自动化那些会占用你大量时间的游戏环节。无论你是想追踪Steam成就、掌握《炉石传说》的最新动态，还是确保不错过Xur，一旦连接成功，所有这些都能自动完成。即使是《暗黑破坏神III》中你心爱的英雄的阵亡，也不会被遗忘。你可以将所有这些服务与Discord、Slack、Google Sheets等平台进行连接。

name: Retool
tagline: Build anywhere. Govern in Retool.
tagline_zh: 随时随地建造。在Retool中管理。
description: Describe what you want and get a production-ready app, not a prototype. Build natively or bring in apps that you've vibe coded elsewhere, then deploy into Retool to inherit auth, audit logs, and more automatically. Build from anywhere, govern in one place.
description_zh: 描述你的需求，然后获得一个可直接生产的应用，而非原型。你可以选择原生开发，或者引入你在其他地方用vibe编写的应用，然后部署到Retool中，以自动继承身份验证、审计日志等功能。你可以从任何地方构建，在一个地方进行管理。

name: TimeTuna.com
tagline: If Calendly had gorgeous video backgrounds
tagline_zh: 如果Calendly有精美的视频背景
description: If Calendly was for people who care about design. We help founders, freelancers, and studios create a memorable impression on their prospective clients through booking pages with beautiful video backgrounds. Your video, your domain, your taste. You have a character. Let you booking page have a character too. Free to start, $10/month for the rest.
description_zh: 如果Calendly是为那些注重设计的人而打造的，那么我们就会帮助创始人、自由职业者和工作室通过带有精美视频背景的预约页面，给他们的潜在客户留下难忘的印象。你的视频，你的域名，你的品味。你有个性。让你的预约页面也有个性。免费试用，其余时间每月10美元。

name: Tokenwise
tagline: A smart LLM proxy that shows where you're overpaying
tagline_zh: 一个智能的大型语言模型（LLM）代理，能显示你在哪些地方支付过高
description: Tokenwise is a one-line LLM proxy (OpenAI-compatible baseURL) for makers and small teams. It learns from your real requests, shows exactly where you're overpaying, proven with quality checks on your own traffic, not public benchmark, and lets you apply the fix in one click while it verifies the savings in real dollars.
description_zh: Tokenwise是一款面向创作者和小型团队的单行大型语言模型（LLM）代理工具（兼容OpenAI的baseURL）。它从您的真实请求中学习，准确指出您支付过高费用的地方，并通过对您自己流量的质量检查（而非公开基准测试）进行验证，并允许您一键应用修复方案，同时验证实际节省的金额。

name: Town
tagline: The assistant that learns how you work, then gets to work.
tagline_zh: 这个助手会学习你的工作方式，然后开始工作。
description: Town is the unusually helpful AI assistant. It learns how you work, not the other way around: your voice, your people, your patterns. It works where you do, across email, calendar, docs, and messages. It drafts your replies, handles your scheduling, and builds routines for the work you repeat. The more it learns, the more it does on its own, so your time goes to the work only you can do.o big ideas.
description_zh: Town是一款极其实用的AI助手。它了解你的工作方式，而非你了解它：你的声音、你的人脉、你的工作模式。它随你工作，覆盖电子邮件、日历、文档和消息。它能起草你的回复，处理你的日程安排，并为你重复的工作建立常规。它学得越多，自主完成的工作就越多，这样你就能把时间花在只有你能完成的工作上。伟大的想法。

name: Novus
tagline: Catch and fix usability issues automatically as you ship
tagline_zh: 在发布时自动捕捉并修复可用性问题
description: Novus is the product agent built for teams that ship fast. Connect your codebase and Novus automatically instruments, analyzes, and improves your product — no manual setup. It monitors continuously, flags usability issues proactively, and delivers intelligence for engineers and PMs.
description_zh: Novus是一款专为快速交付的团队打造的产品代理工具。连接您的代码库后，Novus会自动进行检测、分析和优化您的产品，无需手动设置。它能够持续监控，主动标记可用性问题，并为工程师和项目经理提供智能分析。

name: Stride
tagline: The AI workspace that plans, designs and ships with you.
tagline_zh: 与你一起规划、设计并交付的AI工作空间。
description: Stride is the AI-native workspace for the whole build: plan, design, verify, and ship. Its AI works inside your real project data and plugs into Claude Code and Codex over MCP, so it does the work instead of just talking about it. Your team goes from idea to launch without switching tools.
description_zh: Stride是一个专为整个构建流程（规划、设计、验证和发布）打造的AI原生工作空间。其AI功能深入您的实际项目数据，并通过MCP与Claude Code和Codex无缝对接，因此它能够真正地执行任务，而不仅仅是空谈。您的团队无需切换工具，即可从创意阶段直接进入发布阶段。

name: Avatars in ElevenCreative
tagline: A dedicated entry point for talking-head video
tagline_zh: 专为演讲视频设置的专用入口点
description: The best AI voices, now with a face. Create studio-grade talking videos from a script, a voice, and an avatar - all in one place.
description_zh: 顶尖的人工智能配音，如今更有面孔。只需脚本、配音和头像，即可一站式打造出专业录音室级别的对话视频。

name: Sinalytica
tagline: Travel back to 1998 and use Lovable on Windows 98
tagline_zh: 回到1998年，在Windows 98上使用Lovable
description: Sina Rajaeeian — Software Engineer and ML engineer. Building across AI/ML, web & mobile, and quantitative finance.
description_zh: Sina Rajaeeian — 软件工程师和机器学习工程师。涉足人工智能/机器学习、网页与移动应用以及量化金融领域。

name: Meet Warren 3.0
tagline: Your voice-supported AI financial planning partner
tagline_zh: 你的语音辅助AI理财规划伙伴
description: One voice conversation. Free financial plan. We built Warren because financial planning was broken for anyone without a six-figure portfolio. IFAs charge £200/hr. Spreadsheets go stale. Generic apps tell you what you already know. Warren shows you two futures: what happens if you do nothing and what changes if you act. Then Warren gives you a set of next steps, tracks your progress, and monitors your plan against economic changes. Join 3K+ Brits already using Warren. 10 mins to start.
description_zh: 一次语音对话，免费财务规划。我们打造Warren，是因为对于没有六位数投资组合的人来说，财务规划服务存在缺陷。独立理财顾问（IFAs）收费高达每小时200英镑。电子表格数据陈旧。通用应用程序只能告诉你已知的信息。Warren为你展示两种未来：一种是你什么都不做，另一种是你采取行动后会发生的变化。然后，Warren会为你提供一系列后续步骤，跟踪你的进度，并根据经济变化监控你的计划。已有3000多名英国人加入Warren，快来加入吧，10分钟即可开始。

name: Growati
tagline: The autopilot for YouTube post-production
tagline_zh: YouTube后期制作的自动驾驶功能
description: Generate personalised YouTube titles, descriptions, and thumbnails in minutes and update them based on video performance — built for creators exhausted by post-production work.
description_zh: 在几分钟内生成个性化的YouTube标题、描述和缩略图，并根据视频表现进行更新——专为那些因后期制作工作而疲惫不堪的创作者打造。

name: SeaTicket
tagline: Al agent that resolves issues across all your channels
tagline_zh: 一个能解决您所有渠道问题的代理
description: Software teams are drowning in a sea of fragmented issues across GitHub, Discourse and emails. Valuable feedback is often buried under noise. SeaTicket transforms community support by syncing these into a single workspace. What makes it different? Full Context: Bring related issues and documents when solving an issue. AI Agents: Built-in agents autonomously suggest resolutions using existing documents and previous issues. Stop digging for context. Start resolving.
description_zh: 软件团队淹没在GitHub、Discourse和电子邮件中零散的问题海洋中。有价值的反馈往往被淹没在杂乱无章的信息中。SeaTicket通过将这些信息同步到一个工作空间来改变社区支持的方式。它有何不同之处？完整上下文：在解决问题时，将相关的问题和文档一并带来。人工智能代理：内置代理使用现有文档和以前的问题自主提出解决方案。无需再挖掘上下文。开始解决问题。

name: MockPilot
tagline: Turn live websites into editable mockups
tagline_zh: 将实时网站转化为可编辑的原型
description: MockPilot turns any live webpage into an editable mockup on your desktop. Use natural language - no design or coding skills needed. 📸 Capture full pages or single components from any URL 🎨 Auto-extracts typography, colors, components & icons into a reusable asset library 💬 Edit in plain English — just tell the AI what to change, and it uses your assets to keep everything on-brand 📦 Export as clean, standalone HTML Free & open source. macOS + Windows.
description_zh: MockPilot可将任何实时网页转换为桌面上的可编辑原型。使用自然语言，无需设计或编码技能。📸从任何URL捕获完整页面或单个组件🎨自动将排版、颜色、组件和图标提取到可重复使用的资源库中💬用纯英语编辑——只需告诉AI要更改的内容，它就会使用您的资源来保持所有内容一致📦导出为干净、独立的HTML格式免费且开源。适用于macOS和Windows。

name: choclift
tagline: Use iPhone to open apps, Apple Shortcuts and websites on Mac
tagline_zh: 使用 iPhone 在 Mac 上打开应用、Apple 快捷方式和网站
description: Think beyond the keyboard, trackpad, and mouse: choclift is the third interface for interacting with your Mac. It turns your iPhone into a customizable chocolate bar that lets you instantly switch between favorite and recent Mac apps, trigger Apple Shortcuts without any detours, and use website bookmarks like never before. With a strong focus on product design and user experience, we're just getting started on building the quickest and sweetest way to work with your Mac.
description_zh: 超越键盘、触控板和鼠标的思维：choclift是与Mac交互的第三种界面。它将您的iPhone变成一个可定制的巧克力棒，让您能够即时在喜爱的和最近的Mac应用程序之间切换，无需任何繁琐操作即可触发Apple Shortcuts，并以前所未有的方式使用网站书签。我们非常注重产品设计和用户体验，在构建与Mac交互的最快捷、最甜蜜的方式方面，我们才刚刚起步。

name: DockFlow
tagline: Save, switch, and automate Dock layouts for every workflow
tagline_zh: 为每个工作流程保存、切换和自动化Dock布局
description: DockFlow is a Dock utility that lets you save and swap between different macOS Dock presets. Set up one for design, another for coding, another for writing. One click to switch, close the apps you don't need, and open the ones you do. I built this because I kept wasting the first few minutes of every session dragging icons back into place before I could actually work. Now I pick my context, and I'm already in my workflow. A year and 70 updates in, over 1,000 people use it.
description_zh: DockFlow是一款Dock工具，可让您保存和切换不同的macOS Dock预设。设置一个用于设计，一个用于编码，一个用于写作。一键切换，关闭不需要的应用程序，打开需要的应用程序。我之所以开发这款工具，是因为每次开始工作前，我总是浪费几分钟时间将图标拖回原位。现在，我只要选择上下文，就能直接进入工作流程。经过一年的开发和70次更新，已有超过1000人使用它。

name: Cloudflare Temporary Accounts
tagline: Let agents deploy before signup
tagline_zh: 让代理在注册前进行部署
description: The moment an agent needs to deploy something, it slams face-first into a wall built for humans. Today we're rolling out Temporary Accounts on Cloudflare Workers. Any agent can now run wrangler deploy — temporary and get a live Worker in seconds.
description_zh: 当代理需要部署某些内容时，它会一头撞上为人类而建的墙。今天，我们在Cloudflare Workers上推出了临时账户。现在，任何代理都可以运行wrangler deploy——临时账户，并在几秒钟内获得一个实时Worker。

name: Otty
tagline: A Mac native and beautiful terminal emulator
tagline_zh: 一款原生Mac且美观的终端模拟器
description: Otty is a native, GPU-accelerated terminal, designed for anyone who cares about the feel of every keystroke — minimal, fast, and beautiful. A terminal worth using on its own. And when you run several code agents like Claude Code or Codex side by side, Otty keeps it calm and clear — tuned for the agents you already run. Optimization, not complexity.
description_zh: Otty是一款原生、GPU加速的终端，专为那些在乎每一次击键感受的人设计——简洁、快速且美观。这是一款值得单独使用的终端。当您并行运行多个代码代理（如Claude Code或Codex）时，Otty能保持界面平稳且清晰——它针对您已运行的代理进行了优化。我们追求的是优化，而非复杂性。

name: Ask Ad Manager by Google Ads
tagline: Gemini-powered AI agent for insights & faster ad decisions
tagline_zh: 基于Gemini的AI代理，提供深入见解和更快速的广告决策
description: AI agent, built with Gemini, helps publishers get deeper insights, understand their performance and make better decisions faster.
description_zh: 使用Gemini构建的人工智能代理，可帮助出版商更深入地了解情况，掌握自身表现，并更快地做出更明智的决策。

name: uwait
tagline: Get paid while AI thinks
tagline_zh: 在AI思考的同时获得报酬
description: Every time you use ChatGPT or Claude, you wait. Usually 3 to 8 seconds. That's it. That's the idea. uwait is a Chrome extension that shows a curated ad during that loading screen. You get a small cut. The publishers whose content trained the AI get a cut too. The advertiser gets your attention at a moment when you're actually paying attention. The split: 50% to users, 30% to publishers, 20% to us. We're picky about advertisers. Just brands that make sense in that context.
description_zh: 每次你使用ChatGPT或Claude时，你都会等待。通常需要3到8秒。就是这样。这就是我们的想法。uwait是一款Chrome扩展程序，它会在加载屏幕期间展示精选广告。你会获得一小部分收益。训练人工智能的内容发布商也会获得一部分收益。广告商在你真正集中注意力的那一刻吸引你的注意力。收益分配：用户50%，发布商30%，我们20%。我们对广告商很挑剔。只选择在那种情境下有意义的品牌。

name: OpenArt Director
tagline: Direct cinematic videos through chat
tagline_zh: 通过聊天直接播放电影视频
description: OpenArt Director lets you create cinematic AI videos simply by chatting. Generate videos up to 5 minutes long with consistent characters, scenes, voice, music, and visual style throughout. Director develops story arcs, plans scenes, maintains continuity, and helps refine videos through natural conversation - acting more like a creative director than a traditional video generator. You're not generating clips anymore - you're directing stories.
description_zh: OpenArt Director让您只需通过聊天即可创作出电影级的AI视频。生成时长可达5分钟的视频，其中角色、场景、配音、音乐和视觉风格始终保持一致。Director能够构建故事情节、规划场景、保持连贯性，并通过自然对话帮助完善视频——它的表现更像是一位创意导演，而非传统的视频生成工具。您不再是在生成片段，而是在执导故事。

name: Visual Usability Checker
tagline: Validate your design decisions instantly with AI insights
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能的洞察力，即时验证你的设计决策
description: Get instant AI recommendations to improve your design. Detect cognitive load, see where users focus, catch issues early, and compare variations - so you can confidently make and defend design decisions with data-backed insights.
description_zh: 获取即时的人工智能建议，以改进您的设计。检测认知负荷，了解用户关注点，及早发现问题，并比较不同方案——这样您就可以凭借数据支持的见解，自信地做出设计决策，并为其辩护。

name: Moodloom
tagline: Ad-free Pinterest Alternative with AI content filtering
tagline_zh: 无广告的Pinterest替代品，配备AI内容过滤功能
description: Moodloom is an ad-free visual discovery platform for those fed up of Pinterest. Save and explore fashion, decor, and art - without the noise. What makes it different: Clean feed - no ads, no sponsored posts AI content filter - hide or show AI-generated images For fashion lovers, decorators & digital artists who wish Pinterest were better. We have built Save to Moodloom Extension as well using which you can Import all your Pinterest pins/boards to Moodloom.
description_zh: Moodloom是一个无广告的视觉发现平台，专为那些厌倦了Pinterest的用户打造。在这里，您可以保存和探索时尚、装饰和艺术内容，免受干扰。其独特之处在于：纯净的信息流——无广告、无赞助帖子；AI内容过滤器——可隐藏或显示AI生成的图片。对于时尚爱好者、装饰师和数字艺术家而言，如果他们希望Pinterest能更好一些，那么Moodloom就是他们的不二之选。我们还开发了Save to Moodloom扩展程序，通过该程序，您可以将Pinterest上的所有收藏/图板导入到Moodloom中。

name: Rodeo by TwelveLabs
tagline: Describe your shot. Rodeo builds your first cut.
tagline_zh: 描述你的镜头。Rodeo会为你制作第一个剪辑。
description: Rodeo by TwelveLabs is the AI video intelligence platform for creators and teams who produce at scale. Stop wasting hours scrubbing footage. Go from raw clips to a first cut in minutes using plain language. It's structured creation, not manual review. Unlike transcript-first tools, Rodeo's multimodal AI understands visuals, audio, speech, and text simultaneously, making it perfect for visual-first content. Your video library is now instantly queryable for humans and agents.
description_zh: TwelveLabs的Rodeo是一款面向大规模制作创作者和团队的人工智能视频智能平台。无需再花费数小时清理素材。使用通俗易懂的语言，您可以在几分钟内从原始剪辑生成初剪。这是结构化的创作，而非手动审查。与先转录后处理的工具不同，Rodeo的多模态人工智能能够同时理解视觉内容、音频、语音和文本，非常适合视觉优先的内容。现在，您的视频库可以供人类和代理即时查询。

name: Conan
tagline: A native Mac cockpit for Claude Code
tagline_zh: Claude Code的原生Mac操作界面
description: Conan is a native macOS app that wraps Claude Code in a live HUD — every prompt, tool call, skill, and token, surfaced as it happens.
description_zh: Conan是一款原生macOS应用，它将Claude Code整合到一个实时HUD（用户界面）中——每一个提示、工具调用、技能和标记都会实时显示。

name: hora Calendar
tagline: Google calendar built for the Mac
tagline_zh: 专为Mac打造的谷歌日历
description: hora Calendar is a native Mac app for Google Calendar. See your next meeting in the menu bar, join Meet, Zoom, and Teams in one click, create events fast, schedule focus time, and sync directly with Google without proxying calendar data through hora servers.
description_zh: hora Calendar是一款专为Google Calendar设计的Mac原生应用。您可以在菜单栏中查看下一个会议，一键加入Meet、Zoom和Teams会议，快速创建活动，安排专注时间，并直接与Google同步，无需通过hora服务器代理日历数据。

name: Parsewise API
tagline: API for agentic multi-document processing
tagline_zh: 代理式多文档处理API
description: One API call replaces the entire document processing pipeline. You send multiple documents and a desired output schema; you get back resolved values, flagged contradictions, and full lineage down to the source words, pages, and documents, with bounding boxes you can embed directly into your own UI for human validation. No parsing, classification, stitching, or custom verification interface to build or maintain.
description_zh: 一个API调用即可替换整个文档处理流程。您发送多个文档和一个所需的输出模式；您将获得解析后的值、标记的矛盾点，以及完整的沿袭信息，包括源单词、页面和文档，以及可直接嵌入您自己的用户界面（UI）进行人工验证的边界框。无需构建或维护解析、分类、拼接或自定义验证接口。

name: Mixpanel Headless
tagline: Programmatic access to product analytics for agents and devs
tagline_zh: 为代理商和开发者提供对产品分析的编程式访问
description: Mixpanel Headless is a Python SDK that makes the entire product surface programmable, so agents and devs can dig into data without leaving their IDE.
description_zh: Mixpanel Headless是一个Python软件开发工具包（SDK），它使整个产品界面可编程，因此代理和开发人员无需离开他们的集成开发环境（IDE）即可深入挖掘数据。

name: Perplexity Personal Computer for Windows
tagline: Run AI agents across your local files and apps on Windows
tagline_zh: 在Windows上，对本地文件和应用运行人工智能代理
description: Personal Computer extends Perplexity's multi-model agent system to your Windows machine, running tasks across local files, native apps, and the web for Max and Enterprise Max subscribers on the waitlist.
description_zh: 个人电脑版将Perplexity的多模型代理系统扩展到您的Windows设备上，为等待列表中的Max和Enterprise Max订阅用户跨本地文件、原生应用和网络运行任务。

name: MindReader v1
tagline: Read minds (simulated fMRI data, channeled to neuro-metrics)
tagline_zh: 读取思维（模拟功能性磁共振成像数据，通过神经测量技术获取）
description: How do you feel? It is the oldest question in art and the newest one we can answer in technology. MindReader takes your content and simulates, region by region, how a brain responds to it. Completely Open Source - we encourage you to tinker. Exploring sales evals, neural evals for datasets and other esoteric product experiments w/ madhat founders. MindReader is built on Meta FAIR's TRIBE v2 + 35yrs of neuro research. Inviting collab from the academics et all.
description_zh: 你感觉如何？这是艺术领域最古老的问题，也是我们可以在技术领域回答的最新问题。MindReader会接收你的内容，并逐个区域模拟大脑对其的反应。完全开源——我们鼓励你进行修改。与madhat创始人一起探索销售评估、数据集的神经评估以及其他深奥的产品实验。MindReader建立在Meta FAIR的TRIBE v2 + 35年的神经研究之上。欢迎学术界等各方合作。

name: AEVS
tagline: proof-of-execution for AI agents
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理的执行证明
description: AEVS (Agent Execution Verification System) is a drop-in SDK that records every AI agent tool call and gives agents verifiable execution receipts. It captures the tool, inputs, outputs, status, and timing as tamper-evident proof, so teams can verify what an agent actually executed without relying on chat history or fragile logs.
description_zh: AEVS（代理执行验证系统）是一个即插即用的软件开发工具包（SDK），它能记录每个AI代理工具的调用，并为代理提供可验证的执行凭证。它捕获工具、输入、输出、状态和时序信息，作为防篡改的证据，因此团队无需依赖聊天记录或易损坏的日志，即可验证代理实际执行的内容。

name: Memoriq
tagline: Your private AI memory for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Grok
tagline_zh: 您为ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini和Grok准备的私人AI记忆库
description: Memoriq is your private AI memory for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Grok. Save the conversations that matter in an end-to-end encrypted vault that only you can access. Open source, self-hostable, and built for people who don't want to lose valuable AI chats or trust another plaintext cloud service. Search, organize, and keep your AI knowledge under your control.
description_zh: Memoriq是您专为ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini和Grok打造的私人AI记忆库。将重要的对话保存在端到端加密的保管库中，只有您才能访问。开源、可自行托管，专为那些不想丢失宝贵的AI聊天记录或信任其他纯文本云服务的人而设计。搜索、整理并掌控您的AI知识。

name: Thumbmagic
tagline: AI thumbnail generator trained on top-performing thumbnails
tagline_zh: 基于表现最佳的缩略图训练的AI缩略图生成器
description: Most thumbnail tools give you generic templates. Thumbmagic gives you data. Before generating a single pixel, Thumbmagic analyzes 200+ top-performing thumbnails, studying what drives clicks for tech reviewers, finance creators, and more. The result? Thumbnails that don't just look good, they're engineered to perform.
description_zh: 大多数缩略图工具只能为您提供通用的模板。而Thumbmagic则为您提供数据。在生成任何一张像素之前，Thumbmagic会分析200多个表现最佳的缩略图，研究是什么推动了科技评论员、金融创作者等点击率。结果呢？这些缩略图不仅看起来不错，而且经过精心设计，表现优异。

name: Sulsaly
tagline: #1 Agentic AI sales leads &outreach platform for MENA Region
tagline_zh: #1 中东和北非地区代理型人工智能销售线索与拓展平台
description: Sulsaly is MENA's first Agentic AI sales intelligence platform. Find verified decision-makers instantly, automate personalized outreach across LinkedIn, WhatsApp and Email. Close deals 5x faster. 50M+ verified B2B contacts across the Arab world. Built for sales teams in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Jordan and the Middle East. أول منصة ذكاء اصطناعي للمبيعات في الشرق الأوسط. اكتشف صانعي القرار، أتمتة التواصل عبر واتساب ولينكدإن والبريد الإلكتروني، وأغلق صفقاتك أسرع بـ 5 مرات. 50M+ جهة اتصال موثقة.
description_zh: Sulsaly是MENA首个代理式人工智能销售智能平台。立即查找经过验证的决策者，通过领英（LinkedIn）、WhatsApp和电子邮件自动进行个性化外联。交易完成速度提高5倍。阿拉伯世界拥有5000万+经过验证的B2B联系人。专为阿联酋、沙特阿拉伯、埃及、约旦和中东地区的销售团队打造。首个中东人工智能销售平台。发现决策者，自动化通过WhatsApp、领英和电子邮件进行联系，使你的交易完成速度提高5倍。5000万+经过验证的联系方式。

name: LocalClicky
tagline: Control your Mac with your voice locally
tagline_zh: 在本地用语音控制你的Mac
description: LocalClicky is a Mac menubar app that lets you have a real conversation with your computer - completely offline. Say "Computer" to start a session. It stays listening. You chain commands back to back. Say "goodbye" when you're done. Everything runs on your machine: voice transcription, LLM multi models, VAD, macOS say No API keys. No subscription. No data leaving your Mac. MIT licensed.
description_zh: LocalClicky是一款Mac菜单栏应用程序，让您能够与计算机进行真正的对话——完全离线。说出“Computer”即可开始会话。它会一直处于监听状态。您可以连续下达命令。完成后说“goodbye”。所有操作都在您的机器上运行：语音转录、大型语言模型（LLM）多模型、语音活动检测（VAD）、macOS朗读。无需API密钥。无需订阅。数据不会离开您的Mac。采用MIT许可协议。

name: Orchestria
tagline: AI music engine with granular stem control
tagline_zh: 具备精细干音控制的AI音乐引擎
description: Existing music AIs are black boxes. Orchestria flips the script, generating music as separate stems with natural language agentic control. 100% royalty-free: you own everything you create. Key features: • Stem Control: Edit or regenerate instruments separately without ruining the mix. • Agentic Commands: Tweak sounds (e.g. "make bass pluckier") with natural language. • Pro Audio: Studio-grade 24-bit / 44.1kHz WAV outputs. • Sync Player: Beautiful, sample-accurate visualizer.
description_zh: 现有的音乐人工智能都是黑箱系统。Orchestria则颠覆了这一传统，通过自然语言代理控制生成独立的音乐音轨。100%免版税：您对自己创造的一切拥有完全所有权。主要功能包括：• 音轨控制：在不破坏混音的情况下单独编辑或重新生成乐器。• 代理命令：使用自然语言调整声音（例如，“让低音更拨弦感”）。• 专业音频：工作室级24位/44.1kHz WAV输出。• 同步播放器：美观且采样精确的可视化播放器。

name: PixelForge
tagline: Turn photos into game assets
tagline_zh: 将照片转化为游戏资源
description: Turn one photo into a recognizable RPG character that actually walks - a 4-direction sprite pack (4x4 sheet, 16 transparent PNG frames, walk GIFs) ready for Godot, Unity, or the web. One-time $5. No account, no subscription. Generated by AI, finished by code.
description_zh: 将一张照片转化为一个可识别的、能实际行走的RPG角色——一个四向精灵包（4x4图层，16个透明PNG帧，行走GIF图），适用于Godot、Unity或网页。一次性收费5美元。无需注册账号，也无需订阅。由AI生成，代码完成。

name: Branda
tagline: A fun new way to create & manage brands.
tagline_zh: 一种有趣的新方式来创建和管理品牌。
description: Branda turns a name and idea into a complete brand identity in minutes: strategy, logo, palette, type, and full brand kit. Start from scratch or import existing assets. ✨ 200 free credits on signup ✨ Let AI lead with Lucky, or guide strategy, sketches, and vector concepts yourself. Use visual prompts to keep every generation consistent, extract elements, vectorize to SVG, upscale, export, and share a public showcase.
description_zh: Branda能在几分钟内将一个名称和想法转化为完整的品牌标识：包括策略、标志、调色板、字体和完整的品牌套件。您可以从零开始创建，也可以导入现有资源。✨注册即送200个免费积分✨让AI以Lucky为主导，或者自己指导策略、草图和矢量概念。使用视觉提示来保持每一代的连贯性，提取元素，将其矢量化成SVG格式，进行升级，导出并分享一个公开展示。

name: DodoForm
tagline: Turn talking, pics, or scribbles into clean, structured data
tagline_zh: 将对话、图片或涂鸦转化为干净、结构化的数据
description: Voice, photos, messy notes — DodoForm turns however people communicate into clean structured data. 100+ templates, AI-powered analytics, native integrations, and branded forms. Done in seconds, not minutes. 14-day Pro trial, no card.
description_zh: 语音、照片、杂乱的笔记——DodoForm将人们的各种沟通方式转化为整洁的结构化数据。100多种模板、人工智能驱动的分析、原生集成和品牌化表单。几秒钟内即可完成，无需几分钟。14天专业版试用，无需信用卡。

name: Buddy
tagline: Free Figma agent + Import anything to Figma
tagline_zh: 免费Figma代理 + 将任何内容导入Figma
description: Buddy is the most powerful AI design agent inside Figma. And if you already pay for ChatGPT, plug it in and chat for free. No AI credits. Generate screens, flows, and variants on your canvas. Clone any website, import Claude design/artifacts, or drop a screenshot to get editable Figma layers. Run parallel agents at the same time, organize your file, and stay on-brand with your design system. You're already paying for AI. Now use it right inside Figma.
description_zh: Buddy是Figma中最强大的AI设计助手。如果你已经为ChatGPT付费，只需将其接入即可免费聊天。无需AI积分。在画布上生成屏幕、流程和变体。克隆任何网站，导入Claude设计/工件，或拖放截图以获取可编辑的Figma图层。同时运行并行助手，整理文件，并保持设计系统的一致性。你已经为AI付费了。现在就在Figma中使用它吧。

name: Hero Studio Photos
tagline: Snap one photo, get listing-ready shots from every angle
tagline_zh: 拍一张照片，就能从各个角度获得适合上架的照片
description: Snap one photo of whatever you're selling and Hero turns it into clean studio shots from every angle, including on-model and mannequin-style images for clothing. Live on iOS and Android, with an API and MCP server so developers and AI agents can build on it.
description_zh: 拍摄一张你正在销售的任何产品的照片，Hero会将其从各个角度转化为清晰的工作室照片，包括针对服装的真人模特和人体模型风格的图像。该应用可在iOS和Android上使用，配备API和MCP服务器，以便开发人员和AI代理可以在其基础上进行开发。

name: SoMerch
tagline: Merch for distributed teams, handled end to end
tagline_zh: 为分布式团队提供商品，实现端到端的处理
