What makes it unique: • 🛡️ Smart Exclusions: Never suspends playing audio/video, pinned tabs, or active forms. • ⚙️ Per-Domain Rules: Set custom timeout overrides and whitelists. • 🔄 State Recovery: Restores tab URL, title, and exact scroll position on click. • 🔒 100% Local: Zero tracking, telemetry, or servers.
description_zh: Tab Hibernator Pro是一款开源的、以隐私保护为优先的Chrome扩展程序，它能自动挂起不活动的标签页，从而为每个标签页释放高达80MB的内存。其独特之处在于：• 🛡️智能排除：永远不会挂起正在播放的音频/视频、固定标签页或活动表单。• ⚙️按域规则：设置自定义超时覆盖和白名单。• 🔄状态恢复：点击时恢复标签页的URL、标题和确切滚动位置。• 🔒100%本地化：零跟踪、零遥测、无服务器。

name: Reck Connect
tagline: AI coding that never stops
tagline_zh: 永不停止的AI编码
description: Reck Connect moves your CLI coding agents off your fragile laptop. An always-on Desktop runs every Claude Code / Codex pane; your laptop is just a thin viewport over Tailscale. Close your laptop, and your agents keep running. A stoplight per pane shows which one needs you without overloading information, and you keep control over your workspace by organizing it neatly.
description_zh: Reck Connect 让您的命令行界面（CLI）编码代理脱离脆弱的笔记本电脑。一个始终在线的桌面运行每个 Claude Code / Codex 面板；您的笔记本电脑只是 Tailscale 上方的薄薄视口。关闭笔记本电脑，您的代理仍在运行。每个面板都有一个指示灯，显示哪个面板需要您的关注，同时不会信息过载，您可以通过整洁地整理工作区来保持对工作区的控制。

name: Trace
tagline: Your AI Analytics bundled up.
tagline_zh: 您的AI分析已打包完成。
description: Trace is a local-first AI observability dashboard — like Grafana for your AI CLI usage. Monitor token consumption, estimated costs, and usage trends across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI, and Ollama from a single unified interface.
description_zh: Trace是一个本地优先的AI可观察性仪表板，类似于用于AI命令行界面（CLI）使用的Grafana。您可以通过一个统一的界面监控Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、OpenCode、Gemini CLI、Copilot CLI和Ollama的令牌消耗、预估成本和使用趋势。

name: Gmail Username Checker
tagline: Check Gmail username availability in bulk
tagline_zh: 批量检查Gmail用户名是否可用
description: Check Gmail username availability before you choose a brand, product, or personal handle. Paste usernames or @gmail.com addresses, run the Actor, and export clean available, taken, or invalid results from the dataset.
description_zh: 在选择品牌、产品或个人账号前，请先检查Gmail用户名的可用性。粘贴用户名或@gmail.com地址，运行Actor，并从数据集中导出清晰的可用、已占用或无效结果。

name: A11y Navigation Auditor
tagline: All your structural a11y checks, in one Chrome side panel
tagline_zh: 所有结构化辅助功能检查，尽在一个Chrome侧面板中
description: Visualize your page's structure, accessible names, and live ARIA states—all in one Chrome side panel. See the information assistive tech relies on at a glance, with issues flagged automatically (error / warning / info). No overlay clutter, no DevTools digging. On-device AI guidance powered by Gemini Nano—100% local, zero data leaving your browser.
description_zh: 在Chrome侧面板中，你可以直观地看到页面的结构、可访问名称和实时ARIA状态。辅助技术所依赖的信息一目了然，问题会自动标记（错误/警告/信息）。没有叠加的混乱，无需深入开发者工具。由Gemini Nano提供设备端AI指导——100%本地化，零数据离开你的浏览器。

name: PromptStruct
tagline: Turn messy AI prompts into Structured JSON
tagline_zh: 将杂乱的AI提示转换为结构化的JSON格式
description: PromptStruct helps designers create more consistent AI-generated visuals. Paste a natural prompt, convert it into a structured schema, edit individual elements like scene, style, lighting, composition, and mood, then generate an optimized prompt for your preferred AI image tool. Instead of rewriting prompts repeatedly and wasting credits, PromptStruct gives you a structured workflow for visual iteration.
description_zh: PromptStruct助力设计师打造更为一致的人工智能生成视觉效果。只需粘贴一个自然语言提示，将其转换为结构化模式，编辑场景、风格、光线、构图和氛围等各个元素，即可为首选的人工智能图像工具生成一个优化的提示。PromptStruct为你提供了一个结构化的视觉迭代工作流程，无需反复重写提示，也无需浪费积分。

name: Applysync
tagline: Your AI-powered copilot to automate job applications.
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能副驾驶，助您自动化求职申请流程。
description: Applysync is your AI-powered job application copilot. Upload your resume once and instantly autofill complex application portals with perfectly tailored answers in one click. No more repetitive typing, no more formatting nightmares. Track every application automatically from a clean browser extension dashboard. Built for job seekers who want to out-pace the tedious manual grind and focus on landing the interview.
description_zh: Applysync是一款由人工智能驱动的求职助手。只需上传一次简历，即可一键自动填充复杂申请门户网站，并生成量身定制的完美答案。无需重复输入，也无需担心格式问题。通过简洁的浏览器扩展程序仪表板，自动跟踪每一份申请。专为那些希望摆脱繁琐手动工作、专注于获得面试机会的求职者打造。

name: DockDineFuel
tagline: Reserve your dock slip before you get on the boat
tagline_zh: 上船前，先预订好船位
description: Reserve dock space at waterfront restaurants and marinas before you turn the engine on. Real-time availability on the Intracoastal Waterway. Waterfront restaurants — manage dock reservations, availability, and bookings all in one place.
description_zh: 在启动引擎之前，请先预订海滨餐厅和码头泊位。内陆航道实时泊位可用情况一览。海滨餐厅——一站式管理码头预订、泊位可用情况和预约。

name: Dendedo - Achieve Your Goals
tagline: AI breaks your goals into daily tasks you'll actually do
tagline_zh: 人工智能将你的目标分解成你真正会去完成的日常任务
description: Dendedo is an AI anti procrastination app. You tell it a goal, and it breaks it into daily tasks - rebuilt every day based on what you actually got done. A full gamification layer (XP, streaks, mystery boxes, a cosmetic wardrobe) makes showing up feel addictive instead of like a chore. Built solo, in public, for people who set big goals but stall on day two.
description_zh: Dededo是一款人工智能防拖延应用。你只需告诉它一个目标，它就会将其分解为每日任务——并根据你实际完成的情况每天进行更新。全面的游戏化设计（经验值、连胜、神秘宝箱、装扮衣橱）让完成任务变得令人上瘾，而不再是一项苦差事。这款应用是专为那些设定了宏伟目标但在第二天就拖延的人而设计的，它既适合个人使用，也适合公共场合使用。

name: Traqcker
tagline: Know if a stock is worth it. In seconds.
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可了解某只股票是否值得投资。
description: Traqcker gives you a quality score, fair value estimate, and community Buy/Hold/Sell votes for 8,000+ US stocks — no spreadsheet, no finance degree. Search a ticker, get the answer in seconds. Free forever.
description_zh: Traqcker为您提供8000多只美国股票的质量评分、公允价值估算以及社区买入/持有/卖出投票结果——无需电子表格，也无需金融学位。只需搜索股票代码，几秒钟内即可获得答案。永久免费。

name: BarkodSis
tagline: Reliable POS & Barcode Software, trusted since 2007
tagline_zh: 可靠的POS和条形码软件，自2007年以来备受信赖
description: BarkodSis is a powerful POS and barcode sales software trusted by 4,300+ retail businesses since 2007. It provides seamless inventory tracking, retail management, and fast checkout solutions. BarkodSis; mağaza ve esnaflar için barkodlu satış programı, hızlı satış ve stok takip yazılımları sunar. 2007'den beri 4.300+ işletmeye güvenilir perakende satış programı ve POS çözümleri sağlıyoruz. Try our free demo!
description_zh: BarkodSis是一款强大的POS和条码销售软件，自2007年以来，已获得4,300多家零售企业的信赖。它提供无缝的库存跟踪、零售管理以及快速结账解决方案。BarkodSis是专为商店和店铺设计的条码销售程序，提供快速销售和库存跟踪软件。自2007年以来，我们一直为4,300多家企业提供可靠的零售销售程序和POS解决方案。快来试试我们的免费演示吧！

name: Hairstyle View
tagline: AI-powered hairstyle visualizer for salons
tagline_zh: 面向沙龙的AI发型可视化工具
description: Transform the salon consultation experience with hyper-realistic AI hairstyle previews. Let your clients see their transformation before the first cut.
description_zh: 通过超逼真的AI发型预览，革新沙龙咨询体验。让你的客户在第一次剪发前就能看到自己的变化。

name: 5sdesign
tagline: Curated AI design prompts for building sites with AI
tagline_zh: 为使用人工智能构建网站而精心策划的人工智能设计提示
description: 5sdesign is a curated library of AI design prompts. Paste one into Claude, Cursor, v0 or Lovable and get a polished, production-ready website — not a generic template. Every showcase ships with a matching DESIGN.md so your next pages stay on-brand. 50 prompts, 29 free.
description_zh: 5sdesign是一个经过精心策划的人工智能设计提示库。将其中一个提示粘贴到Claude、Cursor v0或Lovable中，即可获得一个经过打磨、可直接投入生产的网站——而非通用模板。每个展示页面都附带一个匹配的DESIGN.md文件，确保您的后续页面保持品牌一致。50个提示，29个免费。

name: BeamDrop
tagline: Direct iPhone to PC transfer. No cloud, no cable.
tagline_zh: 直接从iPhone传输到PC。无需云服务，无需数据线。
description: BeamDrop turns your iPhone into a local file server so any PC or Mac browser can download photos and videos instantly. No cable, no cloud, no account, and no desktop app. Pick files in BeamDrop, open the local URL on your computer, then download one by one or all at once. Works on Wi-Fi or Personal Hotspot. Transfers stay on your local network for privacy.
description_zh: BeamDrop将您的iPhone变成一个本地文件服务器，这样任何PC或Mac浏览器都可以立即下载照片和视频。无需线缆、无需云服务、无需账户，也无需桌面应用程序。在BeamDrop中选择文件，在您的计算机上打开本地URL，然后逐一下载或一次性全部下载。支持Wi-Fi或个人热点。传输过程始终在您的本地网络上进行，以确保隐私。

name: Comperge
tagline: The infinite-scaling, 100% client-side code diffing engine.
tagline_zh: 无限扩展、100% 客户端代码差异检测引擎。
description: An ultra-performant, 100% client-side code comparison tool. Compare a reference file against infinite targets with zero server lag, real-time consensus mapping, and syntax highlighting.
description_zh: 一款超高性能的100%客户端代码比较工具。可将参考文件与无数目标文件进行对比，无服务器延迟，支持实时共识映射和语法高亮显示。

name: Lexacore
tagline: AI-powered legal intelligence for Indian businesses.
tagline_zh: 为印度企业提供基于人工智能的法律智能服务。
description: Lexacore delivers law-firm grade intelligence — contract analysis, compliance monitoring, and litigation strategy — in one AI-powered platform built for Indian businesses.
description_zh: Lexacore通过一个专为印度企业打造的人工智能平台，提供律师事务所级别的智能服务——合同分析、合规监控和诉讼策略。

name: Bye bye world
tagline: The all-in-one workspace that actually knows your company
tagline_zh: 真正了解你公司的多功能一体化工作空间
description: Bye-bye World replaces Slack, Jira, Zoom, your calendar, docs, and HR tool with one connected workspace — built for fast teams. What's different: an AI that actually knows your company. Ask it anything, get answers sourced from your own chats, tasks, and docs. Meetings become action items automatically. New hires ramp by reading history, not chasing people. One workspace. One bill. Live in under 30 Sec — not 12 weeks.
description_zh: Bye-bye World用一个专为高效团队打造的互联工作空间取代了Slack、Jira、Zoom、你的日历、文档和人力资源工具。与众不同之处在于：它搭载了一个真正了解你公司的AI。你可以向它提问任何问题，它会从你自己的聊天、任务和文档中获取答案。会议内容会自动转化为待办事项。新员工可以通过阅读历史记录快速上手，而无需四处询问。一个工作空间，一张账单。30秒内即可上手，无需12周。

name: Islamic Journal - Muhasaba
tagline: Quran-guided journaling for the modern Muslim.
tagline_zh: 为现代穆斯林提供的以《古兰经》为指导的日记。
description: Muhasaba is the classical Islamic practice of daily self-accounting — reviewing your deeds and intentions before sleep. This app guides you through it in five minutes. After Isha prayer: write or speak your reflection → receive a verse from the Quran chosen for what you shared → an insight into your day → one small action for tomorrow → a dhikr to close. Your entries are encrypted and private. They are never used to train AI — not ours, not anyone else’s.
description_zh: 穆哈萨巴（Muhasaba）是伊斯兰教传统的每日自我反省仪式——在睡前回顾自己的行为和意图。这款应用可在五分钟内引导你完成这一过程。晚祷后：写下或说出你的反思→收到《古兰经》中为你所分享内容所选的一节经文→回顾你的一天→为明天制定一个小行动→以念诵一段祈祷词作为结束。你的记录是加密且私密的。它们绝不会被用来训练人工智能——无论是我们的还是其他任何人的。

name: Planify AI
tagline: The AI planner for overwhelmed minds
tagline_zh: 为疲惫不堪的大脑打造的AI规划师
description: Planify AI untangles your chaotic thoughts and gives you 3 calm, actionable steps for today. Built specifically for burnout prevention, it includes a free-flowing Brain Dump, an emergency Panic Mode, and gamified habit tracking to keep your mind clear.
description_zh: Planify AI能整理你混乱的思绪，为你提供3个平静且可执行的今日步骤。它专为预防职业倦怠而设计，包括自由流畅的头脑风暴、紧急恐慌模式和游戏化的习惯追踪，以保持你的思维清晰。

name: HyperChrono
tagline: Create Free Timelapse Videos with a Built-in Stopwatch
tagline_zh: 使用内置秒表创建免费的延时摄影视频
description: Create time-lapse videos that show exactly how long something took, with a real stopwatch built into every frame. Videos save straight to your camera roll. You choose how long the timelapse will be, so it's perfect for sharing on social medial. Free, no ads. Available in the Apple App Store.
description_zh: 制作时间延时视频，每一帧都内置一个真正的秒表，精确显示某件事花费的时间。视频直接保存到您的手机相册。您可以选择时间延时的长度，非常适合在社交媒体上分享。免费、无广告。可在苹果应用商店下载。

name: handa
tagline: The easiest and fastest way to find your unclaimed royalties
tagline_zh: 找到您未领取的版税的最简单、最快捷的方法
description: handa is made to serve songwriters and producers, putting them first. This is built by the creators, for the creators. With just your name and IPI, handa will tell you the money the industry owes you, and then we recover it. Low friction. Just type your details into the platform and in seconds, we audit the actual ground-truth rights data the industry itself uses to decide who gets paid, and show you exactly what's unclaimed with your name on it.
description_zh: Handa旨在为词曲作者和制作人服务，将他们置于首位。这是由创作者打造，为创作者服务的平台。只需提供您的姓名和国际出版商识别码（IPI），Handa就会告诉您该行业欠您的钱款，然后我们会帮您追回。流程顺畅。只需在平台上输入您的详细信息，几秒钟内，我们就会审核该行业自身用来决定谁应获得报酬的实际版权数据，并准确展示您名下未领取的款项。

name: Mimo - Your Personal AI Assistant
tagline: Stop switching tabs. Ask Mimo instead.
tagline_zh: 别再切换标签页了。去问问米莫吧。
description: Meet Mimo, your open-source Google Workspace teammate. Most AI tools make you open another tab. Mimo lives directly in your browser sidebar, deeply connected to your Gmail, Drive, Calendar, and Tasks. Instantly summarize emails, search docs, check your next meeting, or add to-dos via natural language. Stop breaking your flow. Ask Mimo instead.
description_zh: 来认识一下Mimo吧，它是你的开源Google Workspace团队伙伴。大多数人工智能工具都需要你打开另一个标签页。而Mimo则直接存在于你的浏览器侧边栏中，与你的Gmail、云端硬盘、日历和任务深度连接。你可以通过自然语言立即总结电子邮件、搜索文档、查看下一个会议或添加待办事项。别再打断你的工作流程了。问问Mimo吧。

name: infuseOS
tagline: Track AI visibility. Fix what matters.
tagline_zh: 追踪人工智能的可见性。修复重要问题。
description: Show up in AI answers, not just search results. InfuseOS tracks AI visibility, creates growth actions, and automates the work.
description_zh: 在人工智能答案中展现，而不仅仅是搜索结果中。InfuseOS追踪人工智能的可见性，制定增长策略，并自动化相关工作。

name: RoadFolio
tagline: Run your whole business from one app
tagline_zh: 通过一个应用管理您的全部业务
description: RoadFolio is the all in one business app for contractors and freelancers. GPS mileage tracking, invoicing, expense management, and the RoadBuddy AI voice assistant. Free on iOS and Android.
description_zh: RoadFolio是一款专为承包商和自由职业者打造的一站式商务应用。它集GPS里程追踪、发票开具、费用管理以及RoadBuddy AI语音助手于一体。iOS和Android用户均可免费使用。

name: PlanLIFT
tagline: AI visualisation for the built environment.
tagline_zh: 建筑环境的AI可视化。
description: Upload a floorplan, masterplan or layout drawing and Planlift returns a shareable AI-generated 3D visual in seconds. Built for architects, planners and developers.
description_zh: 上传平面图、总体规划图或布局图，Planlift可在几秒钟内生成可分享的AI生成3D视觉效果图。专为建筑师、规划师和开发商打造。

name: PauseSweep
tagline: Automatically remove pauses from videos on macOS
tagline_zh: 在macOS上自动去除视频中的停顿
description: PauseSweep automatically finds and cuts the pauses, silence and dead air out of your videos and podcasts. Hours of editing down to a minute. Works offline on your Mac.
description_zh: PauseSweep能自动检测并剪掉视频和播客中的停顿、静音和空白时间。数小时的编辑工作，仅需一分钟即可完成。可在Mac上离线使用。

name: Scan Pro Receipts
tagline: Offline receipt scanner — lifetime pricing, easy reporting
tagline_zh: 离线收据扫描仪——终身定价，轻松报告
description: Scan Pro Receipts: offline Android receipt scanner with on-device OCR, fiscal periods, and PDF/CSV/ZIP exports. Review every field before saving. Works without mobile data. Back up to folders you control. 60-day full trial, then USD 29.99 lifetime—no subscription or cloud AI. Built for freelancers, small business, and field sales who email reports to the office plus much more!
description_zh: Scan Pro收据：离线安卓收据扫描仪，配备设备内OCR、会计期间和PDF/CSV/ZIP导出功能。保存前请检查每个字段。无需移动数据即可工作。备份到您控制的文件夹。60天完整试用，之后终身29.99美元——无需订阅或云端AI。专为自由职业者、小型企业和现场销售人员打造，他们通过电子邮件向办公室发送报告，还有更多功能！

name: Xreply
tagline: Grow on X (Twitter) with smart, context aware AI replies.
tagline_zh: 在X（Twitter）上，借助智能、情境感知的AI回复，实现增长。
description: Xreply is an AI powered assistant for X that monitors target accounts, generates natural replies in real time, and schedules them safely to grow your engagement.
description_zh: Xreply是一款由AI驱动的X助手，它能监控目标账户，实时生成自然回复，并安全地安排回复，以提升您的互动度。

name: QueckBiz
tagline: Free invoice & receipt generator. No signup.
tagline_zh: 免费发票和收据生成器。无需注册。
description: Create professional invoices, receipts, estimates, quotes, proposals & delivery notes for free. No signup, no data storage — 100% private browser-based tools.
description_zh: 免费创建专业发票、收据、估价单、报价单、提案和送货单。无需注册，无数据存储——100%基于浏览器的私密工具。

name: Mock Data Generator
tagline: Paste real JSON, get 1,000 coherent rows that match it
tagline_zh: 粘贴真实的JSON数据，获取与之匹配的1000行连贯数据
description: A free, privacy-first mock data generator for developers that creates coherent, reproducible datasets. Generate data using a field picker, a pasted JSON sample, or JSON Schema. Emails, locations, and timestamps stay logically consistent. Use a seed for identical output every time. Export unlimited JSON, NDJSON, or CSV. Runs entirely client-side, works offline, and requires no signup.
description_zh: 一款面向开发者的免费、隐私优先的模拟数据生成器，可创建连贯、可复现的数据集。用户可通过字段选择器、粘贴的JSON示例或JSON模式来生成数据。电子邮件、位置和时间戳在逻辑上保持一致。每次使用种子可获得相同的输出。可导出无限量的JSON、NDJSON或CSV格式数据。该工具完全在客户端运行，支持离线使用，且无需注册。

name: Free QR Code Generator
tagline: Free QR codes for URLs, WiFi & more
tagline_zh: 免费二维码，适用于网址、WiFi等
description: Create QR codes online for free! No signup, no watermarks, no limits. Generate codes for URLs, text, email, phone numbers, and WiFi, then customize colors, size, and error correction. Download as PNG or SVG, or copy to the clipboard. Everything runs 100% in your browser, so your data (even WiFi passwords) never leaves your device. A simple, private alternative to QR Monkey and Adobe's QR generator.
description_zh: 免费在线生成二维码！无需注册，无水印，无限制。为网址、文本、电子邮件、电话号码和WiFi生成二维码，然后自定义颜色、大小和纠错功能。可以下载为PNG或SVG格式，或复制到剪贴板。所有操作均在浏览器中完成，因此您的数据（甚至WiFi密码）永远不会离开您的设备。这是QR Monkey和Adobe二维码生成器的简单、私密的替代方案。

name: RowSink
tagline: Send Data Straight to Your Spreadsheet
tagline_zh: 直接将数据发送到您的电子表格
description: Connect a Google Sheets spreadsheet, get a URL, and send form submissions, webhook payloads, signups, and app events straight into rows. No backend to build or maintain.
description_zh: 连接Google Sheets电子表格，获取URL，并将表单提交、网络钩子有效负载、注册和应用程序事件直接发送到行中。无需构建或维护后端。

name: MyCalculators.app
tagline: 200+ free, ad-free calculators for finance, health & math
tagline_zh: 200+款免费、无广告的金融、健康和数学计算器
description: MyCalculators.app offers 200+ free online calculators across finance, health, and math — mortgage, loan, BMI, tax, retirement, percentage, and more. What makes it different: completely ad-free, no signup, no tracking, and no personal data collected. Fast, mobile-friendly, and built on precise, up-to-date formulas. Just open and calculate.
description_zh: MyCalculators.app提供200多种免费在线计算器，涵盖金融、健康和数学领域——包括房贷、贷款、身体质量指数（BMI）、税务、退休、百分比计算等。其与众不同之处在于：完全无广告、无需注册、无追踪、不收集个人数据。该应用运行快速、适合移动设备使用，且基于精确且最新的公式构建。您只需打开即可开始计算。

name: Waivly Refer - 25% Recurring Commission
tagline: Earn recurring commission by introducing people to Waivly
tagline_zh: 通过向他人介绍Waivly，赚取持续的佣金
description: 25% Recurring Commission On All Future Referrals Unlock access to our Affiliate Program to earn passive income from new members you bring in.
description_zh: 所有未来推荐人可获得25%的持续佣金。解锁我们的联盟计划，通过您带来的新会员赚取被动收入。

name: Song Flow
tagline: Turn ideas into songs with AI
tagline_zh: 用人工智能将创意转化为歌曲
description: Song Flow is an AI-powered app to create original songs, generate music videos, remix tracks, and turn ideas into music in seconds.
description_zh: Song Flow是一款基于人工智能的应用程序，用户可以在几秒钟内创作原创歌曲、生成音乐视频、混音曲目，并将创意转化为音乐。

name: Service Pricing Tool
tagline: Free calculators for local service costs
tagline_zh: 本地服务费用免费计算器
description: Service Pricing Tool is a free calculator library for estimating local service costs before booking. It includes calculators and guides for house cleaning, move-in and move-out cleaning, carpet cleaning, rug cleaning, upholstery cleaning, lawn care, pressure washing, gutter cleaning, junk removal, dog grooming, and auto detailing. It also includes business pricing tools for service owners to review pricing, profit, hourly rates, and packages.
description_zh: 服务定价工具是一个免费的计算器库，用于在预订前估算本地服务费用。它包括房屋清洁、入住和退房清洁、地毯清洁、小地毯清洁、室内装饰清洁、草坪护理、高压清洗、排水沟清洁、垃圾清理、狗狗美容和汽车美容的计算器和指南。此外，它还为服务业主提供了业务定价工具，用于审查定价、利润、小时费率和套餐。

name: CMDReg
tagline: open source for ai skills registry
tagline_zh: 人工智能技能注册的开源项目
description: Publish, discover, and fetch AI skills, commands, tools, and agents.
description_zh: 发布、发现并获取人工智能技能、指令、工具和代理。

name: TrainedTeam
tagline: The AI-native LMS for SOPs, training & proof of work.
tagline_zh: 面向标准操作流程（SOPs）、培训和工作量证明的人工智能原生学习管理系统（LMS）。
description: TrainedTeam is the single home for every SOP, every shift run, and every signed completion. Most tools do half the job - an LMS trains but can't prove work happened; doc tools store SOPs but never test anyone. TrainedTeam closes the loop. Turn a video into a step-by-step SOP with AI, add a knowledge check, then schedule and assign it. Your team runs each step on the job, capturing photo proof and e-signatures for an audit-ready trail and live analytics. Free for up to 5 users.
description_zh: TrainedTeam是每个标准操作流程（SOP）、每次轮班运行和每次签名完成的唯一归宿。大多数工具只能完成一半的工作——学习管理系统（LMS）可以进行培训，但无法证明工作已经完成；文档工具可以存储标准操作流程，但从不测试任何人。TrainedTeam则实现了闭环。利用人工智能将视频转化为详细的步骤式标准操作流程，添加知识检查，然后安排并分配任务。您的团队可以执行工作中的每个步骤，同时捕捉照片证据和电子签名，以备审计和实时分析。最多可供5名用户免费使用。

name: Margin
tagline: Bite-sized news, one card at a time, in your side panel
tagline_zh: 在你的侧边栏里，每次一张卡片，呈现一条条小新闻
description: Margin turns your browser's side panel into a swipeable stack of news cards — pick your topics, read a headline + short summary, tap through to the source. No feed to scroll, no tracking, no account. Free for 3 topics; Plus unlocks the rest.
description_zh: Margin将你浏览器的侧边栏变成了一堆可滑动的新闻卡片——选择你的主题，阅读标题和简短摘要，点击即可跳转到来源。无需滚动信息流，无需追踪，无需账号。前三个主题免费；Plus可解锁其余内容。

name: better-paas v1.8.4
tagline: Deploy like Vercel but full-stack applications + databases
tagline_zh: 像Vercel一样部署，但针对的是全栈应用程序和数据库
description: Why this ? There are already Vercel, Railways, Coolify, Dokploy and 100 more. Glad you asked. Those are great. But Some feels too many features, outdated and other just suck your bank balance when your project get more and more users. I tried to balance those. No surprise bills, No Vendor lock. You own your VPS, data and everything. You are responsible when things goes wrong. 😅
description_zh: 为什么选择这个？市面上已经有Vercel、Railways、Coolify、Dokploy等100多种工具了。很高兴你问到。那些工具都很棒。但有些功能太多，有些已经过时，还有一些会在你的项目用户越来越多时吸干你的银行余额。我试图在这些之间找到平衡。没有意外的账单，没有供应商锁定。你拥有自己的VPS、数据和一切。如果出了问题，你要自己负责。

name: Valkence Connect - Your Unfair Advantage
tagline: Connecting talent, brands, and attention in one place
tagline_zh: 将人才、品牌和关注度汇聚一处
description: We just launched Valkence Connect, and we are building it to be your absolute unfair advantage for scaling influence, growing your brand, and locking down much bigger opportunities. The whole idea here is to completely rethink how talent, brands, and attention intersect by bringing everyone into one centralized ecosystem.
description_zh: 我们刚刚推出了Valkence Connect，我们致力于将其打造成为您扩大影响力、提升品牌知名度以及锁定更多重大机遇的绝对优势。此举的核心思想在于，通过将各方汇聚于一个中心化的生态系统，彻底重塑人才、品牌和注意力之间的相互交织方式。

name: Listora
tagline: Optimize Etsy listings with AI in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可利用人工智能优化Etsy商品列表
description: Optimize your Etsy listings with AI in seconds — generate SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and tags that actually rank. Get real keyword data, audit existing listings with a score and fix list, analyze competitors to find gaps, and bulk-optimize up to 20 listings at once. All free to try, no sign-up required. Most Etsy tools give you generic suggestions. Listora combines real Google search data with AI to show you exactly what buyers search — so your listings get found, not just written.
description_zh: 几秒钟内即可使用人工智能优化您的Etsy商品列表——生成真正能排名的SEO优化标题、描述和标签。获取真实的关键字数据，通过评分和修复列表来审核现有商品列表，分析竞争对手以发现差距，并一次批量优化多达20个商品列表。全部免费试用，无需注册。大多数Etsy工具只能为您提供通用建议。Listora将真实的谷歌搜索数据与人工智能相结合，向您展示买家实际搜索的内容——这样您的商品列表不仅能被写出来，还能被找到。

name: StudentCenter
tagline: AI for educators: teachers and institutions
tagline_zh: 面向教育者的AI：教师和机构
description: Create courses with AI. Turn your notes, references, and learning paths into interactive digital experiences. Students earn credentials they own on-chain, and employers verify any one with a single link, no account.
description_zh: 利用人工智能创建课程。将您的笔记、参考资料和学习路径转化为互动式数字体验。学生可在链上获得自己的证书，雇主只需一个链接即可验证任何证书，无需账户。

name: Practice Rack
tagline: A focused desktop practice rig for guitar and bass
tagline_zh: 专为吉他和贝斯设计的桌面练习装置
description: A focused desktop guitar and bass practice rig with tuner, effects chain, looper, recorder, presets, cabinet IR workflow, and BPM-aware time effects.
description_zh: 一套专业的桌面吉他与贝斯练习设备，配备调音器、效果器链、循环器、录音机、预设、音箱IR工作流程以及BPM感知的时间效果。

name: Flash 'n' Dash
tagline: Interactive arcade flashcards with global leaderboards.
tagline_zh: 带有全球排行榜的互动街机抽认卡。
description: Flash 'n' Dash is a dynamic learning game that turns flashcards into an arcade experience. Master topics in discovery mode, then test your reflexes in a timed arcade mode. What sets us apart? You can compete on global leaderboards for every deck to earn Gold, Silver, and Bronze medals! With daily streaks and a playful, vibrant design, learning finally feels like a game instead of homework.
description_zh: 《Flash 'n' Dash》是一款动态学习游戏，它将闪卡学习转化为街机体验。在探索模式中掌握主题，然后在限时街机模式中测试你的反应速度。我们的独特之处在于，你可以在每副牌的全球排行榜上竞争，获得金、银、铜牌！凭借每日连胜和俏皮、充满活力的设计，学习终于像游戏一样有趣，而不是像作业那么枯燥。

name: CentSight
tagline: Your AI CFO
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能首席财务官
description: CentSight is the AI CFO for businesses doing $1M–$50M in revenue. Connect QuickBooks and your bank via Plaid in minutes, then ask your finances anything in plain English and get real-time, CFO-grade answers. Track runway and burn rate automatically, get proactive alerts when something needs attention, and catch hidden costs like duplicate charges and vendor spend creep before they hurt. No spreadsheets, no month-old reports - just financial clarity, at a fraction of the cost of a fractional CFO.
description_zh: CentSight是专为营收在100万至5000万美元之间的企业打造的AI首席财务官（CFO）助手。只需几分钟，即可通过Plaid连接QuickBooks和您的银行账户，然后以通俗易懂的语言向您的财务系统提问，即可获得实时、CFO级别的专业解答。系统会自动跟踪现金流和烧钱速度，在需要关注时主动发出警报，并在重复收费和供应商支出悄然增加等隐性成本造成损害之前及时发现。无需电子表格，也无需等待一个月的报告——只需花费零碎CFO成本的一小部分，即可获得财务上的清晰度。

name: Landra
tagline: Weirdly Good AI Advertorial & Listicle LPs for DTC Brands
tagline_zh: 面向DTC品牌的奇特好用的AI软文和列表式文章
description: Landra writes the advertorials and listicle landing pages that convert cold paid traffic: the editorial-style pages that warm a visitor up instead of hard-selling them. It takes 3 minutes and you just have to give us your product URL. It will and structure a full page, with all the context of your brand and product, and with imagery in minutes. Built on one rule: educate, build trust, then convert. Made for DTC founders, media buyers, and agencies. getlandra.com
description_zh: Landra撰写能够转化冷付费流量的社论式软文和列表式落地页：这些编辑风格的页面能够为访客营造温馨氛围，而非直接推销。只需3分钟，您只需提供您的产品网址。它将在几分钟内为您构建一个完整的页面，其中包含您品牌和产品的所有背景信息，并配以相关图片。其构建原则只有一个：教育受众，建立信任，然后实现转化。专为DTC创始人、媒体买家和代理商打造。getlandra.com

name: Ugh, What Should I Eat?
tagline: Fun way to decide what to cook or order in
tagline_zh: 决定做什么菜或点什么菜的一种有趣方式
description: Swipe your way out of "what should I eat?" Snap your ingredients for instant recipes, or find a tasty dish to order nearby. COOK IN: make something with what you already have ORDER IN: find the perfect thing to order WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT - Instant recipes from the ingredients you already have - Discover dishes to order from nearby restaurants - Save your favorites to My Food - Smarter suggestions the more you swipe - Built around your diet, allergies, and cuisines
description_zh: 滑动屏幕，轻松解决“我该吃什么？”的问题。快速获取食材，制作即刻食谱，或查找附近可点的美味佳肴。烹饪：用现有食材制作美食；点餐：找到最完美的菜品。为何你会爱上它？——根据已有食材生成即刻食谱；发现附近餐厅的可点菜品；将最爱菜品保存至“我的美食”；滑动越多，智能建议越精准。根据您的饮食偏好、过敏信息和口味偏好量身定制

name: Tinswin Dev Toolkit — Apitron + CacheBin
tagline: Two macOS dev tools, built to fix small daily friction.
tagline_zh: 两个macOS开发工具，旨在解决日常使用中的小问题。
description: Apitron v1.1.3 — a leaner Postman for macOS. Imports no longer wipe your local edits; conflicts are visible and controllable. CacheBin 1.0.0 — dev cache cleaner that actually knows DerivedData, SPM, Docker, npm. Preview everything before anything goes.
description_zh: Apitron v1.1.3 — macOS 上的精简版 Postman。导入操作不再清除本地编辑内容；冲突情况一目了然且可控。CacheBin 1.0.0 — 开发缓存清理工具，真正了解 DerivedData、SPM、Docker、npm。在执行任何操作前预览所有内容。

name: Veloxa
tagline: AI chatbot that books, answers & manages customers 24/7
tagline_zh: 24/7预订、解答和管理客户的AI聊天机器人
description: Veloxa AI is a smart chat widget any business can add to their website with one line of code. It handles customer queries, appointment bookings, rescheduling and cancellations — automatically, 24/7. No extra staff needed. ✅ Works in English, & other Languages ✅ Live dashboard — see all bookings & conversations ✅ Supports any business type — clinic, salon, restaurant, ecommerce ✅ 7-day free trial, no card required Setup in 60 seconds. Your AI receptionist, always online.
description_zh: Veloxa AI是一款智能聊天小部件，任何企业只需一行代码即可将其添加到自己的网站上。它能够自动处理客户咨询、预约、重新安排和取消预约，全天候服务。无需额外员工。✅支持英语和其他语言✅实时控制面板——查看所有预约和对话✅支持任何业务类型——诊所、沙龙、餐厅、电商✅7天免费试用，无需信用卡60秒完成设置。你的AI接待员，始终在线。

name: Peek
tagline: A quiet macOS menu bar switcher for keyboard-heavy work.
tagline_zh: 一个适用于键盘密集型工作的macOS菜单栏切换器，操作安静。
description: Peek helps Mac users switch between apps and windows without opening a heavy workspace tool. The core switcher is free, with Pro for unlimited favorites, hidden apps, layout control, and direct license activation.
description_zh: Peek可帮助Mac用户在不打开繁重的工作区工具的情况下，在应用程序和窗口之间进行切换。核心切换器是免费的，而Pro版则提供无限制收藏夹、隐藏应用程序、布局控制以及直接许可证激活功能。

name: QuantX
tagline: Learn financial markets, the smart way
tagline_zh: 以聪明的方式学习金融市场
description: QuantX is the first gamified app to master financial markets. Black-Scholes, Greeks, VaR, CAPM and derivatives, turned into bite-sized, interactive lessons. Built for Master's students at top business schools and professionals preparing the AMF certification. No direct competitor combines advanced market finance, gamification and mobile format. Content reviewed by leading finance professors in France.
description_zh: QuantX是首款掌握金融市场的游戏化应用。它将布莱克-斯科尔斯模型、希腊值、风险值、资本资产定价模型和衍生品等知识，转化为易于理解的互动课程。该应用专为顶尖商学院的研究生和准备AMF认证的专业人士打造。目前尚无直接竞争对手能将高级市场金融、游戏化和移动格式完美结合。内容经过法国顶尖金融学教授的审核。

name: SelfForje
tagline: The app that helps you forge who you want to become
tagline_zh: 这款应用助你塑造理想自我
description: SelfForje turns your goals, habits, and tasks into visible skill progression. Instead of tracking disconnected habits and to-dos, you build a skill tree across areas like health, career, learning, relationships, and creativity. Every action contributes to the person you're becoming. Track progress with XP, levels, streaks, reports, and heatmaps. Stay motivated through duels, leaderboards, shared skill trees and calendars. Track not just what you do, but who you're becoming.
description_zh: SelfForje将你的目标、习惯和任务转化为可见的技能进度。你不再孤立地追踪习惯和待办事项，而是在健康、职业、学习、人际关系和创造力等领域构建一个技能树。每一个行动都有助于你成为更好的自己。通过经验值（XP）、等级、连续记录、报告和热图来追踪进度。通过决斗、排行榜、共享技能树和日历来保持动力。不仅要追踪你所做的事情，还要追踪你正在成为什么样的人。

name: Peppolpdf
tagline: Peppol XML into a complete, elegant and customer-ready PDF
tagline_zh: 将Peppol XML转换为完整、优雅且适合客户的PDF格式
description: Convert Peppol BIS 3.0 XML invoices into modern, configurable PDFs. Peppolpdf provides complete invoice field coverage, multilingual support, customizable layouts, and GDPR-friendly stateless processing through a simple API. Designed for ERP vendors, accounting platforms, and developers who need high-quality invoice PDFs without building and maintaining their own rendering solution.
description_zh: 将Peppol BIS 3.0 XML发票转换为现代、可配置的PDF格式。Peppolpdf通过简单的API提供完整的发票字段覆盖、多语言支持、可定制的布局以及符合GDPR的无状态处理。专为ERP供应商、会计平台和需要高质量发票PDF而无需构建和维护自己的渲染解决方案的开发人员设计。

name: Astrika
tagline: AI Vedic Jyotishi on your real chart - private, flat-price
tagline_zh: AI吠陀占星术解读你的真实星盘——私人定制，价格公道
description: Most astrology apps put you on a per-minute call with an astrologer who can see all your data. Astrika doesn't. You get your real chart (Swiss Ephemeris, classical Parashari) and an AI writes honest answers on it. Flat ₹49 a question, ₹249 a full reading. No call, no upsell. Your chart never leaves our servers - no human astrologer ever sees it. First reading and first question are free.
description_zh: 大多数占星术应用程序会安排占星家与你进行每分钟的通话，占星家可以看到你的所有数据。但Astrika却不是这样。你会得到一份真实的星盘（瑞士星历表，古典帕拉沙里占星术），然后由人工智能在上面写下诚实的答案。每个问题收费49卢比，完整解读收费249卢比。没有通话，也没有追加销售。你的星盘永远不会离开我们的服务器——没有任何占星家会看到它。首次解读和首次提问是免费的。

name: mainiø
tagline: Build real AI fluency. Five minutes a day.
tagline_zh: 培养真正的人工智能流利度。每天五分钟。
description: mainiø teaches you how to actually use AI at work. Not prompts, not theory. Short daily missions that build real confidence with AI decisions. For people who use AI every day but don't fully trust what it produces. Free to start.
description_zh: Mainiø教你如何在工作中实际使用人工智能。不是提示，不是理论。简短的日常任务，让你对人工智能决策真正有信心。适合那些每天使用人工智能但对其产出不完全信任的人。免费开始。

name: Pome AI
tagline: Shazam for food 🍎
tagline_zh: 为食物点歌🍎
description: Stop tracking calories like it's 2010. Pome AI is a premium, minimalist calorie tracker that acts like Shazam for your food. Just snap a photo, and our AI instantly breaks down the macros and calories with a stunning dark-mode aesthetic. No manual entry, no friction.
description_zh: 别再像2010年那样记录卡路里了。Pome AI是一款高端、极简的卡路里追踪器，就像是你食物的Shazam。只需拍张照片，我们的AI就会立即分解出食物中的宏量营养素和卡路里，同时呈现出惊艳的深色模式美学。无需手动输入，使用起来毫无障碍。

name: stupidlyfit
tagline: get FIT with just your voice
tagline_zh: 仅凭你的声音就能获得FIT
description: stupidlyfit is a super simple fitness app. Track your meals and workouts with your voice, then get real weekly insights on what to do next. The more you show up, the clearer your plan gets.
description_zh: stupidlyfit是一款超级简单的健身应用。用语音记录你的饮食和锻炼情况，然后每周获得关于下一步行动的真正见解。你参与的越多，你的计划就会越清晰。

name: Forq
tagline: VS Code agentic issue board
tagline_zh: VS Code代理问题板
description: Forq turns VS Code into an issue management panel for Claude Code. Move an issue to To Do and Forq launches a Claude code instance for it, isolated in its own git worktree, running as an editor tab — then moves it to In Review when it's done. Launch, isolate, and resume as many as you want, all working at once. Also integrates with Linear issue manager, which has a mobile app.
description_zh: Forq将VS Code转变为Claude Code的问题管理面板。将一个问题移动到“待办事项”列表中，Forq会为其启动一个Claude Code实例，该实例独立于其自己的Git工作树中，作为编辑器标签页运行——完成后将其移动到“审阅中”列表。您可以根据需要启动、隔离和恢复任意数量的实例，所有这些都可以同时进行。此外，它还与Linear问题管理器集成，后者有一个移动应用程序。

name: Kith
tagline: Your AI's memory, identical on every machine you own
tagline_zh: 你的人工智能的内存，在你拥有的每台机器上都是相同的
description: Kith gives you and your AI one shared memory. Your notes, saved tabs, and files live in a private, end-to-end-encrypted store that's identical on every device you own. Run kith serve and Claude Desktop or Cursor read and write the exact same local data over MCP. No account, no cloud, no server that can read it — pair a device with a short code.
description_zh: Kith为您和您的AI提供了一个共享内存。您的笔记、保存的标签和文件都存储在一个私密的、端到端加密的存储空间中，该存储空间在您拥有的每台设备上都是相同的。运行kith serve和Claude Desktop或Cursor，即可通过MCP读写完全相同的本地数据。无需账户、无需云端、无需服务器即可读取——只需将设备与一个短代码配对即可。

name: Carbon
tagline: The analytics layer of AI
tagline_zh: 人工智能的分析层
description: Know exactly what your AI is doing and what it costs. Carbon captures every LLM and tool call in 2 lines of code and turns it into a queryable ledger — cost over time, spend by model, heaviest users, tool failures, where agents stall. Every provider, 1,000 events free.
description_zh: 准确了解您的人工智能（AI）正在做什么以及其成本。Carbon只需两行代码即可捕获每个大型语言模型（LLM）和工具调用的信息，并将其转化为可查询的账本——包括随时间变化的成本、按模型分类的支出、使用量最大的用户、工具故障以及代理停滞的位置。每个提供商均可免费处理1000个事件。

name: ai-profiles
tagline: Run multiple Claude & Codex accounts without logging out
tagline_zh: 无需退出登录即可运行多个Claude & Codex账户
description: Run multiple Claude and Codex accounts side by side on one Mac - desktop apps and CLIs both. Each profile gets its own launcher, CLI command, login, and usage meters. Switch instantly, no logging out. Free, open-source, and 100% local - no telemetry, no cloud.
description_zh: 在一台Mac上同时运行多个Claude和Codex账户——包括桌面应用和命令行界面（CLI）两种方式。每个账户配置文件都有独立的启动器、CLI命令、登录界面和使用情况统计。可即时切换，无需退出登录。免费、开源且100%本地化——无数据收集，无云端存储。

name: ShipLog
tagline: Your changelog, written for you.
tagline_zh: 你的更新日志，为你量身定制。
description: ShipLog automatically reads your GitHub commits, PRs, and merges, then uses AI to generate beautiful, human-friendly changelogs your users will actually read and understand. You'll get a public hosted changelog page + a clean embeddable widget you can drop directly into your own website.
description_zh: ShipLog会自动读取您的GitHub提交记录、拉取请求（PR）和合并记录，然后利用人工智能生成美观且易于理解的变更日志，让您的用户能够真正阅读和理解。您将获得一个公开托管的变更日志页面，以及一个干净的可嵌入小部件，可直接嵌入到您自己的网站中。

name: Socket2
tagline: Instant folder sharing
tagline_zh: 即时文件夹共享
description: Ever wanted to share a whole folder — not just a single file — without uploading anything anywhere? 📁 Socket2 turns your browser tab into a private static web server in 1 click. Your files never leave your device; we just tunnel them over an encrypted WebSocket. Share docs, send clients a link, even host a live website straight from your laptop at a café ☕ SSL + password protected. No subscription — buy bandwidth that never expires. Close the tab, server's gone. 🔒
description_zh: 你是否曾想过分享整个文件夹——而不仅仅是单个文件——而无需将任何内容上传到任何地方？📁 Socket2只需一键，即可将你的浏览器标签页变成一个私密的静态网络服务器。你的文件永远不会离开你的设备；我们只是通过加密的WebSocket将它们传输。分享文档、给客户发送链接，甚至在咖啡馆里直接从你的笔记本电脑托管一个实时网站☕，这些都可以做到，而且SSL加密+密码保护。无需订阅——购买永不过期的带宽。关闭标签页，服务器即消失。

name: SocialLife Diary: Your Social Timeline
tagline: Your social life, remembered privately, shared your way.
tagline_zh: 你的社交生活，私下里被铭记，以你的方式被分享。
description: Remember every meetup. Understand your social life. Track meetups with photos, locations, people, tags, mood emojis, ratings, spending, and drinks. Build a timeline of your social life and share memories to social media. Discover who you see most, your favorite places, who makes you happiest, where your money goes, and how your social habits change over time. 100% private. Everything stays on your device. No account needed. 7-day free trial, then $5 lifetime. iPhone only.
description_zh: 记住每一次聚会。了解你的社交生活。通过照片、地点、人物、标签、心情表情、评分、消费和饮品来追踪聚会。建立你的社交生活时间线，并在社交媒体上分享回忆。发现你见得最多的人、最喜欢的地方、让你最开心的人、钱都花在哪里，以及你的社交习惯如何随时间变化。100%私密。所有内容都保存在你的设备上。无需注册账号。7天免费试用，之后终身5美元。仅限iPhone。

name: On-device AI asks why before you scroll
tagline: Your apps run you on autopilot. Meridian gives you back.
tagline_zh: 你的应用程序让你轻松自如。而Meridian则让你重获自由。
description: Meridian is a privacy-first Android app that puts a moment of intention between you and your most-used apps. Before you open Instagram or TikTok, Kairos, Meridian's on-device AI asks why you're there. No cloud. No data collection. No subscription. One-time purchase. Built for people who already know they have a phone problem and want a tool that respects their intelligence instead of gamifying their behavior. The AI runs entirely on your device. Your patterns stay yours.
description_zh: Meridian是一款以隐私为先的安卓应用，它在你和你最常用的应用之间加入了一个思考的时刻。在你打开Instagram或TikTok之前，Meridian的内置AI会询问你为何要使用这些应用。无云端存储。无数据收集。无订阅。一次性购买。专为那些已经意识到自己手机使用存在问题，并希望找到一个尊重其智能、而非将行为游戏化的工具的人而设计。AI完全在你的设备上运行。你的使用模式始终属于你。

name: DocsBot Actions
tagline: Turn support answers into approved actions
tagline_zh: 将支持性回答转化为已批准的行动
description: DocsBot already helps teams answer customer questions from trusted content. DocsBot Actions takes the next step: your AI agent can use approved tools and workflows to collect leads, book meetings, check billing details, find invoices, trigger workflows, and hand off with the right context, so customers do not just get an answer. They get the next step handled.
description_zh: DocsBot已经能够通过可信内容帮助团队回答客户问题。DocsBot Actions则更进一步：您的AI代理可以使用经过批准的工具和工作流程来收集线索、预约会议、核对账单详情、查找发票、触发工作流程，并在适当的情境下进行交接，这样客户不仅能得到答案，还能得到后续处理。

name: BucketFlow
tagline: Zero-based budgeting built like the Barefoot Investor system
tagline_zh: 零基预算，仿照《赤脚投资者》系统构建
description: Most budgeting apps make you adapt to them. BucketFlow is built around the Barefoot Investor bucket system, Essentials, Fun Money, Goals, and Financial Progress, so if you've read the book, it just clicks. Every payday you fill your buckets, every dollar gets a job. No subscriptions, no app store, works on your phone instantly. Built this because I couldn't find anything that matched the way Scott Pape actually teaches budgeting. It's free, and I'd love feedback.
description_zh: 大多数预算应用程序都需要你去适应它们。BucketFlow是围绕“赤脚投资者”的五个预算桶系统（必需品、娱乐资金、目标、财务进步）构建的，所以如果你读过这本书，它就会非常契合。每个发薪日，你都会填满你的预算桶，每一美元都有其用途。无需订阅，无需应用商店，即刻在你的手机上运行。我之所以开发这个应用程序，是因为我找不到任何与斯科特·佩普实际教授的预算方法相匹配的东西。它是免费的，我很欢迎反馈。

name: LemonKnows
tagline: Independent AI-powered consumer safety engine.
tagline_zh: 独立的人工智能驱动消费者安全引擎。
description: Before you buy, Lemon Knows. Instantly cross-reference 41K+ global government recalls (NHTSA, CPSC, FDA, EU Safety Gate) and 100K+ consumer complaints. Completely self-funded, tracking-light, and optimized to serve lightning-fast data across 7 languages natively. Why it's the best: It establishes immediate authority by dropping your massive data metrics right away. It tells users exactly what problem you solve and proves you have the scale to back it up.
description_zh: 在您购买之前，Lemon Knows。可即时交叉引用41,000+份全球政府召回报告（NHTSA、CPSC、FDA、欧盟安全门户）和100,000+份消费者投诉。完全自筹资金，轻量级跟踪，并优化为以7种语言原生提供闪电般快速的数据。为何它是最优选择：它通过立即展示您的大量数据指标来树立权威。它告诉用户您确切解决了什么问题，并证明您有足够的规模来支持这一点。

name: Convertilo
tagline: All-in-one file toolkit that runs in your browser
tagline_zh: 在浏览器中运行的一站式文件工具包
description: Compress and convert images, work with PDFs, translate with neural network, calculators — all in your browser. No registration, no server uploads.
description_zh: 压缩和转换图片、处理PDF文件、使用神经网络进行翻译、使用计算器——一切尽在您的浏览器中。无需注册，无需服务器上传。

name: ClipAI
tagline: Turn one long video into scored, ready-to-post clips
tagline_zh: 将一个长视频分割成带有配乐、可随时发布的剪辑片段
description: Turn your long video into short, scored clips - captioned, reframed to 9:16, and scheduled everywhere. The only virality score checked against your real views.
description_zh: 将你的长视频剪辑成短小、有配乐的片段——配上字幕，重新调整为9:16比例，并在各处进行定时发布。唯一与你的真实观看量相对应的病毒式传播分数。

name: aiCoChef 2.0
tagline: Make Better and Personalized Food Decisions
tagline_zh: 做出更优质、更个性化的饮食决策
description: Since our first launch, aiCoChef has evolved into a complete food decision platform. Beyond AI-powered recipes, users can evaluate foods, plan meals, generate grocery lists, manage dietary preferences, scan products for nutrition insights, and discover community recipes. This launch brings aiCoChef to iPhone and iPad, making personalized food decisions accessible across both iOS and Android.
description_zh: 自首次发布以来，aiCoChef已发展成为一个全面的食品决策平台。除了基于人工智能的食谱，用户还可以评估食品、规划餐食、生成购物清单、管理饮食偏好、扫描产品以获取营养信息，以及发现社区食谱。此次发布将aiCoChef引入iPhone和iPad，使得用户可以在iOS和Android设备上轻松做出个性化的食品决策。

name: TickerNote
tagline: AI analyst for every U.S. listed company
tagline_zh: 为每家美国上市公司配备AI分析师
description: Enter any ticker and get a clean company profile: what the business does, how it makes money, who it competes with, and what risks it faces. No jargon, no spreadsheets.
description_zh: 输入任何股票代码，即可获得清晰的公司概况：业务范围、盈利方式、竞争对手以及面临的风险。没有行话，也没有电子表格。

name: FaceGate
tagline: The only MacOS app-locker anyone would ever need.
tagline_zh: 任何人都会需要的唯一一款MacOS应用锁。
description: If you hand your laptop to someone for a few minutes, they can open your personal apps. I wanted a way to protect specific applications without constantly locking my entire Mac. I looked around for solutions, but most were outdated, paid, abandoned, or didn't feel native to macOS. So I built FaceGate. FaceGate is a native macOS app that lets you lock individual applications and unlock them using Face Unlock, Touch ID, or a password. Everything runs locally on your Mac. No subscriptions
description_zh: 如果你把笔记本电脑交给别人几分钟，他们就能打开你的个人应用。我想要一种方法来保护特定的应用程序，而无需频繁锁定整个Mac。我四处寻找解决方案，但大多数都已过时、需要付费、已被弃用，或者感觉与macOS不兼容。因此，我开发了FaceGate。FaceGate是一款macOS原生应用，可让你锁定单个应用程序，并使用Face Unlock、Touch ID或密码解锁。所有操作都在你的Mac本地运行。

name: My Own Mascot
tagline: A desktop pet you can dress up and chat with
tagline_zh: 一个可以打扮、可以聊天的桌面宠物
description: My Own Mascot is an animated character that lives on your Mac. It follows your cursor, walks around, and chats with you using AI. It says good morning, reminds you to take breaks, and worries when your battery runs low. You can even import your own illustrations, so your own character lives right on your desktop.
description_zh: “我的专属吉祥物”是一个生活在你的Mac上的动画角色。它会跟随你的光标移动，四处走动，并使用人工智能与你聊天。它会说早上好，提醒你休息，当你的电池电量不足时还会表示担忧。你甚至可以导入自己的插图，这样你自己的角色就会直接出现在你的桌面上。

name: Stature — AirPods Posture Coach
tagline: Real-time posture coaching, powered by your AirPods
tagline_zh: 由您的AirPods提供支持的实时姿势指导
description: Every posture app fails the same way — nothing catches you the moment you slouch. Stature does, using the motion sensors already in your AirPods. No camera, brace, or clip. Drop below neutral and you feel a gentle buzz, instantly, all day, in the background. What's different: real-time AirPods head tracking, a Dynamic Island Live Activity, focus sessions, daily reports, Apple Health sync, and a 14-day habit program. The problem was never motivation. It was memory — Stature remembers for you.
description_zh: 每款姿势监测应用都以同样的方式失败——你一放松，就什么都检测不到。而Stature却能做到，它利用你AirPods中已有的运动传感器。无需摄像头、支架或夹子。一旦你的姿势低于标准，你就会立刻感觉到一种轻微的嗡嗡声，这种声音会全天候在后台响起。与众不同的是：实时AirPods头部追踪、动态岛实时活动、专注时段、每日报告、Apple Health同步以及14天习惯养成计划。问题从来不是动力，而是记忆——Stature会为你记住。

name: Blankie 2.0
tagline: Open-source ambient sound mixer now on iOS, CarPlay and Mac
tagline_zh: 开源环境音混音器现已支持iOS、CarPlay和Mac
description: Blankie helps people all over the world focus, relax and sleep with high-quality ambient sounds (rain, waves, fireplaces, coffee shops, and more) mixed into custom soundscapes. In Blankie 2.0, listeners can now import their own audio, use sleeps timers, set animated lock-screen artwork and take their mixes on the road with CarPlay. Blankie is open source, localized in 12 languages, fully accessible with VoiceOver and 100% free forever.
description_zh: Blankie通过将高品质的环境声音（如雨声、海浪声、壁炉声、咖啡店声等）融入定制的音景中，帮助世界各地的人们集中注意力、放松身心并入睡。在Blankie 2.0中，听众现在可以导入自己的音频，使用睡眠定时器，设置动画锁屏壁纸，并通过CarPlay将他们的混音作品随身携带。Blankie是开源的，支持12种语言，可通过VoiceOver完全访问，并且永久免费。

name: FayeBot
tagline: AI support bot that talks to customers & captures leads
tagline_zh: 与客户交流并获取销售线索的AI支持机器人
description: Fayebot is an AI support agent that lives on your site, talks to your customers in real conversations, answers their questions, and automatically extracts qualified leads. Integrate it in a single line of code. No setup marathon, no bottleneck—just support that scales.
description_zh: Fayebot是一款人工智能支持代理，它存在于您的网站上，能够与客户进行真实对话，回答他们的问题，并自动提取合格的潜在客户。只需一行代码即可完成集成。无需漫长的设置过程，也没有瓶颈——只需支持即可实现扩展。

name: AI Icon Generator
tagline: Generate unique app icons with AI in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可使用人工智能生成独一无二的应用图标
description: AI Icon Generator helps founders, makers, and designers create polished icons for apps, websites, and products from a simple prompt. It is built for fast visual exploration, so you can generate icon ideas quickly and use them as a starting point for branding, landing pages, and launches.
description_zh: AI图标生成器可帮助创始人、创客和设计师仅凭简单提示，即可为应用、网站和产品创作出精美的图标。该工具专为快速视觉探索而设计，因此您可以快速生成图标创意，并将其作为品牌推广、落地页和产品发布的起点。

name: supafix
tagline: Fast security audit for Supabase projects. Fix it. Secure it
tagline_zh: Supabase项目的快速安全审计。修复它，保护它
description: AI writes your Supabase code. It makes the same mistakes every time. supafix finds them in seconds, and fixes the ones it can. Supafixis a lightweight package that runs in your terminal. No run time dependencies, fast, secure and light.
description_zh: AI编写你的Supabase代码。它每次都会犯同样的错误。supafix能在几秒钟内找到这些错误，并修复它能修复的错误。Supafix是一个轻量级的包，可在终端中运行。无运行时依赖，快速、安全且轻便。

name: Orbbis
tagline: Build a Discord bot visually no code,no sign-up,free forever
tagline_zh: 无需代码、无需注册、永久免费，即可可视化构建Discord机器人
description: Orbbis is a free, open-source Discord bot builder. You configure everything through a clean 4-step visual editor — commands, moderation, ticket systems, reaction roles, welcome messages and more. At the end, you download a ready-to-host Node.js project and deploy it on Discloud, Railway, or Render in minutes. No account required. No paywalls. Just open the editor and start building. I built this entirely solo as an indie project. Would love your feedback! 🚀 🔗 https://xqops.github.io/orbbis/
description_zh: Orbbis是一款免费、开源的Discord机器人构建工具。您可以通过简洁的4步可视化编辑器配置所有内容——命令、审核、工单系统、反应角色、欢迎消息等。最后，您只需下载一个即刻可用的Node.js项目，并在几分钟内将其部署到Discloud、Railway或Render上。无需注册账户。无付费门槛。只需打开编辑器即可开始构建。我完全独立开发了这个项目，作为一个独立项目。非常期待您的反馈！🚀 🔗 https://xqops.github.io/orbbis/

name: Technologies.lat
tagline: Quality Assurance for software that is here for the long run
tagline_zh: 为长期使用的软件提供质量保证
description: TechnologiesLat is a platform to help you ship and monitor your apps. Automated QA tests key workflows in apps. Build what you want and make sure it still works 1, 3, or 6 months later with AI workflows. Core problem: software maintenance.
description_zh: TechnologiesLat是一个平台，旨在帮助您发布和监控您的应用程序。它能够自动对应用程序中的关键工作流程进行质量保证（QA）测试。您可以构建您想要的内容，并通过人工智能（AI）工作流程确保它在1个月、3个月或6个月后仍然能够正常运行。核心问题在于软件维护。

name: Quilly
tagline: Describe your blog. Quilly writes, publishes, and ranks it.
tagline_zh: 描述你的博客。Quilly负责撰写、发布并对其进行排名。
description: Quilly turns a plain-English description of your blog into a working content operation. It designs a ghostwriter in your voice — topics, tone, and cadence — then drafts posts onto a calendar and publishes to Webflow, WordPress, or a headless CMS (Strapi/Payload). It also audits your existing pages and bulk-fixes meta, alt text, and schema, builds programmatic long-tail pages, and tracks what each post earns in Google Search Console. Runs on Claude or ChatGPT. Free to start.
description_zh: Quilly能将您博客的普通英文描述转化为可操作的内容运营。它以您的声音设计代写人——包括主题、语气和节奏——然后将帖子草稿安排到日历中，并发布到Webflow、WordPress或无头内容管理系统（Strapi/Payload）。它还能审核您现有的页面，批量修复元数据、替代文本和模式，构建程序化的长尾页面，并在Google Search Console中跟踪每篇帖子的收益情况。该工具可在Claude或ChatGPT上运行。免费试用。

name: Sai
tagline: AI Voice and Chat Agents for MENA Region
tagline_zh: 面向中东和北非地区的AI语音和聊天代理
description: Sai is MENA's voice and chat AI agent platform. Build AI agents that answer calls, WhatsApp, and live chat — qualifying leads, resolving support, and booking appointments end-to-end. Unlike Western voice AI that only handles textbook Arabic, Sai speaks 27+ languages and real dialects: Gulf, Egyptian, Levantine, Maghrebi. ~85% of inquiries resolved instantly at a ~1-second response time, 24/7. No-code — build your agent and go live in minutes.
description_zh: Sai是MENA的语音和聊天人工智能代理平台。构建能够接听电话、WhatsApp消息和进行实时聊天的人工智能代理，从而端到端地筛选合格线索、解决支持问题并预约会面。与仅能处理标准阿拉伯语的西方语音人工智能不同，Sai能说27种以上的语言和真实方言：海湾阿拉伯语、埃及阿拉伯语、黎凡特阿拉伯语、马格里布阿拉伯语。约85%的询问可在约1秒的响应时间内立即解决，全天候服务。无需编码——只需几分钟即可构建您的代理并上线使用。

name: SeoWave
tagline: Does AI recommend your business? Check 7 AIs, free
tagline_zh: 人工智能是否为您的业务提供推荐？免费试用7款人工智能
description: Classic SEO tools only see Google. But your customers now ask ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity before they buy — and you're invisible there. SeoWave checks 7 AI engines every week, shows whether each one recommends you or your competitor, and which sources they trust. You get a plain-language action plan and a client-ready PDF report — your logo, no watermark. Free scan, no card. Plans from $19/mo, while most rivals start at $99+.
description_zh: 传统SEO工具只能看到谷歌。但如今，你的客户在购买前会先询问ChatGPT、Gemini和Perplexity——而你在这些平台上却隐身不见。SeoWave每周会检查7个AI引擎，显示每个引擎是推荐你还是推荐你的竞争对手，以及它们信任哪些来源。你会收到一份通俗易懂的行动计划和一份为客户准备的PDF报告——报告上印有你的标志，无水印。免费扫描，无需卡片。我们的计划起价每月19美元，而大多数竞争对手的起价都在99美元以上。

name: Memora
tagline: Private, local AI photo search for Windows (free)
tagline_zh: 适用于Windows的本地私人AI照片搜索（免费）
description: Memora is a free Windows photo manager that searches your library with natural language, all processed locally. Describe a scene like "sunset over mountains" and find it instantly. Imports Lightroom and Capture One catalogs, supports RAW, and never uploads your photos.
description_zh: Memora是一款免费的Windows照片管理器，它使用自然语言搜索您的图库，所有操作均在本地完成。只需描述一个场景，如“山上的日落”，即可立即找到。它支持导入Lightroom和Capture One目录，支持RAW格式，且永远不会上传您的照片。

name: HappyHorse 1.1
tagline: Turn Ideas Into Cinematic Videos With AI
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能，将创意转化为电影级视频
description: HappyHorse-1.1-I2V supports Image-to-Video generation with improved visual quality, dynamic performance, and cross-clip consistency. It more accurately understands the input image and preserves creative intent, delivering significant improvements in skin texture realism, character ID consistency across clips, motion smoothness, text rendering stability, and audio-visual synchronization, producing high-quality videos with greater realism, richer details, and stronger overall consistency.
description_zh: HappyHorse-1.1-I2V支持图像到视频的生成，具有更高的视觉质量、更动态的表现力和跨片段的一致性。它能够更准确地理解输入图像并保留创作意图，在皮肤纹理的真实感、片段间角色身份的一致性、动作流畅性、文本渲染的稳定性以及视听同步性等方面都有显著提升，从而制作出更具真实感、细节更丰富、整体一致性更强的高质量视频。

name: CrossUI Studio
tagline: The IDE for React - AI writes the logic, you tune the UI
tagline_zh: React的集成开发环境——AI编写逻辑，你负责调整用户界面
description: CrossUI Studio is a visual IDE for React and MUI (and shadcn/ui). Code and canvas stay in two-way sync on the same AST: edit code and the canvas updates live; click an element on the canvas, change a prop, and you get a one-line diff in the actual file-not a 200-line rewrite. The idea is simple: AI writes the logic, Studio tunes the UI. AI is great at architecture, data flow, and refactors, but bad at pixel-level UI tuning. Studio is the visual half-surgical, reviewable edits on your real code.
description_zh: CrossUI Studio是一款针对React和MUI（以及shadcn/ui）的可视化集成开发环境（IDE）。代码和画布在同一抽象语法树（AST）上保持双向同步：编辑代码时，画布实时更新；在画布上点击一个元素，更改一个属性，实际文件就会显示一行差异，而不是200行的重写。这个想法很简单：AI编写逻辑，Studio调整用户界面（UI）。AI擅长架构、数据流和重构，但不擅长像素级的UI调整。Studio则是对真实代码进行视觉上的半手术式、可审查的编辑。

name: Akrual
tagline: Run structured-credit deals without parallel spreadsheets
tagline_zh: 无需使用电子表格即可执行结构化信贷交易
description: Akrual is the operating system for structured credit — over R$2 trillion already managed on it. Securitizers, trustees and fund managers run debentures, CRI, CRA, FIDC, NCE and CCB on one auditable base, with no parallel spreadsheets. Position, collateral, covenants and cash stay live; contractual and regulatory obligations become executable workflows with alerts, approvals and an audit trail. Reports flow from one source of truth. ISO/IEC 27001 · LGPD · 50+ integrations · zero lock-in.
description_zh: Akrual是结构化信贷的操作系统——已在其上管理超过2万亿雷亚尔。证券化机构、受托人和基金经理在一个可审计的基础上管理债券、CRI、CRA、FIDC、NCE和CCB，无需使用多个电子表格。头寸、抵押品、契约和现金保持实时更新；合同和监管义务成为具有警报、审批和审计追踪的可执行工作流程。报告来自一个真实的数据源。ISO/IEC 27001认证、LGPD合规、50多种集成、零锁定。

name: Notal
tagline: Notes become living operations
tagline_zh: 笔记变成生动的操作
description: Notal turns markdown notebooks into long-running systems agents work from. Write the plan once with notal blocks; each block becomes an activity with a role, cycle, and dependencies. Agents pull current work through MCP, execute, and log results back into the same record. The queue empties itself. When the cycle returns, the work comes back. Four marketplace prompts ship today: repo health, post metrics, billing review, restaurant opening. Free for one notebook, $5/month for twenty.
description_zh: Notal将Markdown笔记本转化为代理人员工作的长期运行系统。使用Notal块一次性编写计划；每个块都成为一个活动，包含角色、周期和依赖关系。代理人员通过MCP获取当前工作，执行并将结果记录回同一记录中。队列自行清空。当周期返回时，工作会再次出现。今天发布了四个市场提示：仓库健康状况、发布指标、账单审核、餐厅开业。一个笔记本免费，二十个笔记本每月5美元。

name: Backdrop Supply
tagline: Free premium backgrounds for modern websites
tagline_zh: 为现代网站提供免费的高级背景
description: A curated library of free, production-ready abstract backgrounds for web designers and builders. Download high-resolution PNGs or copy hosted image URLs, Tailwind, React, and HTML/CSS snippets for no-code and code-based projects.
description_zh: 这是一个经过精心筛选的免费库，包含可用于网页设计和构建的生产级抽象背景。您可以下载高分辨率的PNG格式图片，或复制托管图片的URL，以及适用于无代码和基于代码项目的Tailwind、React和HTML/CSS代码片段。

name: Cepho
tagline: Your IDE lives in the cloud. Code from your phone.
tagline_zh: 你的集成开发环境（IDE）在云端。从你的手机编写代码。
description: Cepho syncs your Cursor or VS Code workspace to the cloud — so you can continue coding from your phone, without your PC staying on. Ask Cepho AI about your codebase, get suggestions, and apply changes directly back to your files. Everything syncs automatically. One command installs the extension. One tap connects your phone. Cloud is the truth — devices are windows.
description_zh: Cepho将您的Cursor或VS Code工作区同步到云端，这样您就可以在手机上继续编码，而无需保持电脑开启。向Cepho AI询问您的代码库，获取建议，并将更改直接应用到您的文件中。所有内容都会自动同步。一个命令即可安装扩展程序。一次点击即可连接您的手机。云端才是王道——设备只是窗口。

name: Recall
tagline: Know when Claude will cut you off — before it happens
tagline_zh: 在克劳德打断你之前，就知道他什么时候会打断你
description: Recall is a real-time context & quota monitor built exclusively for Claude.ai. See exactly how full your context window is, where tokens are going (conversation, files, project, tools, system prompt), and how many messages you have left in your 5-hour and weekly quota windows. When a chat gets long, Recall nudges you to summarize and carry it into a fresh conversation — in one click.
description_zh: Recall是一款专为Claude.ai打造的实时上下文与配额监控工具。您可准确查看上下文窗口的占用情况、标记（conversation、files、project、tools、system prompt）的去向，以及您在5小时和每周配额窗口中剩余的消息数量。当聊天内容过长时，Recall会提醒您进行总结，并一键将其转入新的对话中。

name: Speq
tagline: An AI coach in every meeting that actually knows your work
tagline_zh: 每次会议都有一位真正了解你工作的AI教练
description: Speq is an AI coach that joins your meetings and gives real-time guidance based on your own documents. Upload contracts, specs, or pricing sheets — Speq cross-references them live during calls. It catches pricing mistakes before you quote them, surfaces forgotten commitments, and flags contradictions between what's said and what's on paper. After every meeting: full transcript, structured debrief, and running summary. Works with Google Meet, Zoom, and Teams.
description_zh: Speq是一款人工智能教练，它能加入您的会议，并根据您自己的文档提供实时指导。上传合同、规格说明或定价表——Speq会在通话过程中实时对照这些文档。它能在您报价之前发现定价错误，找出遗忘的承诺，并标记出所言与书面内容之间的矛盾。每次会议后：提供完整的会议记录、结构化的会议总结和运行摘要。适用于Google Meet、Zoom和Teams。

name: Appealify
tagline: AI that reads your denial letter and writes your appeal
tagline_zh: 能读取你的拒绝信并撰写你的上诉书的AI
description: 85 million insurance claims were denied in 2024. Only 262,000 were appealed — and ~50% of those won. Appealify reads your denial letter, explains what the insurer is actually objecting to, and writes three complete appeal letters with one recommended for your case. Works for insurance, visa, university, employment, and benefit denials. Any country. Free to analyse. $24 one-time. No account needed.
description_zh: 2024年，有8500万份保险索赔被拒绝。其中仅有262,000份进行了上诉，且约50%的上诉获得了成功。Appealify会阅读您的拒绝信，解释保险公司实际反对的内容，并为您撰写三封完整的上诉信，其中一封会针对您的案件给出建议。该服务适用于保险、签证、大学、就业和福利申请的拒绝情况。服务覆盖全球任何国家。可免费分析。一次性收费24美元。无需注册账户。

name: YT Thumbnail Studio
tagline: Download any YouTube thumbnail in Max HD
tagline_zh: 下载任何YouTube高清缩略图
description: YT Thumbnail Studio lets you instantly download YouTube thumbnails in the highest quality available. Supports: → Regular videos, Shorts, playlists, and channels → Bulk download → Format conversion Perfect for YouTubers analyzing competitor thumbnails, designers looking for inspiration, and researchers archiving content. No account needed. No watermarks. Just click and save.
description_zh: YT Thumbnail Studio可让您立即下载最高质量的YouTube缩略图。支持：→常规视频、短视频、播放列表和频道→批量下载→格式转换非常适合YouTube用户分析竞争对手的缩略图、设计师寻找灵感以及研究人员存档内容。无需注册账户。无水印。只需点击并保存。

name: ClawBox Workstation
tagline: Frontier-model AI for your whole office, on a box you own
tagline_zh: 前沿模型的人工智能，适用于您的整个办公室，且装在您自己的设备上
description: We have shipped 300+ ClawBox units to people who wanted private AI they own. Businesses kept asking for more power, so we built the ClawBox Workstation on the NVIDIA DGX Spark: 128GB unified memory, ~1 petaflop, running 200B-parameter models in-house. No cloud bills, no per-seat fees, your data never leaves the building. It is the AI hub for your whole team, and it integrates with the ClawBoxes already on desks across the office.
description_zh: 我们已经向那些想要拥有私人AI的人们运送了300多台ClawBox设备。企业客户不断要求更强大的性能，因此我们在NVIDIA DGX Spark上构建了ClawBox工作站：128GB统一内存，约1 petaflop的计算能力，内部运行2000亿参数的模型。无需支付云服务账单，无需按座位收费，您的数据永远不会离开大楼。它是您整个团队的AI中心，并且可以与办公室里已经部署在桌面上的ClawBox设备集成。

name: PostlyBio
tagline: The smarter link-in-bio for creators and businesses.
tagline_zh: 为创作者和企业打造的更智能的生物链接。
description: PostlyBio helps creators, founders, and businesses build a smart bio page with links, products, bookings, payments, videos, newsletters, QR destinations, analytics, custom domains, and conversion-focused blocks.
description_zh: PostlyBio助力创作者、创始人和企业打造智能个人主页，其中包含链接、产品、预约、支付、视频、新闻通讯、二维码跳转、数据分析、自定义域名以及以转化效果为重点的板块。

name: Veil
tagline: A web scraper that uses the lightest method that works
tagline_zh: 一个采用最轻量级且有效方法的网络爬虫
description: Veil is an open-source Python web scraper that tries the cheapest method first and only escalates when a site blocks it so you're not running a full browser for every page. • 3 tiers: plain HTTP → TLS impersonation → stealth browser • Resumable concurrent crawler (checkpoint, JSONL, dedupe) • Proxy rotation, rate limiting, robots.txt by default • Honest README: documents what it can't beat Python, MIT, tested. A learning project built in the open.
description_zh: Veil是一个开源的Python网页爬虫，它首先尝试使用最便宜的方法，只有在网站屏蔽该方法时才会升级，这样你就无需为每个页面都运行一个完整的浏览器。• 3层：普通HTTP → TLS模拟 → 隐身浏览器• 可恢复的并发爬虫（检查点、JSONL、去重）• 默认支持代理轮换、速率限制、robots.txt• 诚实的README：记录了它无法击败Python的部分，MIT许可，经过测试。这是一个在开源中构建的学习项目。

name: TrueCommander by TruePlugins
tagline: Run, schedule, and automate WordPress from one command bar
tagline_zh: 通过一个命令栏即可运行、调度和自动化WordPress
description: One WordPress plugin with 10 modules and 91 commands. Press Alt+Shift+W (Option+Shift+W on Mac) to find anything and run it: analytics, security, WooCommerce, AI, and branded emails. By hand, on a schedule, or chained into a macro. Everything ships at install, no add-ons.
description_zh: 一个WordPress插件，包含10个模块和91个命令。按下Alt+Shift+W（Mac上为Option+Shift+W）即可查找并运行任何功能：分析、安全、WooCommerce、人工智能和品牌电子邮件。可以手动操作、设置定时运行，或将其链接到宏中。所有功能均随插件安装提供，无需额外插件。

name: Invoees
tagline: 100% private, client-side invoice generator.
tagline_zh: 100%私密、客户端的发票生成器。
description: Generate premium PDF invoices instantly in your browser. Invoees runs locally, meaning your financial data never touches our servers. Start for free, and upgrade to unlock advanced templates, GST support, and digital signatures.
description_zh: 在您的浏览器中即时生成高级PDF发票。Invoees在本地运行，这意味着您的财务数据永远不会触及我们的服务器。免费开始使用，升级后可解锁高级模板、GST支持和数字签名功能。

name: Slipstrim
tagline: Ai business management
tagline_zh: 人工智能企业管理
description: Invoicing, CRM, AI agents, stock management, travel orders, revenue analytics and bank integration — one business platform built for freelancers and agencies. Free plan available, no credit card required.
description_zh: 发票、客户关系管理、人工智能代理、库存管理、差旅订单、收入分析和银行集成——一个专为自由职业者和代理机构打造的业务平台。提供免费方案，无需绑定信用卡。

name: Promptoken
tagline: 80 prompts that make Claude work like a design lead
tagline_zh: 80个提示，让克劳德像设计主管一样工作
description: Promptoken is 80 prompts for UX/UI designers working with Claude — token architecture, component governance, design-to-code handoff, audits, UX writing, and competitive research. The difference from a prompt list: a governance layer (Category 8) of ten standing rules — plan-first, never-invent, approval gates — that make every prompt produce output you can trust, not plausible noise. Delivered as a duplicable Notion workspace + markdown source files.
description_zh: Promptoken是一套专为与Claude合作的用户体验/用户界面设计师设计的80个提示，涉及令牌架构、组件治理、设计到代码的交接、审核、用户体验撰写以及竞争研究。与提示列表的不同之处在于：它包含一个由十项基本规则（第8类）构成的治理层——计划先行、永不发明、审批关卡——确保每个提示都能产生值得信赖的输出，而非似是而非的杂音。该工具以可复制的Notion工作区+Markdown源文件的形式提供。

name: TRAYL
tagline: Animate windows & files with any emoji
tagline_zh: 用任意表情符号为窗口和文件添加动画效果
description: TRAYL is a playful macOS menu bar app that adds beautiful emoji trails to your desktop as you move windows, files, and folders. It’s lightweight, customizable, and oddly satisfying, turning everyday Mac interactions into something a little more alive.
description_zh: TRAYL是一款趣味十足的macOS菜单栏应用程序，它会在您移动窗口、文件和文件夹时，为您的桌面添加精美的表情符号轨迹。它轻便易用、可定制，且给人一种奇特的满足感，让日常的Mac交互变得更加生动有趣。

name: Lie or Legend
tagline: A daily trivia game about facts, myths and clever lies
tagline_zh: 一个关于事实、谬误和巧妙谎言的日常知识问答游戏
description: Lie or Legend is a daily trivia game where you decide whether short, beautifully written statements are real facts or clever AI-generated lies. Play one official challenge every day, keep your streak alive, unlock extra rounds, and share your score. It is fast, funny, deceptive, and built for people who love weird facts, myths, brain teasers, and “wait, is that actually true?” moments. Available on iPhone, iPad, Android phones, and tablets.
description_zh: 《谎言还是传说》是一款每日益智游戏，您需要判断简短而精美的陈述是真实的事实还是巧妙的人工智能生成的谎言。每天玩一个官方挑战，保持连胜纪录，解锁额外轮次，并分享您的分数。它节奏明快、趣味横生、充满欺骗性，专为那些喜欢奇怪的事实、神话、脑筋急转弯以及“等等，这真的是真的吗？”时刻的人打造。可在iPhone、iPad、安卓手机和平板电脑上玩。

name: LeadStal
tagline: Stop {{First_Name}}, Send AI-Personalized Campaigns
tagline_zh: 别停{{First_Name}}，发送AI个性化营销活动
description: LeadStal is the all-in-one lead generation and cold email outreach platform. Scrape verified leads from Google Maps, Instagram, Zillow, Clutch, G2, TripAdvisor, free. Send AI-personalized cold emails. Manage every reply in one inbox. Starting at $0/month.
description_zh: LeadStal是一款集潜在客户开发和冷邮件推广功能于一体的平台。该平台可免费从谷歌地图、Instagram、Zillow、Clutch、G2、TripAdvisor等网站抓取经过验证的潜在客户信息。用户可以使用该平台发送人工智能个性化冷邮件，并可在一个收件箱中管理所有回复。起价为每月0美元。

name: MediaOptim
tagline: Free up gigabytes on your Mac
tagline_zh: 释放Mac上的数GB空间
description: MediaOptim started as a local media compressor. Now it's a full toolkit to reclaim Mac storage — still 100% on-device, no uploads. What's new: ✓ Visual disk map — see what's eating your space ✓ Duplicate finder (exact + similar photos) ✓ Large-file hunter + safe, risk-rated cleanup ✓ One-click EXIF/GPS metadata stripper ✓ Batch compress images, video, audio, GIF & PDF No subscription — one-time purchase on the Mac App Store.
description_zh: MediaOptim最初是一款本地媒体压缩工具。如今，它已成为一套完整的Mac存储空间回收工具包——仍然100%在设备上操作，无需上传。新增功能：✓可视化磁盘映射——查看占用空间的项目 ✓重复文件查找器（精确+相似照片）✓大文件查找器+安全、风险评级的清理 ✓一键EXIF/GPS元数据剥离器 ✓批量压缩图像、视频、音频、GIF和PDF 无需订阅——在Mac App Store上一次性购买。

name: OLX Scraper
tagline: Export public OLX listing data to a dataset
tagline_zh: 将公开的OLX列表数据导出到数据集中
description: Collect public OLX listings without building your own scraper. Export prices, locations, seller details, photos, attributes, and source URLs for market research, price tracking, and repeat reports.
description_zh: 无需构建自己的爬虫，即可收集公开的OLX列表。导出价格、位置、卖家详情、照片、属性和来源网址，以用于市场研究、价格追踪和重复报告。

name: DataraIMG
tagline: Convert any image, instantly!
tagline_zh: 立即转换任何图片！
description: Hey Product Hunt 👋 DataraIMG is a free-forever, native image converter for macOS & Windows. Drag in any file and convert it in seconds — 8 formats, every direction: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, HEIC, GIF, SVG, BMP. • Batch-convert whole folders in parallel • Resize, quality control, strip EXIF/GPS • HEIC → JPEG with no Apple tools • Built in Go, not Electron — launches in under a second No subscription, no trial, no feature gates. What do you currently use to convert images?
description_zh: 嘿，Product Hunt👋 DataraIMG是一款适用于macOS和Windows的永久免费的原生图像转换器。只需拖放任何文件，即可在几秒钟内完成转换——支持8种格式，双向转换：JPEG、PNG、WEBP、AVIF、HEIC、GIF、SVG、BMP。• 可并行批量转换整个文件夹• 调整大小、质量控制、去除EXIF/GPS信息• 无需Apple工具即可将HEIC转换为JPEG• 内置Go语言，非Electron技术——启动不到一秒无需订阅，无需试用，无功能限制。您目前使用什么工具来转换图像？

name: Wheel of Names – Free Random Picker
tagline: Spin the wheel, pick a winner, and make decisions instantly.
tagline_zh: 转动轮盘，选出赢家，瞬间做出决定。
description: Wheel of Names is a free online random picker that helps you choose names, winners, teams, tasks, and more with a customizable spinning wheel. Simply add your entries, spin the wheel, and get a fair random result. Perfect for giveaways, classrooms, team selection, games, and everyday decisions. No signup required, mobile-friendly, and completely free to use.
description_zh: “名字之轮”是一款免费的在线随机选择工具，通过可定制的旋转轮盘，助您选择名字、获胜者、团队、任务等。只需添加您的选项，旋转轮盘，即可获得公平的随机结果。非常适合抽奖活动、教室、团队选拔、游戏以及日常决策。无需注册，支持移动设备，且完全免费使用。

name: Orbibo
tagline: Turn followers into an audience you actually own.
tagline_zh: 将关注者转化为你真正拥有的受众群体。
description: Orbibo helps creators turn followers into an audience they actually own. Creators can capture leads, grow their email list, and build direct relationships with their audience while tracking growth through actionable analytics.
description_zh: Orbibo助力创作者将关注者转化为真正属于自己的受众。创作者可以获取潜在客户，扩大电子邮件列表，并与受众建立直接关系，同时通过可操作的分析来追踪增长情况。

name: SnoreCam
tagline: The AI sleep camera that never leaves your iPhone
tagline_zh: 永不离开你iPhone的AI睡眠摄像头
description: SnoreCam is an AI sleep camera that runs entirely on your iPhone. Prop it on the nightstand and the on-device AI watches all night — filming a short clip only when you snore, sleep-talk, or cough, then captioning each one in plain English. Wake up to a 3–5 clip highlight reel with a Snore Score and 7-night trends. The wedge: video clips that never leave your device. No servers, no cloud, no upload path — ever. First 3 nights free, no card.
description_zh: SnoreCam是一款完全在iPhone上运行的人工智能睡眠摄像头。将其放置在床头，设备内置的人工智能会整夜监控——仅在你打鼾、说梦话或咳嗽时拍摄短片，并用简单的英语为每个片段添加字幕。醒来时，你会看到一个包含3-5个片段的精彩集锦，并附带打鼾评分和7晚趋势分析。关键点：视频片段永远不会离开你的设备。无需服务器、云端存储或上传路径——永远不会。前3晚免费，无需插卡。

name: aHREFna
tagline: One command for DNS, TLS, WHOIS, GEO, SEO, and DR.
tagline_zh: DNS、TLS、WHOIS、GEO、SEO和DR，一指令搞定。
description: aHREFna is a domain intelligence platform that gives engineers, SREs, and technical SEOs a full forensics view of their domains in one scan. Instead of bouncing between DNS tools, SSL checkers, WHOIS pages, geo/IP lookups, and SEO audits, aHREFna runs eight modules in parallel and compiles everything into a single, cohesive workspace.
description_zh: a HREFna是一个域名智能平台，它让工程师、站点可靠性工程师（SRE）和技术型搜索引擎优化（SEO）人员只需一次扫描，即可全面了解其域名的详细信息。无需在DNS工具、SSL检查工具、WHOIS页面、地理/IP查找和SEO审计之间来回切换，a HREFna可并行运行八个模块，并将所有信息整合到一个统一的工作空间中。

name: AddvCard
tagline: The digital business card built for your wallet
tagline_zh: 为您的钱包打造的数字名片
description: Create a digital business card that lives in Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, and PassMate Wallet. Share your contact details instantly via QR code and update them anytime without reprinting cards.
description_zh: 制作一张电子名片，存放在Apple Wallet、Google Wallet和PassMate Wallet中。通过二维码即时分享您的联系方式，并随时更新，无需重新打印名片。

name: AlphaBitCore
tagline: The AI gateway that regulated industries need to deploy AI
tagline_zh: 受管制行业需要部署的AI网关
description: Nexus AI Gateway by AlphaBitCore (ABC) - Apache 2.0. 1. Intercepts every LLM request before it reaches any model 2. Scans for PII, enforces keyword rules, logs everything with a sealed audit trail 3. Works at the SDK, network or OS layer; Cloud agnostic; Nexus routing sits within 3ms of a zero-compliance proxy LiteLLM has 36x higher TTFT on streaming. Bifrost drops 98% of audit logs under load. Nexus keeps 100%. Nexus is the Foundation of ABC Prime's 23 agents and 95 financial workflows.
description_zh: Nexus AI Gateway由AlphaBitCore（ABC）开发 - 采用Apache 2.0协议。

name: TalkBoard
tagline: Ditch Raycast Pro. $9.99 once. Forever.
tagline_zh: Ditch Raycast Pro。一次购买，永久使用，仅需9.99美元。
description: The two Raycast Pro features you actually use. One price. Forever. Local whisper.cpp dictation + smart clipboard manager.
description_zh: 你实际使用的两个Raycast Pro功能。一个价格。永久有效。本地whisper.cpp听写+智能剪贴板管理器。

name: OddSharps
tagline: Know who's on the other side of every Polymarket trade
tagline_zh: 了解每笔Polymarket交易的另一方是谁
description: OddSharps reads every Polymarket trade — 1.5B+ indexed, no sampling — and shows you, for any Yes/No market, which side's holders actually win on resolved markets, what they paid, and where smart money is flowing. Free screener, no signup.
description_zh: OddSharps会读取Polymarket上的每一笔交易——超过15亿笔已索引交易，无抽样——并针对任何是/否市场，向您展示在已结算市场中哪一方持有者实际获胜，他们支付了多少钱，以及智能资金流向何处。免费筛选，无需注册。

name: Karma.Domains: AI Search 7M+ Domains
tagline: Find Expired Domains using 90+ AI filters across 30+ sources
tagline_zh: 使用90多种人工智能（AI）过滤器，在30多个来源中查找过期域名
description: Ultimate Expired Domains Aggregator with Wayback Machine Spam Analyzer. Find expired, deleted, and dropped domains with authority backlinks—90+ filters, 30+ auction sources in one place. Now AI-native: integrate Karma.Domains into your agents via MCP and Public REST API. Our x402-based monetization allows autonomous agents to pay for reports using USDC (Base/Solana) and execute intelligent queries without manual setup. Power your automation with premium domain data today.
description_zh: 终极过期域名聚合器，配备Wayback Machine垃圾邮件分析器。一站式查找过期、已删除和已弃用域名及其权威反向链接——90多种过滤条件，30多个拍卖来源。现已原生AI化：通过MCP和公共REST API将Karma.Domains集成到您的代理中。我们基于x402的货币化方案允许自主代理使用USDC（Base/Solana）支付报告费用，并无需手动设置即可执行智能查询。即刻用优质域名数据为您的自动化赋能。

name: The Curious Thing
tagline: Turn your kid's photo into a magical puzzle with AI
tagline_zh: 用人工智能将你孩子的照片变成神奇的拼图
description: Turn your child into the hero of a magical world. Upload a photo, approve a proof, and we print a premium custom jigsaw puzzle. Free US shipping.
description_zh: 让你的孩子成为魔法世界的英雄。上传一张照片，审核通过后，我们将为您定制一款高级拼图。美国境内免运费。

name: LaunchTrust
tagline: Find exposed keys & missing policies before app review
tagline_zh: 在应用审核前，找出暴露的密钥和缺失的策略
description: LaunchTrust scans your app or store's public pages for missing trust signals — privacy policy, AI disclosure, exposed API keys and leaked env files, cookie consent, app-store readiness — before a reviewer or user does. Signals, not legal advice. Free 30-second scan, no signup.
description_zh: LaunchTrust会在审核员或用户之前扫描您的应用或商店的公共页面，查找缺失的信任信号——隐私政策、人工智能披露、暴露的API密钥和泄露的环境文件、Cookie同意、应用商店准备就绪情况。这些是信号，而非法律建议。免费30秒扫描，无需注册。

name: Checkride107
tagline: Pass the FAA Part 107 drone exam — every answer cited.
tagline_zh: 通过美国联邦航空局（FAA）第107部分无人机考试——每个答案都需引用。
description: Pass the FAA Part 107 drone exam: 200+ citation-backed questions that simulate the real test, plus blueprint-weighted 60-question timed sims and an AI tutor. Free to start.
description_zh: 通过美国联邦航空局（FAA）第107部分无人机考试：200多个有引文支持的模拟真实考试问题，以及按蓝图权重设计的60题限时模拟题库和AI辅导。免费开始。

name: Memiry
tagline: Agents that call to check in on productivity and brain state
tagline_zh: 用于检查生产力和大脑状态的代理
description: AI agents that call you to check in on productivity, cognitive health, wake drift, schedule, and screen time use. Get focused and protect your day's health.
description_zh: 人工智能助手会提醒你检查自己的工作效率、认知健康、睡眠质量、日程安排以及屏幕使用时间。集中精力，保护好自己一天的健康。

name: Army Body Fat Calculator
tagline: Pass the Army tape test — know before they tape you
tagline_zh: 通过军用胶带测试——在他们用胶带绑你之前了解清楚
description: Know if you pass the 2023 Army tape test in seconds. Instant PASS/FAIL + your body-fat % — plus the exact waist that gets you under the limit for your age. Free, no signup. → armybodyfatcalculator.org
description_zh: 几秒钟内即可知晓你是否通过2023年陆军体测。即时显示通过/未通过+你的体脂百分比——以及使你腰围达到年龄标准限值以下的精确腰围。免费使用，无需注册。→ armybodyfatcalculator.org

name: perpHect
tagline: AI hydration coaching that adapts to your day, not averages
tagline_zh: 人工智能补水指导，根据你当天的具体情况进行调节，而非平均值
description: perpHect is an AI-powered hydration coaching app for iPhone. Every morning it calculates your personalised daily water target based on your body stats, sleep quality, stress levels, planned activity, and live weather. It then coaches you through hitting that target with smart adaptive reminders, three structured daily check-ins, Apple Health integration for real-time activity syncing, and weekly AI behavioural insights — helping you build lasting hydration habits, not just track glasses.
description_zh: perpHect是一款基于人工智能的iPhone补水指导应用程序。每天早上，它会根据您的身体数据、睡眠质量、压力水平、计划活动和实时天气，为您计算个性化的每日补水目标。然后，它会通过智能自适应提醒、三次结构化的每日打卡、与Apple Health的集成以实现实时活动同步，以及每周的AI行为洞察来指导您实现这一目标——帮助您养成持久的补水习惯，而不仅仅是追踪饮水量。

name: Screenshot Cleanup AI
tagline: Clean up thousands of iPhone screenshots in minutes
tagline_zh: 在几分钟内整理数千张iPhone截图
description: Storage full, again. Turned out it was thousands of screenshots going back years. Didn’t want a new phone, didn’t want to mass-delete and lose something I needed. So I built Screenshot Cleanup AI — sorts your screenshots into categories automatically so you can decide what to keep vs nuke, instead of scrolling through thousands one by one. Built it for myself, figured others have the same mess. Would love feedback — what’s missing, what’s annoying?
description_zh: 存储空间再次满了。原来是因为多年来积攒了数千张截图。我不想换新手机，也不想批量删除，以免丢失我需要的东西。于是，我开发了“截图清理AI”——它能自动将你的截图分类，这样你就可以决定哪些该保留，哪些该删除，而不用一张张地翻看数千张截图。我是为自己开发的，但我想其他人也有同样的困扰。非常欢迎反馈——还缺什么？还有什么令人烦恼的地方？

name: cc-fleet
tagline: Any model as a real Claude Code teammate — no sub
tagline_zh: 任何作为真正的Claude Code队友的模型——不接受替补
description: Claude Code's Dynamic Workflows, Agent Teams & Subagents only run Anthropic's models. cc-fleet lets any model with an Anthropic- or OpenAI-compatible API — DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, even your Codex subscription — run as a real Claude Code worker, mixed per node in one run. No Anthropic subscription needed; provider keys never touch env, argv, or shell history. Go CLI + Claude Code plugin. Apache-2.0.
description_zh: Claude Code的动态工作流、代理团队和子代理仅运行Anthropic的模型。cc-fleet允许任何具有Anthropic或OpenAI兼容API的模型（如DeepSeek、GLM、Kimi、Qwen，甚至是您的Codex订阅）作为真正的Claude Code工作者运行，在一次运行中每个节点混合使用。无需Anthropic订阅；提供者密钥永远不会接触环境变量、命令行参数或shell历史记录。使用Go CLI + Claude Code插件。Apache-2.0。

name: HanClip
tagline: Learn Chinese one sentence at a time, right-click to analyze
tagline_zh: 一句一句地学中文，右键点击可进行分析
description: Most translation tools give you a meaning and move on. HanClip gives you a learning card — vocabulary with pinyin,grammar breakdown, and the cultural context behind classical references and idioms. Right-click any Chinese text on any webpage and analyze it without leaving the page. It's built for people who want to actually retain what they read, not just decode it in the moment. Free tier with 10 analyses per day, unlimited with Pro.
description_zh: 大多数翻译工具仅提供译文便结束。而HanClip则为你提供一张学习卡片——包含词汇的拼音、语法分析，以及经典引用和习语背后的文化语境。只需右键点击任何网页上的中文文本，即可在不离开页面的情况下进行分析。它专为那些希望真正记住所读内容，而不仅仅是即时解码的人而设计。免费版每天可分析10次，专业版则无限制。

name: Xseth
tagline: Your AI recon partner for offensive security
tagline_zh: 您在攻防安全领域的AI侦察伙伴
description: Xseth maps your external attack surface like an attacker would then triages what matters. Autonomous recon across subdomains, services, and exposure at machine speed, with every attack path narrated so you see how findings chain. A force-multiplier for security teams and operators buried in scanner noise. Stop chasing false positives. Find what attackers find, first.
description_zh: Xseth会像攻击者一样绘制您的外部攻击面图谱，然后筛选出关键信息。它能够以机器速度自主侦察子域、服务和暴露点，并详细描述每条攻击路径，让您了解发现如何形成链条。对于埋没在扫描器噪声中的安全团队和操作人员来说，它是一种力量倍增器。别再追逐误报了。先找到攻击者能找到的东西。

name: OrchestKit
tagline: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code — MIT
tagline_zh: 克劳德代码的多智能体编排 — 麻省理工学院
description: OrchestKit turns Claude Code into a multi-agent orchestrator: one command fans out parallel specialist agents — backend, frontend, tests, security — that compose for end-to-end work, with quality and security gates enforced automatically by lifecycle hooks. 111 skills, 37 agents, 211 hooks. MIT, no account, no API key.
description_zh: OrchestKit将Claude Code转变为一个多代理编排器：一个命令即可分派并行专家代理——后端、前端、测试、安全——这些代理共同组成端到端的工作流程，生命周期挂钩自动执行质量和安全检查。111项技能，37个代理，211个挂钩。麻省理工学院（MIT）认证，无需账户，无需API密钥。

name: TinTorch
tagline: Business tools that just work.
tagline_zh: 简单实用的商业工具。
description: Email, WhatsApp, AI voice agents, and domain management in one CRM built for growth.
description_zh: 集电子邮件、WhatsApp、AI语音代理和域名管理功能于一体，专为促进增长而打造的CRM系统。

name: Mongo GUI
tagline: Native MongoDB client for macOS
tagline_zh: macOS的原生MongoDB客户端
description: Mongo GUI is an independent native macOS MongoDB client for developers who want row-first document browsing, reconnect restoration, Keychain-backed secrets, dashboards, exports, and review-first AI snippet verification.
description_zh: Mongo GUI是一款独立的原生macOS MongoDB客户端，专为那些希望实现行优先文档浏览、重新连接恢复、Keychain支持的密码管理、仪表板、导出以及审查优先的AI代码片段验证的开发人员而设计。

name: FDM AI PNG to PDF Converter
tagline: Free, ultra-fast PNG to PDF converter in your browser
tagline_zh: 浏览器中免费的超快速PNG到PDF转换器
description: FDM AI PNG to PDF Converter is a secure, browser-based utility that turns images into crisp, professional PDF documents instantly. Built for absolute privacy, it features 100% client-side execution—meaning your images are compiled locally inside your tab session memory and never uploaded to any external server. Experience seamless batch conversions with a zero disk footprint framework. No sign-ups, no hidden costs, and zero daily restrictions. Just raw speed and complete data privacy. 🚀
description_zh: FDM AI PNG到PDF转换器是一款安全、基于浏览器的实用工具，可即时将图像转换为清晰、专业的PDF文档。该工具专为绝对隐私而设计，具有100%客户端执行的特点——这意味着您的图像将在标签会话内存中本地编译，而绝不会上传到任何外部服务器。通过零磁盘占用框架，您可以体验无缝的批量转换。无需注册，无隐藏费用，且无每日限制。只有极致的速度和完全的数据隐私。

name: Watch Later Synthesizer
tagline: Triage your YouTube Watch Later pile inside Obsidian
tagline_zh: 在Obsidian中对YouTube的“稍后观看”列表进行分类整理
