description: Not did you watch everything — but what did you miss worth watching? Clip YouTube videos into Obsidian and your "watch later" folder becomes a graveyard. This plugin triages it: a watch-or-skip verdict per video, the recurring themes across your pile, a conservative "safe to delete" list, plus a flag for stale time-sensitive videos. Triage, not summaries. Bring your own AI key. No server, no account, no subscription. Plugin installs free from the Obsidian directory; one-time Pro license.
description_zh: 你并非什么都看，但你错过了哪些值得一看的内容呢？将YouTube视频导入Obsidian，你的“稍后观看”文件夹就会变成一个“坟墓”。这个插件会对其进行分类：每个视频给出“观看或跳过”的判定，整理你收藏中的重复主题，生成一个保守的“可安全删除”列表，并为时效性强的过时视频添加标记。是分类，而非摘要。带上你自己的AI密钥。无需服务器、账户或订阅。插件可从Obsidian目录免费安装；一次性Pro授权。

name: Website Importer for Webflow
tagline: Convert Lovable & AI-generated sites into Webflow pages
tagline_zh: 将可爱且由AI生成的网站转换为Webflow页面
description: Built an AI site in Lovable, V0, Bolt.new but stuck managing GitHub, complex code, or high hosting costs? Move it to Webflow. Webflow gives you world-class hosting, native SEO, and a visual canvas anyone can use. To protect IP, our tool requires you to verify domain ownership before importing. Once verified, Website Importer safely converts your AI layout into clean, editable Webflow elements in minutes. Perfect for secure, production-ready handoffs. Free to install, pay-per-page.
description_zh: 您是否在Lovable、V0、Bolt.new中构建了一个人工智能网站，但在管理GitHub、处理复杂代码或承担高昂的托管费用时遇到了困难？那就把它迁移到Webflow吧。Webflow为您提供世界级的托管服务、原生搜索引擎优化功能以及任何人都能使用的可视化画布。为了保护知识产权，我们的工具在导入前需要您验证域名所有权。一旦验证通过，网站导入器会在几分钟内安全地将您的AI布局转换为干净、可编辑的Webflow元素。这非常适合安全、生产就绪的交接。安装免费，按页面付费。

name: Cards AI
tagline: Scan any card, get real sold prices in seconds
tagline_zh: 扫描任意卡片，几秒钟内即可获取真实售价
description: Real sold prices and AI grading for sports cards and TCGs. Scan any card and know what it's worth in seconds.
description_zh: 体育卡牌和集换式卡牌（TCGs）的实际售价和人工智能评级。扫描任何卡牌，几秒钟内即可得知其价值。

name: Stillory
tagline: Scan, log, and remember every whiskey you drink
tagline_zh: 扫描、记录并记住你喝的每一杯威士忌
description: Stillory is a whiskey collection tracker and tasting journal built for people who take it seriously. Point your camera at any label and it's identified on the spot, then matched to a catalog of 2,500+ bottles across 650+ brands. Log every pour with structured flavor notes and watch your palate take shape in a Pour Report radar. No clunky spreadsheets, no "free" app locking your own collection behind a paywall. Local-first, so it's fast and works offline. Syncs across devices.
description_zh: Stillory是一款专为认真对待威士忌的人打造的威士忌收藏追踪器和品酒日记。将相机对准任何酒标，它就能当场识别，然后与涵盖650多个品牌、2500多瓶威士忌的目录进行匹配。记录每次倒酒的结构化风味笔记，并在倒酒报告中观察你的味觉变化。无需繁琐的电子表格，也没有“免费”应用将你自己的收藏锁定在付费墙后。本地优先，因此速度快且可离线使用。跨设备同步。

name: Les devinettes
tagline: The quiz game that makes kids smarter!
tagline_zh: 让孩子们变得更聪明的问答游戏！
description: Hundreds of educational riddles for ages 6-8. Learn while having fun with math, science, history, geography and more! Learning through play! With riddles adapted for children, the app stimulates thinking, enriches vocabulary and develops curiosity while offering fun and educational moments. Explore exclusive themes to learn while having fun: universes inspired by fairy tales and magical characters, introduction to Chinese, animals, space, careers, general knowledge and much more.
description_zh: 数百个适合6-8岁儿童的教育谜语。在享受数学、科学、历史、地理等学科乐趣的同时学习！寓教于乐！这款应用中的谜语专为儿童改编，在提供趣味和教育时刻的同时，激发思维，丰富词汇，培养好奇心。探索专属主题，在享受乐趣的同时学习：受童话故事和神奇角色启发的宇宙、中文入门、动物、太空、职业、常识等更多主题。

name: VBORef
tagline: Audit your business visibility across modern platforms
tagline_zh: 审核您在现代平台上的业务可见性
description: VBORef audits the visibility infrastructure behind your business. Analyze branding trust, communication systems, provider compatibility, verification readiness, and ownership gaps across modern digital platforms without mailbox access.
description_zh: VBORef对您业务背后的可见性基础设施进行审计。无需邮箱访问权限，即可分析现代数字平台上的品牌信任度、通信系统、提供商兼容性、验证准备情况以及所有权缺口。

name: Memophant
tagline: Agents forget your repo. Memophant remembers.
tagline_zh: 代理会忘记你的回购。Memophant却会记住。
description: Native macOS app for repo-resident AI memory. Memories, wiki, design, code, tasks, sessions, documents, vendors, and templates — every tier lives in your git repo as plain markdown, exposed to every AI editor through a native MCP server, so each session starts already up to speed.
description_zh: 原生macOS应用程序，用于存储驻留在仓库中的AI记忆。记忆、维基、设计、代码、任务、会话、文档、供应商和模板——每一层都以纯Markdown格式存储在您的Git仓库中，通过原生MCP服务器向每个AI编辑器开放，这样每个会话都能快速启动。

name: PayTransparency
tagline: Ensure your job postings are perfectly compliant nationwide
tagline_zh: 确保您的招聘信息在全国范围内完全合规
description: Paste a job description and check it against every US state's pay-transparency law in seconds. Sign up and we'll check your postings continuously for compliance. Built for mid-market HR teams.
description_zh: 粘贴一份职位描述，几秒钟内即可对照美国各州的薪资透明度法律进行检查。注册后，我们会持续检查您的招聘信息是否合规。专为中端市场人力资源团队打造。

name: MoneyCal
tagline: Free finance calculators. Simple, no signup, no fluff
tagline_zh: 免费金融计算器。简单易用，无需注册，没有花哨的功能
description: Free, fast, no-signup calculators for everyday money decisions: compound interest, debt payoff, savings goals, FIRE, car loans, and more. Runs client-side so no account, no email gate, no data collected.
description_zh: 免费、快速、无需注册的计算器，适用于日常理财决策：复利计算、债务清偿、储蓄目标、财务自由（FIRE）、汽车贷款等。该计算器运行于客户端，因此无需注册账户，无需通过电子邮件验证，也不会收集任何数据。

name: Yoinko.ai
tagline: notes that know your work.
tagline_zh: 了解你工作的笔记。
description: Describe it, yoink it, done. yoinko turns plain language into full pages, asks any LLM you want, and keeps everything in your workspace. Ask anything to Yoyo. Yoyo has your current page as context — no copy-paste, no re-explaining what you're working on.
description_zh: 描述一下，输入一下，搞定。yoinko能将普通语言转化为整页内容，你可以询问任何大型语言模型，所有内容都会保存在你的工作区。向Yoyo提问吧。Yoyo会以上下文的形式展示你当前的页面——无需复制粘贴，也无需重新解释你正在处理的内容。

name: Royal Access Chrome Extension
tagline: Forms, surveys, quizzes, payments — no add-on store
tagline_zh: 表单、调查、测验、支付——无需额外插件商店
description: Most Chrome accessibility extensions either dump raw WCAG codes at you (great for devs, useless for designers, PMs, and clients) or ask for full-URL access just to scan one page. Royal Access does one thing. Open the popup on any webpage, get a 0–100 accessibility score with plain-English fix hints across 8 WCAG 2.1 AA categories: images, headings, color contrast, form labels, ARIA, landmarks, document structure, keyboard. activeTab permission only. No account. Free forever
description_zh: 大多数Chrome辅助功能扩展要么直接输出原始的WCAG代码（对开发者来说很棒，但对设计师、项目经理和客户来说毫无用处），要么要求完全访问URL才能扫描一个页面。Royal Access只做一件事。在任何网页上打开弹出窗口，即可获得0-100分的辅助功能评分，并附带8个WCAG 2.1 AA类别的简明修复提示：图像、标题、颜色对比、表单标签、ARIA、地标、文档结构和键盘。仅需activeTab权限。无需账户。

name: Overtime & Paycheck Pro
tagline: Calculate gross and net pay with overtime and deductions
tagline_zh: 计算包含加班费和扣款后的总工资和净工资
description: The most complete free overtime calculator available. Enter your hourly rate, regular and overtime hours, bonuses, and deductions — get a full gross-to-net pay breakdown instantly. Supports 1.5x and 2x overtime rates, pre/post-tax deductions, and includes a California daily overtime assistant. All 50 states. No signup, no data stored. Know exactly what your paycheck will be before payday.
description_zh: 市面上最全面的免费加班计算器。输入您的时薪、正常工作时间和加班时间、奖金和扣款，即可立即获得一份完整的毛收入到净收入的工资明细。支持1.5倍和2倍的加班费率、税前/税后扣款，并包含加州每日加班助手。覆盖全部50个州。无需注册，不存储任何数据。在发薪日之前就能准确了解您的工资情况。

name: bookmarq.space
tagline: Save your internet favorites, all in one space
tagline_zh: 将您的网络收藏夹全部保存在一个空间中
description: Bookmarq is a clean, privacy first bookmark manager built for simplicity and speed. Add links from any app using the Share menu. No account, no sync, your bookmarks stay on your device.
description_zh: Bookmarq是一款简洁、注重隐私的书签管理器，旨在追求极致的简洁性和速度。您可以通过任何应用中的“分享”菜单添加链接。无需注册账户，也无需同步，您的书签将始终保留在您的设备上。

name: Burnwiser
tagline: Track every subscription. Know your real P&L.
tagline_zh: 追踪每一笔订阅。了解你的真实盈亏情况。
description: Built for SaaS founders. Connect Stripe and Gmail to automatically track expenses, revenue, and profit across your products.
description_zh: 专为SaaS创始人打造。连接Stripe和Gmail，自动跟踪您所有产品的支出、收入和利润。

name: OursCrypto Whale Monitor
tagline: Track whale movements before the market reacts
tagline_zh: 在市场做出反应之前，追踪鲸鱼的动向
description: OursCrypto Whale Monitor gives you real-time alerts when large crypto wallets move significant funds across Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other major blockchains. 🐋 What it does: - Real-time whale transaction alerts - Wallet address tracking - Custom notification thresholds - Transaction history analysis Whether you're a trader or long-term investor, following the smart money helps you make better decisions. Sign up for free and start tracking whale activity today.
description_zh: OursCrypto Whale Monitor会在大型加密货币钱包在比特币、以太坊和其他主要区块链上转移大量资金时，向您发送实时警报。🐋其功能包括： - 实时大额交易警报 - 钱包地址追踪 - 自定义通知阈值 - 交易历史分析 无论您是交易者还是长期投资者，追踪大额交易者的动向都能帮助您做出更明智的决策。立即免费注册，开始追踪大额交易者的活动。

name: Traidechart
tagline: AI bull vs bear debate on any stock or crypto
tagline_zh: 关于任何股票或加密货币的AI看涨与看跌之争
description: TraideChart runs an AI debate on any stock or crypto. A Bull agent builds the strongest bullish case, a Bear agent argues the other side, and an impartial Judge weighs both to deliver a clear Bullish / Neutral / Bearish signal in seconds. Every call is tracked on a public accuracy leaderboard — so you see which AI analysts are actually right. Plus a daily AI pick, real charts, technicals, and 10 languages. Not financial advice — AI-generated analysis for informational purposes.
description_zh: TraideChart对任何股票或加密货币进行人工智能辩论。看涨代理人构建最强的看涨理由，看跌代理人则提出相反的观点，而公正的裁判则权衡双方，在几秒钟内给出明确的看涨/中性/看跌信号。每个预测都会在公开的准确率排行榜上被追踪——这样你就能看到哪些人工智能分析师实际上是正确的。此外，还有每日人工智能精选、真实图表、技术分析和10种语言版本。这不是财务建议——人工智能生成的分析仅供参考。

name: Tolodora
tagline: Launch or find product- Software or Service
tagline_zh: 推出或寻找产品——软件或服务
description: Tolodora is the launch & discovery platform where founders submit their software and services to gain visibility, backlinks, real reviews and customers.
description_zh: Tolodora是一个发布与发现平台，创始人可以在此提交他们的软件和服务，以获得曝光度、反向链接、真实评价和客户。

name: Coralflavor
tagline: Uncensored and Private AI Chatbot
tagline_zh: 无审查且私密的AI聊天机器人
description: Coralflavor is a secure, private AI chat platform for adults. Ask anything, explore ideas freely, and get honest answers without filters.
description_zh: Coralflavor是一个安全私密的成人AI聊天平台。你可以畅所欲言，自由探索各种想法，并获得无过滤的真诚回答。

name: Thaibulksms
tagline: Thailand's #1 SMS, Email & LINE messaging platform & API
tagline_zh: 泰国排名第一的短信、电子邮件和LINE消息平台及API
description: ThaiBulkSMS is Thailand's leading business messaging platform. Send SMS, OTP, Email, and LINE notifications from one dashboard or a REST API. Features include Content Studio for cross-channel campaigns, Flow Automation with smart fallbacks, Credit Exchange, and A/B testing. SMS from THB 0.15 and Email from THB 0.04. Backed by 17+ years and multiple MarTech Awards.
description_zh: ThaiBulkSMS是泰国领先的商业消息传递平台。您可以通过一个控制面板或REST API发送短信、一次性密码（OTP）、电子邮件和LINE通知。该平台的功能包括用于跨渠道营销活动的Content Studio、带智能回退功能的流程自动化、信用交换以及A/B测试。短信发送费用为0.15泰铢起，电子邮件发送费用为0.04泰铢起。该平台拥有17年以上的历史，并荣获多项营销技术（MarTech）奖项。

name: NotepadLLM
tagline: Research-based AI Humanizer
tagline_zh: 基于研究的AI人性化工具
description: Humanize AI-generated text so it reads human-written, remove AI watermarks and clichés, apply smart prompts, and format with markdown. Privacy-focused with no data storage.
description_zh: 使AI生成的文本更人性化，读起来像人类撰写的文本，去除AI的痕迹和陈词滥调，应用智能提示，并使用Markdown格式。注重隐私，不存储任何数据。

name: WeatherSmart Ads
tagline: Only run ads when your customers are ready to buy
tagline_zh: 只在客户准备购买时投放广告
description: Ensure your ads run only when weather conditions drive demand. We provide an automatic safeguard, so you stay in control. Automatically pause your Google Ads when it rains or during unfavorable weather. The simple, automatic safeguard for local service businesses.
description_zh: 确保您的广告仅在天气条件驱动需求时投放。我们提供自动防护功能，让您保持掌控。当下雨或天气不佳时，您的Google Ads会自动暂停。这是为本地服务企业提供的简单、自动化的防护措施。

name: AutoMEP
tagline: AI-powered AutoCAD drafting. Describe edits in plain English
tagline_zh: 基于人工智能的AutoCAD绘图。用通俗易懂的语言描述编辑内容
description: AutoMEP transforms how MEP engineers and CAD professionals edit AutoCAD drawings. Instead of placing objects one by one, editing layers manually, or annotating entities by hand, you describe the changes you want in plain English and AutoMEP applies them directly to your DWG. Built for MEP engineers, mechanical designers, electrical CAD drafters, and plumbing coordination teams who work in AutoCAD daily.
description_zh: AutoMEP 改变了机电工程师和 CAD 专业人士编辑 AutoCAD 图纸的方式。您无需逐一放置对象、手动编辑图层或手动标注实体，只需用简单的英语描述您想要的更改，AutoMEP 就会直接将其应用于您的 DWG。该软件专为每天使用 AutoCAD 的机电工程师、机械设计师、电气 CAD 制图员和管道协调团队打造。

name: Wheron
tagline: AI Digital Closet
tagline_zh: AI数字衣橱
description: Wheron is your personal AI fashion assistant designed to help you manage your wardrobe digitally and take the guesswork out of getting dressed every morning. Whether you want to save time in front of your closet or maximize the potential of the clothes you already own, Wheron is here to elevate your style.
description_zh: Wheron是你的私人AI时尚助手，旨在帮助你数字化管理衣橱，省去每天早上穿衣时的猜测。无论你是想在衣橱前节省时间，还是想最大限度地发挥已有衣物的潜力，Wheron都能提升你的风格。

name: SuperAI
tagline: Control remote AI workstations from one workspace
tagline_zh: 从一个工作区控制远程人工智能工作站
description: SuperAI is a remote AI workstation control center that brings OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, and R-Desktop into one workspace. Connect your own computers as AI workstations, manage multiple accounts or projects, run long research and coding tasks, monitor node status, and access remote desktops when manual control is needed. Available on Web, Windows EXE, and Android APK, SuperAI helps teams turn scattered AI tools and remote machines into one manageable system.
description_zh: SuperAI是一个远程人工智能工作站控制中心，它将OpenClaw、Codex、Claude Code和R-Desktop整合到一个工作空间中。您可以将自己的计算机作为人工智能工作站进行连接，管理多个账户或项目，执行长时间的研究和编码任务，监控节点状态，并在需要手动控制时访问远程桌面。SuperAI支持Web、Windows EXE和Android APK三种形式，可帮助团队将分散的AI工具和远程机器整合成一个易于管理的系统。

name: AIVory Smart Inference
tagline: Cheaper inference. One URL. No code changes.
tagline_zh: 推理成本更低。只需一个URL，无需更改代码。
description: Providers cut prices all the time — your bill pays like they don't. Smart Inference reroutes every LLM call to the cheapest provider serving the same model, in real time. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible: swap one URL, keep your SDK, prompts, and streaming. 50+ models, pay-as-you-go from $10, credits never expire, no subscription. Median ~30% savings, up to 89% on open-weight models. Or self-host — spin up spot GPUs in one click and route to them through the same endpoint.
description_zh: 提供商一直在降价——而你的账单却像没降价一样。Smart Inference会实时将每个大型语言模型（LLM）调用重新路由到提供相同模型且价格最便宜的提供商。即插即用，兼容OpenAI：只需更换一个URL，即可保留你的软件开发工具包（SDK）、提示和流媒体。50多个模型，按需付费，最低10美元起，信用额度永不过期，无需订阅。平均节省约30%，对于开放权重模型可节省高达89%。或者选择自托管——一键启动Spot GPU，并通过同一端点将流量路由到它们。

name: RestockAlerts
tagline: Catch Hermes bag restocks before they vanish
tagline_zh: 抢在爱马仕包包售罄前补货
description: Hermes drops move fast. RestockAlerts watches selected bag families like Picotin, Evelyne, Bolide, and Herbag, then emails you when they appear online — so you can stop refreshing and act before they disappear.
description_zh: 爱马仕新品上架速度很快。RestockAlerts会监控选定的包款系列，如Picotin、Evelyne、Bolide和Herbag，并在这些包款上线时向您发送电子邮件——这样您就不必频繁刷新页面，可以在包款售罄前及时下单。

name: Tambola Host
tagline: Play Together, Not on Screens
tagline_zh: 一起玩，不要盯着屏幕
description: Tambola Host is a free browser-based toolkit for hosting Tambola (Housie/Bingo) games at family gatherings, office events, schools, and community celebrations. 🎤 Smart voice caller 🎟️ Instant ticket generator 🏆 Prize planning tools 📊 Leaderboards & rewards 📱 Works directly in your browser No downloads. No sign-ups. Just open and start hosting memorable Tambola games in minutes. Play together. Not on screens.
description_zh: Tambola Host是一款基于浏览器的免费工具包，用于在家庭聚会、办公室活动、学校和社区庆典中主持Tambola（Housie/宾果）游戏。🎤智能语音呼叫器🎟️即时门票生成器🏆奖品规划工具📊排行榜与奖励📱直接在浏览器中运行无需下载。无需注册。只需打开即可在几分钟内主持令人难忘的Tambola游戏。一起游戏。无需屏幕。

name: theoinvest
tagline: Turn your idea, codebase or website into a financial model
tagline_zh: 将你的想法、代码库或网站转化为财务模型
description: Describe your startup and Theo builds a bottoms up financial model investors actually trust, a formula driven Excel workbook and a branded PDF, ready to send. It's free. Bring your own AI key, plug into our MCP server, and watch your financials materialize in seconds. Share it with an investor straight from the platform and unlock a hyper tuned AI tool like Theo, powered by hitheo.ai, as your Assistant CFO ready to field every question they throw at you
description_zh: 描述您的初创公司，Theo会构建一个投资者真正信赖的自下而上的财务模型，一个由公式驱动的Excel工作簿和一个带有品牌的PDF，随时可以发送。这是免费的。带上您自己的AI密钥，接入我们的MCP服务器，几秒钟内就能看到您的财务数据。直接从平台与投资者分享，并解锁一个由hitheo.ai驱动的超调优AI工具，如Theo，作为您的助理首席财务官，随时准备回答他们抛给您的每一个问题

name: TradeChains
tagline: Trace every player moved in a trade and see who actually won
tagline_zh: 追踪每位参与者在交易中的一举一动，看看谁真正赢了
description: Sports trades are never just two teams swapping players. Every deal kicks off a chain of players being swapped, picks getting moved and prospects switching teams get moved again. The true winner or value isn't shown or obvious until years later. TradeChains lets you follow those chains all the way down. Pick any trade, map every downstream move it triggered, and compare the career value generated on each side.
description_zh: 体育交易从来不仅仅是两支球队交换球员那么简单。每一笔交易都会引发一系列的球员交换、选秀权变动以及前景球员再次转队。真正的赢家或价值在多年后才会显现或变得明显。TradeChains让你能够全程追踪这些交易链。选择任何一笔交易，映射它所触发的每一个下游动作，并比较双方所创造的职业生涯价值。

name: Snapmarks
tagline: Turn every new tab into a launchpad
tagline_zh: 将每个新标签页都变成一个启动板
description: Snapmarks replaces your blank new tab with a fast, visual speed dial for the sites you use most. Organize bookmarks into color-coded categories and tags, search instantly as you type, and launch anything in one click. Private by design — everything stays on your device, no account required. Free tier includes the full speed dial, search, and organization; Pro adds auto-sync across devices, auto-backup, and nested categories.
description_zh: Snapmarks用快速、直观的快速拨号功能替换您空白的新标签页，方便您快速访问最常用的网站。您可以将书签按颜色分类和标记，边输入边搜索，一键启动任何内容。设计注重隐私——所有内容都保存在您的设备上，无需注册账户。免费版包含完整的快速拨号、搜索和组织功能；专业版增加了跨设备自动同步、自动备份和嵌套分类功能。

name: AAC Without Expensive Hardware
tagline: Voxetu – Smart AAC for ALS, Stroke, Autism, and CP
tagline_zh: Voxetu——面向肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、中风、自闭症和脑瘫（CP）的智能AAC（辅助沟通）设备
description: Voxetu is a free AAC communication toolkit for people with ALS, Cerebral Palsy, Stroke, Parkinson's and Autism. World-first breath detection and gaze keyboard. Sign language recognition. Smart predictions, emotion board, voice banking, carer dashboard. Free forever plan. By PISRO Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.
description_zh: Voxetu是一款专为肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、脑瘫、中风、帕金森氏症和自闭症患者设计的免费AAC（辅助沟通）工具包。该工具包具备全球首创的呼吸检测和视线键盘功能，支持手语识别，提供智能预测、情绪板、语音银行和护理者仪表板等功能。该工具包提供永久免费方案。由PISRO Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.开发。

name: Caspi AI
tagline: Your AI calisthenics coach
tagline_zh: 你的AI健身教练
description: Caspi AI is an AI-powered calisthenics coach that analyzes your skills from video and gives instant feedback. Upload a clip of your handstand, planche, front lever, muscle-up, and more to receive scores for form, control, stability, and execution, along with personalized coaching tips. Unlike generic fitness apps, Caspi is built specifically to help athletes improve calisthenics skills through video analysis and progress tracking.
description_zh: Caspi AI是一款基于人工智能的健身操教练应用，它能通过视频分析你的技能，并即时给出反馈。上传你的倒立、平板支撑、前杠杆、肌肉上拉等动作的视频片段，你将获得关于姿势、控制力、稳定性和执行力的评分，以及个性化的训练建议。与普通的健身应用不同，Caspi是专门为运动员设计的，旨在通过视频分析和进度追踪来帮助他们提高健身操技能。

name: Smart Post Studio —  AI powered Desktop
tagline: Post with confidence - Backed by AI
tagline_zh: 自信发帖——AI保驾护航
description: Smart Post Studio — the desktop-native social media scheduler for creators on Instagram, Threads, TikTok, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, Fanvue. Built-in AI Writing and marketing Studio. AI Writing Studio — caption generation, hashtag research, brand voice memory Visual calendar with drag-and-drop scheduling 7 platforms — Instagram, TikTok, X, Threads, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, Fanvue Local-first** — your posts and credentials live on your machine, not ours Mac + Windows** with native installers
description_zh: Smart Post Studio——专为Instagram、Threads、TikTok、X、Facebook、YouTube Shorts、Fanvue上的创作者打造的桌面原生社交媒体排程工具。内置AI写作与营销工作室。AI写作工作室——生成标题、研究标签、记忆品牌声音。可视化日历，支持拖放排程。7大平台——Instagram、TikTok、X、Threads、Facebook、YouTube Shorts、Fanvue。本地优先**——您的帖子和凭证保存在您的设备上，而非我们的设备。Mac + Windows**，提供原生安装程序

name: SaaS Farm
tagline: 36 free online tools for productivity, health & daily life.
tagline_zh: 36款免费在线工具，助力提升生产力、健康与日常生活。
description: SaaS Farm is a collection of 36 free online tools organized into 8 categories: Timer, Tracker, Calculator, Converter, Pregnancy, Generator, Random, Image tools.
description_zh: SaaS Farm是一个包含36个免费在线工具的集合，这些工具被分为8大类：计时器、跟踪器、计算器、转换器、孕期工具、生成器、随机数生成器、图像工具。

name: InvoiceAnt
tagline: 100% Free & No Sign-up - Forever.
tagline_zh: 永久100%免费，无需注册。
description: Create professional, watermark-free invoices instantly with InvoiceAnt. A fast, free billing tool that keeps your data completely secure on your device.
description_zh: 使用InvoiceAnt，即刻生成专业且无水印的发票。这是一款快速且免费的开票工具，能确保您的数据在设备上完全安全。

name: Smart CRO Agent - AI Audits for Shopify
tagline: Your AI CRO consultant for Shopify — instant & affordable
tagline_zh: 您在Shopify上的AI CRO顾问——即时且实惠
description: Smart CRO Agent is your AI conversion consultant for Shopify. Point it at any page — home, collections, products, or CMS — and in ~30 seconds it returns a prioritized, developer-ready action plan ranked by revenue impact, using 5 proven CRO frameworks. Every audit also scores mobile UX, SEO, and your AI search visibility (AEO, GEO & LLMs.txt) so you show up in ChatGPT Search and Google AI Overviews. Share reports via link or PDF. Start free — no consultant fees, no waiting weeks.
description_zh: Smart CRO Agent是您在Shopify上的AI转化顾问。只需将其指向任何页面——主页、产品系列、产品或CMS——大约30秒内，它就会使用5个经过验证的CRO框架，根据收入影响，为您返回一个按优先级排序、适合开发人员的行动计划。每次审核还会对移动端用户体验、搜索引擎优化以及您的AI搜索可见性（AEO、GEO和LLMs.txt）进行评分，以便您在ChatGPT搜索和Google AI概览中脱颖而出。您可以通过链接或PDF分享报告。免费开始——无需咨询费，无需等待数周。

name: ChartKit
tagline: ThinkCell alternative for Google Slides
tagline_zh: Google幻灯片的ThinkCell替代方案
description: ChartKit helps teams build charts directly inside Google Slides, Docs, and Sheets.
description_zh: ChartKit 可帮助团队直接在 Google 幻灯片、文档和表格中构建图表。

name: calculatrice mauricette
tagline: Calcul gratuit des heures de travail en ligne
tagline_zh: 在线免费工时计算
description: Outil gratuit pour calculer les heures de travail, les heures supplémentaires et convertir les heures en format décimal en quelques secondes.
description_zh: 一个免费工具，用于计算工作时间、加班时间，并将小时数转换为十进制格式，单位为秒。

name: TextShape
tagline: Word art that fills any shape - free, exact, private
tagline_zh: 可填充任意形状的文字艺术——自由、精确、个性
description: Turn your words into art that fills any shape - a heart, an animal, a logo or your own uploaded photo. TextShape places every word precisely to trace the silhouette, and because it's deterministic (not AI), you stay in control: same input, same result. It runs entirely in your browser, so nothing's uploaded. Free, no signup, no watermarks. Gradients, palettes, word-cloud packing, custom fonts. Export PNG, vector SVG with a Cricut/Silhouette cut mode, or an animated reveal - then put it on merch.
description_zh: 将你的文字转化为艺术，填充任何形状——一颗心、一只动物、一个标志或你上传的自己的照片。TextShape能精确地放置每个单词以勾勒出轮廓，而且由于它是确定性的（非人工智能），你始终掌握着控制权：相同的输入，相同的结果。它完全在你的浏览器中运行，因此无需上传任何内容。免费、无需注册、无水印。渐变、调色板、词云打包、自定义字体。导出PNG、带Cricut/Silhouette切割模式的矢量SVG，或动画展示——然后将其应用于商品上。

name: DealLock AI
tagline: Smart Marketplace Meetup Booking
tagline_zh: 智能市场聚会预约
description: DealLock AI helps Facebook Marketplace and local sellers turn photos into ready-to-post listings, share a pickup booking link, and reduce back-and-forth with buyers. Sellers set available pickup times, buyers book a slot, and firm-price protection helps keep “firm” prices firm.
description_zh: DealLock AI助力Facebook Marketplace和本地卖家将照片转化为即刻可发布的商品清单，分享取货预约链接，并减少与买家的反复沟通。卖家设定可用的取货时间，买家预约取货时段，而固定价格保护则有助于保持“固定”价格的稳定性。

name: Rapha Protocol
tagline: Compute moves. Patient data stays
tagline_zh: 计算动作。患者数据保持不变
description: Rapha Protocol is a zero-trust, compute-to-data edge network for clinical AI. Instead of exporting raw patient records and risking massive GDPR/HIPAA liabilities, Rapha routes AI models into air-gapped hardware enclaves directly inside hospital server rooms. Models train locally, and only anonymized weights leave. Key features include Intel SGX/TDX isolation, Policy-as-Code compliance enforcement, and immutable Zero-Knowledge (ZK-SNARK) audit receipts anchored on Polygon Mainnet.
description_zh: Rapha协议是一个面向临床人工智能的零信任、计算到数据的边缘网络。Rapha不会导出原始患者记录，从而避免承担《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）和《健康保险流通与责任法案》（HIPAA）规定的巨额责任，而是将人工智能模型直接导入医院服务器机房内的气隙硬件隔离区。模型在本地进行训练，只有经过匿名处理的权重才会离开。其主要特点包括英特尔SGX/TDX隔离、策略即代码（Policy-as-Code）合规性执行，以及锚定在Polygon主网上的不可篡改的零知识（ZK-SNARK）审计收据。

name: Stylus
tagline: Rich, on-brand HTML emails built with Claude
tagline_zh: 用Claude构建的丰富且符合品牌调性的HTML电子邮件
description: Most email tools give you a template editor. Stylus is a skill file you upload to a Claude Project. Claude reads it once and knows your entire design system — components, brand tokens, gradients, copy rules. Describe any email you need, get ready-to-send HTML back. Three themes at launch: Pitch, Grove, Axiom (SaaS). Works with most ESP.
description_zh: 大多数电子邮件工具都提供一个模板编辑器。而Stylus是一个技能文件，你需要将其上传到Claude项目中。Claude读取一次后，就能了解你的整个设计系统——组件、品牌标识、渐变、复制规则。描述你需要的任何电子邮件，就能得到可直接发送的HTML。发布时包含三个主题：Pitch、Grove、Axiom（SaaS）。适用于大多数电子邮件服务提供商（ESP）。

name: Wire Chord Studio
tagline: FREE MIDI jam rooms for musicians
tagline_zh: 为音乐家提供免费的MIDI即兴演奏室
description: WireChord is a service with serzero-config MIDI jam rooms. Instead of heavy audio, we stream lightweight MIDI data. No downloads or external sound cards. Plug in your MIDI instrument and play in your browser. Join our closed beta waitlist!
description_zh: WireChord是一项提供零配置MIDI即兴创作室的服务。我们传输的是轻量级的MIDI数据，而非庞大的音频文件。无需下载或外接声卡。只需插入你的MIDI乐器，即可在浏览器中演奏。快来加入我们的内测等待名单吧！

name: Money Clarity — Notion Finance Tracker
tagline: Track every rupee. Know your net worth. In Notion.
tagline_zh: 追踪每一卢比。了解你的净资产。尽在Notion。
description: Money Clarity is a complete personal finance systembuilt inside Notion — designed for Indians who've tred budgeting apps and quit. 6 modules ready on day 1 Income Tracker, Expense Tracker, 50/30/20 Budget Dahboard, Subscriptions Audit, Net Worth Tracker, and ebt Payoff Tracker. Built specifically for Indian spnding patterns — UPI categories, EMI tracking, INR. ay what you want (min $2).
description_zh: Money Clarity是Notion内置的一个完整的个人理财系统，专为那些尝试过预算应用程序但最终放弃的印度人设计。6个模块从第一天起即可使用：收入跟踪器、支出跟踪器、50/30/20预算仪表板、订阅审计、净资产跟踪器和债务偿还跟踪器。专为印度人的消费模式量身打造——包括UPI类别、EMI跟踪和INR。随心所欲（最低2美元）。

name: Ship Space
tagline: Agent Developing Ecosystem
tagline_zh: 代理开发生态系统
description: ShipSpace is the agent development environment for builders shipping with AI. Run Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor side by side in one workspace with up to 16 agents in parallel. Ship Agent orchestrates your swarm, while a built-in browser, IDE, GitHub integration, and drag-and-drop terminals keep everything in one window. Spin up multi-agent workspaces in under a second. Built by MSH.Tech. Built by agents. Built for builders. Ship faster. 🚀
description_zh: ShipSpace是面向人工智能航运建设者的代理开发环境。您可以在一个工作区中并行运行多达16个代理，同时运行Claude、Codex、Gemini和Cursor。Ship Agent负责编排您的集群，而内置的浏览器、集成开发环境（IDE）、GitHub集成和拖放式终端则将所有内容整合到一个窗口中。不到一秒即可启动多代理工作区。由MSH.Tech打造。由代理构建。为建设者而生。更快地启航。

name: CartAI Upsell
tagline: AI post-purchase upsells with combined shipping
tagline_zh: AI结合配送进行售后追加销售
description: CartAI Upsell helps Shopify merchants turn completed orders into a second sale. It matches each purchase with a relevant accessory, writes a personalized follow-up email, and gives the customer a one-click draft order link so the add-on can ship with the original order. Merchants control the accessory catalog and AI tone, while the dashboard tracks sends, conversions, revenue, and the full email audit trail.
description_zh: CartAI Upsell助力Shopify商家将已完成的订单转化为二次销售。它为每笔购买匹配相关配件，撰写个性化的跟进邮件，并为客户提供一键生成订单草稿的链接，以便附加商品与原始订单一起发货。商家可控制配件目录和AI语气，而控制面板则可追踪发送情况、转化率、收入以及完整的邮件审核记录。

name: WhenAvailable
tagline: Effortless, ad-free group scheduling
tagline_zh: 轻松无广告的群组日程安排
description: Simplifying group coordination without the clutter, tracking, or paywalls. We’ve all been there: you just want to find a time for a group event, but existing tools drown your participants in invasive ads, force everyone to create accounts, or lock basic features behind a subscription. WhenAvailable is built to be the clean, modern, and frictionless alternative. Create a beautiful availability poll in seconds, send the link, and let your group vote.
description_zh: 简化群组协调，免受杂乱信息、追踪或付费门槛的困扰。我们都曾有过这样的经历：你只是想为群组活动找个时间，但现有的工具却让参与者淹没在侵入式广告中，迫使每个人创建账户，或将基本功能锁定在订阅之后。WhenAvailable旨在成为简洁、现代、无障碍的替代方案。只需几秒钟即可创建一个美观的可用性投票，发送链接，让你的群组进行投票。

name: Warning Lab
tagline: Compliance tools for high-risk, high-liability industries
tagline_zh: 高风险、高责任行业的合规工具
description: WarningLab's SaaS (SPONCI) helps high-liability organizations document support, intervention, and compliance efforts. With SPONCI, every outreach attempt is logged and retained, creating evidence that help was offered before legal action. Regulators and state attorneys general increasingly expect organizations to demonstrate meaningful efforts to support and protect users. SPONCI provides engagement and intervention—not just an 800 number, website link, or after-hours counseling referral.
description_zh: WarningLab的SaaS（SPONCI）帮助高风险组织记录支持、干预和合规工作。借助SPONCI，每一次外联尝试都会被记录并保留，从而创建证据，证明在采取法律行动之前已提供过帮助。监管机构和各州总检察长越来越期望组织能证明其为支持和保护用户做出了有意义的努力。SPONCI提供的是参与和干预，而不仅仅是一个800电话号码、网站链接或下班后的咨询转介。

name: Atlas
tagline: Trading built for the everyday investor
tagline_zh: 专为普通投资者打造的交易平台
description: Atlas is a unified trading platform with a built-in smart AI layer called Glob. Glob analyzes tokens and stocks, constructs and executes trading strategies, and supports backtesting before deployment. Glob can trade on your behalf with different strategies such as following breaking news, SMA, and The platform covers all major asset classes: 20,000+ tokens across 90+ networks, 260+ stocks, perpetuals, and 5,000+ prediction markets.
description_zh: Atlas是一个统一的交易平台，内置了一个名为Glob的智能AI层。Glob能够分析代币和股票，构建并执行交易策略，并在部署前支持回测。Glob能够以不同的策略代您进行交易，例如追踪突发新闻、采用移动平均线（SMA）策略等。该平台涵盖所有主要资产类别：来自90多个网络的20,000多种代币、260多种股票、永续合约以及5,000多个预测市场。

name: RootNous
tagline: Foundational Intelligence
tagline_zh: 基础智能
description: Research and Development in Artificial Intelligence and related fields, Leading research organization advancing AI technology through cutting-edge research, publications, patents and innovative software solutions.
description_zh: 人工智能及相关领域的研究与开发，一家领先的研究机构，通过前沿研究、出版物、专利和创新软件解决方案推动人工智能技术的发展。

name: TheTools.World
tagline: Free online tools for images, files, text, and everyday task
tagline_zh: 免费的在线图像、文件、文本处理工具，以及日常任务处理工具
description: TheTools.World starts with free browser-side image tools for compression, resizing, conversion, and upload preparation, with more utilities planned.
description_zh: TheTools.World网站最初提供免费的浏览器端图像工具，用于压缩、调整大小、转换和上传准备，并计划推出更多实用工具。

name: Remote Prop View
tagline: Dallas Fort-Worth property intelligence platform
tagline_zh: 达拉斯-沃斯堡房地产情报平台
description: Competitors show you a price. We show you what it is actually like to live there. Remote Prop View is an AI property intelligence platform that compiles 45+ hyperlocal signals per Dallas-Fort Worth address, fusing listing data, public records, crime, school, commute, environmental and fraud intelligence into a single verified profile. The kind of depth no national portal will build, because they are not built to win one metro. We are. 200 DFW cities. One verified intelligence layer.
description_zh: 竞争对手只给你看价格。而我们则让你亲身体验居住在那里的真实感受。Remote Prop View是一个人工智能房产智能平台，它为达拉斯-沃斯堡地区的每个地址汇集了45个以上的超本地化信号，将房源数据、公共记录、犯罪情况、学校、通勤、环境和欺诈情报融合成一个经过验证的档案。这种深度是任何全国性门户网站都无法构建的，因为它们并不是为了赢得一个都会区而建立的。而我们，则致力于此。200个达拉斯-沃斯堡城市。一个经过验证的情报层。

name: Tesseract: AI Math Solver
tagline: Snap & Get Video Explanation
tagline_zh: 拍摄并获取视频说明
description: When students get stuck, they're stuck choosing between text-step apps (Photomath, ChatGPT) that build no intuition, or generic YouTube lectures made for everyone — not their exact question. Tesseract turns any question into a personalized, animated video explanation — narrated and drawn out step by step, the way the best 1-on-1 tutor would explain it. Generated for your problem, in seconds. Live worldwide on the App Store. We're shipping, not pitching.
description_zh: 当学生遇到难题时，他们要么选择无法培养直觉的文本步骤应用程序（如Photomath、ChatGPT），要么选择面向所有人、却无法针对他们具体问题的通用YouTube讲座。Tesseract则能将任何问题转化为个性化的动画视频讲解——一步步叙述和演示，就像最好的一对一辅导老师所做的那样。针对你的问题，几秒钟内即可生成。该应用已在App Store全球上线。我们提供的是产品，而非推销。

name: certpracticelab
tagline: Free CompTIA practice tests with every answer explained
tagline_zh: 免费CompTIA模拟测试，每道题都有详细解答
description: Free CompTIA practice tests for A+, Network+, Security+, CySA+, and PenTest+. What makes it different: every answer is explained and cited to a primarysource (NIST, MITRE, CISA, OWASP, RFCs, or the official exam objectives) so you learn the concept, not just the letter. Original questions, never dumps. No signup, no paywall. Start in one click.
description_zh: CompTIA A+、Network+、Security+、CySA+和PenTest+的免费模拟测试。与众不同之处在于：每个答案都配有解释，并引用主要来源（NIST、MITRE、CISA、OWASP、RFC或官方考试大纲），以便您学习概念，而不仅仅是文字。题目原创，绝非题库真题。无需注册，无付费门槛。一键开始测试。

name: BidCopy
tagline: Win more freelance jobs with humanized AI proposals.
tagline_zh: 凭借人性化的AI提案，赢得更多自由职业工作。
description: BidCopy generates highly converting, personalized proposals for Upwork and other platforms. We automatically strip away generic AI jargon to make your cover letters sound 100% human, helping you stand out from the crowd and win more contracts.
description_zh: BidCopy为Upwork和其他平台生成高转化率的个性化提案。我们会自动剔除通用的人工智能术语，让您的求职信听起来100%像人类所写，帮助您脱颖而出，赢得更多合同。

name: Vibebattle
tagline: Prove you are the best vibecoders among your friends
tagline_zh: 证明你是朋友中最棒的vibecoder
description: Vibebattle is a 2-8 players vibecoding game. 2 modes: creative -> text subject reproduction -> website target You have X minutes and Y prompts then there is a voting round.
description_zh: Vibebattle是一款2至8人参与的vibecoding游戏。游戏设有两种模式：创意模式->文本主题再现模式->网站目标模式。您有X分钟的时间和Y个提示，之后将进入投票环节。

name: Lite Agent
tagline: Your Browser's new AI intern
tagline_zh: 你的浏览器新添的AI助手
description: Lite Agent is a privacy-first AI browser extension that clicks, types, remembers, and talks — all inside your browser.
description_zh: Lite Agent是一款以隐私保护为先的人工智能浏览器扩展程序，它能在您的浏览器内执行点击、输入、记忆和对话等操作。

name: RankLLM
tagline: Rank Higher in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & Perplexity
tagline_zh: 在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和困惑度方面排名更高
description: RankLLM helps brands monitor AI visibility, track citations, and get cited in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity answers.
description_zh: RankLLM帮助品牌监控人工智能的可见度，追踪引用情况，并在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和Perplexity的回答中被引用。

name: n8n Freelance Autopilot
tagline: AI job hunter that finds freelance work 24/7 while you sleep
tagline_zh: AI求职助手，在你睡觉时全天候为你寻找自由职业工作
description: Tired of checking Upwork daily? n8n Autopilot finds jobs 24/7, scores with AI, generates proposals in 3 languages, sends to Telegram. • Scans Upwork, Malt, Freelancer every 30 min • AI scores jobs 0-100 by your skills • Generates proposals in 3 languages • Sends alerts to Telegram • A/B tests proposals • Weekly reports 💰 €15 one-time • €5/month APIs • No SaaS Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi or VPS 📦 7 workflows • Setup guide • Lifetime updates Built by 17-year-old from Luxembourg 🇱🇺
description_zh: 厌倦了每天查看Upwork？n8n Autopilot全天候自动查找工作，通过AI评分，生成3种语言的提案，并发送到Telegram。• 每30分钟扫描Upwork、Malt、Freelancer一次 • AI根据您的技能对工作进行0-100评分 • 生成3种语言的提案 • 向Telegram发送提醒 • 对提案进行A/B测试 • 每周报告 💰 一次性15欧元 • API每月5欧元 • 非SaaS，自行托管于Raspberry Pi或VPS 📦 7种工作流程 • 设置指南 • 终身更新 由卢森堡17岁少年开发 🇱🇺

name: mypage.cc
tagline: Show your work, not just your links
tagline_zh: 展示你的作品，而不仅仅是你的链接
description: Most link in bio tools hand your audience a stack of buttons to tap. mypage.cc gives you an actual page instead. Add your work, your links, your story, and ship something that looks like you made it on purpose, not something you filled out. Built for freelancers and small studios who care how they show up online. Your page, live in minutes, on your own domain.
description_zh: 大多数个人资料链接工具只是给用户一堆按钮供其点击。而mypage.cc则为你提供一个真正的页面。你可以添加你的作品、链接、故事，并发布一个看起来像是特意制作而非随意填写的页面。该工具专为自由职业者和小型工作室打造，他们关心自己在网上的形象。你的页面几分钟内即可上线，且域名归你所有。

name: PitchLab
tagline: The fastest way from pre-med to published.
tagline_zh: 从医学预科到发表的最快途径。
description: Cold emailing research professors takes hours. Reading papers, personalizing, sending, repeating — most pre-meds spend entire afternoons on this. PitchLab does it in minutes. Pick a university and specialty. We find the professors, read their work, write every email, and send from your Gmail automatically. Starter: 50 emails — $19 Pro: 125 emails — $29 Premium: 200 emails — $39 One-time. Same day.
description_zh: 给研究教授发陌生邮件需要花费数小时。阅读论文、个性化定制、发送、重复——大多数医学预科生会为此花费整个下午。而PitchLab只需几分钟即可完成。选择一所大学和一个专业。我们会找到教授，阅读他们的作品，撰写每一封邮件，并自动从您的Gmail发送。入门版：50封邮件——19美元；专业版：125封邮件——29美元；高级版：200封邮件——39美元。一次性购买。当天送达。

name: My Next Body
tagline: All-in-one fitness coaching: sport, nutrition & mindset
tagline_zh: 全能健身指导：运动、营养与心态
description: Most fitness apps make you choose: train or eat well. My Next Body brings it all together. It's a French all-in-one coaching app where 4 AI coaches guide you across everything that actually matters: 🏋️ Martin — training, at home or in the gym, any level 🥗 Solène — nutrition & recipes, without restrictive diets 🧠 JB — mindset & motivation, so you actually stick with it ❤️ Gabriela — health, recovery & injury prevention
description_zh: 大多数健身应用程序都让你在训练和饮食之间做出选择。而My Next Body则将这两者完美结合。这是一款法国的一站式健身指导应用程序，由四位人工智能教练指导你完成所有真正重要的事项：🏋️ Martin——训练，无论是在家还是在健身房，适合任何水平的人 🥗 Solène——营养与食谱，无限制饮食 🧠 JB——心态与动力，让你真正坚持下去 ❤️ Gabriela——健康、恢复与损伤预防

name: Pollix
tagline: Simple polls & meeting scheduling with zero friction
tagline_zh: 零障碍的简易投票和会议安排
description: Simple polls for better decisions. Pollix helps you create polls and schedule meetings in minutes with zero friction. Why you'll love it: 🚫 No Registration: Participants vote instantly without an account. 📊 Total Flexibility: Support for Single Choice, Multiple Choice, and Calendar Polls. ⏱️ Save Time: Find the best time for meetings based on real-time results. 📲 Easy Sharing: Send a quick link or a QR code. Stop the endless back-and-forth chat. Create your first poll in seconds!
description_zh: 简易投票，助您做出更佳决策。Pollix助您在几分钟内轻松创建投票并安排会议。您为何会爱上它：🚫 无需注册：参与者无需注册账户即可立即投票。📊 完全灵活：支持单选、多选和日历投票。⏱️ 节省时间：根据实时结果找到最佳会议时间。📲 轻松分享：发送快速链接或二维码。无需无休止的来回聊天。几秒钟内即可创建您的第一个投票！

name: Gaplyze
tagline: Stop guessing. Start building what the market wants
tagline_zh: 别再瞎猜了。开始打造市场需要的产品吧
description: Gaplyze stands out by turning startup validation into a complete workflow, not just an idea generator. Start with a niche, idea, or competitor URL and receive demand signals, competitor gaps, pricing insights, underserved audiences, idea scoring, strategy maps, business blueprints, execution roadmaps, domain ratings, prompt packs, and investor-ready exports. All of this is designed to help founders validate faster and build smarter.
description_zh: Gaplyze的独特之处在于，它将初创企业验证转变为一个完整的工作流程，而不仅仅是一个创意生成器。从利基市场、创意或竞争对手的网址开始，您将收到需求信号、竞争对手缺口、定价洞察、未被充分服务的受众、创意评分、战略地图、商业蓝图、执行路线图、域名评级、提示包以及投资者准备就绪的导出文件。所有这些设计都是为了帮助创始人更快地进行验证，并更明智地进行构建。

name: MailShot
tagline: #newsletter #emails #builder
tagline_zh: #新闻通讯 #电子邮件 #构建器
description: Newsletters Builder by drag and drop blocks, modify content and style with multiple canvas and pages each with its own design
description_zh: 通过拖放模块构建新闻通讯，使用多个画布和页面（每个都有其独特的设计）来修改内容和样式

name: TruStar Connect
tagline: All-in-one safety software, built for COR readiness.
tagline_zh: 专为COR就绪性打造的一体化安全软件。
description: TruStar Connect is an all-in-one safety and field operations platform that helps companies get and stay COR ready. It replaces paper and spreadsheets with one connected system for inspections and forms, field observations, incident investigations with AI assistance, hazard registers, corrective actions, training tracking, and equipment maintenance. Everything is backed by audit-grade records, role-based access, and analytics. Built by Canadian safety professionals. Free trial available.
description_zh: TruStar Connect是一个集安全与现场运营于一体的平台，可帮助企业实现并保持COR（合规、合规性、合规性）就绪状态。该平台用一个互联系统取代了纸质文件和电子表格，涵盖了检查与表格、现场观察、人工智能辅助的事故调查、危险登记、纠正措施、培训跟踪以及设备维护等功能。所有内容均以审计级记录、基于角色的访问权限和分析功能为支撑。该平台由加拿大安全专业人士打造，并提供免费试用。

name: Haystack
tagline: Get your brand recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini.
tagline_zh: 让你的品牌获得ChatGPT、Perplexity和Gemini的推荐。
description: Ask ChatGPT for the best tool in your category. It names three companies. You're probably not one of them. Those names aren't random. The model is pulling from a handful of articles it trusts, and your competitors are in them. You're not. Haystack finds the exact prompts buyers use, the exact sources behind every answer, and the journalists who can get you into them. You send the pitch, we watch the engines until your name shows up. Run it free on your own domain.
description_zh: 向ChatGPT询问你所在领域的最佳工具。它会列出三家公司。你可能并不在其中。这些名字并非随机。该模型是从它信任的几篇文章中提取出来的，而你的竞争对手就在其中。但你不在。Haystack能找出买家使用的确切提示、每个答案背后的确切来源，以及能帮你获取这些信息的记者。你发送推销文案，我们监控引擎，直到你的名字出现。在你的域名上免费运行它。

name: OpenMed Labs
tagline: The Infrastructure Layer for Healthcare AI
tagline_zh: 医疗人工智能的基础设施层
description: OpenMed Labs helps healthcare researchers and AI teams build medical AI without moving raw patient data. It combines secure medical datasets with no-code model training and clinical simulation in one platform. Contributors also get transparent ownership and attribution for how their data is used.
description_zh: OpenMed Labs助力医疗研究人员和人工智能团队在不转移原始患者数据的情况下构建医疗人工智能。该平台将安全的医疗数据集、无代码模型训练和临床模拟功能集于一体。同时，数据贡献者对其数据的使用情况享有透明的所有权和归属权。

name: HealthBridge AI
tagline: A calm place to keep everyone's health, together.
tagline_zh: 一个能让大家共同保持健康、宁静的地方。
description: A beautiful, AI-powered healtHealthBridge AI is a calm, simple health companion for your phone. Add your medicines once and it keeps track of timing and dosage. Keep your family's blood groups, allergies, and emergency contacts in one place. Snap a photo of a prescription and it reads it for you. And when you have a health question at 2am, ask the built-in AI — it only talks health, nothing else. No clutter, no sign-up forms. Open it, and it remembers you.
description_zh: 一款美观、由人工智能驱动的健康助手——HealthBridge AI，是您手机上的贴心健康伴侣。只需添加一次您的药物信息，它就能记录服药时间和剂量。您还可以将家人的血型、过敏史和紧急联系人信息集中管理。只需拍下处方照片，它就能为您解读。如果您在凌晨2点有健康问题，只需询问内置的人工智能——它只谈健康，不谈其他。没有繁琐的操作，也没有注册表格。打开它，它就会记住您。

name: ChinaValidate
tagline: Screen Chinese suppliers before you pay
tagline_zh: 在付款前筛选中国供应商
description: ChinaValidate helps overseas buyers screen Chinese suppliers before payments, contracts, onboarding, or shipment decisions. Search by company name, keyword, or USCC, compare possible matches, open an English company profile, and unlock a structured report with registration details, risk signals, public-record modules, and PDF export.
description_zh: ChinaValidate帮助海外买家在付款、签订合同、供应商入职或做出发货决定之前，对中国供应商进行筛选。用户可以通过公司名称、关键字或USCC进行搜索，比较可能的匹配项，打开英文公司简介，并获取一份包含注册详情、风险信号、公开记录模块和PDF导出功能的结构化报告。

name: reAItro
tagline: Remote sprint retros your team shows up for
tagline_zh: 远程冲刺回顾会上，你的团队成员都到场了
description: reAItro is a free AI retrospective tool built for remote & distributed agile teams. Run real-time boards, let AI cluster the feedback and write the summary. action items, and warm up quiet rooms with 5 built-in team games. No credit card, no signup to join.
description_zh: reAItro是一款专为远程和分布式敏捷团队打造的免费人工智能回顾工具。运行实时板，让AI对反馈进行聚类并撰写总结、行动项，并通过5款内置团队游戏打破沉默。无需信用卡，无需注册即可加入。

name: FreeByDate
tagline: Debt shouldn’t be a mystery. We show the path to freedom.
tagline_zh: 债务不应成为谜团。我们为您指明通往自由的道路。
description: FreeByDate is a free debt payoff sequencer that shows you the fastest path to debt freedom using a disciplined sequencing strategy. Not minimum payments. A real plan.
description_zh: FreeByDate是一款免费的债务清偿排序工具，它采用严格的排序策略，为你展示实现债务自由的最快途径。不是最低还款额，而是一个真正的计划。

name: CalculaFinanzas
tagline: Free, no-signup financial calculators for Chile
tagline_zh: 智利免费且无需注册的金融计算器
description: CalculaFinanzas is a free toolbox of 40+ financial calculators built for Chile (in CLP): net salary, severance, mortgage dividend, compound interest, UF/UTM converters and more. Live UF/UTM/IPC data, no signup, no clutter — clear answers in seconds, plus plain-language guides.
description_zh: CalculaFinanzas是一个免费工具箱，内含40多种专为智利（以比索计）设计的金融计算器：净工资、遣散费、抵押贷款分红、复利、UF/UTM转换器等。实时UF/UTM/IPC数据，无需注册，界面简洁——几秒钟内即可获得清晰答案，并提供通俗易懂的指南。

name: Redvibe Multibrowser
tagline: multibrowser, saas, workspace, browser
tagline_zh: 多浏览器、SaaS、工作空间、浏览器
description: Multi-accounting browser with unlimited profiles and zero complex setup. Redvibe is designed to manage dozens of accounts on a single computer without complex setups and technical hassles. Manage clients, scale advertising campaigns, import accounts in bulk — the AI will automatically sort them into ready-made profiles. No limits or restrictions. Launch work accounts quickly, without a cluttered interface or long preparation.
description_zh: 多账户浏览器，无限账户配置，零复杂设置。Redvibe旨在管理单台计算机上的数十个账户，无需复杂设置和技术难题。管理客户、扩展广告活动、批量导入账户——人工智能会自动将它们分类到现成的账户配置中。无限制或约束。快速启动工作账户，无需杂乱的界面或漫长的准备。

name: MakerMetrics
tagline: An open-source analytics dashboard built for Etsy shops.
tagline_zh: 专为Etsy店铺打造的开源分析仪表板。
description: MakerMetrics is an analytics dashboard for Etsy sellers, without API access needed! Import the CSV exports Etsy already gives you and get what Etsy fails to give its sellers: a useful, mobile-friendly dashboard with insights, forecasting, and an ability to connect your own AI API key.
description_zh: MakerMetrics是Etsy卖家的分析仪表板，无需访问API！导入Etsy已经为您提供的CSV导出文件，即可获得Etsy未能为其卖家提供的东西：一个实用的、适合移动设备的仪表板，其中包含洞察、预测功能，并且能够连接您自己的AI API密钥。

name: Ruki
tagline: A Windows AI assistant you can teach and that does the work
tagline_zh: 一个你可以教导的Windows AI助手，它能帮你完成工作
description: A minimal Windows desktop AI assistant you can teach and that then does the work for you, under your supervision.
description_zh: 一个最小的Windows桌面AI助手，你可以对其进行训练，然后它会在你的监督下为你完成工作。

name: CartWatch
tagline: Detect and remove spam abandoned checkouts from Shopify
tagline_zh: 检测并移除Shopify中的垃圾邮件和被遗弃的结账信息
description: CartWatch detects bots and fake sessions in your Shopify abandoned checkout flows. Suppress fake and spam profiles in Klaviyo and Omnisend so you're not paying for fake contacts — and your recovery emails reach real buyers.
description_zh: CartWatch能够检测您Shopify中被放弃的结账流程中的机器人和虚假会话。在Klaviyo和Omnisend中抑制虚假和垃圾邮件账户，这样您就不会为虚假联系人付费，并且您的挽回邮件能够送达真正的买家。

name: LearnPilot AI
tagline: The AI university that enforces mastery before you advance
tagline_zh: 在你进步之前，这所人工智能大学会先要求你掌握知识
description: LearnPilot AI is an AI university that enforces mastery. Type any skill → AI builds your personalized curriculum → study structured lessons with YouTube videos → pass quizzes to unlock next modules → fail → AI generates targeted revision → retry → pass all modules → take a final exam → graduate. No skipping. No passive watching. Actual mastery enforced. Built with Nuxt 4, Node.js, Groq AI, and YouTube API.
description_zh: LearnPilot AI是一所致力于掌握学习的AI大学。输入任何技能→AI为您构建个性化课程→通过YouTube视频学习结构化课程→通过测验解锁下一模块→失败→AI生成针对性复习材料→重试→通过所有模块→参加期末考试→毕业。不可跳过。不可被动观看。真正掌握学习。基于Nuxt 4、Node.js、Groq AI和YouTube API构建。

name: Scuter
tagline: Ad & product intelligence for e-commerce winners
tagline_zh: 电商赢家的广告与产品智能
description: Scruter is an all-in-one e-commerce intelligence platform. Search and analyze millions of live ads across Meta, TikTok and Pinterest, spy on competitors' shops, and uncover winning products before they go viral. Unlike single-platform ad spy tools, Scruter unifies ad research, shop intelligence and product discovery in one place with a shop tracking, email-flow capture, and a full public API + MCP + Chrome extension to research from anywhere.
description_zh: Scruter是一个一体化电子商务智能平台。它能够搜索并分析Meta、TikTok和Pinterest上数以百万计的实时广告，窥探竞争对手的店铺，并在爆红之前发现畅销产品。与单平台广告窥探工具不同，Scruter将广告研究、店铺情报和产品发现功能集于一体，并提供店铺跟踪、电子邮件流捕获以及完整的公共API + MCP + Chrome扩展程序，以便随时随地进行研究。

name: JEEA2Z - Structured JEE Problem Tracker
tagline: Stop solving randomly. Start tracking systematically.
tagline_zh: 别再随意解决了。开始系统地追踪吧。
description: JEE Sheet - Striver A2Z equivalent for JEE Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics aspirants with detailed progress tracking and statistics.
description_zh: JEE 表格 - Striver A2Z 相当于为有志于攻读 JEE 物理、化学和数学的学生提供详细进度跟踪和统计数据。

name: RootedLife
tagline: Turn quitting bad habits into growing real forests. 🌳
tagline_zh: 把戒除坏习惯变成培育真正的森林。
description: RootedLife is a gamified habit tracker that helps you quit smoking and build better routines. Instead of boring streaks, your willpower grows a virtual forest. When a craving hits, use the unique 'Crisis Radar' to distract yourself. Built natively for Android, it transforms the painful process of quitting into a visually rewarding journey.
description_zh: RootedLife是一款游戏化的习惯追踪应用，旨在帮助你戒烟并培养更健康的日常生活习惯。你的意志力将不再只是枯燥的连续天数，而是会生长出一片虚拟的森林。当烟瘾来袭时，你可以使用独特的“危机雷达”功能来分散自己的注意力。这款应用专为安卓系统打造，它将戒烟这一痛苦的过程转化为一段视觉上富有成就感的旅程。

name: Zenhook
tagline: Webhook debugging and AI summaries for humans
tagline_zh: Webhook调试和面向人类的AI摘要
description: Stop reading raw JSON. ZenHook lets you create webhook endpoints, capture requests in real time, and instantly understand incoming events with AI-powered summaries. Search, filter, and organize webhook traffic to debug integrations faster and spend less time digging through payloads. Built for developers, automation engineers, and API integrators.
description_zh: 停止读取原始JSON。ZenHook可让您创建Webhook端点，实时捕获请求，并通过人工智能摘要即时了解传入事件。搜索、过滤和组织Webhook流量，以更快地调试集成，并减少在有效负载中挖掘的时间。专为开发人员、自动化工程师和API集成人员打造。

name: prospect flow
tagline: Find verified local business leads & launch multi-channel AI
tagline_zh: 寻找经过验证的本地商业线索，并启动多渠道人工智能
description: Scaling cold outreach is painful. You have to buy a scraper (like D7), a validation service (like ZeroBounce), an email sender (like Instantly), and a CRM. ProspectFlow.ai unifies the entire workflow into a single glassmorphic workspace: 📍 Google Maps Business Scraper: Search any niche and city instantly. 🛡️ Bounce Protection MX Check: Automatically verifies emails 📣 Multi-Channel Sequences: 🎯 Intelligent Lead Scoring: Instantly ranks leads
description_zh: 扩大冷推广规模是件痛苦的事。你必须购买一个爬虫工具（如D7）、一个验证服务（如ZeroBounce）、一个邮件发送工具（如Instantly）和一个客户关系管理（CRM）系统。ProspectFlow.ai将整个工作流程整合到一个单一的玻璃形态工作空间中：📍谷歌地图商业爬虫：立即搜索任何细分市场和城市。🛡️防退信MX检查：自动验证电子邮件📣多渠道序列：🎯智能线索评分：立即对线索进行排名

name: ShBusca
tagline: Dados e IA para vender mais na Shopee
tagline_zh: 在Shopee上销售更多商品的数据和人工智能
description: SHBusca é uma extensão para Chrome que mostra, direto nas páginas da Shopee, os dados que decidem se um produto vale a pena: faturamento estimado, vendas, concorrência e margem real. Agora ela também ajuda a vender mais: a IA audita sua copy com a estrutura AIDA, detecta objeções nas avaliações e gera campanhas prontas. Tudo sem sair da Shopee. Feito no Brasil, para vendedores da Shopee Brasil.
description_zh: SHBusca是一款Chrome扩展程序，它能在Shopee的页面上直接展示决定产品是否值得购买的数据：预估收入、销量、竞争情况和实际利润率。现在，它还能帮助卖家提升销量：人工智能会使用AIDA结构审核文案，检测评价中的异议，并生成现成的广告活动。所有这些操作都无需离开Shopee平台。该工具由巴西团队开发，专为巴西Shopee卖家服务。

name: Dewan ETS Calculator
tagline: Free EU & UK ETS carbon calculator for shipping voyages
tagline_zh: 欧盟和英国航运航程排放交易计划（ETS）免费碳计算器
description: Instant EU & UK ETS carbon liability estimates for shipping voyages — dry bulk, tankers, containers, gas carriers and Ro-Ro. Free, no sign-up.
description_zh: 航运航程的欧盟和英国碳排放交易体系（ETS）碳责任即时估算——包括干散货船、油轮、集装箱船、气体运输船和滚装船。免费，无需注册。

name: SunnyBill
tagline: Free billing tools for freelancers, no signup
tagline_zh: 为自由职业者提供免费计费工具，无需注册
description: Built for freelancers and small businesses who need clean billing without heavy accounting software. SunnyBill lets you create invoices, quotes, receipts, GST/VAT bills and 1099 tax estimates in seconds. No signup, no watermark, PDF export, and your data stay in your browser unless you export it.
description_zh: 专为需要简洁账单而无需繁重会计软件的自由职业者和小型企业打造。SunnyBill让您在几秒钟内即可创建发票、报价单、收据、商品及服务税/增值税账单和1099税款预估。无需注册，无水印，支持PDF导出，除非您导出，否则您的数据将保存在浏览器中。

name: TellShots - Social forecasting platform
tagline: Lock predictions. Verify outcomes. Build reputation.
tagline_zh: 锁定预测。验证结果。建立声誉。
description: TellShots lets you lock predictions before events happen and automatically verify outcomes over time. No hindsight edits, no rewriting history, just timestamped proof of what you actually called. Compete with counter predictions, join prediction threads, and earn reputation badges based on accuracy. From sports and crypto to politics and tech, every prediction becomes a shareable proof card of your foresight. Predict. Verify. Prove.
description_zh: TellShots允许您在事件发生前锁定预测，并随时间自动验证结果。无需事后编辑，无需重写历史，只需提供您实际预测的时间戳证明。与对立预测竞争，加入预测线程，并根据准确性获得声誉徽章。从体育、加密货币到政治和科技，每一次预测都成为您远见卓识的可分享证明卡。预测。验证。证明。

name: Keygent
tagline: Run terminal commands with safely injected env vars
tagline_zh: 使用安全注入的环境变量运行终端命令
description: Keygent is a lightweight, zero-dependency CLI tool written in Go that executes terminal commands with temporarily injected environment variables. It uses a direct execution model to run commands safely without polluting your global system environment. Upcoming updates will introduce seamlessenv file parsing, centralized project configurations, and password-encrypted global environment profiles.
description_zh: Keygent是一个用Go语言编写的轻量级、零依赖的命令行工具，可通过临时注入的环境变量执行终端命令。它采用直接执行模式，安全地运行命令，而不会污染您的全局系统环境。即将推出的更新将引入seamlessenv文件解析、集中式项目配置和密码加密的全局环境配置文件。

name: LCPath
tagline: Your personalized Socratic AI LeetCode coach
tagline_zh: 你的专属苏格拉底式AI LeetCode教练
description: Grinding LeetCode blindly is a waste of time. LCPath is a Chrome extension that turns LeetCode into a personalized learning platform. Instead of just giving you the answers, our context-aware AI acts as a Socratic coach, reading your current code and providing gentle hints to build your intuition. It analyzes your solve history to recommend the exact problems you need to patch your knowledge gaps, utilizing spaced repetition so you never forget what you learn. Zero setup required.
description_zh: 盲目刷LeetCode是浪费时间。LCPath是一款Chrome扩展程序，它将LeetCode打造成一个个性化的学习平台。我们的情境感知AI不会直接给出答案，而是像苏格拉底式的教练一样，读取你当前的代码，并提供温和的提示来培养你的直觉。它分析你的解题历史，为你推荐恰好能弥补知识漏洞的问题，并利用间隔重复法，让你永远不会忘记所学内容。无需任何设置。

name: ShipStreak.fyi
tagline: The social accountability tool for makers who actually ship
tagline_zh: 面向实际发货制造商的社会责任工具
description: Streak-based social accountability for indie builders. Log a check-in in five seconds, keep your streak alive, and climb the leaderboard with other makers.
description_zh: 为独立开发者提供基于连签的社交问责机制。五秒钟内签到，保持连签记录，与其他创作者一同攀升排行榜。

name: AppZ AU Business Advisor
tagline: AU biz automation blueprints with GST/BAS/super context
tagline_zh: 包含GST/BAS/超级上下文的AU业务自动化蓝图
description: Australian small business? Get a free, personalised automation blueprint from Gemini AI -- with GST, BAS, super, and Fair Work context built in. 30 seconds.
description_zh: 澳大利亚的小企业？从Gemini AI获取一份免费的、个性化的自动化蓝图——内置GST、BAS、super和Fair Work上下文。30秒搞定。

name: PromptCache
tagline: Version your prompts. Ship faster with your team.
tagline_zh: 为你的提示进行版本控制。与团队一起更快地发布。
description: PromptCache is version control for your AI prompts — built for teams. Get full version history, typed variable templates, role-based collaboration, and a public gallery to share and fork prompts. Integrate via REST API or the typed SDK. Stop losing prompts in Notion and Slack. One source of truth for your whole team.
description_zh: PromptCache是您AI提示的版本控制工具——专为团队打造。获取完整的版本历史记录、类型化变量模板、基于角色的协作功能，以及一个用于共享和分叉提示的公共图库。可通过REST API或类型化SDK进行集成。不再在Notion和Slack中丢失提示。为整个团队提供唯一的数据源。

name: Base64 Converter
tagline: Fast, Secure & Free Base64 Conversions.
tagline_zh: 快速、安全且免费的Base64转换。
description: Base64Converters.com is a free, privacy-focused toolkit for all your Base64 needs. Encode, decode, validate, repair, and convert Base64 data instantly—right in your browser. No uploads, no signups, and no data leaves your device. Built for developers, security professionals, and anyone working with encoded data.
description_zh: Base64Converters.com是一个专注于隐私保护的免费工具包，可满足您所有的Base64需求。您可以直接在浏览器中即时对Base64数据进行编码、解码、验证、修复和转换。无需上传，无需注册，且数据不会离开您的设备。该工具专为开发人员、安全专业人士以及所有处理编码数据的人员打造。

name: Oracle NetSuite Industrial
tagline: Artificial Intelligence
tagline_zh: 人工智能
description: AI Oracle NetSuite Industrialsconnected with local LLM to get data from you OracleNetsuite Account and FineTuned LLM will summarize insights and give you better reports than standard one in Oracle NetSuite
description_zh: AI Oracle NetSuite工业版与本地大型语言模型（LLM）相连，从您的Oracle NetSuite账户获取数据，而经过微调的大型语言模型（LLM）将总结洞察，并为您提供比Oracle NetSuite标准报告更优质的报告

name: AnswerManiac
tagline: Be The Answer AI Can't Stop Talking About.
tagline_zh: 成为人工智能热议的话题。
description: Get your free AI visibility report in 60 seconds. See how ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini talk about your brand. No credit card required. After you receive your audit, our team can help you grow your presence across LLM AI Search.
description_zh: 60秒内即可获取您的免费AI可见度报告。了解ChatGPT、Perplexity和Gemini如何评价您的品牌。无需信用卡。收到审核报告后，我们的团队可帮助您在LLM AI搜索中提升品牌知名度。

name: Redacto
tagline: Local AI redacts. You approve.
tagline_zh: 本地人工智能进行编辑。您进行审批。
description: Redacto is not another PDF editor. It is a focused Mac app for local AI redaction. Drop in PDFs, scans, images, DOCX, CSV, JSON, RTF or text files; Redacto detects sensitive data, places redaction boxes, and lets you approve or adjust each choice before exporting. No upload, no account, no subscription.
description_zh: Redacto并非另一款PDF编辑器。它是一款专注于本地AI密文处理的Mac应用。只需将PDF、扫描件、图片、DOCX、CSV、JSON、RTF或文本文件拖入其中；Redacto即可检测敏感数据，自动添加密文框，并允许您在导出前批准或调整每个选择。无需上传，无需账户，也无需订阅。

name: LawnTide
tagline: Know the exact week to treat your lawn — free, by ZIP
tagline_zh: 根据邮政编码，免费获取草坪养护的精确周数
description: LawnTide watches the soil temperature in your zip code and emails you the exact week it's time for each lawn task — crabgrass pre-emergent, feeding, grub control, overseeding — tailored to your grass type. Timed to your soil, not a national calendar. Free, no account.
description_zh: LawnTide会监测您所在地区的土壤温度，并通过电子邮件向您发送每周草坪养护任务的确切时间——包括马唐芽前除草、施肥、虫害防治、补种等——这些任务会根据您的草坪类型进行定制。时间安排基于您的土壤情况，而非全国统一的日历。完全免费，无需注册账户。

name: ExaminerOS
tagline: AI-Powered EdTech Assessments & Analytics for Professionals
tagline_zh: 面向专业人士的基于人工智能的教育科技评估与分析
description: ExaminerOS is a modern comprehensive AI-powered assessment EdTech platform, designed for generating, managing, conducting, and grading assessments of all kinds including exams, quiz, polls/surveys, GTKY (Get-To-Know-You) in real-time, drastically reducing the time and complexity of traditional assessment creation and administration.
description_zh: ExaminerOS是一个现代化的、全面的、由人工智能驱动的评估教育技术平台，旨在生成、管理、进行和评分各种类型的评估，包括考试、测验、投票/调查、实时GTKY（了解你），大大减少了传统评估创建和管理的时间和复杂性。

name: Reloop Studio
tagline: Promote Apps with AI UGC Videos
tagline_zh: 用人工智能用户生成内容（UGC）视频推广应用
description: Generate high-quality UGC videos powered by AI with cinematic quality. Building a product is easy now. Getting people to notice it isn't. Reloop helps founders turn their product into promo videos quickly, so you can test more creatives instead of betting everything on one expensive video.
description_zh: 利用人工智能生成具有电影级画质的高品质用户生成内容（UGC）视频。现在，打造产品变得轻而易举。但要让人们注意到它却并非易事。Reloop帮助创始人快速将他们的产品转化为宣传视频，这样你就可以测试更多的创意，而不是把所有希望都寄托在一个昂贵的视频上。

name: SceneCraft
tagline: AI-native screenwriting, from blank page to final draft
tagline_zh: AI原生剧本创作，从零开始到最终稿
description: SceneCraft is an AI-native screenwriting platform: write, structure, and produce professional screenplays right in your browser. Unlike Final Draft (zero AI) or ChatGPT (zero structure), SceneCraft maintains act structure, character voice, and formatting across a full script. Write in any language, collaborate in real time, and visualize scenes with AI storyboarding. Your co-writer, not your replacement.
description_zh: SceneCraft是一个原生AI的编剧平台：您可以在浏览器中直接编写、构建和制作专业剧本。与Final Draft（无AI）或ChatGPT（无结构）不同，SceneCraft能够在整个剧本中保持剧情结构、角色声音和格式。您可以用任何语言编写，实时协作，并通过AI故事板可视化场景。它是您的合著者，而非替代者。

name: ClientKit
tagline: Manage clients, projects, and GST invoices in one dashboard
tagline_zh: 在一个控制面板中管理客户、项目和商品及服务税（GST）发票
description: Indian freelancers spend hours chasing clients on WhatsApp, sending invoices on Excel, and losing deals because follow-ups slip. ClientKit fixes that. It's a all-in-one client workspace — onboarding, proposals, invoicing, and project updates — designed specifically for how freelancers in India work. No bloated CRM. No confusing dashboards. Just the stuff you actually need to run clients like a pro. Built by a freelancer, for freelancers. 🇮🇳
description_zh: 印度自由职业者花费数小时在WhatsApp上联系客户，用Excel发送发票，却因后续跟进不及时而错失交易。ClientKit解决了这个问题。它是一个集入职、提案、发票和项目更新于一体的客户工作空间，专为印度自由职业者的工作方式而设计。没有臃肿的客户关系管理系统，也没有令人困惑的控制面板。只有你真正需要的工具，让你像专业人士一样管理客户。由自由职业者打造，为自由职业者服务。

name: Tankly: Aquarium Tracker & Log
tagline: Smart aquarium care, in your pocket
tagline_zh: 智能水族馆护理，尽在您的掌握之中
description: Tankly's core difference is its health scoring—it weighs how bad each parameter reading is, penalizes harder when multiple things go wrong together, and factors in how long a tank's been off, with separate tuning for freshwater, coldwater, and reef tanks. So the score actually means something for your setup. It's also a complete app: equipment/task logging, XP and achievements, and a community feed for sharing tank photos.
description_zh: Tankly的核心区别在于其健康评分——它会评估每个参数读数的严重程度，当多个参数同时出错时，评分会更加苛刻，并且会考虑鱼缸停机的时间长短，同时为淡水鱼缸、冷水鱼缸和珊瑚礁鱼缸提供单独的调整。因此，该评分实际上对你的设置有所指示。它也是一个完整的应用程序：设备/任务记录、经验值和成就，以及一个用于分享鱼缸照片的社区动态。

name: Leohunt
tagline: The friend who always finds what you want in NYC
tagline_zh: 那位总能帮你找到纽约市你想要的东西的朋友
description: Leohunt is an AI-powered spot finder for NYC. Describe what you want in plain English — "not too loud," "cozy vibe," "for 6 people" — and get 3 curated picks in 30 seconds. Includes health inspection grades (NYC DOHMH data), happy hours, vibe analysis, map + list + chat views, save & like, and photo gallery. Block-level NYC knowledge. SoHo ≠ NoHo ≠ West Village. Free. No ads.
description_zh: Leohunt是一款基于人工智能的纽约市景点查找工具。用简单的英语描述你的需求——“不太吵”、“氛围舒适”、“适合6人”——30秒内即可获得3个精选推荐。包括卫生检查等级（纽约市卫生局数据）、欢乐时光、氛围分析、地图+列表+聊天视图、保存和点赞，以及照片库。提供纽约市街区级知识。苏荷区≠诺霍区≠西村。免费。无广告。

name: Lean-dev – Teaching AI coding assistants
tagline: lean-dev – Teaching AI coding assistants to be smart
tagline_zh: lean-dev——让AI编码助手更智能
description: I built lean-dev, an open-source AI skill for coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, and GitHub Copilot. lean-dev attempts to address : 1. Think Before Coding 2. Simplicity First 3. Surgical Changes 4. Goal-Driven Execution 5. Lean Responses One interesting result during testing was a significant reduction in token usage (often around 75%) while still producing useful outputs. GitHub: https://github.com/Vishnu90Coreinn/lean-dev
description_zh: 我开发了lean-dev，这是一个开源的人工智能技能，用于像Claude Code、Cursor、ChatGPT和GitHub Copilot这样的编码助手。lean-dev旨在解决以下问题：1. 编码前思考 2. 简单至上 3. 精准修改 4. 目标驱动执行 5. 精简响应 在测试期间，一个有趣的结果是，在仍然产生有用输出的同时，令牌使用量显著减少（通常减少约75%）。GitHub链接：https://github.com/Vishnu90Coreinn/lean-dev

name: VideoGPT Free 2D Video Generator
tagline: prompts to real-time 2D video graphics using HTML canvas.
tagline_zh: 使用HTML canvas实现实时2D视频图形。
description: Generative video platform that turns natural-language user prompts into structured JSON briefs using LLMs to automatically scaffold animated architecture and explainer videos. TypeScript-based expansion pipeline that turns high-level JSON briefs into complete video projects by injecting precise canvas coordinates, layout grids, act-timing tables, and style easing functions. Shape short-form visuals, prompts, and animated previews in one AI-powered workspace.
description_zh: 生成式视频平台，利用大型语言模型（LLMs）将自然语言用户提示转换为结构化的JSON简报，从而自动构建动画架构和解说视频。基于TypeScript的扩展管道，通过注入精确的画布坐标、布局网格、动作时间表和样式缓动函数，将高级JSON简报转化为完整的视频项目。在一个由AI驱动的工作区中，可以生成短视频视觉效果、提示和动画预览。

name: Hercules
tagline: What can Hercules build for you?
tagline_zh: 赫拉克勒斯能为你建造什么？
description: Hercules makes it easy to build apps and websites by chatting with AI. Build SaaS, eCommerce, internal tools, and mobile apps in minutes.
description_zh: Hercules通过与人工智能对话，让构建应用程序和网站变得轻松。您可以在几分钟内构建出SaaS、电子商务、内部工具和移动应用程序。

name: Sami
tagline: Smart Media Optimizer
tagline_zh: 智能媒体优化器
description: Optimize photos, videos, and PDFs with intelligent compression. Pick exactly which items to process, watch folders for changes on macOS, throttle network and cloud drives, and reclaim storage on your iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
description_zh: 通过智能压缩技术优化照片、视频和PDF文件。您可精准选择要处理的文件，在macOS上监控文件夹变化，限制网络和云盘使用，以及在iPhone、iPad和Mac上释放存储空间。

name: CVClaw AI
tagline: Convert job description to ATS-optimized Resume in seconds.
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可将职位描述转换为适合自动招聘系统（ATS）的简历。
description: CVClaw AI is an AI-powered Resume builder that convert job description to ATS-optimized resume under 60 seconds. It enable job seekers create tailormade resume by just pasting job description.
description_zh: CVClaw AI是一款基于人工智能的简历生成工具，能在60秒内将职位描述转换为适合自动招聘系统（ATS）的简历。求职者只需粘贴职位描述，即可轻松生成量身定制的简历。

name: Resubuild
tagline: Open-source AI JSON Resume editor with PDF import & export
tagline_zh: 开源AI JSON简历编辑器，支持PDF导入与导出
description: Resubuild is a self-hostable JSON Resume editor with AI PDF import. Upload any PDF → AI extracts clean structured data. Edit with live preview, tailor for jobs, export perfect PDFs. Built with Next.js, NestJS, Supabase & Mastra AI. 100% JSON Resume compliant • MIT licensed. Live demo: https://app.resubuild.dev GitHub: https://github.com/yortyrh/resubuild
description_zh: Resubuild是一款可自托管的JSON简历编辑器，支持AI PDF导入。上传任意PDF文件→AI提取干净的结构化数据。实时预览编辑，针对职位量身定制，导出完美的PDF文件。采用Next.js、NestJS、Supabase和Mastra AI构建。100%兼容JSON简历格式• MIT许可。在线演示：https://app.resubuild.dev GitHub：https://github.com/yortyrh/resubuild

name: MyPhotoStudio
tagline: AI-powered photo sharing & studio CRM platform
tagline_zh: 基于人工智能的照片共享与工作室客户关系管理平台
description: MyPhotoStudio helps photography businesses manage bookings, clients, payments, photo galleries and online orders from a single platform. Features include AI face recognition, QR-code photo delivery, WhatsApp automation, client proofing, digital downloads, print orders and complete studio CRM tools. Designed for photographers, wedding studios and event photography businesses.
description_zh: MyPhotoStudio通过单一平台帮助摄影企业处理预订、客户管理、支付、照片画廊以及在线订单。其功能包括人工智能人脸识别、二维码照片交付、WhatsApp自动化、客户打样、数字下载、打印订单以及完整的工作室客户关系管理（CRM）工具。该平台专为摄影师、婚纱工作室和活动摄影企业设计。

name: Backlink Checker
tagline: Analyze Backlinks, Discover Opportunities, and Improve SEO
tagline_zh: 分析反向链接，发现机会，提升SEO
description: Check backlink signals, referring domain ideas, anchor text, and SEO link quality with this free Backlink Checker from Tech Wave Cloud.
description_zh: 使用Tech Wave Cloud的这款免费反向链接检测工具，您可以检查反向链接信号、引荐域名创意、锚文本以及SEO链接质量。

name: Nivroo
tagline: Build an AI dropshipping store in 60 seconds - and trade too
tagline_zh: 60秒内打造一个人工智能代销店，还能进行交易
description: Describe your niche in one sentence — Nivroo's AI builds your whole store (brand, products, copy, SEO, checkout) in 60s. It auto-sources products, prices them, fulfils orders, and answers customers. Plus a built-in stock/crypto/forex terminal. Sell on 19 channels.
description_zh: 一句话描述你的优势——Nivroo的人工智能可在60秒内为您构建整个店铺（包括品牌、产品、文案、搜索引擎优化、结账流程）。它能够自动采购产品、定价、履行订单并回复客户。此外，还内置了股票/加密货币/外汇交易终端。可在19个渠道销售。

name: BocadoClaro
tagline: Nutrition for the Spanish market. Adapted to our lifestyle
tagline_zh: 专为西班牙市场设计的营养品。适应我们的生活方式
description: Track calories and macros without having to deal with databases: log your meals using text, photos of your plate, barcodes, recipes, and saved foods. -------------------------- Cuenta calorías y macros sin pelearte con bases de datos: registra comida por texto, foto del plato, código de barras, recetas y alimentos guardados.
description_zh: 无需处理数据库即可追踪卡路里和宏量营养素：通过文本、餐盘照片、条形码、食谱和已保存的食物记录你的餐食。

name: MoldChem Tools
tagline: 63+ free chemistry tools. No login, no paywall, no tracking
tagline_zh: 63+款免费化学工具。无需登录，无付费门槛，无追踪
description: MoldChem Tools is a free suite of 63+ professional-grade chemistry calculators and lookups — molar mass, molarity, dilutions, pH and buffers, NFPA and GHS labels, the periodic table, and more. Every calculation runs client-side in your browser. No login, no paywall, no tracking, no ads. Methods are transparent and cited.
description_zh: MoldChem Tools是一套免费的工具，包含63个以上的专业级化学计算器和查找工具——摩尔质量、摩尔浓度、稀释、pH值和缓冲液、NFPA和GHS标签、元素周期表等。所有计算都在浏览器客户端进行。无需登录，无付费门槛，无追踪，无广告。方法透明且可引用。

name: How Much Mulch Do I Need?
tagline: Mulch Calculator
tagline_zh: 护土覆盖物计算器
description: Calculating the right amount of mulch is essential for both your garden's health and your wallet. Too little mulch won't suppress weeds or retain moisture effectively, while too much can suffocate your plants' root systems.
description_zh: 计算好覆盖物的用量对于花园的健康和钱包都至关重要。覆盖物太少无法有效抑制杂草或保持水分，而太多则可能使植物根系窒息。

name: Prabzo
tagline: Do more of what you love. Prabzo handles the rest
tagline_zh: 多做你喜欢的事，Prabzo会负责其余的事宜
description: Prabzo — The smart client manager for freelance professionals. Track sessions, payments, and grow your practice.
description_zh: Prabzo——自由职业者的智能客户管理器。追踪会话、付款，助力您拓展业务。

name: Price optimizer AppStore
tagline: Localized App Store pricing for all 175 countries
tagline_zh: 所有175个国家/地区的本地化应用商店定价
description: $9.99 is pocket change in Switzerland and a day's pay in India - charge both the same and you lose on both sides. PriceOptimizer blends purchasing power, the Big Mac index, Netflix prices, and a market index into a fair price for each of ~175 Apple territories, snaps it to a real App Store tier, and publishes the whole catalog in one click straight to App Store Connect. Works for subscriptions and IAPs. Preview every country before anything changes. Web-based, ~2 min, free to see your numbers.
description_zh: 在瑞士，9.99美元只是零花钱，而在印度，却是一天的工资——如果两者收费相同，双方都会吃亏。PriceOptimizer将购买力、巨无霸指数、Netflix价格和市场指数融合在一起，为约175个苹果地区中的每一个地区制定一个公平的价格，将其归入一个真实的App Store层级，并一键将整个目录直接发布到App Store Connect。适用于订阅和内购项目。在做出任何更改之前，可以预览每个国家的情况。基于网络，约2分钟，免费查看您的数据。

name: BMR Calculator
tagline: Calculate your basal metabolic rate instantly.
tagline_zh: 立即计算你的基础代谢率。
description: Use Ease Tools BMR Calculator to calculate your basal metabolic rate instantly. Get accurate daily calorie burn based on age, height, weight, and gender.
description_zh: 使用Ease Tools BMR计算器，即可快速计算出你的基础代谢率。根据年龄、身高、体重和性别，准确获取每日卡路里消耗量。

name: Scribbles Now
tagline: Pictionary with AirPlay
tagline_zh: 带AirPlay功能的画图猜词游戏
description: Play Pictionary on the big screen with your friends and family, instead of looking for a whiteboard or a big piece of paper!
description_zh: 与朋友和家人一起在大屏幕上玩猜字游戏，再也不用寻找白板或大张纸了！

name: Story Saver
tagline: Browser-based downloader for public Instagram content.
tagline_zh: 基于浏览器的公共Instagram内容下载工具。
description: Story Saver is a browser-based Instagram downloader designed for saving public content from direct links. It supports stories, reels, videos, photos, and highlights, and works across desktop and mobile devices without requiring extra software or account login. The workflow is simple: paste a public Instagram link, process the available media, and download it directly in your browser. The tool is intended for public content only and does not support private or restricted media.
description_zh: Story Saver是一款基于浏览器的Instagram下载工具，专为从直接链接保存公开内容而设计。它支持故事、卷轴、视频、照片和精彩内容，可在台式机和移动设备上使用，无需额外软件或账户登录。工作流程简单：粘贴公开的Instagram链接，处理可用媒体，然后直接在浏览器中下载。该工具仅适用于公开内容，不支持私人或受限制的媒体。

name: DevBrain
tagline: Git-aware memory for AI coding agents via Obsidian
tagline_zh: 通过Obsidian为AI编码代理提供Git感知内存
description: DevBrain gives AI coding agents a persistent, Git-aware memory layer powered by Obsidian. It automatically detects branch switches, loads branch-specific context, tracks progress, and creates structured handoffs between sessions. Multiple agents can share the same knowledge vault through a single MCP server, so decisions, blockers, and project history never get lost. Stop re-explaining your codebase, let your AI agents build on what they already know.
description_zh: DevBrain为人工智能编码代理提供了一个由Obsidian支持的持久且支持Git的内存层。它能自动检测分支切换，加载特定分支的上下文，跟踪进度，并在会话之间创建结构化的交接。多个代理可以通过单个MCP服务器共享同一个知识库，因此决策、障碍和项目历史永远不会丢失。无需重新解释你的代码库，让你的AI代理基于他们已经知道的内容进行构建。

name: NeuralRun
tagline: Education AI
tagline_zh: 教育人工智能
description: NeuralRun is a grounded AI quiz and trivia platform with citation-backed facts and a Challenge AI feature. Built for knowledge seekers, trivia hosts, and educators.
description_zh: NeuralRun是一个基于事实的AI问答和知识问答平台，提供有引文支持的事实和挑战AI功能。专为知识追求者、知识问答主持人和教育工作者打造。

name: GLOWTRIS
tagline: Free neon block puzzle with daily challenges and no ads.
tagline_zh: 免费霓虹灯块拼图游戏，每日挑战，无广告。
description: Glowtris is a browser block puzzle game with a competitive twist. Every day, every player worldwide gets the same blocks. Same seed, same conditions. Your score goes on a shared global leaderboard that resets at midnight UTC. Modes: - 🌅 Daily Challenge — same puzzle for everyone, worldwide - 🏃 Sprint — clear 40 lines as fast as possible - 🔥 Blitz — max score in 2 minutes - ♾️ Marathon — classic endless No account. No download. No ads. Installs as a PWA on iOS and Android.
description_zh: Glowtris是一款融入竞技元素的浏览器方块拼图游戏。每天，全球每位玩家都会获得相同的方块。相同的种子，相同的条件。你的分数会显示在共享的全球排行榜上，该排行榜会在世界协调时间（UTC）午夜重置。游戏模式包括：- 🌅每日挑战——全球玩家同玩同一拼图 - 🏃冲刺——以最快速度清除40行 - 🔥闪电战——2分钟内获得最高分 - ♾️马拉松——经典的无尽模式 无账号。无下载。无广告。可在iOS和Android上作为渐进式网页应用（PWA）安装。

name: Revisite
tagline: Turn Google Maps reviews into a complete multi-page website
tagline_zh: 将谷歌地图评论打造成一个完整的多页网站
description: Your customers already wrote your best marketing copy. It is buried in your Google reviews. Revisite reads them, finds the real reasons people keep coming back, and turns them into a complete multi-page website: landing, gallery, menu or catalogue, and contact. Pick from 5 hand-crafted themes, add per-page QR codes, and track daily visits. Most tools stop at a single page. Revisite gives you a complete website, live in minutes.
description_zh: 你的客户已经为你撰写了最佳的营销文案。这些文案就隐藏在你的谷歌评论中。Revisite会阅读这些评论，找出人们不断光顾的真正原因，并将这些原因转化为一个完整的多页网站：着陆页、图库、菜单或目录，以及联系方式。从5个手工制作的主题中进行选择，为每个页面添加二维码，并跟踪每日访问量。大多数工具仅限于一个页面。Revisite则为你提供一个完整的网站，几分钟内即可上线。

name: Outlast
tagline: Steal the throne. Hold it. Win the pot.
tagline_zh: 窃取王位。守住王位。赢得奖池。
description: Most games pit you against algorithms or strangers with no stakes. Outlast combines both — real-time social pressure with a shared pot only one person wins. The difference from crash games: you’re not watching a number, you’re watching other players decide. Every time someone drops, the pressure on everyone still holding increases. The social layer is the mechanic. No download, no account. A full round takes under two minutes.
description_zh: 大多数游戏都是让你与算法或陌生人进行无赌注的对决。《Outlast》则将两者结合——实时社交压力与共享奖池，但只有一人能胜出。它与竞速游戏的区别在于：你不是在观察一个数字，而是在观察其他玩家的决定。每当有人出局，其他仍在游戏的人所承受的压力就会增加。社交层面是游戏机制。无需下载，无需账号。一轮游戏不到两分钟。

name: QuoteMate
tagline: AI quoting & invoicing for Australian tradies
tagline_zh: 为澳大利亚贸易商提供人工智能报价和开票服务
description: QuoteMate is an AI-powered quoting & invoicing app built for Australian tradies. Describe any job, get a full materials list with real-time supplier pricing, and send a professional quote in under 2 minutes. Key features: AI material suggestions, live Aussie supplier pricing, section-based quoting, quote-to-invoice in one tap, 9-stage job pipeline, Google Calendar sync, Square tap-to-pay, Xero integration, offline mode, Australian GST built in. Free plan + Pro at $49/mo.
description_zh: QuoteMate是一款专为澳大利亚工匠打造的、基于人工智能的报价和开票应用。只需描述任何工作，即可获得包含实时供应商价格的完整材料清单，并在2分钟内发送专业报价。主要功能包括：人工智能材料建议、实时澳大利亚供应商价格、基于部分的报价、一键从报价到开票、9阶段工作流、谷歌日历同步、Square一键支付、Xero集成、离线模式、内置澳大利亚商品及服务税（GST）。免费版+专业版每月49美元。

name: Swift Signage
tagline: Turn your screens into a customer retention machine
tagline_zh: 将你的屏幕变成一台客户留存机器
description: Swift Signage is a digital signage SaaS built for restaurants and retail. Manage menus, slideshows, and product showcases on any TV — updated in real time from anywhere. Beyond the screens, a built-in retention engine lets you send push notifications, run loyalty programs, and track customer segments — turning one-time visitors into regulars. No hardware lock-in. Live in minutes.
description_zh: Swift Signage是一款专为餐厅和零售店打造的数字标牌软件即服务（SaaS）。您可以在任何电视上管理菜单、幻灯片和产品展示，并随时随地实时更新。除了屏幕展示，内置的留存引擎还能让您发送推送通知、运行忠诚度计划，并追踪客户群体，从而将一次性访客转化为忠实客户。无需硬件锁定。几分钟内即可上线。

name: Votura 2.0
tagline: Explore 500+ cities with AI audio guides.
tagline_zh: 使用人工智能语音导览，探索500多个城市。
description: Most audio tour apps cost $20+ per city, need Wi-Fi, and only speak English. Votura flips that. 🌍 500+ cities. 🗣️ 12 languages. 📶 Fully offline. 🤖 AI-powered narration turns every street into a story — no tour groups, no roaming bills, no paywalls. Download before you go and explore on your own terms, anywhere in the world. We're an indie team that built the audio guide we always wanted. Votura 2.0 is it.
description_zh: 大多数语音导览应用程序每个城市要价20美元以上，需要Wi-Fi，且仅支持英语。Votura颠覆了这一传统。🌍覆盖500多个城市。🗣️支持12种语言。📶完全离线。🤖人工智能语音解说让每条街道都变成一个故事——无需跟团，无需漫游费，无需付费墙。出行前下载，以自己的节奏探索世界任何角落。我们是一个独立团队，打造了我们一直想要的语音导览。Votura 2.0就是它。

name: Meshr
tagline: Connect anything, anywhere
tagline_zh: 随时随地连接一切
description: Meshr is a modern private networking platform that lets you securely connect devices, servers, and teams without complex VPN setups. It combines mesh networking, built-in access control, and zero-trust principles into a simple, developer-friendly experience. No manual configs, no friction — just fast, encrypted connectivity across any environment.
description_zh: Meshr是一个现代化的私有网络平台，让您无需复杂的VPN设置即可安全连接设备、服务器和团队。它将网状网络、内置访问控制和零信任原则融合在一起，打造出一种简单且对开发者友好的体验。无需手动配置，无障碍连接——只需在任何环境中实现快速、加密的连接。

name: Crelyzor
tagline: Your card, schedule, meetings & tasks — all connected
tagline_zh: 你的卡片、日程、会议和任务——全部互联互通
description: Stop stitching together Calendly, Otter.ai, HiHello, and Todoist. Crelyzor brings everything into one platform: * Digital business cards * AI meeting transcription * Smart scheduling * Task management And unlike disconnected tools, everything works together. Share your card → someone books a meeting → AI generates notes → follow-up tasks are created automatically. The entire workflow in one tab. Built for consultants, freelancers, and founders.
description_zh: 别再东拼西凑Calendly、Otter.ai、HiHello和Todoist这些工具了。Crelyzor将所有功能整合到一个平台上：* 电子名片 * AI会议转录 * 智能日程安排 * 任务管理 与那些各自为政的工具不同，Crelyzor的所有功能都能协同工作。分享你的名片→有人预订会议→AI生成会议记录→后续任务自动创建。整个工作流程都在一个标签页内完成。专为咨询师、自由职业者和创始人打造。

name: Guidy
tagline: Real-time guidance for any software.
tagline_zh: 为任何软件提供实时指导。
description: Get the next step the moment you're stuck. Guidy is your AI desktop assistant, working in real time across any software.
description_zh: 遇到难题时，立即获取下一步操作。Guidy是您的AI桌面助手，可跨任何软件实时工作。

name: Genlook Virtual try-on API
tagline: Add AI virtual try-on to any app in two API calls
tagline_zh: 只需两次API调用，即可为任何应用添加AI虚拟试穿功能
description: Genlook is an AI virtual try-on engine behind a simple REST API and TypeScript SDK. Two HTTP calls 1. upload a photo, 2. run the try-on and your users see themselves wearing any product. It works with plain 2D product images. Drop it into any store, app, or custom flow, with an MCP server for AI agents too.
description_zh: Genlook是一个基于简单REST API和TypeScript SDK的AI虚拟试穿引擎。只需两次HTTP调用：1. 上传照片；2. 运行试穿功能，用户就能看到自己穿上任何产品的效果。它适用于普通的2D产品图片。将其集成到任何商店、应用程序或自定义流程中，同时还可以为AI代理配备MCP服务器。

name: 1GEN CATALYST
tagline: AI-Native Fundraising Operating System
tagline_zh: AI原生筹款操作系统
description: 1GEN CATALYST is the AI-native Fundraising Operating System for nonprofits. Plan smarter campaigns, improve readiness before launch, activate board and community networks, build donor trust through impact storytelling, and create fundraising momentum from one platform.
