description: VisaPod is an AI agent for complex visa applications, starting with the U.S. DS-160. It turns documents into a complete, review-ready form, checks missing information upfront, and fills the real CEAC workflow end to end.
description_zh: VisaPod是一款针对复杂签证申请的人工智能助手，从美国DS-160表格开始。它将文件转换为一份完整的、可供审查的表格，预先检查缺失的信息，并从头到尾填写真正的中国电子签证申请中心（CEAC）工作流程。

name: Tunect Labs
tagline: Engineering Scalable Digital Experiences for the Future
tagline_zh: 为未来打造可扩展的数字化体验
description: Tunect Labs — Enterprise software engineering, QA automation, AI solutions, and full-stack development for global organizations.
description_zh: Tunect Labs — 为全球组织提供企业软件工程、质量保证自动化、人工智能解决方案以及全栈开发服务。

name: JavaScript Tools
tagline: Privacy-first developer tools that run in your browser
tagline_zh: 在浏览器中运行的以隐私保护为先的开发工具
description: JSTools.Space is a free collection of privacy-first developer utilities for formatting code, inspecting JSON and tokens, generating secure values, encoding data, and creating test fixtures. No account or setup is required, and most processing happens locally in the browser.
description_zh: JSTools.Space是一套免费的隐私优先型开发者工具集合，可用于格式化代码、检查JSON和令牌、生成安全值、编码数据以及创建测试用例。无需注册账户或进行设置，且大部分处理工作都在浏览器本地完成。

name: API Circle Studio
tagline: API workspace you can git diff and your AI can drive
tagline_zh: API工作区，你可以进行git diff，你的AI也可以进行驱动
description: API Circle Studio is a Git-backed, AI-native API workspace for developers. Build collections, environments, mocks, assertions, and execution plans across Desktop, Web, VS Code, CLI, and MCP. Workspaces live as JSON you can diff, review, and sync through Git — while Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and ChatGPT can read, author, and run requests through MCP. Source-available, local-first, and built for API teams that want ownership.
description_zh: API Circle Studio是一个由Git支持、原生AI的API工作区，专为开发者打造。您可以在桌面、Web、VS Code、CLI和MCP上构建集合、环境、模拟、断言和执行计划。工作区以JSON格式呈现，您可以通过Git进行差异比较、审查和同步——而Claude、Cursor、Copilot和ChatGPT则可以通过MCP读取、编写和运行请求。该工作区提供源代码，以本地优先为原则，专为希望拥有自主权的API团队打造。

name: HiredSmartly
tagline: Brutally honest AI resume review in 60 seconds @ only $1
tagline_zh: 60秒内完成犀利诚实的AI简历评估，仅需1美元
description: Most resume tools either cost $50+ or give you generic tips that don't help. HiredSmartly gives you a real AI review, scored across 10 recruiter checkpoints, in just 60 seconds. Not just a spell check. A full breakdown: ATS score, impact score, formatting, keyword alignment, and 3 specific fixes ranked by priority. Built for US, UK, UAE, Australia, India job markets. Each review is calibrated for your target country's hiring norms. One dollar. No subscription. Download your results as PDF.
description_zh: 大多数简历工具要么要价50美元以上，要么只能给你一些毫无帮助的通用建议。而HiredSmartly则能在短短60秒内为你提供一份真正的AI评估报告，该报告会根据10个招聘人员的检查点为你打分。这不仅仅是一次拼写检查。报告会详细列出：自动筛选系统（ATS）得分、影响力得分、格式、关键词对齐，以及按优先级排列的3项具体修改建议。该工具专为美国、英国、阿联酋、澳大利亚和印度等就业市场打造。每份评估报告都会根据你的目标国家的招聘规范进行校准。仅需一美元，无需订阅。你可以将评估结果下载为PDF格式。

name: MusicAny
tagline: MusicAny turns text prompts into original songs
tagline_zh: MusicAny将文本提示转化为原创歌曲
description: MusicAny is an AI music generator and AI song generator for original songs, background music, and AI music videos. Try a free AI music generator online for creators.
description_zh: MusicAny是一款AI音乐生成器和AI歌曲生成器，可用于创作原创歌曲、背景音乐和AI音乐视频。为创作者提供在线免费试用AI音乐生成器。

name: NervoScan
tagline: Contactless vital signs for any AI agent, via MCP
tagline_zh: 通过MCP为任何AI代理提供非接触式生命体征监测
description: Non-contact heart rate, HRV, blood pressure & more from a 10-second face scan. No wearables, works in your browser.
description_zh: 仅需10秒面部扫描，即可获取非接触式心率、心率变异性（HRV）、血压等数据。无需佩戴可穿戴设备，直接在浏览器中即可使用。

name: AiToolsObserver
tagline: Your guide to navigating the rapidly growing AI ecosystem
tagline_zh: 您在快速发展的AI生态系统中的导航指南
description: AiToolsObserver helps users discover, compare, and evaluate AI tools through curated listings, insights, and trend analysis. The platform continuously scans the AI ecosystem to surface emerging tools, use cases, and workflows. Submitted tools can gain visibility through directory listings, comparisons, rankings, news coverage, and editorial content, helping AI companies reach founders, marketers, developers, and early adopters.
description_zh: AiToolsObserver通过精选列表、深入见解和趋势分析，帮助用户发现、比较和评估人工智能（AI）工具。该平台持续扫描AI生态系统，以展示新兴工具、用例和工作流程。提交的工具可以通过目录列表、比较、排名、新闻报道和编辑内容获得曝光，从而帮助AI公司接触到创始人、营销人员、开发人员和早期采用者。

name: Realme P4 Power 5G India Insights
tagline: Realme P4 Power 5G India Date Trending: Everything We Know
tagline_zh: Realme P4 Power 5G印度发布日期趋势：我们所知的一切
description: Explore realme p4 energy 5g india date trending updates, features, battery insights, and how it compareStay knowledgeable approximately the realme p4 power 5g india date trending subject matter with this in-intensity guide. Explore the predicted India launch timeline, standout specifications, huge battery potential, rapid charging abilities, display great, digital camera functions, and performance insights.
description_zh: 探索realme p4 power 5g在印度的发布日期、趋势更新、功能特点、电池性能洞察，以及与其他产品的对比。通过这份详尽指南，了解关于realme p4 power 5g在印度的发布日期、趋势主题的最新资讯。探索预测的印度发布时间表、出众的规格参数、巨大的电池潜力、快速充电能力、出色的显示屏、数码相机功能和性能洞察。

name: Randomly.online
tagline: Tool ecosystem known for its unique tools, premium designs
tagline_zh: 该工具生态系统以其独特的工具和高端设计而闻名
description: Randomly.online is a modern tool ecosystem focused on exceptional design, usability, and innovation. Unlike traditional tool websites, every tool features a premium UI, fast performance, mobile-friendly experience, and detailed, actionable outputs. The platform combines powerful functionality with consistent high-quality design, creating a software-like experience that helps users solve real problems through a growing collection of unique and practical tools.
description_zh: Randomly.online是一个现代化的工具生态系统，专注于卓越的设计、可用性和创新。与传统工具网站不同，每个工具都具有优质的界面、快速的性能、移动端友好的体验以及详细且可操作的输出结果。该平台将强大的功能与始终如一的高品质设计相结合，打造出一种类似软件的体验，通过不断增长的独特且实用的工具集合，帮助用户解决实际问题。

name: EduCyber
tagline: Strategic Thinking, Top Web Designers,Personal Attention,
tagline_zh: 战略思维，顶尖网页设计师，个性化关注，
description: EduCyber creates compelling design and develops custom applications to deliver results that strengthen your competitive edge. Our experience, skill, and creativity ensure your project will transcend the ordinary that clutters the internet and deliver a site that communicates your message with professionalism and flair.
description_zh: EduCyber致力于打造引人注目的设计，并开发定制化应用程序，以提供能增强您竞争优势的成果。凭借我们的经验、技能和创造力，确保您的项目能够超越互联网上众多平庸之作，打造出一个以专业和独特风格传达您信息的网站。

name: Jaiton Technologies
tagline: Website development Service Bangalore
tagline_zh: 班加罗尔网站开发服务
description: Jaiton Technologies provides AI solutions, IoT systems, cloud applications, UI/UX design, and custom software development services for startups and enterprises worldwide.
description_zh: Jaiton Technologies为全球初创企业和企业提供人工智能解决方案、物联网系统、云应用、用户界面/用户体验设计以及定制软件开发服务。

name: InstaLead
tagline: Maximizing Leads - Instagram Marketing Automation
tagline_zh: 最大化潜在客户——Instagram营销自动化
description: Find qualified Instagram leads, organize conversations, and send personalized outreach from one workflow.
description_zh: 通过一个工作流程，找到合格的Instagram潜在客户，组织对话，并发送个性化的推广信息。

name: NxtLure
tagline: AI Search Visibility Engine
tagline_zh: 人工智能搜索可见性引擎
description: NxtLure tracks how often AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot) cite your brand, scores it across 10 visibility factors, and tells you exactly what to fix. Check for free or pricing starting at $19...
description_zh: NxtLure会追踪AI引擎（ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity、Gemini、Copilot）引用您品牌的频率，根据10个可见性因素对其进行评分，并告诉您具体需要改进的地方。可免费试用，或从19美元起订购。。。

name: Focus Feed - RSS Player
tagline: Follow YouTube channels without the algorithm
tagline_zh: 不依赖算法关注YouTube频道
description: Focus Feed lets you follow YouTube channels using RSS — no algorithm, no recommendations, no distractions. Just uploads from channels you choose, in chronological order. No homepage pulling you into rabbit holes. Parents can lock channels with a PIN and set a daily watch timer. Free to download. 2 channels free forever. Unlimited channels for £4.99 a year.
description_zh: Focus Feed让你能够通过RSS订阅YouTube频道——没有算法推荐，没有其他干扰。它只会按时间顺序上传你选择的频道内容。没有主页把你拉进无底洞。家长可以用PIN码锁定频道，并设置每日观看时间。免费下载。2个频道永久免费。无限频道一年4.99英镑。

name: Global Arbitrage & Liquidity Router
tagline: Stop slippage, save $15k+ per trade, and trade at 7ms speed.
tagline_zh: 止损滑点，每笔交易节省15,000美元以上，交易速度达7毫秒。
description: High-frequency scanner monitoring real-time arbitrage opportunities across Crypto/Forex/Stocks. Key Features: Ultra-Low Latency: Signals in <10ms. Verified: Tracked $18,850 simulation profit. Smart Routing: Save $15k+ per execution. Your strategy stays yours—we never access or store your private keys. Built for traders who value speed and reliability. Don't let slippage cost you thousands.
description_zh: 高频扫描仪实时监控加密货币、外汇和股票之间的套利机会。主要特点：超低延迟：信号传输时间小于10毫秒。经过验证：模拟跟踪获利18,850美元。智能路由：每次执行节省15,000美元以上。您的策略始终属于您——我们绝不会访问或存储您的私钥。专为重视速度和可靠性的交易者打造。别让滑点让您损失数千美元。

name: Pathfinder — Find Your Direction
tagline: Discover who you are, what you love, and where to go
tagline_zh: 发现你是谁，你喜欢什么，以及该去哪里
description: Most career tools ask what you can do. Pathfinder asks who you are. A 3-phase quiz that maps your psychological archetype, passion domain, and congruence score — then matches you to 190+ specific career paths based on how well they actually fit you, not how much they pay or how in-demand they are. No stars. No generic ratings. Just a congruence percentage that tells you how aligned a path is with your real profile. Free to take. 15 minutes.
description_zh: 大多数职业工具询问的是你能做什么。而Pathfinder则询问你是谁。它通过一个三阶段测试，描绘出你的心理原型、激情领域和一致性得分，然后根据这些测试结果与你190多种特定的职业路径相匹配，匹配标准是它们与你实际契合的程度，而非薪酬或需求程度。没有星级。没有通用评分。只有一个一致性百分比，告诉你某条路径与你真实个人资料的契合程度。免费测试。15分钟。

name: UTexSave
tagline: Never lose typed text again — saved locally on Windows
tagline_zh: 再也不会丢失键入的文本了——在Windows上本地保存
description: UTex Save is a local software application dedicated to automatic text backup and recovery. It allows you to automatically preserve your documents and easily restore them in case of a crash or unexpected shutdown.
description_zh: UTex Save是一款专用于自动文本备份和恢复的本地软件应用程序。它能让您自动保存文档，并在系统崩溃或意外关机时轻松恢复这些文档。

name: Grid Crown
tagline: Place blocks, clear lines and climb the global rankings
tagline_zh: 放置方块，清除线条，并攀升全球排名
description: Grid Crown is a modern block puzzle game designed for players who enjoy relaxing but rewarding gameplay. Features: • Classic block puzzle gameplay • Journey mode with unlockable rewards • Global leaderboards • Daily challenges • Offline play • Smooth and satisfying line clear effects Easy to learn, challenging to master.
description_zh: 《Grid Crown》是一款现代风格的方块拼图游戏，专为喜欢轻松但有成就感的游戏体验的玩家设计。游戏特色：• 经典方块拼图玩法 • 旅程模式，可解锁奖励 • 全球排行榜 • 每日挑战 • 离线游玩 • 流畅且令人满意的线条清除效果 简单易学，挑战高难。

name: MissedCallIO
tagline: Every missed call answered. Every lead captured.
tagline_zh: 每一个未接来电都接了，每一个线索都抓住了。
description: MissedCallio is an AI receptionist that instantly answers missed calls, engages callers naturally, captures lead information, and sends business owners a complete summary—so every opportunity gets a response, even when you're unavailable.
description_zh: MissedCallio是一款人工智能（AI）接听助手，能即时接听未接来电，自然地与来电者互动，捕捉关键信息，并向企业主发送完整摘要——这样，即使您不在，每个机会也能得到回应。

name: ccglass
tagline: See what your coding agent sends to the model
tagline_zh: 查看你的编码代理向模型发送了什么
description: A local dashboard for inspecting coding-agent traffic: prompts, tool schemas, tool calls, streamed responses, token usage, cost, latency, and request diffs.
description_zh: 一个用于检查编码代理流量的本地仪表板：提示、工具模式、工具调用、流式响应、令牌使用情况、成本、延迟和请求差异。

name: Stitch Keeper
tagline: An ad-free row counter for knitters & crocheters
tagline_zh: 专为编织者和钩织者设计的无广告行数计数器
description: I've knit for 10 years and write software for a living. I got fed up with row counter apps full of ads and subscriptions, so I built the one I always wanted. Stitch Keeper is a one-time $4.99 — no ads, no subscription, no account, no tracking. Track multiple projects, add custom counters with custom step sizes, iCloud sync between iPhone and iPad, and satisfying haptics. Built solo in SwiftUI, ~2MB, no third-party SDKs.
description_zh: 我从事编织已有10年，并以编写软件为生。我受够了那些充斥着广告和订阅的行数计数应用，于是打造了一个我一直想要的应用。Stitch Keeper只需一次性支付4.99美元——无广告、无订阅、无账户、无追踪。它可以跟踪多个项目，添加自定义步长计数器，支持iPhone和iPad之间的iCloud同步，并提供令人满意的触感反馈。该应用采用SwiftUI独立开发，大小约2MB，未使用第三方SDK。

name: Kobble AI
tagline: Build regulated financial products from a prompt
tagline_zh: 根据提示构建受监管的金融产品
description: AI builders like v0, Replit, and Bolt are great at building software. None of them can build a regulated financial product. Kobble AI can. Describe what you want to launch - a branded card, a payment wallet, a KYC-gated account - and we build it. The regulated infrastructure (cards, accounts, payment rails, KYC/KYB, AML) is already in place. Built on an Australian AFSL, Mastercard Principal Issuer status, and AUSTRAC registration. The full regulated stack. From a prompt.
description_zh: v0、Replit和Bolt等AI构建商在构建软件方面表现出色。但他们都无法构建受监管的金融产品。Kobble AI却能做到。只需描述您想要推出的产品——品牌卡、支付钱包、KYC（了解您的客户）门控账户——我们即可为您构建。受监管的基础设施（卡片、账户、支付轨道、KYC/KYB、反洗钱）已经就绪。基于澳大利亚金融服务许可证（AFSL）、万事达卡主要发行商身份以及澳大利亚交易报告和分析中心（AUSTRAC）的注册。完整的受监管堆栈。从提示开始。

name: AEOmatic
tagline: Get cited by AI — not just ranked by Google
tagline_zh: 被人工智能引用——而不仅仅是谷歌排名
description: AEOmatic is the first free WordPress plugin built for Answer Engine Optimization — making your content visible in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude & Google AI Overviews. It reads your content and generates accurate, type-specific schema — not the same generic JSON-LD every other plugin outputs. Plus llms.txt generation, AI crawler control for 17 bots, AEO content audit scoring, and AI discovery headers. 100% free. No account. No API keys.
description_zh: AEOmatic是首个专为问答引擎优化打造的免费WordPress插件——让您的内容在ChatGPT、Perplexity、Claude和Google AI概览等AI生成的答案中可见。它读取您的内容，并生成准确、特定类型的模式——不同于其他插件输出的通用JSON-LD。此外，它还支持llms.txt生成、17种爬虫的AI爬虫控制、AEO内容审核评分以及AI发现头。100%免费。无需账户。无需API密钥。

name: Grokified
tagline: 50% off every Grok model — change one line of code
tagline_zh: 每个Grok模型50%折扣——只需更改一行代码
description: Grokified is a drop-in proxy for the xAI Grok API — 50% off every model with one line of code. Swap base_url to api.grokified.com/v1, use a Grokified key, and you pay half of xAI list price. Same endpoints, same format, <5ms latency. The deal: 50% off until you've saved $5,000 (first $10K at half price), then 3% off for life. $5 free credits, no card needed. Top up from $1. Supports grok-4.3, grok-4.20, grok-build-0.1, images, video, voice. Prompts are never logged.
description_zh: Grokified是xAI Grok API的即插即用代理——只需一行代码，每个模型即可享受50%的折扣。将base_url替换为api.grokified.com/v1，使用Grokified密钥，您只需支付xAI标价的一半。端点相同，格式相同，延迟<5毫秒。优惠活动：在节省5000美元之前（前10000美元半价），享受50%的折扣，之后终身享受3%的折扣。赠送5美元免费信用额度，无需绑定银行卡。充值最低1美元。支持grok-4.3、grok-4.20、grok-build-0.1、图像、视频、语音。提示内容永不记录。

name: IdeateHub
tagline: AI teardowns of real SaaS — find the wedge, not the clone
tagline_zh: 真正SaaS的AI拆解——找到切入点，而非克隆版
description: A growing library of AI-generated teardowns of real, profitable SaaS (Supabase, PostHog, Plausible, Resend…). Each scores viability across 7 dimensions, gives a BUILD/PIVOT/KILL verdict out of 35, and names the underserved wedge a solo dev can actually win. For indie hackers who can build anything but don't know which thing. 10 teardowns free, no login. $49 once, lifetime, no subscription.
description_zh: 一个不断壮大的AI生成的真实盈利SaaS（如Supabase、PostHog、Plausible、Resend等）拆解库。每个拆解都会从7个维度评估可行性，给出35分制的“构建/转型/淘汰”评价，并指出独立开发者真正能获胜的未被充分服务的细分市场。适合那些什么都能构建，却不知道该构建什么的独立开发者。10次拆解免费，无需登录。一次性付费49美元，终身使用，无需订阅。

name: Stop Loss & Trailing Stop Calculator
tagline: Instantly calculate your stop-loss price and trailing stop %
tagline_zh: 即时计算您的止损价格和追踪止损百分比
description: Most traders know they should set a stop order — but figuring out the exact numbers is annoyingly manual. This free tool takes your cost base, current price, and how much profit you want to protect, and instantly gives you: • Your stop-loss price • The trailing stop % to enter directly in your broker Copy buttons let you paste the numbers straight into your order form. No sign-up. Works on mobile. Free forever.
description_zh: 大多数交易者都知道他们应该设置止损单，但确定确切的数字却是一项繁琐的手动工作。这个免费工具会根据你的成本基础、当前价格以及你想保护的利润额度，立即为你提供：• 止损价格 • 追踪止损百分比，可直接输入你的交易平台。复制按钮可让你直接将数字粘贴到订单表格中。无需注册。适用于移动设备。永久免费。

name: lovelab · relationship simulator
tagline: AI simulates 5 events of a relationship
tagline_zh: 人工智能模拟了5段关系事件
description: AI simulates 5 events of a relationship between two social-media accounts.
description_zh: 人工智能模拟了两个社交媒体账户之间关系的5个事件。

name: Unifi Pay Direct
tagline: Accept stablecoin payments in 10 min, with 0% fees
tagline_zh: 10分钟内接受稳定币支付，0%手续费
description: Unifi Pay is a wallet-based payment protocol from LINE NEXT. Customers pay directly from their wallet—no card networks, no intermediaries. Merchants get 0% payment fees (just 1% protocol fee), 1-second settlement straight to their wallet, and up to 5% APY on holdings. Non-custodial: payments run on smart contracts, so you receive funds directly. Devs, startups, and creators integrate in ~10 min via the A2A SDK. Supports USD, JPY, IDR stablecoins, expanding to KRW, THB, and more.
description_zh: Unifi Pay是LINE NEXT推出的一种基于钱包的支付协议。客户直接从其钱包进行支付——无需银行卡网络，也无需中介机构。商家支付0%的交易费（仅需支付1%的协议费），1秒内直接结算至其钱包，且持有资金可获得高达5%的年利率。非托管：支付基于智能合约进行，因此您会直接收到资金。开发者、初创企业和创作者通过A2A SDK在约10分钟内完成集成。支持美元、日元、印尼盾等稳定币，并扩展至韩元、泰铢等更多货币。

name: Purchase.now
tagline: Own a clean spot on the homepage of the internet
tagline_zh: 在互联网主页上拥有一席之地
description: Purchase.now is a modern take on the Million Dollar Homepage but actually clean. One canvas limited spots Bitcoin only. Brands buy permanent pixel regions on a minimalist homepage instead of renting ads or hunting for placements. You get a trackable spot with impressions and clicks and a simple flow to claim and customize your area.
description_zh: Purchase.now是Million Dollar Homepage的现代版本，但实际上更为简洁。一个画布上仅限比特币广告位。品牌商在极简主页上购买永久像素区域，而非租赁广告位或四处寻找投放位置。您将获得一个可追踪的广告位，附带展示次数和点击次数，以及一个简单的流程来申领和定制您的区域。

name: AiTwin.me
tagline: Browser Rendered Realtime AI Avatars. Make your twin today.
tagline_zh: 浏览器渲染的实时AI头像。今天就制作你的双胞胎吧。
description: Plug your existing AI agent into our AI Twin and go from text to real-time human conversations.
description_zh: 将您现有的AI代理接入我们的AI Twin，即可实现从文本到实时人类对话的转变。

name: ARI Software
tagline: Your Open Source, Self-Hosted AI-Native Personal Workspace
tagline_zh: 您的开源、自托管、AI原生个人工作空间
description: The open source, self-hosted, AI-native productivity platform you self-host. Dozens of built-In modules and build your own In minutes - no coding needed. Full data control. Fully extendable. Completely yours.
description_zh: 您自托管的开源、自托管、原生AI的生产力平台。数十个内置模块，您可在几分钟内自行构建——无需编码。完全数据控制。完全可扩展。完全属于您。

name: ERP for Pharmaceutical Industry UK
tagline: BatchMaster ERP for UK Pharmaceutical Companies
tagline_zh: 面向英国制药公司的BatchMaster ERP
description: BatchMaster Pharma ERP UK is a comprehensive solution designed for pharmaceutical manufacturers, helping manage formulation, production, quality control, inventory, compliance, batch traceability, and financials in a single system. Built to support GMP requirements and regulatory standards, it streamlines operations, improves product quality, enhances visibility across the supply chain, and enables efficient, compliant growth for UK pharmaceutical businesses.
description_zh: BatchMaster Pharma ERP UK是一款专为制药企业设计的综合解决方案，可帮助企业在单一系统中管理配方、生产、质量控制、库存、合规性、批次可追溯性和财务。该解决方案旨在支持良好生产规范（GMP）要求和监管标准，能够简化运营流程，提高产品质量，增强整个供应链的透明度，并助力英国制药企业实现高效、合规的增长。

name: QSTMARKETS
tagline: Free financial terminal for retail investors
tagline_zh: 面向零售投资者的免费金融终端
description: QSTMarkets is a free, command-driven financial terminal for retail investors and finance students. Real-time charts, SEC fundamentals, options analytics, macro, credit and AI analysis in one keyboard-first workspace. No subscription.
description_zh: QSTMarkets是一款面向零售投资者和金融专业学生的免费、指令驱动的金融终端。在一个以键盘操作为主的工作空间中，用户可以获得实时图表、美国证券交易委员会（SEC）基本面数据、期权分析、宏观分析、信用分析和人工智能分析。无需订阅。

name: Steampunk
tagline: A Platform to Watch Together
tagline_zh: 一个共同观看的平台
description: Steampunk was born out of a simple necessity: The frustration of trying to watch video content synchronously with friends or remote teams, only to deal with persistent audio-video lag, heavy UI bloat or restrictive paywalls so the goal was to build a highly optimized, minimalist web application focused entirely on seamless, real-time synchronization and the application is completely free to use.
description_zh: 蒸汽朋克诞生于一种简单的需求：与朋友或远程团队同步观看视频内容时，总是会遇到持续的音视频延迟、繁重的用户界面（UI）臃肿或限制性的付费门槛，令人倍感沮丧。因此，我们的目标是构建一个高度优化、极简主义的网页应用程序，完全专注于实现无缝、实时的同步功能，且该应用程序完全免费使用。

name: patternfetch
tagline: Token-compact market briefs for AI trading agents
tagline_zh: 面向人工智能交易代理的通证紧凑型市场简报
description: One call turns a ticker + timeframe into a compact market-state brief: patterns, support/resistance, regime, interpreted indicators, and a one-line summary. MCP + REST, one-click OAuth, pay-per-call by card or USDC (x402). Free demo, no signup.
description_zh: 一个电话即可将股票代码+时间范围转化为简洁的市场状态简报：形态、支撑/阻力位、市场状态、解读指标以及一行总结。MCP+REST，一键OAuth，按卡或USDC付费（x402）。免费演示，无需注册。

name: PDF Everyday
tagline: Free online PDF tools — merge, compress, OCR & more
tagline_zh: 免费在线PDF工具 — 合并、压缩、OCR及更多功能
description: Free online PDF tools: merge, split, compress, rotate, convert, watermark, protect, unlock, organize, crop, search PDFs with OCR — even scanned documents. 21 tools, 100% free, no sign-up required.
description_zh: 免费在线PDF工具：合并、拆分、压缩、旋转、转换、添加水印、保护、解锁、整理、裁剪、使用OCR搜索PDF——甚至扫描文档。21种工具，100%免费，无需注册。

name: TryOPC - AI驱动的OPC超级个体社区平台
tagline: 超级个体社区，大模型SaaS
tagline_zh: 超级个体社区，大模型SaaS
description: 1、技术： TryOPC是国内唯一接入多个模型的OPC社区，上线了4款模型产品，业务支撑底子搭完。数据安全三层面防护跑通，已基本合规。 2、产品方面： 原型成熟度和UI体验明显拉开竞品，入驻、SaaS服务、政策获取、招标采购完整闭环已打通，获同类创始人好评。 3、用户获取方面： 公众号137人，注册用户92人，算力消耗20万+。合作财务代理2家。数据不大，但在增长。
description_zh:
1. Technology: TryOPC is the only OPC community in China that has integrated multiple models, with four model products launched and a solid foundation for business support established. The three levels of data security protection have been successfully implemented, and compliance has been basically achieved.

2. Product Aspects: The prototype maturity and UI experience significantly differentiate us from competitors. We have established a complete closed loop for onboarding, SaaS services, policy acquisition, and bidding procurement, earning praise from similar founders.

3. User Acquisition: We have 137 followers on our official account and 92 registered users, with a computing power consumption of over 200,000. We have partnered with two financial agents. Although our data is not large, it is growing

name: CaIoT DeviceHub
tagline: Access real Android devices—or contribute yours and earn
tagline_zh: 访问真实的Android设备——或贡献您的设备并获得收益
description: 🚀 Launching CaIoT DeviceHub! Access real Android devices in the cloud for mobile app testing, AI agent validation, geo-specific workflows, ad verification, troubleshooting, and QA—without building your own device farm. Have spare Android phones? Contribute them to the network and earn when they're used. We're looking for early adopters and feedback. https://hub.caiot.co/ #ProductHunt #Android #QA #AI #MobileTesting
description_zh: 🚀 推出CaIoT DeviceHub！无需构建自己的设备农场，即可在云端访问真实的Android设备，用于移动应用测试、AI代理验证、地理位置特定的工作流程、广告验证、故障排除和质量保证。手头有闲置的Android手机吗？将它们贡献给网络，并在使用时获得收益。我们正在寻找早期采用者和反馈。https://hub.caiot.co/ #ProductHunt #Android #QA #AI #MobileTesting

name: RiskDesk
tagline: Professional position sizing & trade analytics for traders.
tagline_zh: 为交易者提供专业的头寸规模和交易分析。
description: RiskDesk is a professional trading companion for Mac, iPhone, and Android. It combines smart position sizing, ADR-based stop levels, trade analytics, and a built-in journal — all in one app. RiskDesk is an essential tool for all traders, providing: Instant position sizing, based on your account size & risk. ADR stop levels based on market volatility. Pro-level analytics (Max Drawdown, Kelly %, Sharpe ratio, Sortino, + more). Built for serious day traders, swing traders & prop firm challenges.
description_zh: RiskDesk是一款适用于Mac、iPhone和Android的专业交易助手。它集智能仓位管理、基于ADR的止损水平、交易分析以及内置日志于一体，全部功能都包含在一个应用程序中。RiskDesk是所有交易者的必备工具，它提供：基于您的账户规模和风险的即时仓位管理。基于市场波动率的ADR止损水平。专业级分析（最大回撤、凯利公式百分比、夏普比率、索蒂诺比率等）。专为认真的日内交易者、波段交易者和应对自营公司挑战而设计。

name: Stippa
tagline: Appointment & booking software, Dutch-first
tagline_zh: 预约与预订软件，荷兰语优先
description: Stippa lets barbers, hair and beauty salons, physiotherapists, personal trainers, and coaches take online appointments. A booking widget for your own site, an online calendar, customer management, payments, and no-show prevention, in one system. Dutch-first, available in multiple languages.
description_zh: Stippa让理发师、美发沙龙、美容院、理疗师、私人教练和教练能够进行在线预约。一个集成了您自己网站的预订小部件、在线日历、客户管理、支付和未到场预防功能的系统。荷兰语优先，支持多种语言。

name: Signa WiFi
tagline: Wi-Fi signal strength, alive in your menu bar
tagline_zh: Wi-Fi信号强度，在你的菜单栏中一目了然
description: Signa WiFi turns your real-time WiFi signal into animated menu bar icons. Choose from 13 themes — from minimal bars to retro pixel art characters that react to your actual RSSI. No data collected. Free with optional premium themes.
description_zh: Signa WiFi可将您的实时WiFi信号转换为动画菜单栏图标。您可以从13种主题中进行选择——从极简风格到复古像素艺术角色，这些图标会随着您的实际RSSI而变化。不会收集任何数据。可选付费主题需额外付费。

name: RetainIq
tagline: AI decision intelligence for SaaS customer retention
tagline_zh: SaaS客户留存的AI决策智能
description: RetainIQ is the first a prioritized action layer for SaaS retention and recovery. RetainIQ replaces dashboards with AI decision intelligence for B2B SaaS retention. Instead of showing customer data, it prioritizes who to contact, why they matter, and the next best action based on revenue impact. It continuously learns from outcomes to improve recommendations, helping teams recover revenue, reactivate users, and reduce churn.
description_zh: RetainIQ是首个针对SaaS留存和恢复的优先行动层。RetainIQ用人工智能决策智能取代了B2B SaaS留存的仪表板。它不再显示客户数据，而是根据收入影响，优先列出要联系的对象、他们的重要性以及下一步最佳行动。它不断从结果中学习，以改进建议，帮助团队恢复收入、重新激活用户并减少流失。

name: Bingo Caller Pro & Tambola
tagline: Professional bingo hosting without cages, paper, or subs
tagline_zh: 专业宾果游戏主持，无需笼子、纸张或替代品
description: Host professional bingo, Tambola, and Housie games from your phone. Features TV casting, virtual QR-powered player cards, winner verification, multilingual voices, custom patterns, auto-calling, sound effects, and fully offline operation. No subscriptions.
description_zh: 通过手机主持专业的宾果游戏、坦博拉游戏和豪斯游戏。该游戏具备电视投屏功能、虚拟二维码玩家卡、获胜者验证、多语言语音、自定义图案、自动叫牌、音效以及完全离线操作等功能。无需订阅。

name: LeetCode Coach
tagline: AI mentor that tells you exactly what to solve next
tagline_zh: AI导师，会告诉你下一步要解决的具体问题
description: LeetCode Coach analyzes your public LeetCode profile and generates personalized recommendations based on your solving history. Features: • AI-powered weakness analysis • Personalized next-problem suggestions • Topic-wise insights • Explainable recommendations • Progress tracking • Beginner-friendly guidance Built for students, interview candidates, and competitive programmers who want structured practice instead of random grinding.
description_zh: LeetCode Coach会分析您公开的LeetCode个人资料，并根据您的解题历史生成个性化推荐。功能包括：• 基于人工智能的弱点分析 • 个性化的下一题建议 • 针对特定主题的见解 • 可解释的推荐 • 进度跟踪 • 适合初学者的指导 专为学生、面试候选人和希望进行结构化练习而非随机刷题的竞技程序员打造。

name: Yet Another Web Analytics
tagline: Self-hosted web analytics with no UI, just AI
tagline_zh: 无需用户界面，仅凭人工智能实现自托管网络分析
description: Yet Another Web Analytics (yawa) is a self-hosted web analytics tool with no UI. Instead of dashboards, you query your data through your LLM client using MCP, asking Claude or any compatible AI assistant questions about your traffic in plain language.
description_zh: Yet Another Web Analytics（yawa）是一款无需用户界面的自托管网络分析工具。您无需使用仪表板，而是通过LLM客户端使用MCP查询数据，用通俗易懂的语言向Claude或任何兼容的AI助手询问有关流量的信息。

name: AstroScroll
tagline: Seven astrology systems. One cosmic verdict.
tagline_zh: 七大占星体系。一个宇宙的裁决。
description: AstroScroll is an astrology oracle built for the 600 million people in India + People across the globe who believe in astrology — and deserve better than recycled sun-sign filler. AstroScroll combines 7 systems — KP, Vedic, Prashna, Karmic, Western, Tarot, and a synthesized Verdict — into one precise reading in under 30 seconds. Every claim names a specific planet and date window. No "good vibes ahead." No vague filler.
description_zh: AstroScroll是一款专为印度6亿人以及全球各地信仰占星术的人们打造的占星术预言工具——他们值得拥有比重复利用的星座运势更好的内容。AstroScroll将七大体系——克利须那派、吠陀、帕什纳、业力、西方、塔罗牌和综合结论——融合在一起，在30秒内提供一份精准的解读。每条声明都指明了特定的行星和日期范围。没有“未来运势良好”之类的模糊填充内容。

name: Faceless Reels Generator
tagline: From topic to fact-checked faceless reels
tagline_zh: 从话题到经过事实核查的匿名视频短片
description: FacelessReels is a faceless reels AI that turns any topic into fact-checked faceless reels with research, narrative shaping, and video generation.
description_zh: FacelessReels是一款人工智能工具，能够通过研究、叙事构建和视频生成，将任何话题转化为经过事实核查的匿名短视频。

name: AmpUp
tagline: Open-source AI chat for your GTM stack - own the base layer
tagline_zh: 为您的GTM（增长-转化-留存）堆栈提供开源AI聊天功能——掌握基础层
description: A chat agent that lives on top of your CRM, calls, and tools over MCP. The base layer is open source and free, so clone it and own it today. Bring in the hosted layers (memory, analytics, coaching) the moment they stop being your job. - Try it: https://chat.ampup.ai - Clone it (OSS): https://github.com/A79-ai/gtm-agentic-chat
description_zh: 一个基于您的CRM、电话和MCP工具之上的聊天代理。基础层是开源且免费的，所以今天就克隆它并拥有它。一旦托管层（内存、分析、辅导）不再由您负责，就引入它们。- 尝试一下：https://chat.ampup.ai - 克隆它（开源软件）：https://github.com/A79-ai/gtm-agentic-chat

name: Glitchwatch — CI and deploy alerts
tagline: One webhook. Every CI failure in one inbox.
tagline_zh: 一个Webhook，一个收件箱中的每次持续集成（CI）失败。
description: Glitchwatch collects GitHub Actions CI failures into one inbox — on the web and iPhone. Add one webhook URL to any repo. When CI fails, you see which project broke, filter by priority, and mark. Setup wizard walks you through it in under 2 minutes. Free: GitHub webhook, multiple repos, 7-day history. Pro ($9.99/mo on iOS): unlimited history + critical push alerts on your lock screen. Built for indie developers juggling multiple side projects. No Vercel Pro required — works with GitHub Free.
description_zh: Glitchwatch将GitHub Actions的持续集成（CI）失败收集到一个收件箱中——可在网页和iPhone上使用。只需在任何仓库中添加一个Webhook URL即可。当CI失败时，您可以看到哪个项目出了问题，按优先级进行筛选，并进行标记。设置向导可在2分钟内引导您完成整个过程。免费版：GitHub Webhook、支持多个仓库、7天历史记录。专业版（iOS上每月9.99美元）：无限制的历史记录+锁屏上的关键推送通知。专为兼顾多个副项目的独立开发者打造。无需Vercel Pro——与GitHub免费版兼容。

name: Samvid Memory Studio
tagline: One install. Every AI on your machine finally remembers.
tagline_zh: 一次安装，你机器上的每个人工智能都能记住。
description: You've explained your stack, your preferences, your decisions, dozens of times over & over again. Inspired by human memory, Samvid Memory Studio solves that recursive loop. Install once, and every AI tool on your machine shares a persistent, local memory. Claude knows what Cursor learned. Cursor remembers what you decided last week. Memories gather. Connections deepen. Meaning emerges. No cloud. No account. Runs entirely on your machine.
description_zh: 你已经无数次地解释了你的技术栈、偏好和决策。受人类记忆的启发，Samvid Memory Studio解决了这种递归循环的问题。只需安装一次，你机器上的每个AI工具就会共享一个持久的本地记忆。Claude知道Cursor学到了什么。Cursor记得你上周的决定。记忆汇聚，连接加深，意义浮现。无需云服务，无需账户，完全在你的机器上运行。

name: OneClickTabs
tagline: Save and launch website workspaces with one click
tagline_zh: 一键保存并启动网站工作区
description: OneClickTabs helps you save groups of websites as reusable workspaces and launch them instantly. Organize work, study, research, and daily browsing sessions without reopening tabs manually.
description_zh: OneClickTabs可帮助您将多组网站保存为可重复使用的工作区，并可立即启动它们。无需手动重新打开标签页，即可整理工作、学习、研究以及日常浏览会话。

name: AI Bug Triage Prompt
tagline: Stop patching crash sites. Start finding root causes.
tagline_zh: 别再修复崩溃的网站了。开始查找根本原因吧。
description: When you paste a stack trace and ask an AI to fix it, it usually patches wherever the error surfaces not where the bug originates. I built a prompt that forces the model to work the problem in order: read the symptom literally, rank hypotheses by likelihood with confidence levels, identify the actual origin (not just the throw site), then propose a fix and a way to verify you actually found the root cause not just made the error move.t: instantly share code, notes, and snippets.
description_zh: 当你粘贴一个堆栈跟踪并要求人工智能修复它时，它通常会在错误出现的地方进行修复，而不是在错误起源的地方。我构建了一个提示，迫使模型按顺序解决问题：逐字逐句地阅读症状，根据置信度对假设按可能性进行排序，确定实际起源（不仅仅是抛出位置），然后提出修复方案和验证方法，以确保你真正找到了根本原因，而不仅仅是让错误转移。t：立即共享代码、笔记和片段。

name: HPSILab MCP
tagline: Options intelligence for AI agents — IV, Monte Carlo & more
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理的选项智能——第四部分，蒙特卡洛方法及其他
description: HPSILab MCP is an 8-tool MCP server that brings institutional-grade options analytics directly into AI agents and coding environments like Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf. Connect once, Ask your AI agent: analyze_stock NVDA, Full Report — structured markdown research note synthesizing all signals Remote MCP endpoint: https://hpsilab.com/mcp Python SDK: pip install hpsilab-mcp Website: https://hpsilab.com GitHub: https://github.com/haiyunsky/hpsilab-mcp-server
description_zh: HPSILab MCP是一款配备8个工具的MCP服务器，它能够将机构级期权分析直接整合到AI代理和编码环境中，如Claude、Cursor和Windsurf。只需连接一次，即可向您的AI代理发出指令：analyze_stock NVDA，获取完整报告 — 结构化Markdown研究笔记，综合所有信号。远程MCP端点：https://hpsilab.com/mcp Python SDK：pip install hpsilab-mcp 网站：https://hpsilab.com GitHub：https://github.com/haiyunsky/hpsilab-mcp-server

name: HiRezGo!
tagline: Share full-resolution images without compression
tagline_zh: 无压缩地分享全分辨率图像
description: HiRezGo lets you share full-resolution images without compression. Most platforms reduce image quality. HiRezGo keeps original resolution intact, even on large screens. Upload once and share instantly via a link. Works on smartphones, tablets, and TVs with no login required. Built for creators who care about image quality.
description_zh: HiRezGo可让您无需压缩即可分享全分辨率图片。大多数平台都会降低图片质量。HiRezGo则能保持原始分辨率不变，即使在大屏幕上也是如此。只需上传一次，即可通过链接立即分享。该平台适用于智能手机、平板电脑和电视，无需登录。专为注重图片质量的创作者打造。

name: Samepage Signals
tagline: Your second brain for product management
tagline_zh: 您产品管理的得力助手
description: Built specifically for the best product leaders, Samepage Signals automatically surfaces the information and insights that are most important to you across all of your tools and web, in one place.
description_zh: Samepage Signals专为顶尖的产品领导者打造，能自动将您所有工具和网络中对您最重要的信息和见解集中呈现于一处。

name: QuickGit
tagline: 1-Click GitHub repository creator directly from your browser
tagline_zh: 直接从浏览器一键创建GitHub仓库
description: QuickGit eliminates workflow friction for developers and founders. Instead of switching tabs, navigating GitHub's web interface, and clicking multiple menus to start a project, QuickGit initializes public or private repositories in just 2 seconds from your active tab. What stands out? It instantly auto-injects official boilerplate (.gitignore templates and licenses) and copies the exact HTTPS clone command directly to your clipboard, leaving you completely terminal-ready.
description_zh: QuickGit为开发者和创始人消除了工作流程中的障碍。无需切换标签页、浏览GitHub的网页界面，也无需点击多个菜单来启动项目，QuickGit只需2秒即可从您当前活动的标签页初始化公共或私有仓库。其独特之处在于，它能立即自动注入官方模板（.gitignore模板和许可证），并将准确的HTTPS克隆命令直接复制到您的剪贴板，让您完全准备好在终端中使用。

name: Orbit
tagline: Understand Your AI Better, Move Faster, Build More
tagline_zh: 更懂AI，更快行动，更多创造
description: Orbit makes Claude Code and Codex understandable at a glance, so you can run a whole fleet of agents on one living canvas and always know exactly what each one is doing. Start free on your own Claude or Codex sub, or try Pro free for 7 days.
description_zh: Orbit让Claude Code和Codex一目了然，这样你就可以在一个生动的画布上运行一整队代理，并且始终确切地知道每个代理在做什么。免费试用你自己的Claude或Codex子账户，或免费试用Pro版7天。

name: BounceProtect
tagline: Smarter Email Validation for Better Deliverability
tagline_zh: 更智能的电子邮件验证，提升邮件送达率
description: Bounce Protect is an advanced email validation and deliverability platform that helps businesses reduce bounce rates, protect sender reputation, and improve email marketing performance. Verify single emails or bulk email lists with powerful email verification tools, real-time API integration, domain analysis, and deliverability insights. Designed for marketers, agencies, SaaS companies, and sales teams seeking accurate, fast, and reliable email validation.
description_zh: Bounce Protect是一款先进的电子邮件验证和送达能力平台，可帮助企业降低退信率，保护发件人声誉，并提升电子邮件营销效果。通过强大的电子邮件验证工具、实时API集成、域名分析和送达能力洞察，您可以验证单封电子邮件或批量电子邮件列表。该平台专为营销人员、代理机构、SaaS公司和销售团队设计，旨在提供准确、快速且可靠的电子邮件验证服务。

name: TicketReel
tagline: Resolve a ticket. Get a video. Automatically.
tagline_zh: 解决一个工单。获取一个视频。自动完成。
description: TicketReel lives inside your Intercom inbox and turns resolved support tickets into branded AI avatar video walkthroughs - automatically. Resolve a ticket, click Generate, and get a 60-second presenter video with burned-in captions, ready to send to the customer or publish straight to your help center. No screen recording, no webcam, no editing, no new tabs. Your team keeps working in Intercom exactly as they do today - TicketReel just makes sure every resolution becomes a reusable asset.
description_zh: TicketReel嵌入您的Intercom收件箱中，能自动将已解决的支持工单转化为带有品牌特色的AI头像视频演示。解决工单后，点击“生成”，即可获得一段60秒的演示视频，视频中带有嵌入式字幕，可直接发送给客户或直接发布到您的帮助中心。无需屏幕录制、无需网络摄像头、无需编辑、也无需打开新标签页。您的团队仍可像往常一样在Intercom中工作——TicketReel只是确保每个解决方案都能成为可重复使用的资产。

name: Vieproide
tagline: Product discovery platform for cool gadgets and items
tagline_zh: 酷炫小玩意和物品的产品发现平台
description: Vieproide is a product discovery platform and directory showcasing a wide variety of cool gadgets, smart shopping ideas, and unique products online. We aggregate interesting items across multiple categories to help you find awesome gear and clever tools in one organized space. It is a clean and straightforward place to discover modern products that make everyday life a bit more interesting. Check it out and let me know your thoughts!
description_zh: Vieproide是一个产品发现平台和目录，展示了各种酷炫的小工具、智能购物创意和独特的在线产品。我们汇集了多个类别的有趣商品，帮助您在一个井井有条的空间中找到出色的装备和巧妙的工具。这是一个干净利落的地方，可以轻松发现让日常生活更有趣的现代产品。快来看看吧，并告诉我您的想法！

name: BelvedereTrack
tagline: Free job search dashboard to manage applications
tagline_zh: 免费求职仪表板，用于管理申请
description: Most dashboards have a paywall beyond a certain number of applications or are full of fluff, such as cover letter and resume editing. BelevedereTrack is a simple dashboard to manage an unlimited number of job applications.
description_zh: 大多数求职仪表板在超过一定数量的申请后就会设置付费门槛，或者充斥着诸如求职信和简历编辑等无关紧要的内容。BelevedereTrack是一个简洁的求职仪表板，可管理无限数量的工作申请。

name: Meeyra
tagline: Real-time AI translator for your online meetings
tagline_zh: 为您的在线会议提供实时人工智能翻译
description: Meeyra translates live speech in meetings — no bots, no app switching, no delays. Just share a link. Guests join from any browser instantly. Your words translate across 42+ languages in real time as you speak. Built for global teams, educators, and anyone who's struggled with language barriers in meetings. ✓ Real-time speech-to-text translation ✓ Live captions & full transcription ✓ End-to-end encrypted sessions ✓ No download required for guests Small team. v1.0. 🌍
description_zh: Meeyra 可在会议中实时翻译发言——无需机器人，无需切换应用，无延迟。只需分享一个链接。参会者即可通过任何浏览器立即加入。您发言时，您的内容将实时翻译成42种以上的语言。专为全球团队、教育工作者以及任何在会议中遭遇语言障碍的人士打造。✓ 实时语音转文字翻译 ✓ 实时字幕和完整转录 ✓ 端到端加密会话 ✓ 参会者无需下载 小团队。v1.0。

name: MentionGPT
tagline: You've built something great. Now it's time to market it.
tagline_zh: 你已经打造出了一些了不起的东西。现在是时候把它推向市场了。
description: While you're busy with SEO, ads, and content marketing, potential customers are already asking for solutions like yours online. MentionGPT finds high-intent conversations where people are looking for recommendations, comparing alternatives, or describing the exact problem you solve. Stop guessing where buyers are. Find them, reply, and convert.
description_zh: 当您忙于SEO、广告和内容营销时，潜在客户已经在网上寻求像您这样的解决方案了。MentionGPT能够发现那些人们正在寻找建议、比较替代方案或描述您所解决的确切问题的高意向对话。别再猜测买家在哪里了。找到他们，回复他们，并实现转化。

name: Germany Copilot AI
tagline: AI assistant for migrants in Germany
tagline_zh: 德国移民的AI助手
description: 🇩🇪 AI Assistant for Life in Germany
description_zh: 德国生活AI助手

name: Habit Pocket
tagline: Find out what's actually affecting your sleep, mood and life
tagline_zh: 找出真正影响你睡眠、情绪和生活的原因
description: Most habit trackers only do yes/no. But half of what I track is numbers and times - steps, weight, when I actually fell asleep. Habit Pocket puts checkmarks, numbers and times of the day in one grid that looks like a spreadsheet, then lets you chart any habit against any other to spot correlations. It started as the Excel sheet I kept for two years. Now a real app on web and iOS. Free for 5 habits.
description_zh: 大多数习惯追踪器只能记录是/否。但我追踪的一半内容是数字和时间——步数、体重、实际入睡时间。Habit Pocket将勾选标记、数字和一天中的时间放在一个类似电子表格的网格中，然后让你将任何习惯与任何其他习惯进行对比，以发现相关性。它最初是我保存了两年的Excel表格。现在是一个真正的网页和iOS应用程序。前5个习惯免费。

name: Pharma NOLT 300 Ampoules
tagline: Joint Recovery and Tissue Repair
tagline_zh: 关节恢复与组织修复
description: Experience a massive transformation in your physique when you buy Pharma NOLT 300 Ampoules. Ordering your performance items from Osgear.to connects you directly with genuine stock from Pharmacom Labs. This formula represents the Best Sustained-Release Nandrolone Blend for Bulking phases, helping you add dense muscle while ensuring rapid structural recovery. Stop settling for slow size increases and unlock supreme power today with verified, high-purity compounds built for elite athletic goals.
description_zh: 购买Pharma NOLT 300安瓿，让您的体格经历巨大转变。通过Osgear.to订购您的健身用品，您将直接获得来自Pharmacom Labs的正品库存。这款配方是增肌阶段最佳的缓释诺龙混合物，帮助您增加肌肉密度，同时确保快速的结构恢复。别再满足于缓慢的体型增长，即刻解锁极致力量，使用经过验证的高纯度化合物，专为精英运动员的目标打造。

name: Voxxhire
tagline: AI interviews, CV tools & career prep — speak your way in.
tagline_zh: 人工智能面试、简历工具和职业准备——用你的方式来表达。
description: Most interview prep is passive. Voxxhire makes it active. Practice voice interviews with AI feedback, scan your CV against ATS filters, check your job-fit score before you apply, and generate cover letters that actually match the role. Built for candidates who want to walk into interviews prepared, not just hopeful. Coming soon: structured AI-assisted interviews for hiring teams, with every decision staying in the hands of your HR team.
description_zh: 大多数面试准备都是被动的。Voxxhire则让面试准备变得主动。通过AI反馈练习语音面试，根据ATS筛选条件扫描简历，在申请前检查你的岗位匹配度评分，并生成真正符合职位要求的求职信。专为那些希望有备而来、而非心怀侥幸地参加面试的求职者打造。即将推出：为招聘团队提供结构化的AI辅助面试，所有决策权均在人力资源团队手中。

name: Loops Lane — Chord Flow
tagline: Ripchord presets for R&B & Soul producers
tagline_zh: 为R&B和灵魂音乐制作人提供的Ripchord预设
description: Chord Flow is a Ripchord preset bank built for R&B, Soul, and Trap Soul producers. Press one key, get a full chord — minor sevenths, extended chords, suspended voicings — the harmonic language of R&B and Soul, instantly accessible without needing music theory. 30 genre-focused presets with over 1,200 chord variations total. Covers everything from classic 70s Soul to modern R&B and Trap Soul. Works in any DAW that supports VST3/AU — FL Studio, Ableton, Logic Pro, Studio One, Pro Tools.
description_zh: Chord Flow是一款专为R&B、灵魂乐和陷阱灵魂乐制作人打造的Ripchord预设音色库。只需按下一个键，即可获得完整的和弦——小七和弦、扩展和弦、悬停和弦——这些是R&B和灵魂乐的和声语言，无需音乐理论即可即时访问。该音色库包含30种以流派为重点的预设，总共提供超过1200种和弦变体。涵盖了从70年代经典灵魂乐到现代R&B和陷阱灵魂乐的所有风格。适用于任何支持VST3/AU的数字音频工作站（DAW）——如FL Studio、Ableton、Logic Pro、Studio One、Pro Tools。

name: Baseline
tagline: The qualitative foundation for your thesis
tagline_zh: 你论文的定性基础
description: Chatbot equity research is piecemeal, where you ask a tool about a company and receive an answer in isolation. Baseline, first developed internally by a family office, runs research across 3,500+ stocks and scores them on a comparable rubric. Research is pre-packaged, standardized, and built on optimized prompts, so you're not re-running the same analysis a chatbot makes you rebuild. For time constrained buy-side investors, it also highlights the long tail of overlooked quality SMID cap stocks.
description_zh: 聊天机器人股票研究是零散的，你向工具询问一家公司的情况，只会收到一个孤立的答案。Baseline最初由一家家族理财室内部开发，它对3500多只股票进行研究，并按照可比标准对它们进行评分。研究是预先打包好的、标准化的，并且建立在优化的提示之上，因此，你无需重复运行聊天机器人让你重新构建的相同分析。对于时间有限的买方投资者而言，它还突出了被忽视的优质中小市值股票的长尾效应。

name: OnlySeeka
tagline: The fastest OnlyFans creator search engine
tagline_zh: 最快的OnlyFans创作者搜索引擎
description: OnlySeeka is a free directory of 11,000+ OnlyFans creators ranked by real subscriber count. Filter by category (Latina, MILF, BBW, Asian, Ebony...), country (Brazil, Colombia, USA...), city, price, and more. Updated daily. No signup needed.
description_zh: OnlySeeka是一个免费目录，收录了11,000多名OnlyFans创作者，并根据真实订阅人数进行排名。用户可以按类别（拉丁裔、熟龄辣妈、大码美女、亚洲人、黑人……）、国家（巴西、哥伦比亚、美国……）、城市、价格等进行筛选。每日更新。无需注册。

name: LocalBlox — Done
tagline: Done-for-you marketing kits for local businesses
tagline_zh: 为本地企业提供的定制营销套餐
description: LocalBlox is a done-for-you marketing kit built specifically for local businesses. Unlike complex marketing software or expensive agencies, LocalBlox provides ready-to-use landing page copy, Instagram captions, and email marketing templates in one package. Designed for restaurants, salons, and gyms, it helps business owners launch campaigns faster, save time, and focus on growing their business.
description_zh: LocalBlox是一款专为本地企业打造的全方位营销套件。与复杂的营销软件或昂贵的代理机构不同，LocalBlox在一个套餐中提供了即用型的落地页文案、Instagram描述和电子邮件营销模板。该套件专为餐厅、沙龙和健身房设计，可帮助企业主更快地启动营销活动，节省时间，并专注于发展业务。

name: Decaf: Caffeine Tracker
tagline: Cut back on caffeine without the withdrawal crash
tagline_zh: 减少咖啡因摄入，避免戒断反应
description: Most people quit cold turkey, hit the headaches and fatigue, then relapse by day three. Decaf builds you a gentle taper plan that lowers your limit week by week, so your body adjusts instead of revolting. Log drinks in seconds, see caffeine leave your system in real time, and know exactly when you'll be sleep-ready. Track withdrawal symptoms, hit streak milestones, and watch your sleep improve. Less caffeine, more you.
description_zh: 大多数人会突然戒掉咖啡因，开始出现头痛和疲劳的症状，然后在第三天又故态复萌。Decaf为你制定了一个温和的减量计划，每周逐步降低你的摄入量，这样你的身体就能逐渐适应，而不是产生排斥反应。只需几秒钟即可记录饮料摄入，实时查看咖啡因从你的体内排出情况，并准确了解你何时会感到困倦。跟踪戒断症状，达成连续戒断里程碑，并观察你的睡眠状况改善。减少咖啡因，找回更好的自己。

name: Craft Widgets
tagline: Playable and custom widgets for your iPhone Home Screen
tagline_zh: 适用于iPhone主屏幕的可玩性和自定义小部件
description: Craft Widgets turns your iPhone and iPad Home Screen into something personal: 500+ ready-made widgets, playable widgets like 2048 and Sudoku, Lock Screen and StandBy widgets, plus a visual editor with layers, fonts, colors, and AI so you can design your own.
description_zh: Craft Widgets将您的iPhone和iPad主屏幕变成个性化空间：500多个现成小部件、可玩的小部件（如2048和数独）、锁屏和待机小部件，以及一个具有图层、字体、颜色和人工智能功能的可视化编辑器，让您能够设计自己的小部件。

name: Goto77
tagline: Goto77 adalah platfrom game online tebak angka di indonesia
tagline_zh: Goto77是印度尼西亚的一款数字竞猜在线游戏平台
description: Goto77 Menawarkan pilihan game yang luar biasa dan grafiknya menakjubkan! Saya belum pernah menikmati bermain game separah ini.
description_zh: Goto77提供了非同寻常的游戏选择，其图形效果令人叹为观止！我从未享受过如此与众不同的游戏体验。

name: SerpDo
tagline: One click. Claude boosts your SEO.
tagline_zh: 一键操作。克劳德助您提升SEO。
description: Connects to your Google Search Console and gives you an SEO-focused prompt to fix your site's biggest issues. I got tired of "unactionable" GSC data. So I made SerpDo to connect to your GSC, read your traffic, and tell you exactly what to fix today. Not some vague "report". A real task list. It finds pages losing clicks, spots low CTR issues, flags keyword cannibalization, scores your pages, and drafts the content fixes you need. Free to try. No GSC experience needed.
description_zh: 连接到您的谷歌站长工具（Google Search Console），并为您提供一个以SEO为重点的提示，以解决您网站的最大问题。我厌倦了“无法操作”的谷歌站长工具数据。因此，我开发了SerpDo，它可以连接到您的谷歌站长工具，读取您的流量数据，并准确告知您今天需要修复哪些问题。不是一些模糊的“报告”，而是一个真正的任务列表。它会找出点击量下降的页面，发现点击率低的问题，标记关键词同质化，为您的页面打分，并起草您所需的内容修复方案。免费试用。无需谷歌站长工具经验。

name: FastAPI Cloud
tagline: Deploy FastAPI apps with one command
tagline_zh: 只需一条命令即可部署FastAPI应用
description: FastAPI Cloud is the official deployment platform for FastAPI. Deploy with one command: fastapi deploy. Connect GitHub repos, use custom domains, manage environment variables, and ship with zero config, zero uncertainty, and zero frustration. You code. We cloud.
description_zh: FastAPI Cloud是FastAPI的官方部署平台。只需一条命令即可完成部署：fastapi deploy。连接GitHub仓库，使用自定义域名，管理环境变量，且无需配置、无不确定性、无烦恼。您只需编写代码，其余的交给我们云端处理。

name: Devpilot
tagline: A simpler way to manage infrastructure and DevOps workflows
tagline_zh: 一种更简单的管理基础设施和DevOps工作流程的方法
description: Devpilot is an AI-powered platform for managing deployments, infrastructure, and DevOps workflows from one place. It automates routine tasks, reduces manual setup, and helps teams scale without complex configurations. Built for founders and engineers who want to ship faster without handling infrastructure overhead.
description_zh: Devpilot是一个由人工智能驱动的平台，可一站式管理部署、基础设施和DevOps工作流程。它自动化了常规任务，减少了手动设置，并帮助团队无需复杂配置即可实现扩展。该平台专为希望加快产品发布速度而无需处理基础设施开销的创始人和工程师打造。

name: Investhesis
tagline: Value any stock by yourself — now inside your AI
tagline_zh: 自己评估任何股票——现在，让你的AI来帮你
description: A real equity analysis — DCF, reverse-DCF, multiples, ROIC/WACC, forensic accounting, an institutional-grade thesis Retail investors just don't have that, so most "research" is a vibe and a headline. • A multi-method valuation where you control every assumption (growth, margins, WACC) — not a black box. • 160 forensic accounting checks — Altman Z (bankruptcy), Beneish M (earnings manipulation), Piotroski F — the stuff that flags the next blow-up. • An AI-written investment thesis
description_zh: 真正的股权分析——贴现现金流法（DCF）、反向贴现现金流法（reverse-DCF）、市盈率、资本成本回报率（ROIC）/加权平均资本成本（WACC）、法务会计、机构级论文 散户投资者不具备这些条件，因此大多数“研究”只是凭感觉和看标题。• 一种多方法估值，你可以控制每一个假设（增长、利润率、加权平均资本成本）——而不是一个黑箱。• 160项法务会计检查——Altman Z（破产）、Beneish M（盈余操纵）、Piotroski F——这些是预示下一次爆雷的因素。• 一篇由人工智能撰写的投资论文

name: Portrait Drop
tagline: Product Photograph for Online Sellers
tagline_zh: 面向在线卖家的产品照片
description: Portrait Drop is a mobile product photography app built for online sellers who need better product photos without expensive studio equipment, complicated editing software, or monthly subscriptions.
description_zh: Portrait Drop是一款专为在线卖家打造的手机产品摄影应用，他们需要更好的产品照片，但又不希望使用昂贵的工作室设备、复杂的编辑软件或每月订阅服务。

name: LinkMagnet
tagline: Auto-deliver your lead magnet to everyone who comments
tagline_zh: 自动将你的引流资源发送给所有评论的人
description: Someone comments your keyword on your LinkedIn post → LinkMagnet DMs them your resource in under 10 minutes, 24/7. Inbound and opt-in only (no cold DMs, no scraping). 5-min setup, account-safe pacing, real-time tracking.
description_zh: 当有人在您的领英（LinkedIn）帖子下评论了您的关键词时，LinkMagnet会在10分钟内通过私信向他们发送您的资源，全天候服务。仅限入站和选择加入（无陌生私信，无数据抓取）。5分钟快速设置，账户安全节奏，实时跟踪。

name: bab.gg
tagline: Talk your way past the guard - a new door every day
tagline_zh: 巧妙地绕过警卫——每天都有一扇新门
description: Bab.gg is a daily guard game: persuade the gatekeeper to let you through in limited messages. New guard daily, worldwide. Free browser game in Arabic & English.
description_zh: Bab.gg是一款日常守护游戏：用有限的信息说服守门人让你通过。每天都有新的守门人，遍布全球。这是一款免费的阿拉伯语和英语浏览器游戏。

name: Arkham Intelligence Wallet Data Scraper
tagline: Export Arkham wallet data from addresses or URLs
tagline_zh: 从地址或网址导出Arkham钱包数据
description: Paste wallet addresses or Arkham wallet URLs and export public Arkham wallet analytics to a dataset. Useful for on-chain research, compliance triage, portfolio review, and internal crypto dashboards.
description_zh: 粘贴钱包地址或Arkham钱包URL，并将Arkham钱包的公开分析数据导出到数据集中。这对链上研究、合规性分类、投资组合审查以及内部加密货币仪表板非常有用。

name: GoWeb OS
tagline: An immutable, framework-free single-file Web OS prototype
tagline_zh: 一个不可变、无框架的单文件Web操作系统原型
description: GoWeb OS is an architectural proof-of-concept demonstrating a sandboxed, multi-window desktop environment engineered inside a single 15KB zero-dependency HTML file. Powered by a custom micro-kernel loop and an un-abstracted Vanilla JS engine, it explores secure containerization, minimal attack surface vulnerabilities, and deterministic runtime isolation. Includes a working BBS terminal shell, automated process z-index management, and a dedicated 60 FPS HTML5 Canvas graphics matrix.
description_zh: GoWeb OS是一个架构概念验证，展示了一个在单个15KB零依赖HTML文件中构建的沙盒式多窗口桌面环境。它由一个自定义微内核循环和一个非抽象的Vanilla JS引擎驱动，探索了安全容器化、最小攻击面漏洞和确定性运行时隔离。包括一个可用的BBS终端shell、自动化的进程z-index管理以及一个专用的60 FPS HTML5 Canvas图形矩阵。

name: LeLiveBoost
tagline: Whatnot Live Boost: Seller Analytics, CRM & Tools
tagline_zh: Whatnot Live Boost：卖家分析、客户关系管理（CRM）及工具
description: LeLiveBoost is the essential tool for Whatnot sellers. Automated size detection, buyers CRM, live analytics, smart queues. Boost your sales today.
description_zh: LeLiveBoost是Whatnot卖家的必备工具。它具备自动尺寸检测、买家客户关系管理、实时分析以及智能队列等功能，助您即刻提升销售额。

name: Quorum — Multi-LLM Starter Kit
tagline: Ship AI that doesn't hallucinate. 11 LLMs vote.
tagline_zh: 打造不会产生幻觉的AI船只。11个大型语言模型（LLMs）投票。
description: Next.js boilerplate: 11-LLM semantic consensus, EU AI Act Art. 12+13 audit cert generator, opt-in HSP fail-closed gate. Stripe billing + magic-link auth + 4 vertical examples. Real code, not a demo — fork it Friday, ship Monday.
description_zh: Next.js 模板：11-LLM 语义共识、欧盟《人工智能法案》第 12+13 条审计证书生成器、选择性加入 HSP 故障关闭门。Stripe 计费 + 魔法链接认证 + 4 个垂直示例。真实代码，非演示版——周五 fork，周一发布。

name: Voleeo
tagline: The local-first client for the AI era.
tagline_zh: AI时代的本地优先客户端。
description: Voleeo is the local-first API client built for the AI era. Native, private (data never leaves your machine), multi-protocol: HTTP, gRPC, WebSocket, GraphQL in one app. Built-in MCP server so AI agents drive your API testing. MIT-licensed, free.
description_zh: Voleeo是一款专为人工智能时代打造的本地优先API客户端。它是一款原生应用，具有私有性（数据永远不会离开您的设备），支持多种协议：HTTP、gRPC、WebSocket、GraphQL。内置MCP服务器，让AI代理驱动您的API测试。该应用采用MIT许可协议，免费使用。

name: AXIS AI
tagline: Custom automation for B2B operations.
tagline_zh: B2B运营的定制自动化。
description: AXIS AI builds custom automation systems for B2B companies on Make.com, n8n, and custom APIs. We handle the workflows your team repeats every day: lead response, CRM updates, follow-ups, onboarding, invoicing, reporting. Fixed-scope projects starting at $1,500, delivered in one to four weeks. No hourly billing, no bloated retainers. Every client works directly with the founder. Three free tools on our site if you want to see how we think before booking anything.
description_zh: AXIS AI在Make.com、n8n和自定义API上为B2B公司构建定制自动化系统。我们处理您团队每天重复的工作流程：线索回复、客户关系管理（CRM）更新、跟进、入职、开票、报告。固定范围的项目起价为1500美元，一至四周内交付。无计时收费，无高额预付费用。每位客户直接与创始人合作。如果您想在预订任何服务之前了解我们的想法，我们网站上有三个免费工具供您使用。

name: SketchPop
tagline: Photo-to-coloring-page magic + smart coloring for kids
tagline_zh: 照片变涂色页的神奇功能+儿童智能涂色
description: SketchPop turns any child into an artist. Color 12 cute templates — star, cat, butterfly & more — or snap a photo and watch it become a line-art coloring page. Three engines (Normal/Fine/Expert) set the detail level. Standout feature: Smart region-lock keeps paint inside the lines — detecting boundaries, handling anti-aliased edges, even repairing gaps in line art. Plus 20 colors, 3 tools, 30-step undo. No ads, fully offline, 11 languages, 100% on-device processing for privacy.
description_zh: SketchPop让每个孩子都成为艺术家。选择12个可爱的模板——星星、猫咪、蝴蝶等等——或者拍张照片，看着它变成一幅线条涂色页。三种引擎（普通/精细/专家）可设置细节级别。突出特点：智能区域锁定功能，让画笔始终在线条内——检测边界、处理抗锯齿边缘，甚至修复线条艺术中的空白。此外，还有20种颜色、3种工具、30步撤销功能。无广告、完全离线、11种语言、100%设备内处理，保障隐私。

name: RUCKUS2 TKP
tagline: The ultimate street-surfing machine, pre-dialed to carve.
tagline_zh: 终极街头滑板机器，预设为精准刻划。
description: Step straight into deep street surfing with Ruckus2 TKP. Featuring a dual Traditional Kingpin geometry pre-dialed for pure carving right out of the box, next-gen PROFOC ESC power delivery, and tool-less Bravura quick-release hubs.
description_zh: Ruckus2 TKP让您轻松开启深度街道冲浪之旅。该产品采用双传统主销几何设计，预调至开箱即用的极致刻滑状态，搭载下一代PROFOC电子调速器（ESC）动力输出，并配备免工具安装的Bravura快速拆卸轮毂。

name: Flight Scraper
tagline: Scrape flight prices and schedules into clean datasets
tagline_zh: 将航班价格和时刻表信息整理成干净的数据集
description: Flight Scraper turns route and date searches into clean itinerary rows with prices, airlines, times, stops, baggage hints, and booking links. Useful for airfare monitoring, travel dashboards, price comparison tools, and quick route checks.
description_zh: Flight Scraper将路线和日期搜索结果转化为简洁的行程列表，其中包含价格、航空公司、时间、经停站、行李提示和预订链接。该工具对于机票价格监控、旅行仪表板、价格比较工具和快速路线检查非常有用。

name: OBaI
tagline: AI research desk to learn, backtest, and invest smarter.
tagline_zh: AI研究平台，用于学习、回测和更智能地投资。
description: Retail investors don’t have an information problem. They have a research bottleneck. OBaI gives them a self-hosted AI research desk: eight specialist agents for technicals, fundamentals, options, quant research, screening, and backtesting. Ask one plain-English question from the CLI, watch agents work live in the Web UI, and get one coordinated answer. Open-source. Local-first. Your data stays on your machine except the APIs you configure.
description_zh: 散户投资者并不存在信息问题。他们面临的是研究瓶颈。OBaI为他们提供了一个自托管的人工智能研究平台：八位专业代理，分别负责技术分析、基本面分析、期权、量化研究、筛选和回测。通过命令行界面（CLI）提出一个简单明了的问题，在网页用户界面（Web UI）中实时观察代理的工作情况，并获得一个协调一致的答案。开源。本地优先。除了您配置的API外，您的数据将保存在您的设备上。

name: AutoGtg
tagline: Revolutionizing automotive care in India
tagline_zh: 革新印度的汽车护理行业
description: AUTO GTG is a groundbreaking mobile app designed to transform the way India experiences vehicle care. From car repairs and spare parts procurement to roadside assistance and teleconsultation with certified mechanics, AUTOGTG is your one-stop solution for hassle-free automotive services. But it’s more than just an app, it’s a complete automotive ecosystem built for the modern Indian driver.
description_zh: AUTO GTG是一款具有开创性的移动应用，旨在彻底改变印度汽车护理的方式。从汽车维修、备件采购，到道路救援以及与认证技师的远程咨询，AUTO GTG为您提供一站式解决方案，让您轻松享受便捷的汽车服务。但它不仅仅是一款应用，它是一个为现代印度驾驶者打造的完整汽车生态系统。

name: Workout for Women: HomeFitPro
tagline: Daily home workouts and weight loss
tagline_zh: 日常家庭锻炼和减肥
description: HomeFitPro is a complete home workout and fitness app designed to help you stay fit, lose weight, and build strength without going to the gym.
description_zh: HomeFitPro是一款功能齐全的家庭锻炼和健身应用程序，旨在帮助您无需前往健身房即可保持身材、减轻体重并增强体力。

name: Qovlo
tagline: One Workflow for Every Team
tagline_zh: 每个团队一个工作流程
description: Run planning, people operations, approvals, docs, payments, and decisions from one business-friendly workspace.
description_zh: 在一个方便业务的工作空间中，管理计划、人员运营、审批流程、文档、付款和决策。

name: HearthNet
tagline: community AI mesh that works offline
tagline_zh: 离线工作的社区人工智能网格
description: Imagine the internet cable in your neighbourhood gets cut. Right now, that means no Google, no ChatGPT, no maps, no marketplace, no messaging. The cloud goes silent. HearthNet changes that. It's a local AI mesh that turns local devices in your neighbourhood — your gaming PC, your neighbour's old laptop, the Pi in someone's attic — into a shared, resilient AI cooperative. The answer is generated locally, three streets away. The cloud owns AI today. Communities will own it tomorrow.
description_zh: 想象一下，你所在社区的网线被切断了。现在，这意味着无法使用谷歌、ChatGPT、地图、市场和消息传递服务。云端陷入一片沉寂。HearthNet改变了这一现状。它是一个本地人工智能网格，可将你所在社区的本地设备——你的游戏电脑、邻居的旧笔记本电脑、某人阁楼里的树莓派——转变为一个共享的、有韧性的AI协作网络。答案在三街之外的地方本地生成。云端如今拥有AI。社区明天也将拥有它。

name: WarMap
tagline: Real-time global conflict map with AI risk intelligence
tagline_zh: 配备AI风险智能的实时全球冲突地图
description: Track real-time military conflicts, country risk levels, and geopolitical events on an interactive map. Risk assessments for 90+ countries, military power comparison, and live event tracking.
description_zh: 在交互式地图上实时追踪军事冲突、国家风险等级和地缘政治事件。提供90多个国家的风险评估、军事实力对比以及实时事件追踪。

name: XsiKOM
tagline: 3 AI bots that find jobs, write cover letters & auto-apply
tagline_zh: 3个AI机器人，可帮您找工作、撰写求职信并自动申请职位
description: 🤖 XsiKOM BewerbungsBOT is the first job application assistant with 3 specialized AI bots:AALIYAH - Your personal AI career advisor, XSI - Automatic application sender with PDF attachments✨1. Search jobs across 10+ portals worldwide 2. AI generates individual cover letters 3. Automatically attaches your resume, certificates & photo • International: USA, UK, EU, Remote • Multi-language: DE, EN, FR • 2FA & Quantum encryption • GDPR compliant Try it now: https://xsikom-bewerbungsbot.onrender.com
description_zh: 🤖 XsiKOM BewerbungsBOT是首个配备3个专业AI机器人的求职助手：AALIYAH - 您的个人AI职业顾问，XSI - 自动发送附带PDF附件的申请✨1. 在全球10多个门户网站上搜索工作 2. AI生成个性化求职信 3. 自动附加您的简历、证书和照片 • 国际：美国、英国、欧盟，远程工作 • 多语言：德语、英语、法语 • 双因素认证和量子加密 • 符合GDPR标准 立即试用：https://xsikom-bewerbungsbot.onrender.com

name: Dynamic API Platform
tagline: Open-source dynamic REST API platform
tagline_zh: 开源动态REST API平台
description: Zero-downtime API: new endpoints in admin panel save to MongoDB and serve on next request – no Node/nginx/container restart. Unlike Strapi, Directus, Express (routes baked in code or need restart), here routes are dynamic: save in UI, call instantly. Great for fast‑evolving APIs, MVPs, admin backends, integrations, or lightweight CMS alternative with REST + schemas + access control.
description_zh: 零停机API：管理面板中的新端点会保存到MongoDB并在下次请求时提供服务——无需重启Node/nginx/容器。与Strapi、Directus、Express（路由内嵌在代码中或需要重启）不同，这里的路由是动态的：在用户界面中保存，立即调用。非常适合快速发展的API、最小可行产品（MVP）、管理后端、集成，或作为REST + 模式 + 访问控制的轻量级内容管理系统（CMS）替代方案。

name: AIQORA
tagline: Hand-curated AI tools, prompts & live signal — for builders.
tagline_zh: 为开发者精心筛选的人工智能工具、提示和实时信号。
description: The hand-curated AI intelligence hub for serious builders. Browse 166+ AI tools, copy from 225+ tested prompts, run an LLM cost calculator across 13 models, take a 5-Q quiz to find your stack, and stay current with live AI news. Free to start. EN / العربية / 中文.
description_zh: 专为严谨的开发者打造的人工智能（AI）智能中心。浏览166+款AI工具，从225+个经过测试的提示中复制内容，在13个模型中运行大型语言模型（LLM）成本计算器，参加5问测验以了解你的技术栈，并随时获取最新的AI新闻。免费试用。英语/阿拉伯语/中文。

name: Grade9Plus
tagline: Free AI-powered GCSE revision for UK students
tagline_zh: 为英国学生提供免费的基于人工智能的GCSE复习服务
description: Grade9Plus is a completely free GCSE revision app for UK students. Features: - Practice quizzes across 11 subjects - AI Examiner — essays marked like a real examiner instantly - Mock exams with real exam conditions - Flashcards and revision notes - Predicted 2027 exam questions - No signup required Built by IRA TECH SOLUTIONS LTD. Android app coming soon!
description_zh: Grade9Plus是一款专为英国学生设计的完全免费的GCSE复习应用。功能包括： - 涵盖11门科目的练习测验 - AI阅卷官——像真实考官一样即时批改作文 - 模拟真实考试条件的模拟考试 - 闪卡和复习笔记 - 2027年预测考试题目 - 无需注册 由IRA TECH SOLUTIONS LTD.开发。安卓版即将上线！

name: Listening Post
tagline: Your Mac as the scrobbling hub for *all* your Apple devices
tagline_zh: 让你的Mac成为你所有苹果设备的记录中心
description: Listening Post is a macOS app that turns your Mac into the scrobbling hub for all your Apple devices. It can pick up music two ways: 1. Your Mac's mic identifies what's playing around you via Apple's ShazamKit 2. Anything you shazam on your iPhone, iPad, or Apple Watch syncs in over iCloud; no extra iOS apps necessary. LP posts your listens to the channels you've set up: scrobblers like Last.fm or ListenBrainz; local CSV/JSONL exports or Apple Shortcuts; social posts to BlueSky or Mastodon.
description_zh: Listening Post是一款macOS应用，可将您的Mac变成所有Apple设备的音乐记录中心。它可通过两种方式获取音乐：1. Mac的麦克风通过Apple的ShazamKit识别您周围播放的内容。2. 您在iPhone、iPad或Apple Watch上通过Shazam识别的任何内容都会通过iCloud同步；无需额外的iOS应用。LP会将您的收听记录发布到您设置的频道：Last.fm或ListenBrainz等音乐记录服务；本地CSV/JSONL导出或Apple Shortcuts；发布到BlueSky或Mastodon的社交帖子。

name: LogLens
tagline: No yapping. Clean python fix. Good for newbies
tagline_zh: 别废话。简洁明了的Python修复。适合新手
description: Point your phone at any Python error. Get a human-verified fix and a clear explanation - instantly. No login, no guesses, no AI nonsense.
description_zh: 将手机对准任何Python错误。立即获得人工验证的修复方案和清晰解释。无需登录，无需猜测，更无AI的胡乱操作。

name: Synca
tagline: Manage your performer team effortlessly
tagline_zh: 轻松管理您的表演者团队
description: Nền tảng quản lý đội nhảy, xếp ca, và điều phối chuyên nghiệp
description_zh: 管理团队、车队和职业调度平台

name: WorkCV
tagline: Build a professional UK CV without a monthly subscription.
tagline_zh: 无需每月订阅，即可打造一份专业的英国简历。
description: WorkCV is a focused CV builder for UK job applications. It is built around practical UK CV structure: clear contact details, a concise profile, recent experience first, education, skills, and recruiter-readable templates. Users can build and preview their CV before paying, then unlock the finished PDF with a one-time payment. WorkCV is positioned for people who need one strong CV and do not want a recurring CV-builder subscription.
description_zh: WorkCV是一款专为英国求职而设计的简历生成工具。它围绕实用的英国简历结构构建：清晰的联系方式、简洁的个人简介、先介绍近期工作经历、教育背景、技能，以及适合招聘人员阅读的模板。用户可以在付费前构建并预览自己的简历，然后通过一次性付款解锁完成的PDF版本。WorkCV的目标用户是那些需要一份出色的简历，但不想订阅定期更新简历生成工具的人。

name: Tutary
tagline: The calm home base for independent tutors
tagline_zh: 独立导师的宁静大本营
description: Tutary is the calm home base for independent tutors. The moment a lesson ends, one flow handles everything: a structured note, homework, payment, and an AI-drafted parent update you send on WhatsApp in a tap — all in under 2 minutes. Student profiles remember weak areas and what to focus on next. Payment tracking, prepaid packages, and a reusable lesson library round it out. Mobile-first, works offline. Free for up to 3 students, no card.
description_zh: Tutary是独立教师的安心大本营。课程一结束，一站式服务就能搞定一切：结构化笔记、作业、付款，以及一键通过WhatsApp发送由AI起草的家长更新——所有这些都在2分钟内完成。学生档案会记录薄弱环节以及下一步的关注点。此外，还提供付款跟踪、预付套餐和可重复使用的课程库。该平台以移动端为主，支持离线使用。最多可免费为3名学生服务，无需银行卡。

name: Product Canvas
tagline: Turn a greenfield product brief into a structured PRD
tagline_zh: 将绿地项目产品概要转化为结构化的产品需求文档（PRD）
description: Product Canvas lets you turn a product brief into a structured PRD, generate feature and milestone definitions using AI, invite collaborators and reviewers, capture comments, and lock alignment decisions with an audit trail. For Product Managers and builders. The PRD can be exported to coding agents for implementation.
description_zh: Product Canvas可助您将产品概要转化为结构化的产品需求文档（PRD），利用人工智能生成功能和里程碑定义，邀请合作者和审阅者，记录评论，并通过审计追踪锁定一致决策。专为产品经理和构建者设计。PRD可导出至编码代理以供实施。

name: Meridian Institute of AI
tagline: Free AI courses with real certificates - 20+ courses
tagline_zh: 免费人工智能课程，附真实证书 - 20多门课程
description: Free AI courses with certificates. Learn ChatGPT, Claude, machine learning, prompt engineering, AI in finance, law, healthcare & more. Earn credentials employers recognize. Great for students in school, and great for adults trying to find jobs and need to add to their resume.
description_zh: 免费AI课程，结业可获证书。学习ChatGPT、Claude、机器学习、提示工程、金融、法律、医疗保健等领域的AI知识。获得雇主认可的证书。非常适合在校学生，也适合想找工作并需要丰富简历的成年人。

name: ClearSkys
tagline: Should I stargaze tonight? Go/no go, any location
tagline_zh: 今晚我应该去看星星吗？去/不去，任何地点都可以
description: Will the sky be clear tonight? ClearSkys analyses cloud layers, moon phase, wind, humidity and atmospheric conditions for your location, then scores each hour while also providing a concise go/no go decision. Observer profiles for visual, astrophotography, planetary and aurora — or build your own. Free 7-day forecast, any location worldwide. Daily notifications and weekly digest available.
description_zh: 今晚天空会晴朗吗？ClearSkys会分析您所在位置的云层、月相、风力、湿度和大气状况，然后每小时进行评分，同时提供简洁的“去/不去”决策建议。提供视觉观测、天文摄影、行星观测和极光观测的观测者配置文件——或自行创建。全球任何地点均可获取7天免费天气预报。提供每日通知和每周摘要。

name: Kedarkul
tagline: The smarter way to run your school.
tagline_zh: 更智慧地管理你的学校。
description: Kedarkul is school management software for Indian schools — admissions, fees, attendance, salary and classes in one platform, with a free Android app.
description_zh: Kedarkul是一款专为印度学校设计的学校管理软件，集招生、收费、考勤、薪资和课程于一体，并提供免费的安卓应用。

name: Link Notepad
tagline: Free online notepad with shareable links.
tagline_zh: 免费在线记事本，带有可分享的链接。
description: LinkNotepad is a lightning-fast online notepad with shareable links and email reminders. Create note groups and share text notes instantly without sign-up.
description_zh: LinkNotepad是一款速度如闪电的在线记事本，提供可分享的链接和电子邮件提醒功能。无需注册，即可创建笔记组并即时共享文本笔记。

name: Unstuck Anywhere
tagline: The AI accelerator you can run from your couch
tagline_zh: 你可以在沙发上运行的AI加速器
description: Unstuck Anywhere gives founders AI-powered tools to validate ideas, build a business canvas, create pitch decks, and get a full launch package. No cohort. No waitlist. No equity. Just the structure of an accelerator, on your schedule.
description_zh: Unstuck Anywhere为创始人提供人工智能工具，帮助他们验证想法、构建商业画布、制作演示文稿，并获得全套启动方案。无需分批、无需等待名单、无需股权。只有加速器的结构，按照你的时间表进行。

name: Grass 2.0
tagline: The always-on computer for your coding agents
tagline_zh: 专为你的编码代理设计的永不休机的电脑
description: Grass gives your coding agents their own always-on cloud computer. Run Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode on Grass, then monitor progress, approve decisions, and push changes from your iPhone. Version 2 is faster, redesigned, and now live on the App Store.
description_zh: Grass为你的编码代理提供了专属的云端计算机，可随时使用。在Grass上运行Claude Code、Codex或OpenCode，然后通过你的iPhone监控进度、批准决策并推送更改。第二版速度更快，经过重新设计，现已在App Store上线。

name: DravonX
tagline: DRAVONX | PASSIVE INCOME GENERATOR
tagline_zh: DRAVONX | 被动收入生成器
description: Idle Game Faucet and Idle Earning Hub. Claim stored GOLD and run the next DravonX reward command.
description_zh: 闲置游戏水龙头和闲置收益中心。领取存储的金币并运行下一个DravonX奖励指令。

name: DATA HIT Tools
tagline: Know when demand peaks and if AI is citing you
tagline_zh: 了解需求高峰期以及AI是否引用了你的内容
description: Dashboards give you numbers. They rarely show you the rhythm: when your traffic actually peaks, how a Google SERP shifts through the year, or whether AI names you. DATA HIT Tools is four small tools for exactly that: your GA4 or Search Console data as a year-long spiral, your peak day-and-hour windows, the top 10 Google results for a keyword across 12 months, and which brands ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews cite for your topics. For solo SEOs and small agencies, priced like it.
description_zh: 数据面板为你提供数字。它们很少能展示节奏：你的流量何时达到峰值，谷歌搜索结果页面（SERP）一年中的变化，或者人工智能是否为你命名。DATA HIT工具正是为此而设计的四个小工具：将你的谷歌分析（GA4）或谷歌站长工具（Search Console）数据呈现为一年螺旋线，展示你的高峰日和高峰小时窗口，提供12个月内关键词的前10个谷歌搜索结果，以及ChatGPT和谷歌人工智能概述（Google AI Overviews）针对你的主题引用的品牌。对于独立SEO和小型机构而言，其定价合理。

name: Excel spreadsheets to MARC21 Converter
tagline: The fastest way to convert Excel to MARC21 for Koha
tagline_zh: 将Excel文件转换为Koha系统可用的MARC21格式的最快方法
description: Koha Excel to MARC Converter is a free, browser-based tool designed to simplify one of the most challenging tasks in library automation: converting spreadsheet data into MARC21 records that can be imported into Koha. Many libraries maintain bibliographic information in Microsoft Excel or CSV files during cataloging projects, retrospective conversion, or migration from legacy library management systems.
description_zh: Koha Excel到MARC转换器是一款免费的、基于浏览器的工具，旨在简化图书馆自动化中最具挑战性的任务之一：将电子表格数据转换为可导入Koha的MARC21记录。在编目项目、追溯转换或从旧版图书馆管理系统迁移的过程中，许多图书馆都会在Microsoft Excel或CSV文件中维护书目信息。

name: MarkPhoto
tagline: Cool Photo Border Tool – Level Up Your Film Photos Instantly
tagline_zh: 酷炫照片边框工具——瞬间提升你的电影照片格调
description: MarkPhoto Built for film photographers, MarkPhoto enables batch watermark and film border editing for Xiaohongshu, Douyin and Weibo posts. It provides Leica, Hasselblad, Fujifilm logos, Kodak Portra400, 120 film frames and smart auto layout. Features real-time preview, drag adjustment, dark flat design, supporting JPG, PNG, HEIC. It protects photo copyrights and boosts your works’ uniqueness. Loved by countless film fans. Send us your border & watermark demands for constant updates!
description_zh: MarkPhoto专为电影摄影师打造，可批量为小红书、抖音和微博帖子添加水印和电影边框。它提供徕卡、哈苏、富士胶片标志、柯达Portra400、120胶片边框和智能自动布局。具有实时预览、拖动调整、暗色扁平化设计等功能，支持JPG、PNG、HEIC格式。它保护照片版权，提升您作品的独特性。深受无数电影爱好者的喜爱。请将您的边框和水印需求发送给我们，以便我们不断更新！

name: Animegenius Hub
tagline: AI Manga Translator — AnimeGenius Hub
tagline_zh: AI漫画翻译器 — AnimeGenius Hub
description: Easily translate manga to any languages with our free AI manga translator. Upload manga pages and translate it without usage limit and sign-up.
description_zh: 使用我们的免费AI漫画翻译器，轻松将漫画翻译成任何语言。上传漫画页面即可进行翻译，无使用限制，也无需注册。

name: PixellPeep
tagline: Catch visual UI bugs before your users do
tagline_zh: 在用户发现之前，先发现视觉用户界面（UI）的缺陷
description: What makes PixellPeep different: • 6 comparison algos — pixel, perceptual & structural • 6 visualization modes — overlay, slider, heatmap & more • Bulk CSV comparison for hundreds of image pairs at once • Native SDKs for Playwright, Cypress & Puppeteer (npm install @pixellpeep/playwright) • AI-powered diff explanations that cut false positives • CI/CD ready — fail the build before the bug ships Free tier to start. Transparent pricing Built by the team at AAROHII AI SOLUTION.
description_zh: PixellPeep 的独特之处在于：• 6种比较算法 — 像素级、感知级和结构级• 6种可视化模式 — 叠加、滑块、热图等• 可一次性批量比较数百对图像的CSV文件• 为Playwright、Cypress和Puppeteer提供了原生SDK（通过npm安装@pixellpeep/playwright）• 基于AI的差异解释，减少误报• 支持CI/CD — 在错误发布前即构建失败免费试用。价格透明由AAROHII AI SOLUTION团队打造。

name: LumaNox
tagline: Private offline vault for photos and videos
tagline_zh: 照片和视频的私人离线存储空间
description: LumaNox is an ad-free private photo and video vault with on-device encryption, biometric lock, local AI privacy tools, and encrypted backup and restore.
description_zh: LumaNox是一款无广告的私人照片和视频存储空间，具备设备内加密、生物识别锁、本地人工智能隐私保护工具以及加密备份和恢复功能。

name: Remove Watermark from Video
tagline: Clean watermarks off your own videos — no blur, no crop.
tagline_zh: 清除您自己视频中的水印——无模糊，无裁剪。
description: Remove Watermark from Video is an online, AI-powered tool for cleaning watermarks off videos you own or have the rights to use. Instead of blurring or cropping, the AI rebuilds the area behind the mark, so your clip keeps its original resolution. Upload a short clip and download the result in your browser — nothing to install. 1 credit = 1 second; new accounts get 30 free credits, and failed jobs are refunded automatically.
description_zh: “视频去水印”是一款基于人工智能的在线工具，可清除您拥有或有权使用的视频中的水印。该工具不会采用模糊或裁剪的方式，而是利用人工智能重建水印后的区域，从而保持视频的原始分辨率。您只需上传一个简短的视频片段，即可在浏览器中下载处理后的结果，无需进行任何安装。1个信用点=1秒；新账户可获得30个免费信用点，处理失败的任务将自动退款。

name: Rizz Roast AI
tagline: Get brutally roasted or dangerously smooth in second with AI
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能，在短短几秒钟内，即可实现极致的烘焙效果或危险的顺滑口感
description: Rizz Roast AI is the ultimate AI-powered roast and rizz generator built for Gen Z. Upload a photo, type a message, or describe a situation and get savage roasts, smooth pickup lines, hilarious comebacks, and viral-worthy content instantly. Unlike generic AI chatbots, Rizz Roast AI specializes in humor, personality analysis, roasting battles, meme-style responses, and social sharing. Every result is designed to be screenshot-worthy and share
description_zh: Rizz Roast AI是一款专为Z世代打造的终极人工智能吐槽与调侃生成器。只需上传一张照片、输入一条消息或描述一个场景，即可立即获得犀利的吐槽、流畅的搭讪开场白、搞笑的反驳以及值得疯传的内容。与普通的AI聊天机器人不同，Rizz Roast AI专注于幽默、个性分析、吐槽大战、梗式回复以及社交分享。每个结果都值得截图分享

name: Oxlo.ai
tagline: Scale across AI models without scaling your bill
tagline_zh: 无需调整账单，即可扩展AI模型
description: Most AI teams pick a model first and discover the bill later. We built Oxlo.ai to change that. Access 35+ frontier AI models including DeepSeek V4 Pro, Kimi K2.6, GLM 5, Qwen, Llama, and Mistral through a single API. Compare models, calibrate responses, and choose the right model for each use case. Scale across AI models with predictable monthly subscriptions, benchmark-grade performance, generous usage limits, and we never train on your data.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能（AI）团队都是先选择模型，然后再发现账单。我们创建了Oxlo.ai来改变这一现状。通过单一API，您可以访问35个以上的前沿AI模型，包括DeepSeek V4 Pro、Kimi K2.6、GLM 5、Qwen、Llama和Mistral。您可以比较模型、校准响应，并为每个用例选择合适的模型。我们的AI模型可按可预测的月度订阅进行扩展，具有基准级性能和慷慨的使用限制，并且我们绝不会使用您的数据进行训练。

name: SelfShape AI
tagline: AI personal trainer for serious strength training
tagline_zh: AI私人教练，助力专业力量训练
description: SelfShape AI is an AI-native strength training app that builds your workout plan from your real routine, goals and equipment — then explains the reasoning behind every set, rep and progression. Your 24/7 AI coach adapts each session as you evolve, grounded in modern exercise science (ACSM) and a 260+ exercise taxonomy. No generic templates, no guesswork — a coach that actually tells you why. 14-day free trial.
description_zh: SelfShape AI是一款基于人工智能的力量训练应用，它能根据您的实际训练计划、目标和设备，为您定制训练方案，并解释每组训练、重复次数和进阶训练背后的原理。您的全天候AI教练会根据您的进步调整每次训练，这一切都基于现代运动科学（ACSM）和260多种运动分类法。没有通用模板，没有猜测——教练会真正告诉您原因。14天免费试用。

name: Wallbreak
tagline: Apply less. Apply better.
tagline_zh: 少用，但要用得更好。
description: Wallbreak: UK job search built around one idea - apply less, apply better. Search pulls UK roles from public sources. Visa Sponsorship mode surfaces sponsor-register organisations with trust notes (register presence is a signal, not a guarantee). CV Intelligence gives deterministic rule-based feedback - not a trained model or opaque score. Gate B prevents job-description text becoming evidence about you. Watchlist, Contact Intelligence. Beta — AI features may have limits. Plans TBD.
description_zh: Wallbreak：英国求职平台，围绕一个理念打造——少申请，精申请。该平台从公共资源中搜索英国职位。签证赞助模式会展示带有信任标记的赞助注册组织（注册存在是一种信号，而非保证）。简历智能提供基于确定性规则的反馈——而非训练有素的模型或不透明的评分。Gate B可防止职位描述文本成为关于你的证据。关注列表、联系人智能。测试版——人工智能功能可能存在局限性。计划待定。

name: Shopify Product Video Generator (Prompt)
tagline: Generate AI video prompts for your Shopify product pages
tagline_zh: 为您的Shopify产品页面生成AI视频提示
description: Upload product photos and get detailed AI video prompts designed for Shopify product galleries. Use them with Runway, Kling, Veo, SeeDance, Luma, Pika, or any AI video model. Most Shopify stores still rely on product photos alone. I noticed something while experimenting with AI video tools for e-commerce products: the difference between a great video and a terrible one usually wasn't the AI model. It was the prompt. So I built a tool around that idea.
description_zh: 上传产品照片，即可获得专为Shopify产品图库设计的详细AI视频提示。这些提示可与Runway、Kling、Veo、SeeDance、Luma、Pika或任何AI视频模型一起使用。大多数Shopify商店仍然仅依赖产品照片。在尝试使用电子商务产品的AI视频工具时，我注意到了一件事：一个优秀的视频和一个糟糕的视频之间的区别通常不在于AI模型，而在于提示。因此，我围绕这一想法构建了一个工具。

name: WA Group Extractor
tagline: Export WhatsApp group members to Excel in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可将WhatsApp群组成员导出到Excel
description: Export WhatsApp Web group contacts to Excel in seconds. Free up to 20 contacts per group. Pro available in BRL (R$ 49,99) or USD (US$ 9,99).
description_zh: 几秒钟内即可将WhatsApp网页群组联系人导出到Excel。每个群组最多可导出20个联系人。专业版可在巴西雷亚尔（BRL）支付（49.99雷亚尔）或美元（USD）支付（9.99美元）。

name: Trace and Trade
tagline: Insiders have to file. We read everything.
tagline_zh: 内部人士必须提交文件。我们会阅读所有内容。
description: AI-scored alerts for every Congress PTR, SEC Form 4 insider trade, 13D activist stake, federal contract, Polymarket whale bet, and more. Track Pelosi, Tuberville, Buffett, and the rest as soon as their filings publish. Features:
description_zh: 针对每次国会PTR、SEC表格4内幕交易、13D激进投资者股份、联邦合同、Polymarket大额交易等，提供人工智能评分警示。在佩洛西、图伯维尔、巴菲特等人的文件发布后立即进行跟踪。功能：

name: MealScan.ai
tagline: AI food tracker. Snap a photo, get exact macros instantly.
tagline_zh: AI食物追踪器。拍张照片，即可立即获取准确的营养成分。
description: Manual calorie counting is dead. MealScan.ai is a straightforward SaaS that calculates your macros and calories from a single photo. No clunky databases, no weighing food. Just take a picture and get accurate nutritional data instantly. Try it before signing up—guest scans map seamlessly to your account upon registration. Built for speed, accuracy, and zero friction. Stop typing, start scanning.
description_zh: 手动计算卡路里已经过时。MealScan.ai是一款简便的SaaS软件，只需一张照片，即可计算出你的宏量营养素和卡路里。无需繁琐的数据库，也无需称重食物。只需拍张照片，即可立即获得准确的营养数据。注册前先试用一下——访客扫描结果会在注册时无缝映射到您的账户。专为速度、准确性和零障碍体验而打造。停止打字，开始扫描。

name: EnigmaProxy
tagline: Reliable proxies for AI, scraping & automation
tagline_zh: 人工智能、数据抓取与自动化的可靠代理
description: EnigmaProxy offers secure residential and premium proxy services with zero-logs policy, global coverage, and personal support. Choose flexible proxy plans today.
description_zh: EnigmaProxy提供安全的住宅和高级代理服务，遵循零日志政策，覆盖全球，并提供个人支持。立即选择灵活的代理计划。

name: Prompt Bros
tagline: Plug-and-play AI prompt packs for busy business owners
tagline_zh: 即插即用的AI提示包，专为忙碌的企业主打造
description: Plug-and-play AI prompt packs for busy business owners. 50 copy-paste prompts per pack, one pack per job: small business, real estate, content, freelancing, and ecommerce. Paste into ChatGPT, swap your details, done.
description_zh: 为忙碌的企业主提供即插即用的AI提示包。每包包含50个可复制粘贴的提示，每个工作对应一个包：小型企业、房地产、内容创作、自由职业和电子商务。只需粘贴到ChatGPT中，替换你的详细信息，即可完成。

name: ToolsNova
tagline: 154 free browser-based tools — no signup, works offline
tagline_zh: 154款基于浏览器的免费工具——无需注册，可离线使用
description: ToolsNova is a collection of 154 free browser-based tools for developers, traders, students and everyday users. No signup. No installation.
