Everything runs in your browser. → Developer: JSON formatter, Base64, JWT decoder, Regex tester, UUID generator → Trading: Monte Carlo simulator, Kelly Criterion, Risk of Ruin calculator → Finance: EMI calculator, Loan comparison, Net worth tracker → 12 categories, works offline as a PWA 100% free, forever.
description_zh: ToolsNova是一个集合了154个基于浏览器的免费工具的平台，适用于开发者、交易者、学生和日常用户。无需注册，无需安装，所有工具均在浏览器中运行。→ 开发者工具：JSON格式化器、Base64解码器、JWT解码器、正则表达式测试器、UUID生成器 → 交易工具：蒙特卡洛模拟器、凯利公式、破产风险计算器 → 金融工具：等额本息计算器、贷款比较工具、净值追踪器 → 12大类工具，可作为渐进式网页应用（PWA）离线使用，永久100%免费。

name: Nomen — Brand Signal Intelligence
tagline: Catch brand mentions on HN & Reddit before they spread
tagline_zh: 在品牌提及在HN和Reddit上传播开来之前，及时捕捉到它们
description: Built this because every brand monitoring tool was $200/mo+ or required a sales call. Nomen monitors your brand on Hacker News and Reddit in real time — with AI sentiment analysis, noise filtering, and no alert caps. No setup calls. No enterprise contracts. No dashboards that need three tutorials to navigate. Solo plan: $29/mo. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. 20% off for Product Hunt launch — code PHLAUNCH20.
description_zh: 之所以开发这个工具，是因为市面上所有的品牌监测工具要么每月收费200美元以上，要么需要销售电话。Nomen可以实时监测你在Hacker News和Reddit上的品牌动态——具备AI情感分析、噪音过滤功能，且无警报上限。无需设置电话。无需企业合同。无需学习三遍教程才能学会使用的仪表板。单人计划：每月29美元。无隐藏费用。可随时取消。Product Hunt上线时享受20%折扣——折扣码PHLAUNCH20。

name: Hexabot v3
tagline: Self-hosted AI Workflow Automation
tagline_zh: 自托管人工智能工作流自动化
description: Source-available, self-hosted AI workflow automation engine built for JS/TS developers on NestJS under a Fair-Core license. Move beyond simple chatbots and orchestrate production-ready agents using developer-friendly, extensible architecture. Features: 📄 Declarative Workflows: Define complex agent logic via YAML. ⚙️ AI Agent Orchestration: Inject MCP tools and reusable actions. 🧠 Advanced Memory & RAG: Equip agents with persistent context.
description_zh: 这是一个基于Fair-Core许可协议，为NestJS上的JS/TS开发者构建的开源、自托管的AI工作流自动化引擎。它超越了简单的聊天机器人，使用开发者友好且可扩展的架构，能够编排出可投入生产的智能体。特性包括：📄 声明式工作流：通过YAML定义复杂的智能体逻辑。⚙️ AI智能体编排：注入MCP工具和可复用的操作。🧠 高级内存与RAG：为智能体配备持久上下文。

name: Self-Improvement & Mindset planner
tagline: Build positive daily habits
tagline_zh: 培养积极的日常习惯
description: Benefits • Build positive daily habits • Increase self-confidence and self-awareness • Develop a growth mindset • Improve focus and productivity • Stay motivated and accountable • Track personal progress effectively • Create healthier routines and better habits • Turn goals into actionable steps
description_zh: 益处 • 培养积极的日常习惯 • 提高自信心和自我意识 • 培养成长心态 • 提高专注力和生产力 • 保持动力和责任感 • 有效追踪个人进步 • 养成更健康的日常习惯 • 将目标转化为可执行的步骤

name: Atom Foundry
tagline: Understand why AI recommends some brands, not others
tagline_zh: 了解为什么人工智能会推荐某些品牌，而不推荐其他品牌
description: Atom Foundry is building the AI Commerce Intelligence platform. We help brands understand how AI systems discover, evaluate, trust and recommend products. Measure AI Visibility, Recommendation Intelligence, AI Trust and Decision Confidence across modern AI platforms. Our mission is to map the emerging AI Commerce Graph and help brands become recommendation-ready in the age of AI-driven commerce.
description_zh: Atom Foundry正在构建人工智能商业智能平台。我们帮助品牌了解人工智能系统如何发现、评估、信任和推荐产品。衡量现代人工智能平台上的AI可见性、推荐智能、AI信任度和决策信心。我们的使命是绘制新兴的人工智能商业图谱，并帮助品牌在人工智能驱动的商业时代做好推荐准备。

name: Sequence Tool
tagline: Create What Matters - Toolkit for Final Cut & Resolve
tagline_zh: 创造关键内容——Final Cut与Resolve工具包
description: Transcribe, normalize audio, remove fillers, and clean-up profanity entirely on-device. Fast search, organization, and clean export to Final Cut Pro or DaVinci Resolve Studio. Featured in Larry Jordan's Edit Smarter Newsletter. -On-device transcription (Parakeet V3) -Text-based editing -Search across projects and media -Filler-word and profanity cleanup -Remove silent moments -Keyword generation including in export for Final Cut Pro -Export workflows for Final Cut Pro and DaVinci Resolve
description_zh: 在设备上完成音频转录、标准化、填充词去除以及脏话清理。快速搜索、整理，并干净利落地导出到Final Cut Pro或DaVinci Resolve Studio。该功能已在Larry Jordan的《编辑更聪明》通讯中推荐。-设备上转录（Parakeet V3）-基于文本的编辑-跨项目和媒体搜索-填充词和脏话清理-去除静音片段-生成关键词，包括在导出到Final Cut Pro时-为Final Cut Pro和DaVinci Resolve导出工作流程

name: Dockly
tagline: The OS Gateway & Command Center for AI Agents
tagline_zh: AI代理的操作系统网关与指挥中心
description: AI agents use expensive 4MB screenshots just to click a browser tab. Dockly 2.0 fixes this. For Humans: A sleek sidebar unifying tabs across all Chrome profiles. For AI: A local REST API that translates your browser into a 2KB JSON map to save 95% on token costs.
description_zh: AI代理仅为了点击一个浏览器标签页，就会使用高成本的4MB截图。Dockly 2.0解决了这个问题。对于人类用户：一个简洁的侧边栏，将所有Chrome配置文件中的标签页统一起来。对于AI：一个本地REST API，将您的浏览器转换为2KB的JSON映射，从而节省95%的令牌成本。

name: Wire RN
tagline: Generative UI for React Native, rendered native
tagline_zh: React Native的生成式用户界面，原生渲染
description: Wire RN is an open-source (MIT) generative-UI SDK for React Native. An AI agent sends a UI payload over A2UI, Google's open protocol for agent-driven interfaces, and Wire RN renders it as schema-validated native components. Examples such as agent-driven onboarding, in-app coaching, and dynamic flows on mobile, where every other generative-UI SDK only does web.
description_zh: Wire RN是一款适用于React Native的开源（MIT许可）生成式用户界面（UI）软件开发工具包（SDK）。人工智能（AI）代理通过A2UI（谷歌为代理驱动界面开发的开放协议）发送UI有效负载，Wire RN将其呈现为经过模式验证的原生组件。例如，代理驱动的入职流程、应用内辅导以及移动设备上的动态流程，而其他生成式UI SDK仅支持网页端。

name: Is it Slop?
tagline: Free AI text checker based on the latest research
tagline_zh: 基于最新研究的免费AI文本检查工具
description: Most AI detectors out there either miss obvious AI phrasing or are just top of funnels to get naive students to pay, offering "human rewrites". Isitslop catches the AI in your text, tells you your "reading grade" and gives you legit advice based on your patterns, so you can be confident your writing sounds like you, all of it without ever stealing your information!
description_zh: 市面上大多数AI检测器要么漏掉明显的AI措辞，要么只是作为吸引无知学生付费的噱头，提供“人工重写”服务。Isitslop能捕捉到你文本中的AI，告诉你你的“阅读水平”，并根据你的模式给你提供合理的建议，这样你就可以确信你的写作听起来像你自己，而这一切都不会窃取你的信息！

name: Sello
tagline: Your AI stylist that knows your colors, closet & calendar
tagline_zh: 你的AI造型师，了解你的肤色、衣橱和日程安排
description: StyleAI solves "what should I wear?" — for good. It generates daily outfits using only clothes you own, filtered by your personal color season, today's weather, and your plans (office, date, gym, travel). Upload a garment photo → AI classifies it automatically. Set your plans → get 3–5 ranked outfits with color reasoning. Plus a marketplace where every listing is pre-filtered to match your palette. Your closet, finally working for you.
description_zh: StyleAI彻底解决了“我该穿什么？”的问题。它仅使用你已有的衣物，并根据你的个人色彩季节、当天天气以及你的计划（上班、约会、健身、旅行）进行筛选，生成每日穿搭。上传一张衣物照片→AI会自动对其进行分类。设定你的计划→根据色彩搭配原理，获得3-5套排名靠前的穿搭。此外，还有一个市场，其中每个商品都经过预先筛选，以匹配你的色调。你的衣橱，终于为你服务了。

name: Mimir Systems
tagline: The research answer tool that can't fake a citation
tagline_zh: 无法伪造引用的研究答案工具
description: Mimir answers a research question with a cited source in seconds, drawn from millions of papers in materials science, chemistry, and physics. Every citation points to a real paper you can open. The system retrieves from indexed literature instead of generating text, so it cannot invent a reference. Free foredu andgov. Start your 7 free trial now.
description_zh: Mimir能在几秒钟内从材料科学、化学和物理领域的数百万篇论文中，引用一个来源来回答研究问题。每个引用都指向一篇你可以打开的真实论文。该系统是从索引文献中检索信息，而不是生成文本，因此它无法编造参考文献。免费试用foredu和gov。立即开始您的7天免费试用。

name: Kit Hub Tool
tagline: your ultimate web toolkit for SEO images, and downloads
tagline_zh: 您用于SEO图片和下载的终极网络工具包
description: KitHubTool provide tools for daily work easily. And also kithubtool news, blog, latest technology tools and update.
description_zh: KitHubTool为日常工作提供便捷工具。同时，您还可以获取Kithubtool的新闻、博客、最新技术工具以及更新信息。

name: Pacerio
tagline: Running ans nutrition
tagline_zh: 跑步与营养
description: Pacerio est l'appli où ta nutrition s'adapte à ton plan d'entraînement : tes besoins en énergie s'ajustent à tes séances. Suivi running + nutrition réunis, un coach IA qui te dit quoi faire. Beta en cours, lancement 2026.
description_zh: Pacerio是一款让你的营养摄入与训练计划相匹配的应用程序：你的能量需求会根据你的训练课程进行调整。结合跑步跟踪和营养建议，AI教练会告诉你该怎么做。目前处于测试阶段，2026年正式发布。

name: VocaEasy
tagline: Learn English vocabulary in context. Practice it with AI.
tagline_zh: 在语境中学习英语词汇。用人工智能进行练习。
description: Most English learners memorize words but struggle to actually use them. VocaEasy helps you save words from real context, organize them into focused lists, and practice them through AI conversations that naturally reuse every word until it becomes part of your active vocabulary.
description_zh: 大多数英语学习者虽然能记住单词，但在实际使用时却感到困难。VocaEasy能助您从真实语境中提取单词，将它们整理成有针对性的列表，并通过人工智能对话进行练习，这些对话会自然地重复使用每个单词，直至其成为您常用词汇的一部分。

name: NotebookLM 2.0 Is a Game Changer
tagline: Auto research, analyze, and create with your own data
tagline_zh: 使用您自己的数据进行自动研究、分析和创建
description: Google quietly upgraded NotebookLM into something much more powerful than a simple AI summarizer. In this video, I break down how the new agentic NotebookLM workflow can research, analyze data, generate business insights, and turn raw information into usable outputs like reports, roadmaps, slides, and financial plans. I walk through a real business example, show why the old workflow was limited, and give you a practical playbook for using NotebookLM as a research assistant for your business.
description_zh: 谷歌悄然将NotebookLM升级为远超简单AI摘要工具的强大功能。在本视频中，我将详细介绍新的代理式NotebookLM工作流程如何进行研究、分析数据、生成商业见解，并将原始信息转化为报告、路线图、幻灯片和财务计划等可用输出。我将通过一个真实的商业案例，展示旧工作流程的局限性，并为您提供一份实用的手册，指导您如何将NotebookLM作为业务研究助理。

name: Fast Estimate Maker
tagline: Launches FastEstimateMaker to support solo businesses!
tagline_zh: 推出FastEstimateMaker，助力个体商户！
description: The all-in-one platform for contractors: estimates, invoicing, follow-ups, canvassing, payments. Fast Estimate Maker lets you speak the job from the driveway and take pictures and sends a branded, signable estimate in ~60 seconds — because in home services, whoever quotes first wins. Clients get a portal to approve, pay, and see photos of the finished work. Built-in invoicing, AI follow-ups, online booking, and a door-knocking lead map round it out. No app, flat $29/mo, free to start.
description_zh: 承包商的一站式平台：估价、开票、跟进、宣传、付款。快速估价生成器让您在车道上就能描述工作情况、拍照，并在约60秒内发送一份带有品牌标识且可签字的估价单——因为在上门服务中，谁先报价谁就占得先机。客户会获得一个门户网站，用于批准、支付和查看完工照片。内置开票功能、人工智能跟进、在线预约和上门拜访路线图，一应俱全。无需下载应用程序，每月固定费用29美元，免费试用。

name: Viral Video Generator (Beta)
tagline: Generate viral videos for your app or SaaS - By SocialClaw
tagline_zh: 为您的应用或SaaS制作病毒式传播视频 - 由SocialClaw提供
description: Turn your app screenshots or a screen recording into a viral-worthy UGC video or photo carousel. Real creator hooks, AI-written captions, ready to post.
description_zh: 将您的应用截图或屏幕录制转化为值得病毒式传播的用户生成内容（UGC）视频或照片轮播。真正的创作者吸引点，人工智能编写的标题，随时可以发布。

name: Zylio
tagline: AI Procurement Optimization & Invoice Compliance Platform
tagline_zh: 人工智能采购优化与发票合规平台
description: Zylio automatise vos factures, devis, contrats et rapprochement bancaire grâce à l'IA. Économies 15%, conformité 100%. Demandez votre démo.
description_zh: Zylio通过人工智能自动化您的发票、报价、合同和银行结算。节省15%，合规率100%。欢迎申请演示。

name: Voicetypr 2.0
tagline: Stop typing, Start talking to your apps and agents
tagline_zh: 别打字了，开始和你的应用及智能体对话吧
description: Voicetypr 2.0 is a ground-up rebuild — now your AI agents can hear you. A new Agent CLI + local API lets any agent or script pull your voice as text/JSON, on-device. OpenClaw, Hermes, and Nanoclaw can listen with no per-minute transcriptio API and no audio sent to the cloud. New in 2.0: • Agent CLI & local API: voice in, text/JSON out • Remote sharing over your Wi-Fi • Way more powerful formatting: 6 modes + per-app rules • Optional cloud engines One-time, no subscription.n
description_zh: Voicetypr 2.0 是一款全新重建的产品——现在，您的AI代理可以听到您的声音了。全新的Agent CLI +本地API允许任何代理或脚本在设备上将您的语音转换为文本/JSON。OpenClaw、Hermes和Nanoclaw可以在不使用每分钟转录API且不将音频发送到云端的情况下进行监听。2.0版本新增功能：• Agent CLI & 本地API：语音输入，文本/JSON输出• 通过Wi-Fi进行远程共享• 更强大的格式化功能：6种模式+每个应用程序的规则• 可选云引擎一次性购买，无需订阅。

name: Zeninvo
tagline: Free invoicing for freelancers — get paid faster
tagline_zh: 自由职业者免费开票——更快收到付款
description: Zeninvo is free invoice software for freelancers and small businesses — no credit card, no trial, no catch. Create professional, branded invoices in seconds with a visual template designer, send them by email or shareable link, track payments, and get paid faster. Most tools lock basics behind paywalls; Zeninvo keeps invoicing genuinely free and dead simple. Add your logo, pick a theme, export to PDF, done.
description_zh: Zeninvo是一款专为自由职业者和小型企业设计的免费发票软件——无需信用卡，无需试用，无任何附加条件。通过可视化模板设计器，您可以在几秒钟内创建出专业且带有品牌特色的发票，并通过电子邮件或可分享的链接发送，同时还能追踪付款情况，更快地收到付款。大多数工具都会将基本功能隐藏在付费门槛之后；而Zeninvo则始终保持发票功能的真正免费且极其简便。只需添加您的徽标，选择一个主题，导出为PDF，即可完成操作。

tagline: The social media scheduler that actually posts
tagline_zh: 真正能发布内容的社交媒体排程工具
description: Schedule to every platform, then get the platform's own post link back as proof each post went live. Auto-retry on fails, token-expiry alerts, no silent failures. Flat-rate from $25/mo, never per-seat or per-channel. Bluesky + Mastodon built in. 7-day free trial.
description_zh: 将内容发布到每个平台，然后获取平台自己的帖子链接作为每个帖子已发布的证明。失败时自动重试，出现令牌过期时发出警报，不会出现无提示失败的情况。包月费用统一为$25起，不按座位或频道收费。内置Bluesky和Mastodon功能。提供7天免费试用。

In this video, I break down how the new agentic NotebookLM workflow can research, analyze data, generate business insights, and turn raw information into usable outputs like reports, roadmaps, slides, and financial plans. I walk through a real business example, show why the old workflow was limited, and give you a practical playbook for using NotebookLM as a research assistant for your business.
description_zh: 谷歌悄然将NotebookLM升级为远超简单AI摘要工具的强大功能。在本视频中，我将详细介绍新的代理式NotebookLM工作流程如何进行研究、分析数据、生成商业洞察，并将原始信息转化为报告、路线图、幻灯片和财务计划等可用输出。我将通过一个真实的商业案例，展示旧工作流程的局限性，并为您提供一份实用的攻略，指导您如何将NotebookLM作为您的业务研究助手。

name: Fast Estimate Maker
tagline: Launches FastEstimateMaker to support solo businesses!
tagline_zh: 推出FastEstimateMaker，助力个人创业！
description: The all-in-one platform for contractors: estimates, invoicing, follow-ups, canvassing, payments. Fast Estimate Maker lets you speak the job from the driveway and take pictures and sends a branded, signable estimate in ~60 seconds — because in home services, whoever quotes first wins. Clients get a portal to approve, pay, and see photos of the finished work. Built-in invoicing, AI follow-ups, online booking, and a door-knocking lead map round it out. No app, flat $29/mo, free to start.
description_zh: 承包商的一站式平台：估价、开票、跟进、拉票、付款。快速估价生成器让您在车道上就能描述工作情况、拍照，并在约60秒内发送一份带有品牌标识、可签名的估价单——因为在上门服务中，谁先报价谁就胜出。客户会获得一个门户网站，用于批准、支付和查看完工照片。内置开票功能、人工智能跟进、在线预约和上门拜访路线图，一应俱全。无需下载应用程序，每月固定费用29美元，免费试用。

name: Viral Video Generator (Beta)
tagline: Generate viral videos for your app or SaaS - By SocialClaw
tagline_zh: 为您的应用或SaaS制作病毒式传播视频 - 由SocialClaw提供
description: Turn your app screenshots or a screen recording into a viral-worthy UGC video or photo carousel. Real creator hooks, AI-written captions, ready to post.
description_zh: 将您的应用截图或屏幕录制内容，转化为值得病毒式传播的用户生成内容（UGC）视频或照片轮播。真正的创作者吸引点，人工智能编写的标题，随时准备发布。

name: Kedarkul
tagline: The smarter way to run your school.
tagline_zh: 管理学校的更明智方式。
description: Kedarkul is school management software for Indian schools — admissions, fees, attendance, salary and classes in one platform, with a free Android app.
description_zh: Kedarkul是一款专为印度学校设计的学校管理软件，集招生、收费、考勤、薪资和课程于一体，并配有免费的安卓应用程序。

name: Klipzo
tagline: 82 tools. No signup. No ads. No nonsense
tagline_zh: 82款工具。无需注册。无广告。无废话
description: Access 82 free online tools for PDF, image, text, audio, video, and conversion tasks. 100% private — no signup required, with most tools running directly in your browser.
description_zh: 访问82款免费在线工具，涵盖PDF、图像、文本、音频、视频及转换任务。100%隐私保护——无需注册，大多数工具可直接在浏览器中运行。

name: Link Notepad
tagline: Free online notepad with shareable links.
tagline_zh: 免费在线记事本，可生成可分享的链接。
description: LinkNotepad is a lightning-fast online notepad with shareable links and email reminders. Create note groups and share text notes instantly without sign-up.
description_zh: LinkNotepad是一款速度如闪电的在线记事本，提供可分享的链接和电子邮件提醒功能。无需注册，即可创建笔记组并即时分享文本笔记。

name: LED Banner Plus
tagline: Elegant Led Banner
tagline_zh: 优雅的LED横幅
description: Turn your iPhone or iPad into a bright LED banner display! LED Banner Plus lets you create eye-catching scrolling text messages for concerts, parties, airports, bars, meetings, events, and more. FEATURES • Large LED scrolling text display • Multiple LED colors and backgrounds • Adjustable text size and scrolling speed • Portrait and landscape modes • Quick preset messages • Glow Effect • Blink Effect • Rainbow Animation • Wave Animation • Full-screen display • Easy-to-use interface
description_zh: 将您的iPhone或iPad变成一个明亮的LED横幅显示屏！LED Banner Plus让您能够为音乐会、派对、机场、酒吧、会议、活动等创建引人注目的滚动文字信息。特点 • 大尺寸LED滚动文字显示屏 • 多种LED颜色和背景 • 可调节文字大小和滚动速度 • 竖屏和横屏模式 • 快速预设信息 • 发光效果 • 闪烁效果 • 彩虹动画 • 波浪动画 • 全屏显示 • 易于使用的界面

name: Aqua Answers Pool Company
tagline: Pool Services in Deer Park
tagline_zh: 鹿园泳池服务
description: For over a decade, we have been making dreams a reality in Greater Houston, Texas. Our commitment to excellence is evident in every project, ensuring we build more than a pool but an oasis you’ve dreamed of. That is because we focus on more than the pool but the whole picture. From the moment you break ground to the final touches, maintenance, and upkeep, Aqua Answers is with you every step of the way.
description_zh: 十多年来，我们一直在德克萨斯州大休斯顿地区将梦想变为现实。我们对卓越的承诺在每一个项目中都显而易见，确保我们建造的不仅仅是一个游泳池，而是一个你梦寐以求的绿洲。这是因为我们关注的不仅仅是游泳池，而是整体规划。从破土动工到最后的细节处理、维护和保养，Aqua Answers将全程陪伴您。

name: Grass 2.0
tagline: The always-on computer for your coding agents
tagline_zh: 专为你的编码代理设计的全天候计算机
description: Grass gives your coding agents their own always-on cloud computer. Run Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode on Grass, then monitor progress, approve decisions, and push changes from your iPhone. Version 2 is faster, redesigned, and now live on the App Store.
description_zh: Grass为你的编码代理提供了专属的云端计算机，可随时在线。在Grass上运行Claude Code、Codex或OpenCode，然后通过你的iPhone监控进度、批准决策并推送更改。第二版速度更快，经过重新设计，现已在App Store上线。

name: https://www.shopncentives.com/
tagline: shopncentives
tagline_zh: 购物激励
description: Hey PH! 👋 Maker here. Most Shopify stores are loaded with ghost scripts apps that were uninstalled months ago but left their tracking pixels and JS behind, still loading on every page and killing PageSpeed scores. The scanner fingerprints 133+ known third-party tools and cross-references them against what's actually in your store's source. You get a full list of what's loading, what it is, and whether it should be there. Free scan takes about 60 seconds, no install, no login.
description_zh: 嘿，PH！👋 我是这里的开发者。大多数Shopify商店都装载了数月前已卸载的幽灵脚本应用，但它们的跟踪像素和JavaScript脚本却留了下来，仍然在每个页面上加载，严重拉低了PageSpeed分数。我们的扫描工具能够识别133种以上的已知第三方工具，并将其与您商店源代码中的实际内容交叉比对。您将获得一个完整的列表，显示正在加载的内容、其具体信息以及是否应存在。免费扫描大约需要60秒，无需安装，也无需登录。

name: The Space Within
tagline: Interactive emotional diary connecting you with the space
tagline_zh: 互动情感日记，将你与空间紧密相连
description: The Space Within is an interactive emotional diary that connects your daily mood to real cosmic events - solar activity, lunar phases, and geomagnetic conditions. Through gamified check-ins, AI-powered insights, and immersive rituals, we help young adults build self-awareness and emotional resilience. It's not just a tracker - it's a daily ritual that turns self-care into a beautiful, scientific, and playful experience.
description_zh: “内在空间”是一款互动情感日记应用，它将你的日常情绪与真实的宇宙事件——太阳活动、月相和地磁条件——联系起来。通过游戏化的签到、基于人工智能的洞察和沉浸式的仪式，我们帮助年轻人建立自我意识和情感韧性。它不仅仅是一个追踪工具，更是一种日常仪式，将自我关怀转化为一种美丽、科学且有趣的体验。

name: DravonX
tagline: DRAVONX | PASSIVE INCOME GENERATOR
tagline_zh: DRAVONX | 被动收入生成器
description: Idle Game Faucet and Idle Earning Hub. Claim stored GOLD and run the next DravonX reward command.
description_zh: 闲置游戏水龙头和闲置收益中心。领取存储的金币，并运行下一个DravonX奖励指令。

name: DATA HIT Tools
tagline: Know when demand peaks and if AI is citing you
tagline_zh: 了解需求高峰何时出现，以及是否被人工智能引用
description: Dashboards give you numbers. They rarely show you the rhythm: when your traffic actually peaks, how a Google SERP shifts through the year, or whether AI names you. DATA HIT Tools is four small tools for exactly that: your GA4 or Search Console data as a year-long spiral, your peak day-and-hour windows, the top 10 Google results for a keyword across 12 months, and which brands ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews cite for your topics. For solo SEOs and small agencies, priced like it.
description_zh: 数据面板为你提供数字。它们很少能展示节奏：你的流量何时达到峰值，谷歌搜索结果页面（SERP）一年中的变化，或者人工智能是否为你命名。DATA HIT工具正是为此而设计的四个小工具：将你的谷歌分析（GA4）或搜索控制台数据以螺旋线形式展示一年，显示你的高峰日和高峰小时窗口，展示12个月内某个关键词的前10个谷歌搜索结果，以及ChatGPT和谷歌人工智能概述（Google AI Overviews）针对你的主题引用的品牌。对于独立SEO和小型机构而言，这样的定价很合理。

name: PromptMatrix AI
tagline: Turn raw concepts into enterprise-grade system prompts.
tagline_zh: 将原始概念转化为企业级系统的提示。
description: A powerful prompt engineering workbench. PromptMatrix programmatically restructures basic thoughts into comprehensive, structured system prompts. Fully optimized with targeted frameworks for Midjourney v6 layout arrays, Claude Code systems, and DeepSeek reasoning logic.
description_zh: 一个强大的提示工程工作台。PromptMatrix能够以编程方式将基本思路重构为全面、结构化的系统提示。该工作台已针对Midjourney v6布局阵列、Claude Code系统和DeepSeek推理逻辑进行了全面优化，并采用了相应的框架。

name: RepWave — Reputation Intelligence
tagline: AI reputation & sentiment intel for people & brands
tagline_zh: 面向个人和品牌的AI声誉与情绪智能
description: RepWave is AI reputation & sentiment intelligence for creators, brands, and product or movie launches. It reads what the world is saying about you across news, video and community — then tells you what people actually feel, who's driving it, and what to do next, in plain English. Get a live Reputation Score, audience-vs-media gaps, crisis alerts, narratives, and AI reply drafts. Connect Instagram for per-comment sentiment. Understands Hindi, Hinglish & 40+ languages. Free to start.
description_zh: RepWave是一款面向创作者、品牌以及产品或电影发布的人工智能声誉与情感分析工具。它能够解读全球各地新闻、视频和社区中关于您的言论，然后用通俗易懂的语言告诉您人们的真实感受、背后的推动因素以及下一步的行动建议。您将获得实时声誉评分、受众与媒体之间的差距分析、危机预警、故事叙述以及人工智能回复草稿。连接Instagram可获取每条评论的情感分析。该工具支持印地语、印式英语以及40多种语言。免费试用。

name: Animegenius Hub
tagline: AI Manga Translator — AnimeGenius Hub
tagline_zh: AI漫画翻译器 — AnimeGenius Hub
description: Easily translate manga to any languages with our free AI manga translator. Upload manga pages and translate it without usage limit and sign-up.
description_zh: 使用我们的免费AI漫画翻译器，轻松将漫画翻译成任何语言。上传漫画页面即可进行翻译，无使用限制，也无需注册。

name: Free JPEG XL Converter
tagline: Convert JXL, HEIC & more — free, private, in your browser
tagline_zh: 转换JXL、HEIC等格式 — 免费、私密，在您的浏览器中完成
description: A free image converter for JPEG XL (JXL), HEIC, PNG, JPG & WebP that runs 100% in your browser. No uploads, no sign-up, no watermarks — your files never leave your device. Powered by WebAssembly, so it's fast and fully private. Includes a built-in JXL viewer.
description_zh: 一款适用于JPEG XL（JXL）、HEIC、PNG、JPG和WebP的免费图像转换器，100%在浏览器中运行。无需上传、无需注册、无水印——您的文件永远不会离开您的设备。该工具由WebAssembly提供支持，因此转换速度快且完全私密。还包括一个内置的JXL查看器。

name: MaskotIA
tagline: AI-powered veterinary ecosystem for clinics and pet owners
tagline_zh: 面向诊所和宠物主人的基于人工智能的兽医生态系统
description: MaskotIA is an AI-powered veterinary ecosystem designed for clinics and pet owners. It helps veterinarians manage appointments, medical records, prescriptions, inventory and client retention while giving pet owners reminders, digital records and smart QR pet tags.
description_zh: MaskotIA是一个专为诊所和宠物主人设计的、由人工智能驱动的兽医生态系统。它帮助兽医管理预约、医疗记录、处方、库存和客户留存，同时为宠物主人提供提醒、数字记录和智能二维码宠物标签。

name: PixellPeep
tagline: Catch visual UI bugs before your users do
tagline_zh: 在用户发现之前，先发现视觉用户界面（UI）的缺陷
description: What makes PixellPeep different: • 6 comparison algos — pixel, perceptual & structural • 6 visualization modes — overlay, slider, heatmap & more • Bulk CSV comparison for hundreds of image pairs at once • Native SDKs for Playwright, Cypress & Puppeteer (npm install @pixellpeep/playwright) • AI-powered diff explanations that cut false positives • CI/CD ready — fail the build before the bug ships Free tier to start. Transparent pricing Built by the team at AAROHII AI SOLUTION.
description_zh: PixellPeep 的独特之处在于：• 6种比较算法 — 像素级、感知级和结构级• 6种可视化模式 — 叠加、滑块、热图等• 可一次性批量比较数百对图像的CSV文件• 为Playwright、Cypress和Puppeteer提供了原生SDK（通过npm安装@pixellpeep/playwright）• 基于AI的差异解释，减少误报• 支持CI/CD — 在错误发布前即构建失败提供免费试用。价格透明由AAROHII AI SOLUTION团队打造。

name: VoiceOne
tagline: Translate text and readit aloud using Chrome's built-in AI.
tagline_zh: 使用Chrome内置的人工智能翻译文本并大声朗读。
description: Translate selected text and read it aloud using Chrome's built-in on-device AI. Right-click any selection to translate and speak.
description_zh: 使用Chrome内置的设备端AI翻译所选文本并朗读。右键单击任何所选内容即可进行翻译和朗读。

name: GitHub
tagline: Custom Linux OS bypassing GTK4 theme limits dynamically.
tagline_zh: 自定义Linux操作系统，动态绕过GTK4主题限制。
description: A custom distribution built from scratch to bypass GTK4/libadwaita theming restrictions. Instead of destructively overriding system CSS, Kawaiintu uses a Python daemon to dynamically hook into GTK 4.0 UI selectors. This enables real-time hue rotation across the desktop environment without modifying core system files.
description_zh: Kawaiintu是一款从零开始构建的自定义发行版，旨在绕过GTK4/libadwaita的主题限制。它没有破坏性地覆盖系统CSS，而是使用Python守护进程动态挂接到GTK 4.0 UI选择器。这使得用户能够在桌面环境中实时旋转色调，而无需修改核心系统文件。

name: Flarev
tagline: Personalized AI video for every new GoHighLevel lead
tagline_zh: 为每一位新加入GoHighLevel的潜在客户，提供个性化AI视频
description: Flarev automatically sends a personalized AI spokesperson video to every new lead in your GoHighLevel pipeline. No recording, no code, no manual effort. When a contact enters GHL, Flarev writes a custom script with their name, renders an AI avatar video via HeyGen, and drops the link into their contact record. Your workflow sends it via SMS or email. Set it up once. Every lead gets a personal video. Installs in 5 minutes.
description_zh: Flarev会自动向您GoHighLevel渠道中的每一位新潜在客户发送个性化的AI代言人视频。无需录制、无需代码、无需人工操作。当联系人进入GHL时，Flarev会编写一个包含其姓名的自定义脚本，通过HeyGen渲染一个AI头像视频，并将链接添加到他们的联系人记录中。您的工作流程可以通过短信或电子邮件发送。只需设置一次。每位潜在客户都会收到一个个性化视频。5分钟内即可安装。

name: Learner Quiz
tagline: Free 60-second VARK quiz that reveals your learning style
tagline_zh: 免费的60秒VARK测试，揭示你的学习风格
description: Find out if you're a visual, auditory, reading, or kinesthetic learner in under 60 seconds. Based on the VARK framework used by educators worldwide. Answer 10 quick questions and get instant, personalized study strategies tailored to your learning style. No signup, no data stored. Free forever. Whether you're a student, self-learner, or professional — study smarter starting today.
description_zh: 60秒内即可了解你是视觉型、听觉型、阅读型还是动觉型学习者。该测试基于全球教育工作者所使用的VARK框架。回答10个简短问题，即可立即获得根据你的学习风格量身定制的个性化学习策略。无需注册，数据永不存储。永久免费。无论你是学生、自学成才者还是专业人士，从今天开始，用更聪明的方式学习。

name: Oxlo.ai
tagline: Scale across AI models without scaling your bill
tagline_zh: 无需调整账单，即可扩展AI模型规模
description: Most AI teams pick a model first and discover the bill later. We built Oxlo.ai to change that. Access 35+ frontier AI models including DeepSeek V4 Pro, Kimi K2.6, GLM 5, Qwen, Llama, and Mistral through a single API. Compare models, calibrate responses, and choose the right model for each use case. Scale across AI models with predictable monthly subscriptions, benchmark-grade performance, generous usage limits, and we never train on your data.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能（AI）团队都是先选择模型，然后再发现账单。我们构建了Oxlo.ai来改变这一现状。通过一个API，您可以访问35个以上的前沿AI模型，包括DeepSeek V4 Pro、Kimi K2.6、GLM 5、Qwen、Llama和Mistral。您可以比较模型、校准响应，并为每个用例选择合适的模型。我们的AI模型可按可预测的月度订阅进行扩展，具有基准级性能和充足的使用限制，并且我们绝不会使用您的数据进行训练。

name: Flight Scraper
tagline: Scrape flight prices and schedules into clean datasets
tagline_zh: 将航班价格和时刻表数据整理成干净的数据集
description: Flight Scraper turns route and date searches into clean itinerary rows with prices, airlines, times, stops, baggage hints, and booking links. Useful for airfare monitoring, travel dashboards, price comparison tools, and quick route checks.
description_zh: Flight Scraper将路线和日期搜索结果转化为简洁的行程表，其中包含价格、航空公司、时间、经停站、行李提示和预订链接。该工具适用于机票价格监控、旅行仪表板、价格比较工具和快速路线检查。

name: SelfShape AI
tagline: AI personal trainer for serious strength training
tagline_zh: 专为高强度训练打造的AI私人教练
description: SelfShape AI is an AI-native strength training app that builds your workout plan from your real routine, goals and equipment — then explains the reasoning behind every set, rep and progression. Your 24/7 AI coach adapts each session as you evolve, grounded in modern exercise science (ACSM) and a 260+ exercise taxonomy. No generic templates, no guesswork — a coach that actually tells you why. 14-day free trial.
description_zh: SelfShape AI是一款基于人工智能的力量训练应用，它能根据您的实际训练计划、目标和设备，为您量身定制锻炼方案，并解释每个组次、次数和进阶背后的逻辑。您的24/7 AI教练会根据您的进步调整每次训练，这一切都基于现代运动科学（ACSM）和260多种运动分类法。没有通用模板，没有猜测——教练会真正告诉您原因。14天免费试用。

name: CV Align
tagline: Match your CV to any job. Generate tailored applications.
tagline_zh: 让你的简历匹配任何工作。生成量身定制的申请材料。
description: See how well a job matches your CV and generate tailored documents, powered by Claude AI.
description_zh: 看看你的简历与职位有多匹配，并生成由Claude AI支持的定制化文档。

name: Wallbreak
tagline: Apply less. Apply better.
tagline_zh: 少用，用好。
description: Wallbreak: UK job search built around one idea - apply less, apply better. Search pulls UK roles from public sources. Visa Sponsorship mode surfaces sponsor-register organisations with trust notes (register presence is a signal, not a guarantee). CV Intelligence gives deterministic rule-based feedback - not a trained model or opaque score. Gate B prevents job-description text becoming evidence about you. Watchlist, Contact Intelligence. Beta — AI features may have limits. Plans TBD.
description_zh: Wallbreak：英国求职平台，围绕一个理念打造——少申请，精申请。该平台从公共资源中搜索英国职位。签证赞助模式会展示带有信任标记的赞助注册组织（注册存在是一种信号，而非保证）。简历智能提供基于确定性规则的反馈——而非训练有素的模型或不透明的评分。Gate B可防止职位描述文本成为关于你的证据。关注列表、联系人智能。测试版——人工智能功能可能存在限制。计划待定。

name: Trace and Trade
tagline: Insiders have to file. We read everything.
tagline_zh: 内部人士必须提交文件。我们会阅读所有内容。
description: AI-scored alerts for every Congress PTR, SEC Form 4 insider trade, 13D activist stake, federal contract, Polymarket whale bet, and more. Track Pelosi, Tuberville, Buffett, and the rest as soon as their filings publish. Features:
description_zh: 针对每一项国会PTR、SEC表格4内幕交易、13D激进股东持股、联邦合同、Polymarket大额交易等，我们都会提供人工智能评分的警报。一旦佩洛西、图伯维尔、巴菲特等人的文件发布，我们就会立即进行跟踪。功能：

name: Grace
tagline: Turn Git into a royal language.
tagline_zh: 让Git成为一门高级语言。
description: Grace Git is a playful CLI wrapper that transforms Git into royal language. Instead of git push, use grace dispatch; instead of git status, use grace inspect. Every command comes with witty, regal responses while remaining fully compatible with your existing Git workflow. It's lightweight, open source, and installs with a single command.
description_zh: Grace Git是一个俏皮的命令行界面（CLI）包装器，它将Git转换为高雅的语言。使用grace dispatch代替git push；使用grace inspect代替git status。每个命令都会伴随着机智而高雅的回应，同时与您现有的Git工作流程完全兼容。它轻量级、开源，只需一个命令即可安装。

name: Markdownify
tagline: From webpage to Markdown.
tagline_zh: 从网页到Markdown。
description: Extract any URL or convert raw HTML into clean Markdown. Most HTML-to-Markdown tools are designed for content migration or publishing workflows. Markdownify is built specifically for AI and LLM workflows.
description_zh: 提取任何网址或将原始HTML转换为整洁的Markdown格式。大多数HTML到Markdown的工具都是为内容迁移或发布工作流程而设计的。而Markdownify则是专为人工智能和大型语言模型（LLM）的工作流程而构建的。

name: WA Group Extractor
tagline: Export WhatsApp group members to Excel in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可将WhatsApp群组成员导出到Excel
description: Export WhatsApp Web group contacts to Excel in seconds. Free up to 20 contacts per group. Pro available in BRL (R$ 49,99) or USD (US$ 9,99).
description_zh: 几秒钟内即可将WhatsApp网页群组联系人导出到Excel。每个群组最多可导出20个联系人。专业版可选巴西雷亚尔（49.99雷亚尔）或美元（9.99美元）。

name: JSONPath Assistant
tagline: Generate JSONPath from Natural Language
tagline_zh: 根据自然语言生成JSONPath
description: JSONPath Assistant is an AI-powered copilot for working with JSONPath. ﻿ Unlike traditional JSONPath testers, it helps you create and understand JSONPath expressions instead of manually writing them. ﻿ Features: ﻿ ✓ Natural Language → JSONPath ﻿ ✓ Preview matching results instantly ﻿ Perfect for: ﻿ • Backend Developers • API Engineers • QA Teams • Data Engineers • AI Developers ﻿ No signup required. Runs entirely in your browser.
description_zh: JSONPath Assistant是一款基于人工智能的JSONPath辅助工具。与传统的JSONPath测试器不同，它可帮助您创建和理解JSONPath表达式，而无需手动编写。功能：✓自然语言→JSONPath✓即时预览匹配结果非常适合：•后端开发人员•API工程师•质量保证团队•数据工程师•人工智能开发人员无需注册。完全在您的浏览器中运行。

name: MealScan.ai
tagline: AI food tracker. Snap a photo, get exact macros instantly.
tagline_zh: AI食物追踪器。拍张照片，立即获取准确的营养成分。
description: Manual calorie counting is dead. MealScan.ai is a straightforward SaaS that calculates your macros and calories from a single photo. No clunky databases, no weighing food. Just take a picture and get accurate nutritional data instantly. Try it before signing up—guest scans map seamlessly to your account upon registration. Built for speed, accuracy, and zero friction. Stop typing, start scanning.
description_zh: 手动计算卡路里已经过时。MealScan.ai是一款简洁的SaaS工具，只需一张照片，即可计算出你的宏量营养素和卡路里。无需笨重的数据库，也无需称重食物。只需拍张照片，即可立即获得准确的营养数据。注册前先试用一下——访客扫描结果会在注册时无缝映射到你的账户。专为速度、准确性和零摩擦而打造。停止打字，开始扫描。

name: EnigmaProxy
tagline: Reliable proxies for AI, scraping & automation
tagline_zh: 人工智能、数据抓取与自动化的可靠代理
description: EnigmaProxy offers secure residential and premium proxy services with zero-logs policy, global coverage, and personal support. Choose flexible proxy plans today.
description_zh: EnigmaProxy提供安全的住宅和高级代理服务，遵循零日志政策，覆盖全球，并提供个人支持。立即选择灵活的代理计划。

name: Prompt Bros
tagline: Plug-and-play AI prompt packs for busy business owners
tagline_zh: 即插即用的AI提示包，专为忙碌的企业主打造
description: Plug-and-play AI prompt packs for busy business owners. 50 copy-paste prompts per pack, one pack per job: small business, real estate, content, freelancing, and ecommerce. Paste into ChatGPT, swap your details, done.
description_zh: 为忙碌的企业主提供即插即用的AI提示包。每包包含50个可复制粘贴的提示，每个工作对应一个包：小型企业、房地产、内容创作、自由职业和电子商务。只需粘贴到ChatGPT中，替换你的详细信息，即可完成。

name: GOMAX Ultimate
tagline: AI operating system for WordPress. One prompt, done.
tagline_zh: WordPress的人工智能操作系统。一个提示，搞定。
description: Most WordPress owners can't afford a developer and don't have time to learn WordPress themselves. GOMAX Ultimate lets you manage your entire WordPress business by talking to AI. Build pages, run your WooCommerce store, capture leads, send emails, track analytics — all from a simple conversation. One prompt built a complete coffee shop website with an AI barista chatbot in under 5 minutes. No coding. No developer. £149 once.
description_zh: 大多数WordPress网站所有者既请不起开发人员，也没有时间自学WordPress。GOMAX Ultimate通过与人工智能对话，让您管理整个WordPress业务。构建页面、运营WooCommerce商店、获取潜在客户、发送电子邮件、跟踪分析——所有这些只需通过简单的对话即可完成。只需一个提示，不到5分钟就能搭建一个完整的咖啡店网站，并配备一个AI咖啡师聊天机器人。无需编码，无需开发人员。一次性收费149英镑。

name: Sequence Tool
tagline: Create What Matters - Toolkit for Final Cut & Resolve
tagline_zh: 创造关键内容——Final Cut与Resolve工具包
description: Transcribe, normalize audio, remove fillers, and clean-up profanity entirely on-device. Fast search, organization, and clean export to Final Cut Pro or DaVinci Resolve Studio. Featured in Larry Jordan's Edit Smarter Newsletter. -On-device transcription (Parakeet V3) -Text-based editing -Search across projects and media -Filler-word and profanity cleanup -Remove silent moments -Keyword generation including in export for Final Cut Pro -Export workflows for Final Cut Pro and DaVinci Resolve
description_zh: 在设备上完成音频转录、标准化、去除填充词，并彻底清理脏话。快速搜索、整理，并干净利落地导出到Final Cut Pro或DaVinci Resolve Studio。该功能已在Larry Jordan的《编辑更聪明》通讯中推荐。-设备上转录（Parakeet V3）-基于文本的编辑-跨项目和媒体搜索-填充词和脏话清理-去除静音片段-生成关键词，包括在导出到Final Cut Pro时-为Final Cut Pro和DaVinci Resolve导出工作流程

name: Accord OS
tagline: Run cross-organization work in one shared system.
tagline_zh: 在一个共享系统中运行跨组织工作。
description: Accord is a collaborative execution platform designed for teams working across organizations. Instead of relying on scattered tools like email, chat, and task managers, Accord provides a shared workspace where teams can manage deliverables, coordinate approvals, and track progress with clear accountability. The platform includes a real-time timeline of activity, AI-powered insights to detect risks and bottlenecks, and a unified dashboard that shows the health of work across all participants.
description_zh: Accord是一个专为跨组织团队设计的协作执行平台。它不再依赖电子邮件、聊天和任务管理器等分散的工具，而是提供了一个共享的工作空间，团队可以在其中管理可交付成果、协调审批，并以明确的责任追踪进度。该平台包括一个实时活动时间线、基于人工智能的洞察力以检测风险和瓶颈，以及一个统一的仪表板，显示所有参与者的工作状态。

name: Reveald
tagline: Get Paid First. Clients See Watermarks Till Payment Clears.
tagline_zh: 先收款。客户在款项结清前会看到水印。
description: Stop chasing unpaid invoices. Reveald is the client portal that withholds full deliverables until payment clears. Clients see watermarked previews only. Upload files, set revision limits, add invoices. When Stripe payment goes through, files unlock automatically. Change requests require approval and pricing before work starts. Built by a designer tired of scope creep and non-payment. Free tier 1 portal. Pro: unlimited portals, custom branding, full change request workflow. Get paid, then reveal.
description_zh: 别再追讨未付的发票了。Reveald是一个客户门户网站，它会扣留全部交付成果，直到款项结清。客户只能看到带有水印的预览。上传文件、设置修订限制、添加发票。当Stripe付款通过后，文件会自动解锁。变更请求需要在工作开始前获得批准和定价。该网站由一位厌倦了范围蔓延和未付款的设计师打造。免费版一级门户。专业版：无限门户、定制品牌、完整的变更请求工作流程。先收款，再公开。

name: Mimir Systems
tagline: The research answer tool that can't fake a citation
tagline_zh: 无法伪造引用的研究答案工具
description: Mimir answers a research question with a cited source in seconds, drawn from millions of papers in materials science, chemistry, and physics. Every citation points to a real paper you can open. The system retrieves from indexed literature instead of generating text, so it cannot invent a reference. Free foredu andgov. Start your 7 free trial now.
description_zh: Mimir能在几秒钟内从材料科学、化学和物理领域的数百万篇论文中，引用一个来源来回答研究问题。每个引用都指向一篇可以打开的真实论文。该系统是从索引文献中检索信息，而非生成文本，因此它无法编造参考文献。免费试用foredu和gov。立即开始您的7天免费试用。

name: Remove Watermark from Video
tagline: Clean watermarks off your own videos — no blur, no crop.
tagline_zh: 清除您自己视频中的水印——无模糊，无裁剪。
description: Remove Watermark from Video is an online, AI-powered tool for cleaning watermarks off videos you own or have the rights to use. Instead of blurring or cropping, the AI rebuilds the area behind the mark, so your clip keeps its original resolution. Upload a short clip and download the result in your browser — nothing to install. 1 credit = 1 second; new accounts get 30 free credits, and failed jobs are refunded automatically.
description_zh: “视频去水印”是一款基于人工智能的在线工具，用于清除您拥有或有权使用的视频中的水印。该工具不会采用模糊或裁剪的方式，而是利用人工智能重建水印后的区域，从而保持视频的原始分辨率。您只需上传一个简短的视频片段，即可在浏览器中下载处理后的结果，无需进行任何安装。1个信用点=1秒；新账户可获得30个免费信用点，处理失败的任务将自动退款。

name: AI Ad generator
tagline: AI Ad generator
tagline_zh: AI广告生成器
description: AIAdGen is an AI advertisement generator and AI ad maker. Upload a product image and generate high-converting ad creatives for TikTok, Amazon, Shopify, and other e-commerce platforms in minutes.
description_zh: AIAdGen是一款人工智能广告生成器和广告制作工具。只需上传产品图片，即可在几分钟内为TikTok、亚马逊、Shopify和其他电子商务平台生成高转化率的广告素材。

name: Hexabot v3
tagline: Self-hosted AI Workflow Automation
tagline_zh: 自托管人工智能工作流自动化
description: Source-available, self-hosted AI workflow automation engine built for JS/TS developers on NestJS under a Fair-Core license. Move beyond simple chatbots and orchestrate production-ready agents using developer-friendly, extensible architecture. Features: 📄 Declarative Workflows: Define complex agent logic via YAML. ⚙️ AI Agent Orchestration: Inject MCP tools and reusable actions. 🧠 Advanced Memory & RAG: Equip agents with persistent context.
description_zh: 基于Fair-Core许可，为NestJS上的JS/TS开发人员构建的开源、自托管的AI工作流自动化引擎。超越简单的聊天机器人，使用开发者友好且可扩展的架构，编排生产就绪的代理。特性：📄 声明式工作流：通过YAML定义复杂的代理逻辑。⚙️ AI代理编排：注入MCP工具和可重用操作。🧠 高级内存与RAG：为代理配备持久上下文。

name: SayOnce
tagline: Voice typing for Windows you buy once - offline, no cloud
tagline_zh: Windows语音打字，一次购买，离线使用，无需云端
description: Voice typing for Windows that runs fully on your PC. Hold a hotkey, speak, and the text lands in any app - editor, browser, chat. Speech recognition is local (no audio leaves your machine), works without a GPU, and it's a one-time purchase instead of a monthly subscription. It also batch-transcribes audio/video files into clean, readable text - split into proper paragraphs instead of one giant block - with Prose/Code/Email presets and a personal dictionary.
description_zh: Windows 平台上的语音打字功能，完全在您的电脑上运行。按住热键，说话，文本就会出现在任何应用程序中——编辑器、浏览器、聊天应用。语音识别是本地化的（音频不会离开您的电脑），无需GPU即可工作，而且是一次性购买，而非每月订阅。它还可以将音频/视频文件批量转录成干净易读的文本——分成适当的段落，而不是一个大块——具有散文/代码/电子邮件预设和个人词典。

name: Sello
tagline: Your AI stylist that knows your colors, closet & calendar
tagline_zh: 你的AI造型师，了解你的肤色、衣橱和日程安排
description: StyleAI solves "what should I wear?" — for good. It generates daily outfits using only clothes you own, filtered by your personal color season, today's weather, and your plans (office, date, gym, travel). Upload a garment photo → AI classifies it automatically. Set your plans → get 3–5 ranked outfits with color reasoning. Plus a marketplace where every listing is pre-filtered to match your palette. Your closet, finally working for you.
description_zh: StyleAI彻底解决了“我该穿什么？”的问题。它仅使用你已有的衣物，并根据你的个人色彩季节、当天天气以及你的计划（上班、约会、健身、旅行）进行筛选，生成每日穿搭。上传一张衣物照片→AI会自动对其进行分类。设定你的计划→根据色彩搭配原理，获得3-5套排名靠前的穿搭。此外，还有一个市场，其中每个商品都经过预先筛选，以匹配你的色彩偏好。你的衣橱，终于为你服务了。

name: Photoluminescent Exit Signs
tagline: Silent Safety. Powerful Protection Under Every Step
tagline_zh: 静音安全。每一步都提供强大保护
description: When the lights go out, clarity steps in. These code-compliant photoluminescent exit signs are engineered to glow with purpose, guiding occupants safely even in complete darkness. No wires, no batteries, no fuss. Designed for indoor use, they deliver clear direction up to 50–75 feet and meet fire, building, and life safety codes. Built with a durable anodized aluminum frame and universal mounting kit, installation is quick and adaptable.
description_zh: 当灯光熄灭时，清晰度便凸显出来。这些符合规范的发光出口标志经过精心设计，能够有目的地发光，即使在完全黑暗的环境中也能引导使用者安全撤离。无需电线、电池，无需大惊小怪。专为室内使用而设计，它们能在高达50-75英尺的距离内提供清晰的指引，并符合消防、建筑和生命安全规范。采用耐用的阳极氧化铝框架和通用安装套件，安装快速且灵活。

name: Smart Booking System AI
tagline: AI assistant automating orders & bookings with precision
tagline_zh: 人工智能助手精准自动化订单和预订
description: An AI-powered assistant automating orders & bookings 24/7 without human intervention. Highly flexible and tailored for various industries: Clinics: Organizes patient appointments & onboarding. Taxi Services: Collects trip details & precise locations. Real Estate: Manages purchase/rental requests & viewings. Restaurants: Handles food orders, reservations & delivery. Instant alerts are sent straight to Telegram. Deploy via web widget or social media links seamlessly!
description_zh: 一款由人工智能驱动的助手，可全天候自动处理订单和预订，无需人工干预。高度灵活，可针对不同行业进行定制：诊所：安排患者预约和入院。出租车服务：收集行程详情和精确位置。房地产：管理购买/租赁请求和看房。餐厅：处理食品订单、预订和送餐。即时警报直接发送到Telegram。可通过网页小部件或社交媒体链接无缝部署！

name: LEDGER AI ELITE
tagline: AI document vault for luxury real estate agents.
tagline_zh: 豪华房地产经纪人的AI文档库。
description: AI document vault for luxury real estate. Patrick automatically links contracts to wire transfers, capture receipts, and classify high-ticket buyer leads into Hot/Warm reports on autopilot. Secure your exclusive Beta access today.
description_zh: 豪华房地产AI文档库。Patrick能自动将合同与电汇关联，抓取收据，并自动将高价买家线索分类为热门/热门报告。立即获取您的独家测试版访问权限。

name: ScreenSize.net
tagline: Live screen checker for responsive web development
tagline_zh: 响应式网页开发的实时屏幕检查工具
description: ScreenSize.net is a live screen checker that shows your current viewport dimensions, screen resolution, device pixel ratio, and other specs in real-time — no DevTools needed. Perfect for: • Testing responsive breakpoints as you resize • Sharing exact screen specs with clients or designers • Quick reference on mobile devices (where DevTools isn't available) • Comparing your screen with target devices (iPhone, iPad, MacBook, etc.) Built with Astro + TypeScript, deplolazing-fast global performance.
description_zh: ScreenSize.net是一个实时屏幕检查工具，可实时显示您当前的视口尺寸、屏幕分辨率、设备像素比以及其他规格信息，无需使用开发者工具。非常适合：• 在调整尺寸时测试响应式断点• 与客户或设计师共享准确的屏幕规格信息• 在移动设备（无法使用开发者工具）上快速参考• 将您的屏幕与目标设备（iPhone、iPad、MacBook等）进行比较该工具采用Astro + TypeScript构建，具有超快的全球性能。

name: Pinpoint
tagline: Point your AI agent at the exact pixel you mean
tagline_zh: 将你的AI代理对准你指定的确切像素
description: Pinpoint is a macOS menu-bar app that turns a screenshot into a prompt your AI agent can actually read. Capture a region, drop numbered markers on what matters, and copy an annotated image plus a structured text that references every marker — image size, each marker's position and note, then your instructions. Built for Claude Code, Codex and friends. Native (SwiftUI + ScreenCaptureKit), private (nothing leaves your Mac), free & open source.
description_zh: Pinpoint是一款macOS菜单栏应用程序，可将截图转换为人工智能助手（AI agent）实际可读的提示。捕捉一个区域，在重要内容上放置编号标记，然后复制一张带注释的图像以及引用每个标记的结构化文本——图像大小、每个标记的位置和注释，最后是你的指令。专为Claude Code、Codex等打造。原生（SwiftUI + ScreenCaptureKit），私有（不会离开你的Mac），免费且开源。

name: Voicetypr 2.0
tagline: Stop typing, Start talking to your apps and agents
tagline_zh: 别打字了，开始和你的应用及智能体对话吧
description: Voicetypr 2.0 is a ground-up rebuild — now your AI agents can hear you. A new Agent CLI + local API lets any agent or script pull your voice as text/JSON, on-device. OpenClaw, Hermes, and Nanoclaw can listen with no per-minute transcriptio API and no audio sent to the cloud. New in 2.0: • Agent CLI & local API: voice in, text/JSON out • Remote sharing over your Wi-Fi • Way more powerful formatting: 6 modes + per-app rules • Optional cloud engines One-time, no subscription.n
description_zh: Voicetypr 2.0 是一款全新重构的产品——现在，你的AI代理可以听到你的声音了。全新的Agent CLI +本地API允许任何代理或脚本在设备上将你的语音转换为文本/JSON。OpenClaw、Hermes和Nanoclaw可以在不使用每分钟转录API且不将音频发送到云端的情况下进行监听。2.0版新增功能：• Agent CLI & 本地API：语音输入，文本/JSON输出• 通过Wi-Fi进行远程共享• 格式化功能更强大：6种模式+每个应用的规则• 可选云引擎一次性购买，无需订阅。

name: DravonX
tagline: DRAVONX | PASSIVE INCOME GENERATOR
tagline_zh: DRAVONX | 被动收入生成器
description: Idle Game Faucet and Idle Earning Hub. Claim stored GOLD and run the next DravonX reward command.
description_zh: 闲置游戏水龙头和闲置收益中心。领取存储的金币，并运行下一个DravonX奖励指令。

name: Color Dictionary
tagline: 240 colors: Japanese Traditional & CSS Named with Oigin
tagline_zh: 240种颜色：日本传统颜色与基于Oigin的CSS命名
description: A free color dictionary of about 240 colors — 100 Japanese traditional colors and 140 CSS named colors. Browse and search by name or HEX, with the origin of each name, its meaning, suggested pairings, HEX/RGB/HSL codes and WCAG contrast. No sign-up, free to copy.
description_zh: 这是一本免费的色彩词典，收录了约240种颜色——100种日本传统颜色和140种CSS命名颜色。您可以通过名称或HEX码进行浏览和搜索，同时还可以查看每种颜色的名称来源、含义、建议搭配、HEX/RGB/HSL代码以及WCAG对比度。无需注册，可免费复制。

name: Dub Ninja
tagline: Live autonomous AI DJ that digs, mixes & explains 24/7
tagline_zh: 全天候现场自主AI DJ，挖掘、混音并讲解
description: An autonomous AI DJ. No schedule, no playlists — just the next correct record, chosen live and explained in real time. Underground electronic, always on.
description_zh: 一位自主的AI DJ。无固定时间表，无预设播放列表——只播放下一张正确的唱片，现场挑选，实时解说。地下电子音乐，永不间断。

name: Arrow Game
tagline: Test your reflexes with fast-paced arrow challenges
tagline_zh: 通过快节奏的箭头挑战来测试你的反应速度
description: Most arrow games are available only as mobile apps. You have to download them, sit through ads, or deal with unnecessary distractions before you can start playing. I wanted something simpler. Arrow Game is a free browser-based reflex game that you can play instantly on desktop or mobile. No downloads, no signup, and no ads. Just test your reaction speed, focus, and accuracy through fast-paced arrow challenges. Open the game and start playing in seconds.
description_zh: 大多数箭术游戏都只能通过移动应用来玩。你必须先下载应用，忍受广告，或者处理不必要的干扰，然后才能开始游戏。我想要更简单的东西。Arrow Game是一款免费的基于浏览器的反应游戏，你可以在桌面或移动设备上立即玩。无需下载、无需注册、无广告。只需通过快节奏的箭术挑战来测试你的反应速度、注意力和准确性。打开游戏，几秒钟内即可开始玩。

name: Design for the AI era
tagline: The design doc is the product. Screens are the consequence.
tagline_zh: 设计文档是产品，而屏幕则是其结果。
description: Engaged Inquiry — design practice for the AI era. The spec is the product. The screens are the consequence. Design for the AI era argues that the problem with AI-generated design is not the AI — it's the absence of a governing principle upstream of it. Five dimensions of digital experience (Screen, Context, Content, Time, Trust) must be authored before any build begins. Free PDF. Print on Amazon.
description_zh: 参与式探究——人工智能时代的设计实践。规格说明是产品。屏幕是结果。人工智能时代的设计认为，人工智能生成的设计的问题不在于人工智能本身——而在于其上游缺乏一个指导原则。在任何构建开始之前，必须先确定数字体验的五个维度（屏幕、情境、内容、时间、信任）。免费PDF。可在亚马逊打印。

name: LlevoSan
tagline: Manage rotating savings groups with clarity
tagline_zh: 清晰管理循环储蓄小组
description: LlevoSan helps organizers manage rotating savings groups used in Spanish-speaking communities. It keeps participants, turns, contributions, late payments, receipts and reminders organized in one place. LlevoSan does not collect, hold or process money; it simply helps organizers bring clarity, control and transparency to their SAN groups.
description_zh: LlevoSan助力组织者管理在西班牙语社区使用的循环储蓄小组。它能够将参与者、轮次、捐款、逾期付款、收据和提醒信息集中管理。LlevoSan不收集、持有或处理资金；它只是帮助组织者为其SAN小组带来清晰度、控制力和透明度。

name: Temp Gmail for Essential Online Privacy
tagline: Protect Your Identity with Secure Temporary Email
tagline_zh: 使用安全临时邮箱保护您的身份信息
description: Temp Gmail for Essential Online Privacy helps users protect their personal email addresses from spam, unwanted marketing messages, and privacy risks. At TempGmailer.com, you can generate a secure temporary email instantly for registrations, verifications, and online activities. Our disposable email service keeps your inbox clean while ensuring safe and anonymous access to websites. Choose TempGmailer.com for reliable, fast, and privacy-focused temporary email solutions.
description_zh: Temp Gmail for Essential Online Privacy可帮助用户保护其个人电子邮件地址免受垃圾邮件、不必要营销信息和隐私风险的侵扰。在TempGmailer.com，您可以立即生成一个安全的临时电子邮件，用于注册、验证和在线活动。我们的临时电子邮件服务可保持您的收件箱整洁，同时确保您能够安全、匿名地访问网站。选择TempGmailer.com，享受可靠、快速且注重隐私的临时电子邮件解决方案。

name: Pharma NOLT 300 Ampoules
tagline: Joint Recovery and Tissue Repair
tagline_zh: 关节恢复与组织修复
description: Experience a massive transformation in your physique when you buy Pharma NOLT 300 Ampoules. Ordering your performance items from Osgear.to connects you directly with genuine stock from Pharmacom Labs. This formula represents the Best Sustained-Release Nandrolone Blend for Bulking phases, helping you add dense muscle while ensuring rapid structural recovery. Stop settling for slow size increases and unlock supreme power today with verified, high-purity compounds built for elite athletic goals.
description_zh: 购买Pharma NOLT 300安瓿，体验体格的巨大转变。通过Osgear.to订购您的性能提升产品，可直接从Pharmacom Labs获得正品库存。此配方是增肌阶段最佳的缓释诺龙混合物，帮助您增加密集肌肉，同时确保快速的结构恢复。别再满足于缓慢的体型增长，即刻解锁极致力量，使用经过验证的高纯度化合物，专为精英运动员目标打造。

name: Ink Sync Notes & Checklist
tagline: Simple, clean note-taking, sync across all your devices
tagline_zh: 简洁明了的笔记功能，支持跨设备同步
description: A clean, distraction-free note-taking app that syncs seamlessly across Android, iOS, and the web. Write, organize, and collaborate without the clutter. (iOS coming soon)
description_zh: 一款干净整洁、无干扰的笔记应用，可在安卓、iOS和网页端无缝同步。书写、整理和协作，尽享整洁无杂乱的体验。（iOS版即将推出）

name: Clapet
tagline: Excalidraw meets AI system design
tagline_zh: Excalidraw与AI系统设计相遇
description: Clapet is an AI-assisted architecture diagram tool for designing, reviewing, saving, and sharing system designs.
description_zh: Clapet是一款基于人工智能的架构图工具，用于设计、审查、保存和共享系统设计。

name: DevLauch
tagline: AI DevOps that writes,fixes & deploys your pipelines for you
tagline_zh: AI DevOps，为您编写、修复和部署流程
description: `DevPilot turns any GitHub repo into a live deployment in 2 minutes. Pick a branch — we generate your Dockerfile, CI/CD pipeline, and deploy to your server automatically. When builds break, AI reads the logs, pushes a fix, and retries — no human needed. Provision EC2, RDS & S3 from one dashboard. Ask plain-English questions like "why did the backend fail?" and get answers. No Jenkins expertise. Just ship.`
description_zh: `DevPilot 可在2分钟内将任何GitHub仓库转换为实时部署。选择一个分支，我们就会自动为您生成Dockerfile、CI/CD流水线，并部署到您的服务器。当构建失败时，AI会读取日志，推送修复，并重试——无需人工干预。您可通过一个控制面板配置EC2、RDS和S3。只需提出像“为什么后端失败了？”这样的简单问题，就能获得答案。无需Jenkins专业知识。只需发布即可。`

name: MaliMoney
tagline: Talk to your money
tagline_zh: 与你的财富对话
description: Talk to Mali about your money by voice or text. It links your bank and runs tested financial tools — Roth conversions, Social Security timing, Monte Carlo retirement odds, tax-aware withdrawals — on your real numbers. Built for couples.
description_zh: 通过语音或文字与Mali交流你的财务状况。它会连接你的银行账户，并根据你的真实数据运行经过测试的财务工具——如Roth账户转换、社保时间安排、蒙特卡洛退休概率计算、税负意识下的提款等。专为夫妻设计。

name: HPSILab MCP
tagline: Options intelligence for AI agents — IV, Monte Carlo & more
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理的选项智能——第四部分，蒙特卡洛方法及其他
description: 8-tool MCP server for US equity options intelligence: real-time IV radar, Monte Carlo price simulation, options pressure maps, equity curve backtesting, and quantum ML prediction signals for AI-driven trading research.
description_zh: 8工具MCP服务器，专为美国股票期权情报而设：实时IV雷达、蒙特卡洛价格模拟、期权压力图、股票曲线回测，以及用于AI驱动交易研究的量子机器学习预测信号。

name: The AI CMO
tagline: Marketing department that fits in a browser tab
tagline_zh: 一个可以嵌入浏览器标签页的营销部门
description: The marketing department that fits in a browser tab. Strategy, ads, email, social – written, shipped, measured. It learns what sells, and does more of it.
description_zh: 一个能装进浏览器标签页的营销部门。负责策略制定、广告投放、电子邮件发送、社交媒体运营——撰写文案、发布内容、进行效果评估。它能够了解哪些内容受欢迎，并加大推广力度。

name: HippoSplit
tagline: Expense splitting as easy as texting
tagline_zh: 费用分摊，就像发短信一样简单
description: Most bill-splitters feel like accounting software. HippoSplit is chat-first, so adding an expense is as easy as sending a message: snap a receipt photo or type "dinner, $80," and AI itemizes it, picks a category, and keeps the split clear and editable. With 150+ currencies at live rates, it's perfect for trips abroad. Tracking expenses is finally fast and even enjoyable. Think Splitwise, but with fast input and advanced AI, built for trips, roommates, families, and everyday personal spending.
description_zh: 大多数账单分摊工具给人的感觉都像是会计软件。HippoSplit则以聊天为先，因此添加一笔费用就像发送一条消息一样简单：拍下收据照片或输入“晚餐，80美元”，人工智能就会对其进行逐项记录，选择一个类别，并保持分摊清晰且可编辑。它支持150多种货币，实时汇率，非常适合出国旅行。费用追踪终于变得快速且令人愉快。想想Splitwise吧，但它拥有快速输入和先进的人工智能，专为旅行、室友、家庭和日常个人支出而设计。

name: InterviewWatch
tagline: Real-time integrity for every remote interview
tagline_zh: 为每一次远程面试提供实时完整性保障
description: InterviewWatch verifies remote interviews in real time — confirming candidates are real and unassisted, with signed, evidence-grade integrity reports.
description_zh: InterviewWatch可实时验证远程面试——通过签署的、证据级别的完整性报告，确认候选人真实且未受协助。

name: rssu.me
tagline: Resume as Data
tagline_zh: 简历即数据
description: Your resume is data. Treat it like data. We kept reformatting the same resume for every application. So we built rssume. Enter your experience once. Share it via password-protected links — each with its own password, expiration, and template. Redact what you want, show what you want. Import from PDF, LinkedIn, or AI paste. Export to PDF when a portal demands it. Connect GitHub and keep it in version control. Let your skills speak. Not your formatting skills.
description_zh: 你的简历就是数据。要像对待数据一样对待它。我们总是为每份申请重新格式化同一份简历。因此，我们开发了rssume。只需输入一次你的经历。通过密码保护的链接进行分享——每个链接都有自己的密码、有效期和模板。你可以编辑你想要的内容，展示你想要的信息。可以从PDF、LinkedIn或AI粘贴中导入。当门户网站需要时，可以导出为PDF。连接GitHub并保持版本控制。让你的技能说话，而不是你的排版技能。

name: Dealer Bloom
tagline: The dealership platform that knows it sells cars
tagline_zh: 了解自身销售汽车业务的经销商平台
description: Multi-tenant SaaS for independent car dealerships. Inventory CMS, lead pipeline, custom domain, headless API, 12+ public site templates in one product. Dedicated database per tenant. Live in under a minute from $250/mo. No per-listing or per-lead fees.
description_zh: 面向独立汽车经销商的多租户SaaS。库存内容管理系统（CMS）、潜在客户渠道、自定义域名、无头API，一款产品包含12个以上公共网站模板。每个租户拥有专用数据库。上线不到一分钟，每月250美元起。无每条列表或每条潜在客户收费。

name: monkeysee
tagline: Let your terminal agent drive your real, logged-in Chrome.
tagline_zh: 让你的终端代理驱动你真实登录的Chrome浏览器。
description: Other browser agents open a headless browser logged into nothing. MonkeySee drives YOUR real Chrome — already signed into everything. No LLM, no agent loop: your terminal agent is the brain, MonkeySee the hands and eyes. Read pages, click, type, fill forms cinematically, run many sessions.
description_zh: 其他浏览器代理会打开一个无头浏览器，但并未登录任何账户。而MonkeySee则会驱动您真正的Chrome浏览器——它已经登录了所有账户。无需大型语言模型（LLM），也无需代理循环：您的终端代理是大脑，MonkeySee则是手和眼睛。它可以像电影一样阅读页面、点击、输入、填写表单，并运行多个会话。

name: Pricer AI
tagline: Price your AI product with confidence.
tagline_zh: 自信地为你的AI产品定价。
description: PricerAI is a free calculator that turns raw AI model costs into a credit-based pricing model, blended pipeline cost, infrastructure overhead, target margin, credit denomination, and per-plan profitability, so you can price your AI product with confidence before you ship. Everything runs entirely in your browser. There is no account, no backend, and no database. Your pricing configuration is never uploaded anywhere.
description_zh: PricerAI是一款免费计算器，它将原始的AI模型成本转化为基于信用定价的模型，综合考虑了管道成本、基础设施开销、目标利润率、信用面额以及每项计划的盈利能力，让您在发货前能够自信地为AI产品定价。所有操作均在您的浏览器中完成，无需注册账户、后台管理或数据库。您的定价配置信息绝不会被上传到任何地方。

name: Loops Lane — Chord Flow
tagline: Ripchord presets for R&B & Soul producers
tagline_zh: 为R&B和灵魂音乐制作人准备的Ripchord预设
description: Chord Flow is a Ripchord preset bank built for R&B, Soul, and Trap Soul producers. Press one key, get a full chord — minor sevenths, extended chords, suspended voicings — the harmonic language of R&B and Soul, instantly accessible without needing music theory. 30 genre-focused presets with over 1,200 chord variations total. Covers everything from classic 70s Soul to modern R&B and Trap Soul. Works in any DAW that supports VST3/AU — FL Studio, Ableton, Logic Pro, Studio One, Pro Tools.
description_zh: Chord Flow是一款专为R&B、灵魂乐和陷阱灵魂乐制作人打造的Ripchord预设音色库。只需按下一个键，即可获得完整的和弦——小七和弦、扩展和弦、挂留和弦——这些是R&B和灵魂乐的和声语言，无需音乐理论即可即时访问。该音色库包含30种以流派为重点的预设，总共超过1200种和弦变体。涵盖了从70年代经典灵魂乐到现代R&B和陷阱灵魂乐的所有风格。适用于任何支持VST3/AU的数字音频工作站（DAW）——如FL Studio、Ableton、Logic Pro、Studio One、Pro Tools。

name: Dumqa
tagline: Stop Guessing What to Study Next
tagline_zh: 别再猜接下来要学什么了
description: Personalized prep plans with micro-lessons and tests for tech interviews and certifications. Tailored to your target company, role, or exam.
description_zh: 针对技术面试和认证，提供包含微课程和测试的个性化准备计划。根据您的目标公司、职位或考试量身定制。

name: Modiva
tagline: One API & MCP server for every social platform
tagline_zh: 每个社交平台一个API和MCP服务器
description: Connect social and ads APIs through a single unified REST API and hosted MCP server. OAuth, typed tools and scopes handled for you — TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn and more.
description_zh: 通过单一的统一REST API和托管的MCP服务器，连接社交和广告API。OAuth、类型化工具和作用范围均由我们为您处理——涵盖TikTok、Instagram、YouTube、LinkedIn等更多平台。

name: clausio
tagline: AI contract review inside Microsoft Word for law firms
tagline_zh: 在Microsoft Word中为律师事务所进行AI合同审查
description: Clausio is a Microsoft Word plugin for contract review. It compares the client's version against your firm's template, highlights every change, and flags risky clauses by severity — critical, high, medium, low. For each flagged clause, it generates a counter-proposal in legal language, ready to approve or edit. No copy-pasting. No switching apps. Everything happens inside Word's task pane. Lawyer approves every suggestion before anything changes. Free 14-day trial for law firms.
description_zh: Clausio是一款用于合同审查的Microsoft Word插件。它将客户的版本与贵公司的模板进行对比，突出显示所有更改，并根据严重程度（关键、高、中、低）标记有风险的条款。对于每个标记的条款，它会生成一份法律语言表述的反提案，随时可以批准或编辑。无需复制粘贴，也无需切换应用程序。所有操作均在Word的任务窗格内完成。律师会在任何更改前批准每项建议。律师事务所可享受14天免费试用。

name: East Blue Gym
tagline: Full-stack gym SaaS with AI coach, live chat & payments
tagline_zh: 全栈健身房软件即服务（SaaS），配备人工智能教练、实时聊天和支付功能
description: East Blue Gym is a production-ready gym management platform built with FastAPI, MongoDB, and Next.js. Features: → AI Personal Coach (Gemini) → Live Chat & WebSockets → Stripe Payments & Memberships → Video Vault → Community features → Mobile responsive → 110/100 Mozilla Security Score Built by a self-taught builder with zero CS degree using AI-assisted development. Everything runs on free tier — Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas. Live demo: https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app
description_zh: East Blue Gym是一个基于FastAPI、MongoDB和Next.js构建的、可投入生产的健身房管理平台。功能包括：→ AI私人教练（Gemini）→ 在线聊天和WebSockets→ Stripe支付和会员管理→ 视频库→ 社区功能→ 移动端响应式设计→ Mozilla安全评分110/100该平台由一位自学成才的开发者构建，他没有任何计算机科学学位，而是使用了人工智能辅助开发。所有功能均在免费层上运行——Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas。在线演示：https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app

name: EDD Hold
tagline: Skip government phone hold — we dial until you connect
tagline_zh: 免去政府电话等待——我们为您拨号直至接通
description: Stop spending hours redialing the IRS, CA EDD, Social Security, and other government agencies. EDD Hold auto-dials for you, navigates the phone menu, and calls you back the moment a live agent is ready. From $9.99. Money-back guarantee.
description_zh: 别再花几个小时反复拨打美国国税局（IRS）、加州就业发展部（CA EDD）、社会保障局（Social Security）和其他政府机构的电话了。EDD Hold可为您自动拨号，引导您进入电话菜单，并在人工客服准备好后立即回拨给您。起价9.99美元。退款保证。

name: Atom Foundry
tagline: Understand why AI recommends some brands, not others
tagline_zh: 了解人工智能为何推荐某些品牌而非其他品牌
description: Atom Foundry is building the AI Commerce Intelligence platform. We help brands understand how AI systems discover, evaluate, trust and recommend products. Measure AI Visibility, Recommendation Intelligence, AI Trust and Decision Confidence across modern AI platforms. Our mission is to map the emerging AI Commerce Graph and help brands become recommendation-ready in the age of AI-driven commerce.
description_zh: Atom Foundry正在构建人工智能商业智能平台。我们帮助品牌了解人工智能系统如何发现、评估、信任和推荐产品。衡量现代人工智能平台上的AI可见性、推荐智能、AI信任度和决策信心。我们的使命是绘制新兴的人工智能商业图谱，并帮助品牌在人工智能驱动的商业时代做好推荐准备。

name: Arkham Intelligence Wallet Data Scraper
tagline: Export Arkham wallet data from addresses or URLs
tagline_zh: 从地址或网址导出Arkham钱包数据
description: Paste wallet addresses or Arkham wallet URLs and export public Arkham wallet analytics to a dataset. Useful for on-chain research, compliance triage, portfolio review, and internal crypto dashboards.
description_zh: 粘贴钱包地址或Arkham钱包URL，并将Arkham钱包的公开分析数据导出到数据集中。这对链上研究、合规性分类、投资组合审查以及内部加密货币仪表板非常有用。

name: YT Analyzer
tagline: Outlier detection and analytics for YouTube creators
tagline_zh: YouTube创作者异常值检测与分析
description: YT Analyzer shows exactly which videos are over/underperforming vs. your channel average — directly on YouTube, no API key needed. Free: Outlier badges on your feed, plus channel analysis (upload patterns, title keyword performance, engagement rate). Pro: Full watch-page overlay with real-time view growth graph, title/thumbnail change history, algorithm "revival" detection, and channel comparison.
description_zh: YT Analyzer可直接在YouTube上准确显示哪些视频相对于您的频道平均表现超出/未达预期，无需API密钥。免费版：在您的信息流上显示异常视频徽章，并提供频道分析（上传模式、标题关键词表现、互动率）。专业版：完整的观看页面覆盖，包括实时观看增长图、标题/缩略图更改历史、算法“复苏”检测以及频道对比。

name: EdgeShaping Lite
tagline: GA4 can't see AI crawlers. This WordPress plugin can.
tagline_zh: GA4无法识别AI爬虫。但这个WordPress插件可以。
description: GA4 relies on JavaScript, so it mostly can't see AI crawlers like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and Perplexity visiting your site. EdgeShaping Lite logs AI bot visits at the PHP layer instead — no JS dependency — so you can see which bots read which pages, and when. - Dictionary-based AI bot detection - Dashboard with bot frequency ranking + most-visited pages - Full access log, CSV export - AHQG Matrix: cross AI visits with human search clicks (GSC) to spot pages AI loves that humans haven't found yet
description_zh: GA4依赖于JavaScript，因此它基本上无法识别像GPTBot、ClaudeBot和Perplexity这样的AI爬虫访问您的网站。EdgeShaping Lite在PHP层记录AI爬虫的访问——无需依赖JavaScript——因此您可以查看哪些爬虫访问了哪些页面，以及何时访问。- 基于词典的AI爬虫检测 - 包含爬虫频率排名和最常访问页面的仪表板 - 完整的访问日志，可导出为CSV格式 - AHQG矩阵：将AI访问与人工搜索点击（GSC）相结合，以发现AI喜欢但人类尚未发现的页面

name: CalcTrip: offline travel calculator
tagline: The first app you open when you see a price abroad
tagline_zh: 当你在国外看到价格时，你打开的第一个应用
description: The free, no-login calculator you keep open all trip: - Currency + math in one: type "12,800×2", see it live in your home currency - Every "=" auto-saves to your history with place & time — no manual expense entry - "Cheap or expensive here?" See how a price compares to real local prices, as a number - Trip budget tracks itself by category - Offline · no login · 10 languages · installs as an app - Your photos never leave your device Free, no account needed.
description_zh: 您旅行中必备的免费、免登录计算器： - 货币转换+数学计算于一体：输入“12,800×2”，即可实时看到以您本国货币表示的结果 - 每次计算结果都会自动保存到您的历史记录中，并附带地点和时间 — 无需手动输入费用 - “这里东西便宜还是贵？”以数字形式查看价格与当地实际价格的对比 - 旅行预算按类别自动跟踪 - 离线使用 · 免登录 · 10种语言 · 可安装为应用程序 - 您的照片永远不会离开您的设备 免费，无需账户。

name: Dealer Bloom
tagline: The dealership platform that knows it sells cars
tagline_zh: 了解自身销售汽车业务的经销商平台
description: Multi-tenant SaaS for independent car dealerships. Inventory CMS, lead pipeline, custom domain, headless API, 12+ public site templates in one product. Dedicated database per tenant. Live in under a minute from $250/mo. No per-listing or per-lead fees.
description_zh: 面向独立汽车经销商的多租户SaaS。库存内容管理系统（CMS）、潜在客户渠道、自定义域名、无头API，一款产品包含12个以上公共网站模板。每个租户拥有专用数据库。上线不到一分钟，每月250美元起。无每条列表或每条潜在客户收费。

name: monkeysee
tagline: Let your terminal agent drive your real, logged-in Chrome.
tagline_zh: 让你的终端代理驱动你真实登录的Chrome浏览器。
description: Other browser agents open a headless browser logged into nothing. MonkeySee drives YOUR real Chrome — already signed into everything. No LLM, no agent loop: your terminal agent is the brain, MonkeySee the hands and eyes. Read pages, click, type, fill forms cinematically, run many sessions.
description_zh: 其他浏览器代理会打开一个无头浏览器，该浏览器未登录任何账户。而MonkeySee则会驱动您真正的Chrome浏览器——该浏览器已登录所有账户。无需大型语言模型（LLM），也无需代理循环：您的终端代理是大脑，MonkeySee则是手和眼。它可以像电影一样阅读页面、点击、输入、填写表单，并运行多个会话。

name: Pricer AI
tagline: Price your AI product with confidence.
tagline_zh: 自信地为你的AI产品定价。
description: PricerAI is a free calculator that turns raw AI model costs into a credit-based pricing model, blended pipeline cost, infrastructure overhead, target margin, credit denomination, and per-plan profitability, so you can price your AI product with confidence before you ship. Everything runs entirely in your browser. There is no account, no backend, and no database. Your pricing configuration is never uploaded anywhere.
description_zh: PricerAI是一款免费计算器，可将原始AI模型成本转换为基于信用定价模型、混合管道成本、基础设施开销、目标利润率、信用面额和每项计划的盈利能力，以便您在发货前自信地为AI产品定价。所有操作均在您的浏览器中完成。无需账户、后端和数据库。您的定价配置永远不会上传到任何地方。

name: Loops Lane — Chord Flow
tagline: Ripchord presets for R&B & Soul producers
tagline_zh: 为R&B和灵魂音乐制作人提供的Ripchord预设
description: Chord Flow is a Ripchord preset bank built for R&B, Soul, and Trap Soul producers. Press one key, get a full chord — minor sevenths, extended chords, suspended voicings — the harmonic language of R&B and Soul, instantly accessible without needing music theory. 30 genre-focused presets with over 1,200 chord variations total. Covers everything from classic 70s Soul to modern R&B and Trap Soul. Works in any DAW that supports VST3/AU — FL Studio, Ableton, Logic Pro, Studio One, Pro Tools.
description_zh: Chord Flow是一款专为R&B、灵魂乐和陷阱灵魂乐制作人打造的Ripchord预设音色库。只需按下一个键，即可获得完整的和弦——小七和弦、扩展和弦、挂弦——R&B和灵魂乐的和声语言，无需音乐理论即可即时访问。包含30种以流派为重点的预设，共计超过1200种和弦变体。涵盖从70年代经典灵魂乐到现代R&B和陷阱灵魂乐的所有风格。适用于任何支持VST3/AU的数字音频工作站（DAW）——FL Studio、Ableton、Logic Pro、Studio One、Pro Tools。

name: Modiva
tagline: One API & MCP server for every social platform
tagline_zh: 每个社交平台一个API和MCP服务器
description: Connect social and ads APIs through a single unified REST API and hosted MCP server. OAuth, typed tools and scopes handled for you — TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn and more.
description_zh: 通过单一的统一REST API和托管的MCP服务器，连接社交和广告API。OAuth、类型化工具和作用范围均由我们为您处理——涵盖TikTok、Instagram、YouTube、LinkedIn等更多平台。

name: clausio
tagline: AI contract review inside Microsoft Word for law firms
tagline_zh: 在Microsoft Word中为律师事务所进行AI合同审查
description: Clausio is a Microsoft Word plugin for contract review. It compares the client's version against your firm's template, highlights every change, and flags risky clauses by severity — critical, high, medium, low. For each flagged clause, it generates a counter-proposal in legal language, ready to approve or edit. No copy-pasting. No switching apps. Everything happens inside Word's task pane. Lawyer approves every suggestion before anything changes. Free 14-day trial for law firms.
description_zh: Clausio是一款用于合同审查的Microsoft Word插件。它将客户的版本与贵公司的模板进行对比，突出显示所有更改，并根据严重程度（关键、高、中、低）标记有风险的条款。对于每个标记的条款，它会生成一份法律语言表述的反提案，随时可供批准或编辑。无需复制粘贴，也无需切换应用程序。所有操作均在Word的任务窗格内完成。律师会在任何更改前批准每项建议。律师事务所可免费试用14天。

name: East Blue Gym
tagline: Full-stack gym SaaS with AI coach, live chat & payments
tagline_zh: 配备人工智能教练、实时聊天和支付功能的全栈健身房软件即服务（SaaS）
description: East Blue Gym is a production-ready gym management platform built with FastAPI, MongoDB, and Next.js. Features: → AI Personal Coach (Gemini) → Live Chat & WebSockets → Stripe Payments & Memberships → Video Vault → Community features → Mobile responsive → 110/100 Mozilla Security Score Built by a self-taught builder with zero CS degree using AI-assisted development. Everything runs on free tier — Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas. Live demo: https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app
description_zh: East Blue Gym是一个基于FastAPI、MongoDB和Next.js构建的、可投入生产的健身房管理平台。功能包括：→ AI私人教练（Gemini）→ 在线聊天与WebSockets→ Stripe支付与会员管理→ 视频库→ 社区功能→ 移动端响应式设计→ Mozilla安全评分110/100该平台由一位自学成才的开发者构建，他没有任何计算机科学学位，而是使用了人工智能辅助开发。所有功能均在免费层上运行——Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas。在线演示：https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app

name: EDD Hold
tagline: Skip government phone hold — we dial until you connect
tagline_zh: 免去政府电话等待——我们为您拨号直至接通
description: Stop spending hours redialing the IRS, CA EDD, Social Security, and other government agencies. EDD Hold auto-dials for you, navigates the phone menu, and calls you back the moment a live agent is ready. From $9.99. Money-back guarantee.
description_zh: 别再花几个小时反复拨打美国国税局（IRS）、加州就业发展部（CA EDD）、社会保障局（Social Security）和其他政府机构的电话了。EDD Hold会为您自动拨号，引导您进入电话菜单，并在有座席代表接听时立即回拨给您。起价9.99美元。退款保证。

name: Atom Foundry
tagline: Understand why AI recommends some brands, not others
tagline_zh: 了解人工智能为何推荐某些品牌而非其他品牌
description: Atom Foundry is building the AI Commerce Intelligence platform. We help brands understand how AI systems discover, evaluate, trust and recommend products. Measure AI Visibility, Recommendation Intelligence, AI Trust and Decision Confidence across modern AI platforms. Our mission is to map the emerging AI Commerce Graph and help brands become recommendation-ready in the age of AI-driven commerce.
description_zh: Atom Foundry正在构建人工智能商务智能平台。我们帮助品牌了解人工智能系统如何发现、评估、信任和推荐产品。衡量现代人工智能平台上的AI可见性、推荐智能、AI信任度和决策信心。我们的使命是绘制新兴的AI商务图谱，并帮助品牌在人工智能驱动的商务时代做好推荐准备。

name: Arkham Intelligence Wallet Data Scraper
tagline: Export Arkham wallet data from addresses or URLs
tagline_zh: 从地址或网址导出Arkham钱包数据
description: Paste wallet addresses or Arkham wallet URLs and export public Arkham wallet analytics to a dataset. Useful for on-chain research, compliance triage, portfolio review, and internal crypto dashboards.
description_zh: 粘贴钱包地址或Arkham钱包URL，并将Arkham钱包的公开分析数据导出到数据集中。这对链上研究、合规性分类、投资组合审查以及内部加密货币仪表板非常有用。

name: YT Analyzer
tagline: Outlier detection and analytics for YouTube creators
tagline_zh: YouTube创作者异常值检测与分析
description: YT Analyzer shows exactly which videos are over/underperforming vs. your channel average — directly on YouTube, no API key needed. Free: Outlier badges on your feed, plus channel analysis (upload patterns, title keyword performance, engagement rate). Pro: Full watch-page overlay with real-time view growth graph, title/thumbnail change history, algorithm "revival" detection, and channel comparison.
description_zh: YT Analyzer可直接在YouTube上准确显示哪些视频的表现优于/劣于您的频道平均水平，无需API密钥。免费版：在您的信息流上显示异常视频徽章，并提供频道分析（上传模式、标题关键词表现、互动率）。专业版：完整的观看页面覆盖，包括实时观看增长图、标题/缩略图更改历史、算法“复苏”检测以及频道对比。

name: EdgeShaping Lite
tagline: GA4 can't see AI crawlers. This WordPress plugin can.
tagline_zh: GA4无法识别AI爬虫，但这个WordPress插件可以。
description: GA4 relies on JavaScript, so it mostly can't see AI crawlers like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and Perplexity visiting your site. EdgeShaping Lite logs AI bot visits at the PHP layer instead — no JS dependency — so you can see which bots read which pages, and when. - Dictionary-based AI bot detection - Dashboard with bot frequency ranking + most-visited pages - Full access log, CSV export - AHQG Matrix: cross AI visits with human search clicks (GSC) to spot pages AI loves that humans haven't found yet

description: The free, no-login calculator you keep open all trip: - Currency + math in one: type "12,800×2", see it live in your home currency - Every "=" auto-saves to your history with place & time — no manual expense entry - "Cheap or expensive here?" See how a price compares to real local prices, as a number - Trip budget tracks itself by category - Offline · no login · 10 languages · installs as an app - Your photos never leave your device Free, no account needed.

name: Prevail
tagline: An AI harness for your life, not your job
tagline_zh: AI是为你的人生服务，而非你的工作
description: Prevail is an AI harness for your life; think Openclaw or Hermes, but instead of wrapping a model around your codebase, it wraps one around you. 🔌 Any model, your choice. Cloud (Claude, GPT, …) or fully local (Ollama). The harness is the product; swap the engine anytime. 🧠 It learns you. Persistent context about your life means it gets sharper every time you use it — no re-explaining yourself to a blank chat box. AI for your life, not your job.
description_zh: Prevail是您生活中的AI助手；想象一下Openclaw或Hermes，但它不是将模型包裹在您的代码库周围，而是将模型包裹在您周围。🔌 任何模型，您随意选择。云端（Claude、GPT……）或完全本地（Ollama）。助手是产品；随时更换引擎。🧠 它了解您。关于您生活的持续上下文意味着每次使用时它都会变得更加智能——无需向一个空白的聊天框重新解释自己。AI为您的生活服务，而非您的工作。

name: ROASintheBlack.com
tagline: Know your break-even ROAS before spending a dollar on ads
tagline_zh: 在广告上花一分钱之前，先了解你的盈亏平衡投资回报率
description: Free break-even ROAS calculator for marketers, ecommerce brands, and business owners. Enter your cost percentages and instantly see the minimum ROAS your campaigns need to stay profitable. No sign-up, no upsell, just the math.
description_zh: 面向营销人员、电商品牌和企业主的免费盈亏平衡ROAS（广告支出回报率）计算器。只需输入您的成本百分比，即可立即查看您的广告活动保持盈利所需的最低ROAS。无需注册，无强制升级，只提供计算服务。

name: DailyVox
tagline: Speak 42 seconds a day — a private, on-device voice diary
tagline_zh: 每天说42秒——一个私密的、设备上的语音日记
description: DailyVox turns 42 seconds of talking into a written journal — and a Digital Twin that learns your patterns over time. Everything runs on your iPhone: no account, no cloud, no tracking. The hardest part of journaling was never the writing — it was keeping it up and being able to look back. Speaking is the lowest-friction way in. Free forever, and open source.
description_zh: DailyVox将42秒的语音转录为文字日记，并生成一个数字孪生体，它会随着时间的推移学习你的习惯模式。所有操作均在iPhone上完成：无需注册账号、无需云端存储、无需追踪。写日记最难的部分从来不是写作本身，而是坚持下去并能够回顾。语音输入是最便捷的方式。永久免费，且开源。

name: rssu.me
tagline: Resume as Data
tagline_zh: 简历即数据
description: Your resume is data. Treat it like data. We kept reformatting the same resume for every application. So we built rssume. Enter your experience once. Share it via password-protected links — each with its own password, expiration, and template. Redact what you want, show what you want. Import from PDF, LinkedIn, or AI paste. Export to PDF when a portal demands it. Connect GitHub and keep it in version control. Let your skills speak. Not your formatting skills.
description_zh: 你的简历就是数据。要像对待数据一样对待它。我们总是为每份申请重新格式化同一份简历。因此，我们开发了rssume。只需输入一次你的经历。通过密码保护的链接进行分享——每个链接都有各自的密码、过期时间和模板。你可以编辑你想要的内容，展示你想要的信息。可以从PDF、LinkedIn或AI粘贴导入。当门户网站要求时，可以导出为PDF。连接GitHub并保持版本控制。让你的技能说话，而不是你的排版技能。

name: Dealer Bloom
tagline: The dealership platform that knows it sells cars
tagline_zh: 了解自身销售汽车业务的经销商平台
description: Multi-tenant SaaS for independent car dealerships. Inventory CMS, lead pipeline, custom domain, headless API, 12+ public site templates in one product. Dedicated database per tenant. Live in under a minute from $250/mo. No per-listing or per-lead fees.
