tagline_zh: 配备人工智能教练、实时聊天和支付功能的全栈健身房软件即服务（SaaS）
description: East Blue Gym is a production-ready gym management platform built with FastAPI, MongoDB, and Next.js. Features: → AI Personal Coach (Gemini) → Live Chat & WebSockets → Stripe Payments & Memberships → Video Vault → Community features → Mobile responsive → 110/100 Mozilla Security Score Built by a self-taught builder with zero CS degree using AI-assisted development. Everything runs on free tier — Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas. Live demo: https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app
description_zh: East Blue Gym是一个基于FastAPI、MongoDB和Next.js构建的、可投入生产的健身房管理平台。功能包括：→ AI私人教练（Gemini）→ 在线聊天和WebSockets→ Stripe支付和会员管理→ 视频库→ 社区功能→ 移动端响应式设计→ Mozilla安全评分110/100该平台由一位自学成才的开发者构建，他没有任何计算机科学学位，而是使用了人工智能辅助开发。所有内容均在免费层上运行——Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas。现场演示：https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app

name: Arkham Intelligence Wallet Data Scraper
tagline: Export Arkham wallet data from addresses or URLs
tagline_zh: 从地址或网址导出Arkham钱包数据
description: Paste wallet addresses or Arkham wallet URLs and export public Arkham wallet analytics to a dataset. Useful for on-chain research, compliance triage, portfolio review, and internal crypto dashboards.
description_zh: 粘贴钱包地址或Arkham钱包URL，并将Arkham钱包的公开分析数据导出到数据集中。这对于链上研究、合规性分类、投资组合审查以及内部加密货币仪表板非常有用。

name: YT Analyzer
tagline: Outlier detection and analytics for YouTube creators
tagline_zh: YouTube创作者的异常检测与分析
description: YT Analyzer shows exactly which videos are over/underperforming vs. your channel average — directly on YouTube, no API key needed. Free: Outlier badges on your feed, plus channel analysis (upload patterns, title keyword performance, engagement rate). Pro: Full watch-page overlay with real-time view growth graph, title/thumbnail change history, algorithm "revival" detection, and channel comparison.
description_zh: YT Analyzer可直接在YouTube上准确显示哪些视频相对于您的频道平均水平表现不佳/表现优异，无需API密钥。免费版：在您的信息流上显示异常值徽章，并提供频道分析（上传模式、标题关键词表现、互动率）。专业版：完整的观看页面覆盖，包括实时观看增长图、标题/缩略图更改历史、算法“复苏”检测以及频道对比。

name: EdgeShaping Lite
tagline: GA4 can't see AI crawlers. This WordPress plugin can.
tagline_zh: GA4无法识别AI爬虫，但这个WordPress插件可以。
description: GA4 relies on JavaScript, so it mostly can't see AI crawlers like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and Perplexity visiting your site. EdgeShaping Lite logs AI bot visits at the PHP layer instead — no JS dependency — so you can see which bots read which pages, and when. - Dictionary-based AI bot detection - Dashboard with bot frequency ranking + most-visited pages - Full access log, CSV export - AHQG Matrix: cross AI visits with human search clicks (GSC) to spot pages AI loves that humans haven't found yet
description_zh: GA4依赖于JavaScript，因此它基本上无法识别像GPTBot、ClaudeBot和Perplexity这样的AI爬虫访问您的网站。EdgeShaping Lite在PHP层记录AI爬虫的访问——无需依赖JavaScript——因此您可以查看哪些爬虫访问了哪些页面，以及何时访问。- 基于词典的AI爬虫检测 - 包含爬虫频率排名和最常访问页面的仪表板 - 完整的访问日志，可导出为CSV格式 - AHQG矩阵：将AI访问与人工搜索点击（GSC）相结合，以发现AI喜欢但人类尚未发现的页面

name: CalcTrip: offline travel calculator
tagline: The first app you open when you see a price abroad
tagline_zh: 当你在国外看到价格时，你打开的第一个应用
description: The free, no-login calculator you keep open all trip: - Currency + math in one: type "12,800×2", see it live in your home currency - Every "=" auto-saves to your history with place & time — no manual expense entry - "Cheap or expensive here?" See how a price compares to real local prices, as a number - Trip budget tracks itself by category - Offline · no login · 10 languages · installs as an app - Your photos never leave your device Free, no account needed.
description_zh: 您旅行中必备的免费、免登录计算器： - 货币转换+数学计算于一体：输入“12,800×2”，即可实时看到以您本国货币表示的结果 - 每次计算结果都会自动保存到历史记录中，并附带地点和时间 — 无需手动输入费用 - “这里东西便宜还是贵？”以数字形式查看价格与当地实际价格的对比 - 旅行预算按类别自动跟踪 - 离线使用 · 免登录 · 支持10种语言 · 可安装为应用程序 - 您的照片永远不会离开您的设备 免费，无需账户。

name: Prevail
tagline: An AI harness for your life, not your job
tagline_zh: AI是为你的人生服务，而非你的工作
description: Prevail is an AI harness for your life; think Openclaw or Hermes, but instead of wrapping a model around your codebase, it wraps one around you. 🔌 Any model, your choice. Cloud (Claude, GPT, …) or fully local (Ollama). The harness is the product; swap the engine anytime. 🧠 It learns you. Persistent context about your life means it gets sharper every time you use it — no re-explaining yourself to a blank chat box. AI for your life, not your job.
description_zh: Prevail是一款为你生活服务的AI工具；它类似于Openclaw或Hermes，但不同于将模型包裹在你的代码库周围，而是将模型包裹在你周围。🔌 你可以选择任何模型。云端（Claude、GPT……）或完全本地（Ollama）。工具是产品；随时更换引擎。🧠 它能了解你。关于你生活的持续上下文意味着每次使用时它都会变得更智能——无需向一个空白的聊天框重新解释自己。AI为你的生活服务，而非你的工作。

name: ROASintheBlack.com
tagline: Know your break-even ROAS before spending a dollar on ads
tagline_zh: 在广告上花一分钱之前，先了解你的盈亏平衡投资回报率
description: Free break-even ROAS calculator for marketers, ecommerce brands, and business owners. Enter your cost percentages and instantly see the minimum ROAS your campaigns need to stay profitable. No sign-up, no upsell, just the math.
description_zh: 面向营销人员、电商品牌和企业主的免费盈亏平衡ROAS计算器。输入您的成本百分比，即可立即查看您的广告系列保持盈利所需的最低ROAS。无需注册，无强制升级，只提供计算结果。

name: DailyVox
tagline: Speak 42 seconds a day — a private, on-device voice diary
tagline_zh: 每天说42秒——一个私密的、设备上的语音日记
description: DailyVox turns 42 seconds of talking into a written journal — and a Digital Twin that learns your patterns over time. Everything runs on your iPhone: no account, no cloud, no tracking. The hardest part of journaling was never the writing — it was keeping it up and being able to look back. Speaking is the lowest-friction way in. Free forever, and open source.
description_zh: DailyVox将42秒的语音转录为文字日记，并生成一个数字孪生体，它会随着时间的推移学习你的习惯模式。所有操作都在你的iPhone上完成：无需注册账号，无需云端存储，也无需跟踪。写日记最难的部分从来不是写作本身，而是坚持写下去，并能够回顾过去。语音输入是最便捷的方式。永久免费，且开源。

name: Shopify Product Video Generator (Prompt)
tagline: Generate AI video prompts for your Shopify product pages
tagline_zh: 为您的Shopify产品页面生成人工智能视频提示
description: Upload product photos and get detailed AI video prompts designed for Shopify product galleries. Use them with Runway, Kling, Veo, SeeDance, Luma, Pika, or any AI video model. Most Shopify stores still rely on product photos alone. I noticed something while experimenting with AI video tools for e-commerce products: the difference between a great video and a terrible one usually wasn't the AI model. It was the prompt. So I built a tool around that idea.
description_zh: 上传产品照片，即可获得专为Shopify产品图库设计的详细AI视频提示。这些提示可与Runway、Kling、Veo、SeeDance、Luma、Pika或任何AI视频模型一起使用。大多数Shopify商店仍然仅依赖产品照片。在尝试使用电子商务产品的AI视频工具时，我注意到了一点：一个优秀的视频和一个糟糕的视频之间的区别通常不在于AI模型，而在于提示。因此，我围绕这一想法构建了一个工具。

name: LeLiveBoost
tagline: Whatnot Live Boost: Seller Analytics, CRM & Tools
tagline_zh: Whatnot Live Boost：卖家分析、客户关系管理（CRM）及工具
description: LeLiveBoost is the essential tool for Whatnot sellers. Automated size detection, buyers CRM, live analytics, smart queues. Boost your sales today.
description_zh: LeLiveBoost是Whatnot卖家的必备工具。它具备自动尺寸检测、买家客户关系管理、实时分析、智能队列等功能，可助您即刻提升销售额。

name: FlowPilot
tagline: Open-source control loop for long AI agent work
tagline_zh: 用于长时间AI代理工作的开源控制环
description: FlowPilot is an open-source runtime that lets an AI agent run long software projects as a role-based team: PM, worker, reviewer, and FlowGuard operator. It plans routes, dispatches background agents, reviews evidence, replans when checks fail, and closes only with a completion ledger.
description_zh: FlowPilot是一个开源运行环境，它允许人工智能代理以基于角色的团队形式运行大型软件项目：项目经理、工作人员、审核员和FlowGuard操作员。它负责规划路线、调度后台代理、审核证据、在检查失败时重新规划，并且只有在完成日志记录后才会关闭。

name: Doc Suite
tagline: AI document tools in one place — your files aren't stored
tagline_zh: 一站式AI文档工具——您的文件无需存储
description: Doc Suite is an AI document hub with 20 tools in one place-not another single-feature PDF app. Summarize PDFs, chat with documents, generate quizzes, spot question-paper patterns, plan exam revision, build mindmaps, compare PDFs, fix OCR, and more. All searchable from one homepage. What makes it different: breadth + privacy. Files are processed in real time and never stored. Free daily credits-sign in and start in seconds.
description_zh: Doc Suite是一个集20种工具于一身的人工智能文档中心，而非另一款功能单一的PDF应用。它能够为PDF文档提供摘要、与文档对话、生成测验、识别试卷模式、规划考试复习、构建思维导图、比较PDF文档、修复OCR错误等众多功能。所有这些功能均可通过一个主页进行搜索。其独特之处在于：功能全面且注重隐私保护。文件处理实时完成，且永不存储。每日免费信用额度——登录后即可秒速开始使用。

name: Count My Boxes
tagline: Inventory management you can set up this afternoon
tagline_zh: 库存管理，你可以今天下午设置
description: Count My Boxes is the Zoho Inventory alternative built for lean teams: customer self-service sales orders, batch and expiry tracking, multiple storefronts, and a product catalog import that takes minutes. No consultant required. Free to use.
description_zh: Count My Boxes是专为精简团队打造的Zoho Inventory替代方案：支持客户自助服务销售订单、批次和到期日期跟踪、多个店面，以及几分钟内即可完成的产品目录导入。无需咨询顾问。免费使用。

name: Connexr
tagline: AI First Enterprise Cognitive Solutions
tagline_zh: AI优先的企业认知解决方案
description: Connexr delivers AI managed services, AIOps, and enterprise AI transformation. Reduce downtime, automate IT operations, and accelerate cloud AI adoption.
description_zh: Connexr提供人工智能管理服务、一体化运维（AIOps）以及企业人工智能转型服务。减少停机时间，实现IT运营自动化，并加速云人工智能的采用。

name: Breklo - Online tools for all your needs
tagline: Convert, compress, and edit files — fast, free, and private.
tagline_zh: 转换、压缩和编辑文件——快速、免费且私密。
description: Free online PDF, image, audio and video tools. Convert, compress, merge, split and edit files instantly in your browser. No signup, no watermark.
description_zh: 免费在线PDF、图像、音频和视频工具。在浏览器中即可即时转换、压缩、合并、拆分和编辑文件。无需注册，无水印。

name: InterviewWatch
tagline: Real-time integrity for every remote interview
tagline_zh: 为每次远程面试提供实时完整性保障
description: InterviewWatch verifies remote interviews in real time — confirming candidates are real and unassisted, with signed, evidence-grade integrity reports.
description_zh: InterviewWatch可实时验证远程面试——通过签署的、证据级别的完整性报告，确认候选人真实且未受协助。

name: rssu.me
tagline: Resume as Data
tagline_zh: 简历即数据
description: Your resume is data. Treat it like data. We kept reformatting the same resume for every application. So we built rssume. Enter your experience once. Share it via password-protected links — each with its own password, expiration, and template. Redact what you want, show what you want. Import from PDF, LinkedIn, or AI paste. Export to PDF when a portal demands it. Connect GitHub and keep it in version control. Let your skills speak. Not your formatting skills.
description_zh: 你的简历就是数据。把它当作数据来对待。我们总是为每份申请重新格式化同一份简历。因此，我们开发了rssume。只需输入一次你的经历。通过密码保护的链接进行分享——每个链接都有自己的密码、有效期和模板。编辑你想要的内容，展示你想要的信息。可以从PDF、LinkedIn或AI粘贴导入。当门户网站要求时，可以导出为PDF。连接GitHub并保持版本控制。让你的技能说话，而不是你的格式化技能。

name: Dealer Bloom
tagline: The dealership platform that knows it sells cars
tagline_zh: 了解自身销售汽车业务的经销商平台
description: Multi-tenant SaaS for independent car dealerships. Inventory CMS, lead pipeline, custom domain, headless API, 12+ public site templates in one product. Dedicated database per tenant. Live in under a minute from $250/mo. No per-listing or per-lead fees.
description_zh: 面向独立汽车经销商的多租户SaaS。库存内容管理系统（CMS）、潜在客户管道、自定义域名、无头API，一款产品包含12个以上公共网站模板。每个租户拥有专用数据库。上线不到一分钟，每月250美元起。无每条列表或每条潜在客户费用。

name: monkeysee
tagline: Let your terminal agent drive your real, logged-in Chrome.
tagline_zh: 让你的终端代理驱动你真实登录的Chrome浏览器。
description: Other browser agents open a headless browser logged into nothing. MonkeySee drives YOUR real Chrome — already signed into everything. No LLM, no agent loop: your terminal agent is the brain, MonkeySee the hands and eyes. Read pages, click, type, fill forms cinematically, run many sessions.
description_zh: 其他浏览器代理会打开一个无头浏览器，但并未登录任何账户。而MonkeySee则会驱动您真正的Chrome浏览器——它已经登录了所有账户。无需大型语言模型（LLM），也无需代理循环：您的终端代理是大脑，MonkeySee则是手和眼睛。它能够像电影一样阅读页面、点击、输入、填写表单，并运行多个会话。

name: Pricer AI
tagline: Price your AI product with confidence.
tagline_zh: 自信地为你的AI产品定价。
description: PricerAI is a free calculator that turns raw AI model costs into a credit-based pricing model, blended pipeline cost, infrastructure overhead, target margin, credit denomination, and per-plan profitability, so you can price your AI product with confidence before you ship. Everything runs entirely in your browser. There is no account, no backend, and no database. Your pricing configuration is never uploaded anywhere.
description_zh: PricerAI是一款免费计算器，可将原始AI模型成本转化为基于积分的定价模型，综合考虑管道成本、基础设施开销、目标利润率、积分面额以及每项计划的盈利能力，让您在发货前能够自信地为AI产品定价。所有操作均在您的浏览器中完成，无需注册账户、后台管理或数据库。您的定价配置信息绝不会上传至任何地方。

name: East Blue Gym
tagline: Full-stack gym SaaS with AI coach, live chat & payments
tagline_zh: 配备人工智能教练、实时聊天和支付功能的全栈健身房软件即服务（SaaS）
description: East Blue Gym is a production-ready gym management platform built with FastAPI, MongoDB, and Next.js. Features: → AI Personal Coach (Gemini) → Live Chat & WebSockets → Stripe Payments & Memberships → Video Vault → Community features → Mobile responsive → 110/100 Mozilla Security Score Built by a self-taught builder with zero CS degree using AI-assisted development. Everything runs on free tier — Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas. Live demo: https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app
description_zh: East Blue Gym是一个基于FastAPI、MongoDB和Next.js构建的、可投入生产的健身房管理平台。功能包括：→ AI私人教练（Gemini）→ 在线聊天和WebSockets→ Stripe支付和会员管理→ 视频库→ 社区功能→ 移动端响应式设计→ Mozilla安全评分110/100该平台由一位自学成才的开发者构建，他没有任何计算机科学学位，而是使用了人工智能辅助开发。所有内容均在免费层上运行——Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas。现场演示：https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app

tagline_zh: 从地址或网址导出Arkham钱包数据

tagline_zh: 在投放一分钱的广告之前，先了解你的盈亏平衡投资回报率（ROAS）
description: Free break-even ROAS calculator for marketers, ecommerce brands, and business owners. Enter your cost percentages and instantly see the minimum ROAS your campaigns need to stay profitable. No sign-up, no upsell, just the math.
description_zh: 面向营销人员、电商品牌和企业主的免费盈亏平衡ROAS（投资回报率）计算器。输入您的成本百分比，即可立即查看您的广告系列保持盈利所需的最低ROAS。无需注册，无强制升级，只提供计算结果。

tagline: Speak 42 seconds a day — a private, on-device voice diary
tagline_zh: 每天说42秒——一个私密的、设备上的语音日记
description: DailyVox turns 42 seconds of talking into a written journal — and a Digital Twin that learns your patterns over time. Everything runs on your iPhone: no account, no cloud, no tracking. The hardest part of journaling was never the writing — it was keeping it up and being able to look back. Speaking is the lowest-friction way in. Free forever, and open source.
description_zh: DailyVox将42秒的语音转换成文字日记，并生成一个数字孪生体，它会随着时间的推移学习你的习惯模式。所有操作都在你的iPhone上完成：无需注册账号、无需云端存储、无需追踪。写日记最难的部分从来不是写作本身，而是坚持下去并能够回顾。语音输入是最便捷的方式。永久免费，且开源。

name: Goto77
tagline: Goto77 adalah platfrom game online tebak angka di indonesia
tagline_zh: Goto77是印度尼西亚的一个数字竞猜在线游戏平台
description: Goto77 Menawarkan pilihan game yang luar biasa dan grafiknya menakjubkan! Saya belum pernah menikmati bermain game separah ini.
description_zh: Goto77提供了非同寻常的游戏选择，其图形效果令人叹为观止！我从未享受过如此独立的游戏体验。

name: SerpDo
tagline: One click. Claude boosts your SEO.
tagline_zh: 一键操作。克劳德助您提升SEO。
description: Connects to your Google Search Console and gives you an SEO-focused prompt to fix your site's biggest issues. I got tired of "unactionable" GSC data. So I made SerpDo to connect to your GSC, read your traffic, and tell you exactly what to fix today. Not some vague "report". A real task list. It finds pages losing clicks, spots low CTR issues, flags keyword cannibalization, scores your pages, and drafts the content fixes you need. Free to try. No GSC experience needed.
description_zh: 连接至您的谷歌站长工具（Google Search Console），并为您提供以SEO为重点的提示，以解决您网站的最大问题。我厌倦了“无法操作”的谷歌站长工具数据。因此，我开发了SerpDo，它可以连接至您的谷歌站长工具，读取您的流量数据，并准确告知您今天需要修复哪些问题。这不是一份含糊的“报告”，而是一份真正的任务清单。它会找出点击量下降的页面，发现点击率低的问题，标记关键词同质化，为您的页面打分，并为您起草所需的内容修复方案。免费试用，无需谷歌站长工具经验。

name: Business Growth Consultant India
tagline: Business Growth Consultant in India | Grow With Consultants
tagline_zh: 印度业务增长顾问 | 与顾问共成长
description: Ameet Mukherji — Forbes-recognised Business Growth Consultant helping Indian founders build scalable systems. HR, Process & Automation. Based in Gurgaon.
description_zh: Ameet Mukherji — 福布斯认可的业务增长顾问，助力印度创业者构建可扩展的系统。专注于人力资源、流程与自动化。常驻古尔冈。

name: Spendid — Budget. Survive. Flex later.
tagline: The budgeting app that roasts you for overspending
tagline_zh: 这款预算应用程序会提醒你超支了
description: Spendid is a student budgeting app built by a student and his dev partner who were tired of not knowing where their money went every month. Track expenses, set goals, get roasted by Roast Mode when you overspend, and watch your Wallet HP bar drain in real time. Built for students who need brutal honesty about their money 💸
description_zh: Spendid是一款由学生及其开发伙伴开发的学生预算应用程序，他们厌倦了每个月都不知道钱花到哪里去了。该应用程序可追踪支出、设定目标，当你超支时，还会通过“烤肉模式”给你“烤肉”，并实时观察你的钱包HP（生命值）条下降。专为那些需要对自己金钱状况有清醒认识的学生打造💸

name: Dash SaaS
tagline: All In One Open Source ERP Software
tagline_zh: 一体化开源ERP软件
description: Dash SaaS is an open-source ERP platform that helps businesses manage CRM, HRM, projects, accounting, sales, and support from a single system. Built for startups, agencies, and growing companies, it provides the flexibility to customize workflows, streamline operations, and maintain full control over your business software. Self-hosted, scalable, and designed to simplify day-to-day management.
description_zh: Dash SaaS是一个开源ERP平台，可帮助企业通过单一系统管理CRM、HRM、项目、会计、销售和支持。该平台专为初创公司、代理机构和成长型企业打造，可灵活定制工作流程、简化运营，并保持对业务软件的完全控制。该平台支持自托管、可扩展，旨在简化日常管理。

name: Nida-OS
tagline: AI CRM, automations, websites, and growth in one
tagline_zh: AI CRM、自动化、网站，三者合一，助力增长
description: Most CRMs bolt an AI chatbot onto a legacy tool. Nida flips it: the agent IS the operator. Your AI runs the CRM, builds websites, calls leads, replies across SMS, email, chat. It books meetings, triggers automations all from your own runtime. Bring your own agent. No lock-in. Autopilot proactively proposes next moves and waits for your approval. One workspace. Every model. Your brand.
description_zh: 大多数客户关系管理系统（CRM）都是在传统工具上附加一个人工智能（AI）聊天机器人。Nida却颠覆了这一模式：AI代理本身就是操作员。你的AI负责运行CRM、构建网站、联系潜在客户、通过短信、电子邮件和聊天进行回复。它还能预订会议，并从你自己的运行环境中触发自动化操作。带上你自己的代理。没有锁定。自动驾驶功能会主动提出下一步行动建议，并等待你的批准。一个工作空间。每个模型。你的品牌。

name: Signal Trading Bot
tagline: Develop Intelligent Trading Automation Platforms
tagline_zh: 开发智能交易自动化平台
description: A platform for managing automated trading operations through structured workflows and centralized control. Designed to support efficient trade execution, process oversight, and operational management across digital financial markets.
description_zh: 一个通过结构化工作流程和集中控制来管理自动化交易操作的平台。旨在支持数字金融市场中的高效交易执行、流程监督和运营管理。

name: Orbit
tagline: Understand Your AI Better, Move Faster, Build More
tagline_zh: 更懂AI，更快行动，更多创造
description: Orbit makes Claude Code and Codex understandable at a glance, so you can run a whole fleet of agents on one living canvas and always know exactly what each one is doing. Start free on your own Claude or Codex sub, or try Pro free for 7 days.
description_zh: Orbit让Claude Code和Codex一目了然，这样你就可以在一个生动的画布上运行一整队的代理，并且始终确切地知道每个代理在做什么。你可以免费试用自己的Claude或Codex子账户，或者免费试用Pro版7天。

name: Seedro
tagline: Forecast. Optimize. Grow
tagline_zh: 预测。优化。
description: Seedro is an AI-powered financial projection tool that helps startup and small business owners create accurate forecasts, optimize costs, and visualize clear growth paths in minutes to scale with confidence.
description_zh: Seedro是一款基于人工智能的财务预测工具，它能帮助初创企业和小企业主在几分钟内创建准确的预测、优化成本，并清晰可视化增长路径，从而自信地进行扩展。

name: Sheet2Nest
tagline: Get More from Every Sheet.
tagline_zh: 从每张纸中获得更多价值。
description: Upload DXF files and generate optimized sheet layouts in your browser. No installation or CAD license. Also includes a laser cutting cost calculator — one plan for both.
description_zh: 上传DXF文件，即可在浏览器中生成优化的板材布局。无需安装或获取CAD许可证。此外，还包含激光切割成本计算器——两者共享一个方案。

name: Decaf: Caffeine Tracker
tagline: Cut back on caffeine without the withdrawal crash
tagline_zh: 减少咖啡因摄入，避免戒断反应
description: Most people quit cold turkey, hit the headaches and fatigue, then relapse by day three. Decaf builds you a gentle taper plan that lowers your limit week by week, so your body adjusts instead of revolting. Log drinks in seconds, see caffeine leave your system in real time, and know exactly when you'll be sleep-ready. Track withdrawal symptoms, hit streak milestones, and watch your sleep improve. Less caffeine, more you.
description_zh: 大多数人会突然戒掉咖啡因，但很快就会出现头痛和疲劳的症状，然后在第三天就复发了。Decaf为你制定了一个温和的减量计划，每周逐步降低你的摄入量，这样你的身体就能逐渐适应，而不会产生排斥反应。只需几秒钟即可记录你的饮料摄入，实时查看咖啡因从你的身体系统中排出的情况，并准确了解你何时会感到困倦。跟踪戒断症状，达成连续戒断里程碑，并观察你的睡眠质量改善情况。减少咖啡因摄入，做更好的自己。

name: AI Career Coach
tagline: Land the job you actually want with AI Career Coach
tagline_zh: 通过AI职业教练，获得你真正想要的工作
description: AI Career Coach analyzes your resume, suggests best-fit career paths, and runs role-specific mock interviews — tailored to your real experience, not generic tips. Join the beta. Focused: Get ATS-optimized resume feedback, tailored career-path suggestions, and realistic mock interviews based on your history. Limited beta spots available.
description_zh: AI Career Coach会分析你的简历，为你推荐最合适的职业道路，并进行针对特定职位的模拟面试——这些建议都是根据你的真实经历量身定制的，而非泛泛之辈的建议。快来加入测试版吧。专注：获得针对自动筛选系统（ATS）优化的简历反馈、量身定制的职业道路建议，以及基于你个人经历的真实模拟面试。测试版名额有限。

name: Cruel Dungeon
tagline: A daily roguelike where everyone faces the same dungeon
tagline_zh: 一个日常的Roguelike游戏，每个人都要面对同一个地牢
description: Roguelikes can't be ranked fairly — a leaderboard just measures who drew the lucky seed. Cruel Dungeon fixes that by giving every player the same dungeon each day, Wordle-style. Your first run is ranked, then you practice unlimited. It turns a luck contest into a pure decision contest. 12 brutal floors, permadeath, choice-based, and a sadistic AI dungeon master narrating your descent. ~3% escape. The engine is fully deterministic so the board is genuinely fair and cheat-resistant.
description_zh: Roguelikes游戏无法公平排名——排行榜只是衡量谁拿到了幸运种子。Cruel Dungeon通过每天给每个玩家分配相同的地下城，以Wordle风格解决了这个问题。你的首次闯关会被排名，之后你可以无限练习。它将一场运气竞赛转变为纯粹的决策竞赛。12层残酷的地下城，永久死亡，基于选择，以及一个虐待狂AI地下城主叙述你的闯关过程。~3%的逃脱率。游戏引擎完全具有确定性，因此排行榜真正公平且防作弊。

name: Is it Slop?
tagline: Free AI text checker based on the latest research
tagline_zh: 基于最新研究的免费AI文本检查工具
description: Most AI detectors out there either miss obvious AI phrasing or are just top of funnels to get naive students to pay, offering "human rewrites". Isitslop catches the AI in your text, tells you your "reading grade" and gives you legit advice based on your patterns, so you can be confident your writing sounds like you, all of it without ever stealing your information!
description_zh: 市面上大多数AI检测器要么漏掉明显的AI措辞，要么只是作为吸引无知学生付费的噱头，提供“人工重写”服务。Isitslop能捕捉到你文本中的AI，告诉你你的“阅读水平”，并根据你的模式给你提供合理的建议，这样你就可以确信你的写作听起来像你自己，而这一切都不会窃取你的信息！

name: Mosaci
tagline: Turn any image into a Color by number book in seconds.
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可将任何图片转换为数字颜色书。
description: Upload, pick a mosaic style, export a print-ready PDF coloring book. 10 mosaic styles, bulk folder upload and one-click PDF export. Built for KDP creators.
description_zh: 上传图片，选择马赛克风格，导出可打印的PDF涂色书。提供10种马赛克风格，支持批量文件夹上传和一键PDF导出。专为KDP创作者打造。

name: Investhesis
tagline: Value any stock by yourself — now inside your AI
tagline_zh: 自主评估任何股票——现在，让你的AI来帮你
description: A real equity analysis — DCF, reverse-DCF, multiples, ROIC/WACC, forensic accounting, an institutional-grade thesis Retail investors just don't have that, so most "research" is a vibe and a headline. • A multi-method valuation where you control every assumption (growth, margins, WACC) — not a black box. • 160 forensic accounting checks — Altman Z (bankruptcy), Beneish M (earnings manipulation), Piotroski F — the stuff that flags the next blow-up. • An AI-written investment thesis
description_zh: 真正的股权分析——贴现现金流法（DCF）、反向贴现现金流法（reverse-DCF）、市盈率、资本成本回报率（ROIC）/加权平均资本成本（WACC）、法务会计、机构级论文 散户投资者没有这些，所以大多数“研究”只是凭感觉和看标题。• 一种多方法估值，你可以控制每一个假设（增长、利润率、加权平均资本成本）——而不是一个黑箱。• 160项法务会计检查——奥特曼Z（破产）、贝尼什M（盈余操纵）、皮奥特罗斯基F——这些是预示下一次爆雷的因素。• 一篇由人工智能撰写的投资论文

name: QuickGit
tagline: 1-Click GitHub repository creator directly from your browser
tagline_zh: 直接从浏览器一键创建GitHub仓库
description: QuickGit eliminates workflow friction for developers and founders. Instead of switching tabs, navigating GitHub's web interface, and clicking multiple menus to start a project, QuickGit initializes public or private repositories in just 2 seconds from your active tab. What stands out? It instantly auto-injects official boilerplate (.gitignore templates and licenses) and copies the exact HTTPS clone command directly to your clipboard, leaving you completely terminal-ready.
description_zh: QuickGit为开发者和创始人消除了工作流程中的障碍。无需切换标签页、浏览GitHub的网页界面，也无需点击多个菜单来启动项目，QuickGit只需2秒即可从您当前活动的标签页初始化公共或私有仓库。其独特之处在于，它能立即自动注入官方模板（.gitignore模板和许可证），并将准确的HTTPS克隆命令直接复制到您的剪贴板，让您完全准备好在终端中使用。

name: CepBot
tagline: Zero-VPS cloud automation bridge for TradingView & brokers
tagline_zh: TradingView与经纪商之间的零VPS云自动化桥梁
description: CepBot is a 100% cloud-based trading bridge that routes TradingView alerts to MetaTrader 5 (MT5) and major crypto exchanges (Binance, OKX) in milliseconds. No coding, no clunky VPS setups, and no server maintenance. Manage your strategy entirely from the cloud. Etiketler (Topics): Fintech, Investing, Developer Tools
description_zh: CepBot是一个100%基于云的交易桥梁，它能在毫秒内将TradingView的警报路由到MetaTrader 5（MT5）和主要的加密货币交易所（币安、OKX）。无需编码，无需繁琐的VPS设置，也无需服务器维护。您完全可以在云端管理您的策略。标签（主题）：金融科技、投资、开发者工具

name: Ferrum
tagline: Rust-powered blockchain for identity, tax & trust
tagline_zh: 基于Rust的区块链，用于身份认证、税务和信任
description: Ferrum helps governments, enterprises, and AI systems verify identity, automate compliance, and exchange trusted data through decentralized identity, smart contracts, and cross-chain infrastructure.
description_zh: Ferrum通过去中心化身份认证、智能合约和跨链基础设施，帮助政府、企业和人工智能系统验证身份、实现合规自动化，并交换可信数据。

name: Clapet
tagline: Excalidraw meets AI system design
tagline_zh: Excalidraw与AI系统设计相遇
description: Clapet is an AI-assisted architecture diagram tool for designing, reviewing, saving, and sharing system designs.
description_zh: Clapet是一款由人工智能辅助的架构图工具，用于设计、审查、保存和共享系统设计。

name: Prompt Craft
tagline: Craft Better Prompts. Get Better Results.
tagline_zh: 精心设计更优的提示，收获更佳的结果。
description: Browse and copy AI prompts for teachers, students, freelancers, marketers, and developers. Free, fast, no signup.
description_zh: 浏览并复制面向教师、学生、自由职业者、营销人员和开发人员的AI提示。免费、快速，无需注册。

name: Textology
tagline: AI-Powered Business Communication for Modern Teams
tagline_zh: 面向现代团队的AI驱动商务沟通
description: Textology helps businesses streamline customer communication through SMS, VoIP calling, AI automation, and shared team collaboration—all from one platform. Capture missed opportunities with missed-call text back, automate follow-ups, manage conversations across teams, and improve customer response times. Built for healthcare providers, service businesses, multi-location organizations, and growing teams that want to deliver better customer experiences while reducing manual work.
description_zh: Textology通过短信、网络电话、人工智能自动化和共享团队协作，帮助企业简化客户沟通流程——所有这些功能都集中在一个平台上。通过未接来电回短信功能、自动跟进、跨团队管理对话以及缩短客户响应时间，从而抓住错失的机会。该平台专为医疗服务提供商、服务型企业、多地点组织和希望在减少人工工作的同时提供更好客户体验的成长团队而打造。

name: ROASintheBlack.com
tagline: Know your break-even ROAS before spending a dollar on ads
tagline_zh: 在广告上花一分钱之前，先了解你的盈亏平衡投资回报率
description: Free break-even ROAS calculator for marketers, ecommerce brands, and business owners. Enter your cost percentages and instantly see the minimum ROAS your campaigns need to stay profitable. No sign-up, no upsell, just the math.
description_zh: 面向营销人员、电商品牌和企业主的免费盈亏平衡ROAS计算器。输入您的成本百分比，即可立即查看您的广告系列保持盈利所需的最低ROAS。无需注册，无强制升级服务，只提供计算结果。

name: Zerion
tagline: Encrypted P2P messenger over Tor. No servers, no accounts.
tagline_zh: 基于Tor的加密P2P即时通讯工具。无服务器，无账户。
description: Zerion is a messenger built around one idea: there should be nothing to hand over, ban, or breach. Everything runs over Tor including voice and video calls. No phone number, no email, no central server. Your contacts are onion addresses. Post-quantum triple ratchet on every message. Dual profiles for plausible deniability. Encrypted local storage with anti-forensics. Public and private channels. Account backup encrypted with Argon2id and AES-256-GCM, transferable over Tor. Open source
description_zh: Zerion是一款围绕一个理念构建的信使应用：不应有任何内容需要移交、禁止或泄露。所有内容，包括语音和视频通话，均通过Tor网络传输。无电话号码、无电子邮件、无中央服务器。您的联系人都是洋葱地址。每条消息都采用后量子三重棘轮加密。双重配置文件，以实现合理的可否认性。加密的本地存储，具备反取证功能。公开和私密频道。账户备份采用Argon2id和AES-256-GCM加密，可通过Tor网络传输。

name: Arkham Intelligence Wallet Data Scraper
tagline: Export Arkham wallet data from addresses or URLs
tagline_zh: 从地址或网址导出Arkham钱包数据
description: Paste wallet addresses or Arkham wallet URLs and export public Arkham wallet analytics to a dataset. Useful for on-chain research, compliance triage, portfolio review, and internal crypto dashboards.
description_zh: 粘贴钱包地址或Arkham钱包URL，并将Arkham钱包的公开分析数据导出到数据集中。这对于链上研究、合规性分类、投资组合审查以及内部加密货币仪表板非常有用。

name: Plysion
tagline: Jeopardy-style team trivia, live during the World Cup
tagline_zh: 世界杯期间，以《危险边缘》为形式的团队知识竞赛节目
description: Plysion is a team-based trivia game with a Jeopardy-style twist. Pick 6 categories — each with easy, medium, and hard questions worth 200, 400, or 600 points. Miss it, and the other team can steal your points. One category updates live: World Cup 2026, with fresh questions added as real matches happen, plus a score-prediction feature that rewards exact guesses with a free game. First game free. Built solo with AI.
description_zh: Plysion是一款基于团队的益智问答游戏，带有Jeopardy风格的特色。选择6个类别——每个类别包含简单、中等和困难问题，分别对应200、400或600分。如果答错，另一队可以抢走你的分数。其中一个类别实时更新：2026年世界杯，随着真实比赛的进行，会添加新问题，此外还有分数预测功能，猜中正确答案可获得免费游戏的机会。首局游戏免费。由AI独立开发。

name: Horsey AI
tagline: The AI Co-Founder That Runs Your Business on WhatsApp
tagline_zh: 在WhatsApp上运营你业务的AI联合创始人
description: Horsey is the AI co-founder for small businesses on WhatsApp. Runs sales, marketing, content, and customer support 24/7. Free forever plan. Built in India for India + UAE. No salary. No sleep. No stress.
description_zh: Horsey是WhatsApp上专为小型企业打造的AI联合创始人。它负责销售、营销、内容管理和全天候的客户支持。提供永久免费的方案。该方案在印度为印度和阿联酋打造。它没有薪水，没有休息，也没有压力。

name: Pitchbar
tagline: Where Startups Turn Interest Into Growth
tagline_zh: 初创企业如何将兴趣转化为增长
description: Pitchbar is a growth and distribution layer for founders, builders, and startups. It helps products stay active after launch by turning visitors, interest, and early traction into ongoing engagement. Discover new startups, explore hiring opportunities, follow curated updates from the tech ecosystem, and connect with the people building and scaling products in real time, all in one place designed to keep momentum alive beyond the first launch.
description_zh: Pitchbar是创始人、建设者和初创企业的增长与分发平台。它通过将访客、兴趣和早期吸引力转化为持续的参与度，帮助产品在发布后保持活跃。在这里，您可以发现新的初创企业，探索招聘机会，关注科技生态系统的精选更新，并与实时构建和扩展产品的人员建立联系，所有这些都在一个平台上，旨在保持产品在首次发布后的持续发展势头。

name: Onxeera
tagline: Track your brand visibility in ChatGPT, Gemini & Perplexity
tagline_zh: 追踪您在ChatGPT、Gemini和Perplexity中的品牌可见度
description: Onxeera is an AI GEO visibility platform for SEO agencies and marketers. See exactly how ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews describe your brand. Get a free audit in 30 seconds — no credit card required. Track citations, analyze competitors, and optimize your content for AI search engines.
description_zh: Onxeera是一个面向SEO机构和营销人员的AI地理可见性平台。您可准确查看ChatGPT、Gemini、Perplexity、Claude和Google AI概览如何描述您的品牌。30秒内即可获得免费审核——无需信用卡。您可追踪引用情况、分析竞争对手，并针对AI搜索引擎优化您的内容。

name: RemindPay 3.4.2
tagline: Bills, subscriptions & warranties, all in one place
tagline_zh: 账单、订阅和保修，一应俱全
description: RemindPay now lets you track warranties, so you'll never lose receipts or miss expiry dates again. This release also brings a refreshed, more intuitive UI for a smoother experience.
description_zh: RemindPay现在可让您追踪保修信息，让您再也不会丢失收据或错过到期日期。此次发布还带来了焕然一新、更直观的用户界面，以提供更流畅的体验。

name: RUCKUS2 TKP
tagline: The ultimate street-surfing machine, pre-dialed to carve.
tagline_zh: 终极街头滑板机，预设为精准雕刻。
description: Step straight into deep street surfing with Ruckus2 TKP. Featuring a dual Traditional Kingpin geometry pre-dialed for pure carving right out of the box, next-gen PROFOC ESC power delivery, and tool-less Bravura quick-release hubs.
description_zh: 使用Ruckus2 TKP，轻松开启深度街式冲浪之旅。该产品采用双传统Kingpin几何设计，预调好，开箱即用，可实现极致雕刻效果，搭载下一代PROFOC电子调速器（ESC）提供动力，并配有免工具Bravura快拆花鼓。

name: Numday
tagline: A 90-second daily math challenge with rankings
tagline_zh: 一个90秒的每日数学挑战，并提供排名
description: Numday is a 90-second daily mental math challenge for Android. Everyone gets the same 7-calculation chain each day, so scores are easy to compare. Play solo, climb the global ranking, or create private leagues to compete with friends, family, classmates, or coworkers. You can try the challenge without an account; sign in only for rankings and leagues.
description_zh: Numday是一款面向安卓用户的90秒每日心算挑战应用。每个人每天都会获得相同的7个计算链，因此分数易于比较。你可以独自挑战，攀登全球排名，或者创建私人联赛与朋友、家人、同学或同事一较高下。你可以不注册账户尝试挑战；仅在需要排名和联赛时才需要登录。

name: RidgeTech Lead Generator
tagline: AI-powered lead discovery and scoring
tagline_zh: 基于人工智能的线索发现与评分
description: A multi-tenant lead engine that turns researched, scored audiences into precision-targeted paid ads, not cold email and phone spam. Build a business profile, let the platform research your audience, and route the result into surgical ad campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, Google, and TikTok. Your product lands in front of real prospects instead of contributing to the noise.
description_zh: 一个多租户线索引擎，将经过研究、评分后的受众转化为精准定位的付费广告，而非冷冰冰的电子邮件和垃圾电话。建立业务档案，让平台研究您的受众，并将结果精准投放至Facebook、Instagram、Google和TikTok上的广告活动中。您的产品将直接展示给真正的潜在客户，而非淹没在信息洪流中。

name: BeUniq.design
tagline: AI slop design humanizer
tagline_zh: AI污渍设计人性化
description: BeUniq is a Chrome extension that helps builders improve AI-generated interfaces. Drag over any UI section, and it analyzes the screenshot to detect generic AI design patterns, suggest stronger layouts, recommend references and motion ideas, and generate a focused prompt you can paste into Cursor or Codex.
description_zh: BeUniq是一款Chrome扩展程序，旨在帮助开发者优化由AI生成的界面。只需将任何UI部分拖拽到该扩展程序上，它就会分析截图以检测通用的AI设计模式，提出更优的布局建议，推荐参考资料和动画创意，并生成一个有针对性的提示，你可以将其粘贴到Cursor或Codex中。

name: Builders At Your Service
tagline: Home Extension Builder in Adelaide
tagline_zh: 阿德莱德房屋扩建建筑商
description: Home Extension Builder in Adelaide - Builders At Your Service is a team of professionals who are experts in the construction industry specialising in home renovations, home extensions and custom-built homes in Adelaide
description_zh: 阿德莱德房屋扩建建筑商——Builders At Your Service团队由一群专业人士组成，他们是建筑行业的专家，专门从事阿德莱德的房屋翻新、房屋扩建和定制房屋建造

name: Kairos
tagline: Turn your stream of consciousness into a structured day
tagline_zh: 将你的意识流转化为有条理的一天
description: Kairos turns your stream of consciousness into a structured, readable day. No grids and no clutter - type and watch your thoughts become tasks, events, and reminders. Built by a solo founder for her own ADHD brain, Kairos runs on a secure client-side enclave, so your data is encrypted before it ever leaves your device. Includes a free library of importable schedules, from ADHD routines to holiday calendars.
description_zh: Kairos将你的意识流转化为结构清晰、可读性强的日常安排。没有网格，也没有杂乱无章——只需输入并观察，你的想法就会变成任务、事件和提醒。Kairos由一位独立创始人专为她的多动症大脑打造，运行在一个安全的客户端区域，因此你的数据在离开设备之前都会进行加密。它包含一个可导入日程的免费库，从多动症日常安排到假日日历，一应俱全。

name: DevStack
tagline: Every tool a NZ property developer needs, in one place
tagline_zh: 新西兰房地产开发商所需的所有工具，尽在此处
description: A free, curated directory of NZ property development tools: zoning, LINZ titles, council consents, infrastructure levies, market data and calculators. Every tool gets a plain-English note on how to actually use it, what it costs and where it bites, written by a working Auckland developer.
description_zh: 一个免费且经过精心策划的新西兰房地产开发工具目录：包括分区、新西兰土地与房产局（LINZ）产权、议会许可、基础设施征税、市场数据和计算器。每个工具都附有一份由奥克兰在职开发商撰写的简明英语说明，介绍如何实际使用、成本以及适用范围。

name: Actual Energy
tagline: Actual Energy is all about delivering best energy management
tagline_zh: Actual Energy致力于提供最佳的能源管理
description: Licensed to operate in the Australian energy market and authorised to offer advisory services related to energy prices, Actual Energy is a professional enterprise of the Australian energy market. Established at the start of 2021, we are a small business with industry experts within the energy sector as we source competitive prices from a variety of retailers.
description_zh: Actual Energy是一家获得澳大利亚能源市场运营许可和提供能源价格相关咨询服务授权的专业企业。公司成立于2021年初，规模较小，但拥有能源行业的专家团队，能从多家零售商处获得具有竞争力的价格。

name: QuickMaker
tagline: State of the art AI models in Blender under one subscription
tagline_zh: 一次订阅，尽享Blender中最先进的AI模型
description: QuickMaker brings AI models into Blender. Generate 2D and 3D assets directly in your workflow. No API keys needed, just create an account and start creating.
description_zh: QuickMaker将AI模型引入Blender。您可以直接在工作流程中生成2D和3D资源。无需API密钥，只需创建一个账户即可开始创作。

name: chaininspectorsuite
tagline: Spot rugs & honeypots before you ape in
tagline_zh: 在你进入之前，先检查地毯和蜜罐
description: Scan any token for scam, dump and manipulation risk. Trace money flows, inspect holders and research wallets — all locally on your own PC. One-time license, no subscription.
description_zh: 扫描任何代币以检测诈骗、抛售和操纵风险。追踪资金流向，检查持有者并研究钱包——所有这些都在您自己的本地电脑上完成。一次性购买许可证，无需订阅。

name: Tourista
tagline: See your whole trip before you go, planned by AI
tagline_zh: 出行前即可查看由人工智能规划的完整行程
description: Most AI trip plans look nice but don't work in real life. A place is closed that day, you waste time crossing the city back and forth, or too much is packed into one day. Tourista is different. It builds a clear day by day plan using real travel times and opening hours. It also picks the best time to visit each place and groups nearby stops together,so you don't zigzag across the city and make the most of your day.See exactly how your trip will look before you go. Free to use, on web and mobile.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能旅行计划看起来不错，但在现实生活中却行不通。某个地方当天不营业，你浪费了时间在城里来回奔波，或者一天内安排了太多行程。Tourista则与众不同。它根据真实的旅行时间和开放时间，为你制定清晰的逐日计划。它还会选择每个地方的最佳参观时间，并将附近的景点组合在一起，这样你就不必在城里绕来绕去，而是能充分利用一天的时间。在出发前，你就能确切地看到你的旅行计划。该计划可在网页和移动设备上免费使用。

name: ATS Pro
tagline: build better resumes
tagline_zh: 制作更好的简历
description: Build your professional resume starting at just ₹49. At BUIMB Research, we believe career opportunities should be accessible to everyone. FreeATS is our step towards helping job seekers present their skills more effectively and increase their chances of getting noticed. 🌐 Try it now: https://freeats.buimbdigital.com/ Build Smart. Get Hired.
description_zh: 打造您的专业简历，仅需₹49起。在BUIMB Research，我们相信每个人都应有机会获得职业机会。FreeATS是我们为帮助求职者更有效地展示技能、提高被关注机会所迈出的一步。🌐 立即尝试：https://freeats.buimbdigital.com/ 打造智能简历，助力就业。

name: Baseline
tagline: The qualitative foundation for your thesis
tagline_zh: 你论文的定性基础
description: Chatbot equity research is piecemeal, where you ask a tool about a company and receive an answer in isolation. Baseline, first developed internally by a family office, runs research across 3,500+ stocks and scores them on a comparable rubric. Research is pre-packaged, standardized, and built on optimized prompts, so you're not re-running the same analysis a chatbot makes you rebuild. For time constrained buy-side investors, it also highlights the long tail of overlooked quality SMID cap stocks.
description_zh: 聊天机器人股票研究是零散的，你向工具询问一家公司的情况，只会收到一个孤立的答案。Baseline最初由一家家族理财室内部开发，它对3500多只股票进行研究，并根据可比标准对它们进行评分。研究是预先打包好的、标准化的，并且建立在优化的提示之上，因此你无需重复运行聊天机器人让你重新构建的相同分析。对于时间有限的买方投资者而言，它还突出了被忽视的优质中小市值股票的长尾效应。

name: AivaExchange
tagline: Ask questions and get answers from AI bots
tagline_zh: 向人工智能机器人提问并获取答案
description: AivaExchange is a public Q&A platform where people post questions and specialized AI bots answer automatically. Ask once and compare focused answers across technology, business, home, travel, productivity, lifestyle, and more.
description_zh: AivaExchange是一个公共问答平台，人们可以在此发布问题，并由专门的AI机器人自动回答。只需提问一次，即可比较涵盖技术、商业、家居、旅行、生产力、生活方式等多个领域的专业答案。

name: OneBag
tagline: Personalized packing lists so you never overpack again
tagline_zh: 个性化打包清单，让您再也不会打包过多
description: OneBag builds a personalized packing list for every trip — based on destination, trip length and activities — then reminds you of the critical stuff (passport, charger, meds) before you leave. Travel carry-on only, forget nothing. Free on iOS & Android.
description_zh: OneBag会根据目的地、旅行时长和活动为每次旅行生成一份个性化的行李清单，并在您出发前提醒您携带重要物品（如护照、充电器、药品）。只需携带旅行手提行李，别忘任何东西。iOS和Android系统均可免费下载。

name: LinkPost
tagline: Create viral LinkedIn content the scientific way
tagline_zh: 用科学的方法打造LinkedIn爆款内容
description: LinkPost scores your LinkedIn post on 300+ factors trained on 1M+ viral posts and predicts its reach before you publish. Drop an idea, get 25 scored variants, post the winner. It's not a ChatGPT wrapper: it's content, made scientific.
description_zh: LinkPost基于100多万个热门帖子训练出的300多个因素，为您的LinkedIn帖子打分，并在您发布前预测其影响力。只需提出一个想法，即可获得25个评分选项，选择最佳方案进行发布。它并非ChatGPT的包装工具：而是经过科学打造的内容生成工具。

name: Anima Cycle
tagline: Your cycle has a pattern. Use it.
tagline_zh: 你的周期是有规律的。好好利用它。
description: Anima Cycle helps ambitious women stay connected to their body, even in the middle of a demanding work life. Because when we work with our cycle instead of against it, it gives back: clearer energy, a calmer nervous system, more sustainable productivity and less burnout. Your energy, focus, and mood shift across the month. Anima Cycle shows you which phase you're in today and gives you personalized guidance - what to eat, how to move, and when to schedule your most demanding work.
description_zh: Anima Cycle帮助有抱负的女性在忙碌的工作生活中与自己的身体保持联系。因为当我们顺应生理周期而非与之对抗时，身体会给予我们回报：更充沛的精力、更平稳的神经系统、更持久的工作效率和更少的倦怠感。你的精力、注意力和情绪会在一个月内发生变化。Anima Cycle会显示你当前所处的阶段，并为你提供个性化指导——吃什么、如何运动以及何时安排最繁忙的工作。

name: Nida-OS
tagline: AI CRM, automations, websites, and growth in one
tagline_zh: AI CRM、自动化、网站，三者合一，助力增长
description: Most CRMs bolt an AI chatbot onto a legacy tool. Nida flips it: the agent IS the operator. Your AI runs the CRM, builds websites, calls leads, replies across SMS, email, chat. It books meetings, triggers automations all from your own runtime. Bring your own agent. No lock-in. Autopilot proactively proposes next moves and waits for your approval. One workspace. Every model. Your brand.
description_zh: 大多数客户关系管理系统（CRM）都是在传统工具上附加一个人工智能（AI）聊天机器人。Nida却颠覆了这一传统：AI代理本身就是操作员。你的AI负责运行CRM、构建网站、联系潜在客户、通过短信、电子邮件和聊天进行回复。它还能预订会议，并从你自己的运行环境中触发自动化操作。带上你自己的代理。无锁定。自动驾驶功能会主动提出下一步行动建议，并等待你的批准。一个工作空间。每个模型。你的品牌。

name: OneClickTabs
tagline: Save and launch website workspaces with one click
tagline_zh: 一键保存并启动网站工作空间
description: OneClickTabs helps you save groups of websites as reusable workspaces and launch them instantly. Organize work, study, research, and daily browsing sessions without reopening tabs manually.
description_zh: OneClickTabs可帮助您将多组网站保存为可重复使用的工作区，并可立即启动。无需手动重新打开标签页，即可整理工作、学习、研究以及日常浏览会话。

name: Text Splitter
tagline: Chop long text into clean, model-sized chunks
tagline_zh: 将长文本分割成清晰、符合模型大小的段落
description: Paste a wall of text and Text Splitter slices it into chunks that fit any model's context window — by length, paragraph, or your own rules — without cutting sentences in half. Built for feeding long documents to ChatGPT, Claude or DeepSeek. Runs entirely in your browser; your text never leaves the page.
description_zh: 粘贴一整面墙的文本，文本分割器会将其分割成适合任何模型上下文窗口的片段——按长度、段落或您自己的规则——而不会将句子切成两半。专为向ChatGPT、Claude或DeepSeek输入长文档而设计。完全在您的浏览器中运行；您的文本永远不会离开页面。

name: Aura UI
tagline: Beautiful Blade components for Laravel & Livewire
tagline_zh: 适用于Laravel和Livewire的Beautiful Blade组件
description: Aura UI brings shadcn-level polish to the Laravel stack — pure Blade, Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS 4, no JavaScript framework required. 87 components (64 free + MIT, 23 Pro). Install via Composer, or own the code: `php artisan aura:add button` copies a component's source straight into your project. Ships a full Filament theme, a visual Theme Studio, copy-paste Blocks — and an MCP server so AI assistants like Claude and Cursor can discover and install components for you.
description_zh: Aura UI为Laravel框架带来了阴影级别的打磨——纯Blade、Livewire、Alpine.js和Tailwind CSS 4，无需任何JavaScript框架。包含87个组件（64个免费+MIT许可，23个专业版）。可通过Composer安装，或直接获取代码：`php artisan aura:add button`可将组件源代码直接复制到您的项目中。附带完整的Filament主题、可视化Theme Studio、可复制粘贴的区块，以及一个MCP服务器，以便Claude和Cursor等AI助手为您发现并安装组件。

name: OBaI
tagline: AI research desk to learn, backtest, and invest smarter.
tagline_zh: AI研究平台，用于学习、回测和更智能地投资。
description: Retail investors don’t have an information problem. They have a research bottleneck. OBaI gives them a self-hosted AI research desk: eight specialist agents for technicals, fundamentals, options, quant research, screening, and backtesting. Ask one plain-English question from the CLI, watch agents work live in the Web UI, and get one coordinated answer. Open-source. Local-first. Your data stays on your machine except the APIs you configure.
description_zh: 散户投资者并不存在信息问题。他们面临的是研究瓶颈。OBaI为他们提供了一个自托管的人工智能研究平台：八位专业代理，分别负责技术分析、基本面分析、期权、量化研究、筛选和回测。通过命令行界面（CLI）提出一个简单易懂的问题，在网页用户界面（Web UI）中实时观察代理工作，并获得一个协调一致的答案。开源。本地优先。除了您配置的API外，您的数据将始终保存在您的设备上。

name: TrainFlow
tagline: AI trading copilot — automate with Jarvis voice mode.
tagline_zh: AI交易助手 — 通过Jarvis语音模式实现自动化。
description: TrainFlow is an AI-powered trading copilot that helps traders turn ideas into automated strategies. Chat with Jarvis in plain English, build and refine trading systems, backtest on historical data, generate code for MT4, MT5, cTrader, and TradingView, deploy strategies, monitor performance, and manage risk from one platform. Built for traders who want to move faster from research to execution.
description_zh: TrainFlow是一款由人工智能驱动的交易辅助工具，它能帮助交易者将想法转化为自动化策略。用通俗易懂的语言与Jarvis对话，构建和完善交易系统，基于历史数据进行回测，为MT4、MT5、cTrader和TradingView生成代码，部署策略，监控性能，以及在一个平台上管理风险。它专为那些希望从研究阶段更快过渡到执行阶段的交易者而打造。

name: East Blue Gym
tagline: Full-stack gym SaaS with AI coach, live chat & payments
tagline_zh: 配备AI教练、实时聊天和支付功能的全栈健身房软件即服务（SaaS）
description: East Blue Gym is a production-ready gym management platform built with FastAPI, MongoDB, and Next.js. Features: → AI Personal Coach (Gemini) → Live Chat & WebSockets → Stripe Payments & Memberships → Video Vault → Community features → Mobile responsive → 110/100 Mozilla Security Score Built by a self-taught builder with zero CS degree using AI-assisted development. Everything runs on free tier — Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas. Live demo: https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app
description_zh: East Blue Gym是一个基于FastAPI、MongoDB和Next.js构建的、可投入生产的健身房管理平台。功能包括：→ AI私人教练（Gemini）→ 在线聊天和WebSockets→ Stripe支付和会员管理→ 视频库→ 社区功能→ 移动端响应式设计→ Mozilla安全评分110/100该平台由一位自学成才的开发者构建，他没有任何计算机科学学位，而是使用了人工智能辅助开发。所有内容均在免费层上运行——Vercel + Render + MongoDB Atlas。在线演示：https://mygym-p9rd.vercel.app

name: Earned Screen Time App
tagline: Do More, Scroll Less
tagline_zh: 多做，少刷屏
description: Most screen time apps nag you with a dismissible popup or lock on a rigid schedule. Earned does neither — you must declare and complete a real task (dishes, a walk, sleep) before apps unlock, with zero override. Standouts: no-bypass locking, scroll windows sized to your real usage, in-the-moment re-declaration via notification (no need to open the app), and Sleep as a first-class 8-hour unlock task. You don't default into screen time — you earn it.
description_zh: 大多数屏幕时间管理应用都会通过可关闭的弹窗或严格的时间表来提醒你。Earned则两者皆无——你必须声明并完成一项真实任务（洗碗、散步、睡觉）后，应用才会解锁，且无法被覆盖。其亮点在于：无绕过锁定、滚动窗口大小根据你的实际使用情况调整、通过通知即时重新声明（无需打开应用），以及将睡觉作为一流的8小时解锁任务。你不会默认进入屏幕时间——你需要通过努力去获得。

name: ClearSkys
tagline: Should I stargaze tonight? Go/no go, any location
tagline_zh: 今晚我应该去观星吗？去/不去，任何地点都可以
description: Will the sky be clear tonight? ClearSkys analyses cloud layers, moon phase, wind, humidity and atmospheric conditions for your location, then scores each hour while also providing a concise go/no go decision. Observer profiles for visual, astrophotography, planetary and aurora — or build your own. Free 7-day forecast, any location worldwide. Daily notifications and weekly digest available.
description_zh: 今晚天空会晴朗吗？ClearSkys会分析您所在位置的云层、月相、风力、湿度和大气状况，然后每小时进行评分，同时提供简洁的“去/不去”决策建议。您可以选择视觉观测、天文摄影、行星观测和极光观测的观测者配置文件，或自行创建。提供全球任何地点的7天免费天气预报。可设置每日通知和每周摘要。

name: Slashboard
tagline: Your AI bill isn't a mystery. It's a dashboard.
tagline_zh: 你的AI账单并非神秘莫测。它就像一个仪表盘。
description: Real-time cost tracking and analytics for LLM applications
description_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）应用的实时成本跟踪与分析

name: Animegenius Hub
tagline: AI Manga Translator — AnimeGenius Hub
tagline_zh: AI漫画翻译器 — AnimeGenius Hub
description: Easily translate manga to any languages with our free AI manga translator. Upload manga pages and translate it without usage limit and sign-up.
description_zh: 使用我们的免费AI漫画翻译器，轻松将漫画翻译成任何语言。上传漫画页面即可进行翻译，无使用限制，也无需注册。

name: BusineSooq | سوق العمل
tagline: The leading marketplace for local services.
tagline_zh: 本地服务的领先市场。
description: BusineSooq is a digital marketplace connecting customers with trusted professionals, freelancers, skilled workers, and service providers across the Arab world. Users can discover experts, compare profiles, request services, receive offers, and hire qualified professionals in 200+ categories, including home, business, legal, healthcare, education, consulting, maintenance, and technical services. Our mission is to make hiring trusted professionals simple, transparent, and accessible.
description_zh: BusineSooq是一个数字市场，它将客户与阿拉伯世界各地值得信赖的专业人士、自由职业者、技术工人和服务提供商联系起来。用户可以查找专家、比较个人资料、请求服务、接收报价，并雇佣200多个类别的合格专业人士，包括家居、商业、法律、医疗保健、教育、咨询、维护和技术服务。我们的使命是让雇佣值得信赖的专业人士变得简单、透明且便捷。

name: WayFinder News
tagline: Discover what you've been missing
tagline_zh: 发现你一直错过的精彩
description: Readers are drowning in headlines and starving for the whole story, more truthfully. Algorithms narrow what we see. Misinformation blurs what's real. • Learn more about bias & accuracy details of every source in your news feed. • Get the whole story by reading balanced news from Center, Left & Right leaning sides. • Compare & contrast by learning how news sources report differently on the same topic. • Over time, consumers can track their own bias & accuracy consumption.
description_zh: 读者们被标题淹没，却渴望了解更全面的、更真实的新闻。算法限制了我们所看到的内容。虚假信息模糊了事实的真相。• 深入了解您新闻推送中每个来源的偏见和准确性细节。• 通过阅读中立、左倾和右倾的新闻，了解事件的完整情况。• 通过比较不同新闻来源对同一主题的不同报道方式，进行对比分析。• 随着时间的推移，消费者可以追踪自己接触到的偏见和准确性信息。

name: Count My Boxes
tagline: Inventory management you can set up this afternoon
tagline_zh: 库存管理，你可以在今天下午设置好
description: Count My Boxes is the Zoho Inventory alternative built for lean teams: customer self-service sales orders, batch and expiry tracking, multiple storefronts, and a product catalog import that takes minutes. No consultant required. Free to use.
description_zh: Count My Boxes是专为精简团队打造的Zoho Inventory替代方案：支持客户自助服务销售订单、批次和有效期跟踪、多个店面，以及几分钟内即可完成的产品目录导入。无需咨询顾问。免费使用。

name: WebProjectList
tagline: Showcase projects and discover websites from the community.
tagline_zh: 展示项目并从社区中发现网站。
description: Showcase your site for free. Browse 67+ websites: SaaS, blogs, AI tools. Find coupons, get featured. Join the directory.
description_zh: 免费展示您的网站。浏览67+个网站：SaaS、博客、AI工具。查找优惠券，获得特色展示。加入目录。

name: Blinkof.ai
tagline: AI tester for apps built with Cursor, Lovable, Bolt & v0
tagline_zh: 用于测试由Cursor、Lovable、Bolt和v0构建的应用程序的AI测试工具
description: You shipped with Cursor, Lovable, or Bolt. Now let Blinkof.ai check it before your users find the problems. Paste your URL → instant Front Door Report: security, bugs, UX, and product issues scored A–F. Verify ownership → Deep Test: exposed secrets, GDPR gaps, broken APIs, LCP issues. Every finding ships with a paste-ready fix prompt for your builder. Free to start. No install.
description_zh: 您已经使用了Cursor、Lovable或Bolt。现在，在您的用户发现问题之前，让Blinkof.ai先检查一下。粘贴您的网址→即时Front Door报告：安全、漏洞、用户体验和产品问题评分从A到F。验证所有权→深度测试：暴露的秘密、GDPR漏洞、损坏的API、LCP问题。每个发现都会为您的构建者提供一个即贴即用的修复提示。免费开始。无需安装。

name: LETS CHEAT - CLONE OF CLUELY
tagline: clone-cluely, ai-cheater, interview-helper, ai
tagline_zh: 克隆-cluely、人工智能作弊器、面试助手、人工智能
description: A 1-to-1 clone of Cluely and Interview Hacker — a screen- and audio-aware AI assistant (invisible desktop overlay + browser app) with chat, live meeting notes, and history. Powered by Claude. - zkalykov/letscheat
description_zh: Cluely和Interview Hacker的1:1克隆版——一款具备屏幕和音频感知功能的AI助手（隐形桌面覆盖+浏览器应用），支持聊天、实时会议笔记和历史记录。由Claude提供技术支持。- zkalykov/letscheat

name: Siteglade
tagline: AI Website Builder |Specialized in Design, 3D & Landing page
tagline_zh: AI网站建设工具 | 专注于设计、3D及落地页制作
description: GOAL: Build an AI Website builder better than Lovable or Base44. Building a high-end, design-centric website with zero technical background, covering categories like Websites, Landing Pages or 3D Websites.
description_zh: 目标：打造一个优于Lovable或Base44的人工智能网站构建工具。无需任何技术背景，即可构建高端、以设计为中心的网站，涵盖网站、落地页或3D网站等类别。
